title: Visual-Semantic Contrastive Alignment for Few-Shot Image Classification
title_zh: 用于少镜头图像分类的视觉语义对比对齐
comment: ECCV 2022 Workshop on Computer Vision in the Wild
comments: ECCV 2022 Workshop on Computer Vision in the Wild
abstract: Few-Shot learning aims to train and optimize a model that can adapt to unseen visual classes with only a few labeled examples. The existing few-shot learning (FSL) methods, heavily rely only on visual data, thus fail to capture the semantic attributes to learn a more generalized version of the visual concept from very few examples. However, it is a known fact that human visual learning benefits immensely from inputs from multiple modalities such as vision, language, and audio. Inspired by the human learning nature of encapsulating the existing knowledge of a visual category which is in the form of language, we introduce a contrastive alignment mechanism for visual and semantic feature vectors to learn much more generalized visual concepts for few-shot learning. Our method simply adds an auxiliary contrastive learning objective which captures the contextual knowledge of a visual category from a strong textual encoder in addition to the existing training mechanism. Hence, the approach is more generalized and can be plugged into any existing FSL method. The pre-trained semantic feature extractor (learned from a large-scale text corpora) we use in our approach provides a strong contextual prior knowledge to assist FSL. The experimental results done in popular FSL datasets show that our approach is generic in nature and provides a strong boost to the existing FSL baselines.

Our method simply adds an auxiliary contrastive learning objective which captures the contextual knowledge of a visual category from a strong textual encoder in addition to the existing training mechanism. The experimental results done in popular FSL datasets show that our approach is generic in nature and provides a strong boost to the existing FSL baselines.
abstract_zh: Few-Shot 学习旨在训练和优化一个模型，该模型只需少量标记的示例即可适应看不见的视觉类别。现有的小样本学习（FSL）方法严重依赖于视觉数据，因此无法捕获语义属性以从很少的示例中学习更通用的视觉概念版本。然而，众所周知的事实是，人类视觉学习极大地受益于视觉、语言和音频等多种形式的输入。受人类以语言形式封装视觉类别现有知识的学习本质的启发，我们引入了视觉和语义特征向量的对比对齐机制，以学习更广义的视觉概念，以进行少样本学习。我们的方法只是添加了一个辅助对比学习目标，除了现有的训练机制之外，它还从强大的文本编码器捕获视觉类别的上下文知识。因此，该方法更加通用，可以插入任何现有的 FSL 方法中。我们在方法中使用的预先训练的语义特征提取器（从大规模文本语料库中学习）提供了强大的上下文先验知识来协助 FSL。在流行的 FSL 数据集中完成的实验结果表明，我们的方法本质上是通用的，并且为现有的 FSL 基线提供了强大的提升。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合视觉与语义对比对齐的方法，用于提升少样本图像分类的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本学习方法仅依赖视觉数据，难以捕捉语义属性，而人类学习依赖多模态信息（如语言）来增强视觉概念理解。
AI.method: 引入对比对齐机制，通过辅助对比学习目标将视觉特征与预训练文本编码器提取的语义特征对齐，无需修改现有FSL框架。
AI.result: 在主流FSL数据集上实验表明，该方法能有效提升现有基线模型的性能，且具有通用性。
AI.conclusion: 利用预训练语义先验知识的对比对齐方法，可显著增强少样本学习模型的泛化能力，且易于集成到现有方法中。

title: Task Phasing: Automated Curriculum Learning from Demonstrations
title_zh: 任务阶段化：从演示中自动进行课程学习
comment: 7 pages main paper, 7 figures, 4 pages appendix. Submitted to AAAI 2023 Conference
comments: 7 pages main paper, 7 figures, 4 pages appendix. Submitted to AAAI 2023 Conference
abstract: Applying reinforcement learning (RL) to sparse reward domains is notoriously challenging due to insufficient guiding signals. Common RL techniques for addressing such domains include (1) learning from demonstrations and (2) curriculum learning. While these two approaches have been studied in detail, they have rarely been considered together. This paper aims to do so by introducing a principled task phasing approach that uses demonstrations to automatically generate a curriculum sequence. Using inverse RL from (suboptimal) demonstrations we define a simple initial task. Our task phasing approach then provides a framework to gradually increase the complexity of the task all the way to the target task, while retuning the RL agent in each phasing iteration. Two approaches for phasing are considered: (1) gradually increasing the proportion of time steps an RL agent is in control, and (2) phasing out a guiding informative reward function. We present conditions that guarantee the convergence of these approaches to an optimal policy. Experimental results on 3 sparse reward domains demonstrate that our task phasing approaches outperform state-of-the-art approaches with respect to asymptotic performance.
summary: Applying reinforcement learning (RL) to sparse reward domains is notoriously challenging due to insufficient guiding signals. Common RL techniques for addressing such domains include (1) learning from demonstrations and (2) curriculum learning. While these two approaches have been studied in detail, they have rarely been considered together. This paper aims to do so by introducing a principled task phasing approach that uses demonstrations to automatically generate a curriculum sequence. Using inverse RL from (suboptimal) demonstrations we define a simple initial task. Our task phasing approach then provides a framework to gradually increase the complexity of the task all the way to the target task, while retuning the RL agent in each phasing iteration. Two approaches for phasing are considered: (1) gradually increasing the proportion of time steps an RL agent is in control, and (2) phasing out a guiding informative reward function. We present conditions that guarantee the convergence of these approaches to an optimal policy. Experimental results on 3 sparse reward domains demonstrate that our task phasing approaches outperform state-of-the-art approaches with respect to asymptotic performance.
abstract_zh: 由于指导信号不足，将强化学习（RL）应用于稀疏奖励领域是出了名的具有挑战性。用于解决这些领域问题的常见强化学习技术包括 (1) 从演示中学习和 (2) 课程学习。虽然这两种方法已被详细研究，但很少将它们放在一起考虑。本文旨在通过引入一种原则性的任务分阶段方法来实现这一目标，该方法使用演示来自动生成课程序列。使用来自（次优）演示的逆强化学习，我们定义了一个简单的初始任务。然后，我们的任务分阶段方法提供了一个框架，可以逐渐增加任务的复杂性直至目标任务，同时在每个分阶段迭代中重新调整 RL 代理。考虑两种分阶段方法：(1) 逐渐增加 RL 智能体控制的时间步长比例，(2) 逐步取消指导性信息奖励函数。我们提出了保证这些方法收敛到最优政策的条件。 3 个稀疏奖励域的实验结果表明，我们的任务分阶段方法在渐近性能方面优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合模仿学习与课程学习的自动任务分阶段方法，通过演示数据生成渐进式训练序列以解决稀疏奖励领域的强化学习难题。
AI.motivation: 稀疏奖励环境下传统强化学习缺乏有效指导信号，单独使用模仿学习或课程学习存在局限性，亟需融合两者优势的新型训练框架。
AI.method: 基于逆强化学习构建初始任务，通过两种渐进策略（控制时长递增/引导奖励函数退化）动态调整任务难度，并提供理论收敛性证明。
AI.result: 在三个稀疏奖励场景中，该方法在渐近性能上超越现有最先进算法，验证了任务分阶段策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 任务分阶段框架成功统一了模仿学习与课程学习，为稀疏奖励问题提供了兼具理论保证与实践效果的解决方案。

authors_text: Jinman Wei,Jinkun Yao,Guoshan Zhanga,Bin Guan,Yueming Zhang,Shaoquan Wang
title: Semi-supervised object detection based on single-stage detector for thighbone fracture localization
title_zh: 基于单级检测器的半监督目标检测大腿骨骨折定位
comment: Preprint submitted to Applied Soft Computing
comments: Preprint submitted to Applied Soft Computing
abstract: The thighbone is the largest bone supporting the lower body. If the thighbone fracture is not treated in time, it will lead to lifelong inability to walk. Correct diagnosis of thighbone disease is very important in orthopedic medicine. Deep learning is promoting the development of fracture detection technology. However, the existing computer aided diagnosis (CAD) methods baesd on deep learning rely on a large number of manually labeled data, and labeling these data costs a lot of time and energy. Therefore, we develop a object detection method with limited labeled image quantity and apply it to the thighbone fracture localization. In this work, we build a semi-supervised object detection(SSOD) framework based on single-stage detector, which including three modules: adaptive difficult sample oriented (ADSO) module, Fusion Box and deformable expand encoder (Dex encoder). ADSO module takes the classification score as the label reliability evaluation criterion by weighting, Fusion Box is designed to merge similar pseudo boxes into a reliable box for box regression and Dex encoder is proposed to enhance the adaptability of image augmentation. The experiment is conducted on the thighbone fracture dataset, which includes 3484 training thigh fracture images and 358 testing thigh fracture images. The experimental results show that the proposed method achieves the state-of-the-art AP in thighbone fracture detection at different labeled data rates, i.e. 1%, 5% and 10%. Besides, we use full data to achieve knowledge distillation, our method achieves 86.2% AP50 and 52.6% AP75.
summary: The thighbone is the largest bone supporting the lower body. If the thighbone fracture is not treated in time, it will lead to lifelong inability to walk. Correct diagnosis of thighbone disease is very important in orthopedic medicine. Deep learning is promoting the development of fracture detection technology. However, the existing computer aided diagnosis (CAD) methods baesd on deep learning rely on a large number of manually labeled data, and labeling these data costs a lot of time and energy. Therefore, we develop a object detection method with limited labeled image quantity and apply it to the thighbone fracture localization. In this work, we build a semi-supervised object detection(SSOD) framework based on single-stage detector, which including three modules: adaptive difficult sample oriented (ADSO) module, Fusion Box and deformable expand encoder (Dex encoder). ADSO module takes the classification score as the label reliability evaluation criterion by weighting, Fusion Box is designed to merge similar pseudo boxes into a reliable box for box regression and Dex encoder is proposed to enhance the adaptability of image augmentation. The experiment is conducted on the thighbone fracture dataset, which includes 3484 training thigh fracture images and 358 testing thigh fracture images. The experimental results show that the proposed method achieves the state-of-the-art AP in thighbone fracture detection at different labeled data rates, i.e. 1%, 5% and 10%. Besides, we use full data to achieve knowledge distillation, our method achieves 86.2% AP50 and 52.6% AP75.
abstract_zh: 大腿骨是支撑下半身的最大骨头。大腿骨骨折如果不及时治疗，会导致终身无法行走。正确诊断大腿骨疾病在骨科医学中非常重要。深度学习正在推动断裂检测技术的发展。然而，现有的基于深度学习的计算机辅助诊断（CAD）方法依赖于大量手动标记的数据，并且标记这些数据需要花费大量的时间和精力。因此，我们开发了一种具有有限标记图像量的目标检测方法，并将其应用于大腿骨骨折定位。在这项工作中，我们构建了一个基于单级检测器的半监督目标检测（SSOD）框架，该框架包括三个模块：自适应困难样本导向（ADSO）模块、Fusion Box和可变形扩展编码器（Dex编码器）。 ADSO模块通过加权将分类分数作为标签可靠性评估标准，Fusion Box设计将相似的伪框合并为可靠框进行框回归，并提出Dex编码器以增强图像增强的适应性。实验在大腿骨骨折数据集上进行，该数据集包括3484张训练大腿骨折图像和358张测试大腿骨折图像。实验结果表明，该方法在不同标记数据率（1%、5%和10%）下实现了大腿骨骨折检测中最先进的AP。此外，我们使用完整的数据来实现知识蒸馏，我们的方法达到了 86.2% AP50 和 52.6% AP75。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于单阶段检测器的半监督目标检测方法，用于股骨骨折定位。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习辅助诊断方法依赖大量人工标注数据，标注成本高且耗时，需开发低标注量下的有效检测方法。
AI.method: 构建包含自适应困难样本模块（ADSO）、融合框（Fusion Box）和可变形扩展编码器（Dex Encoder）的半监督检测框架，通过伪标签优化与数据增强提升模型性能。
AI.result: 在股骨骨折数据集上，该方法在1%、5%、10%标注数据率下均达到最先进水平，全数据知识蒸馏后AP50为86.2%，AP75为52.6%。
AI.conclusion: 提出的半监督框架有效降低了标注数据依赖性，在有限标注条件下实现了高精度的股骨骨折检测。

search_text: Semi-supervised object detection based on single-stage detector for thighbone fracture localization 基于单级检测器的半监督目标检测大腿骨骨折定位 The thighbone is the largest bone supporting the lower body. If the thighbone fracture is not treated in time, it will lead to lifelong inability to walk. Correct diagnosis of thighbone disease is very important in orthopedic medicine. Deep learning is promoting the development of fracture detection technology. However, the existing computer aided diagnosis (CAD) methods baesd on deep learning rely on a large number of manually labeled data, and labeling these data costs a lot of time and energy. Therefore, we develop a object detection method with limited labeled image quantity and apply it to the thighbone fracture localization. In this work, we build a semi-supervised object detection(SSOD) framework based on single-stage detector, which including three modules: adaptive difficult sample oriented (ADSO) module, Fusion Box and deformable expand encoder (Dex encoder). ADSO module takes the classification score as the label reliability evaluation criterion by weighting, Fusion Box is designed to merge similar pseudo boxes into a reliable box for box regression and Dex encoder is proposed to enhance the adaptability of image augmentation. The experiment is conducted on the thighbone fracture dataset, which includes 3484 training thigh fracture images and 358 testing thigh fracture images. The experimental results show that the proposed method achieves the state-of-the-art AP in thighbone fracture detection at different labeled data rates, i.e. 1%, 5% and 10%. Besides, we use full data to achieve knowledge distillation, our method achieves 86.2% AP50 and 52.6% AP75. 大腿骨是支撑下半身的最大骨头。大腿骨骨折如果不及时治疗，会导致终身无法行走。正确诊断大腿骨疾病在骨科医学中非常重要。深度学习正在推动断裂检测技术的发展。然而，现有的基于深度学习的计算机辅助诊断（CAD）方法依赖于大量手动标记的数据，并且标记这些数据需要花费大量的时间和精力。因此，我们开发了一种具有有限标记图像量的目标检测方法，并将其应用于大腿骨骨折定位。在这项工作中，我们构建了一个基于单级检测器的半监督目标检测（SSOD）框架，该框架包括三个模块：自适应困难样本导向（ADSO）模块、Fusion Box和可变形扩展编码器（Dex编码器）。 ADSO模块通过加权将分类分数作为标签可靠性评估标准，Fusion Box设计将相似的伪框合并为可靠框进行框回归，并提出Dex编码器以增强图像增强的适应性。实验在大腿骨骨折数据集上进行，该数据集包括3484张训练大腿骨折图像和358张测试大腿骨折图像。实验结果表明，该方法在不同标记数据率（1%、5%和10%）下实现了大腿骨骨折检测中最先进的AP。此外，我们使用完整的数据来实现知识蒸馏，我们的方法达到了 86.2% AP50 和 52.6% AP75。 本文提出一种基于单阶段检测器的半监督目标检测方法，用于股骨骨折定位。 Jinman Wei,Jinkun Yao,Guoshan Zhanga,Bin Guan,Yueming Zhang,Shaoquan Wang eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Yisi Sang,Xiangyang Mou,Mo Yu,Dakuo Wang,Jing Li,Jeffrey Stanton
title: MBTI Personality Prediction for Fictional Characters Using Movie Scripts
title_zh: 使用电影脚本对虚构人物进行 MBTI 性格预测
abstract: An NLP model that understands stories should be able to understand the characters in them. To support the development of neural models for this purpose, we construct a benchmark, Story2Personality. The task is to predict a movie character's MBTI or Big 5 personality types based on the narratives of the character. Experiments show that our task is challenging for the existing text classification models, as none is able to largely outperform random guesses. We further proposed a multi-view model for personality prediction using both verbal and non-verbal descriptions, which gives improvement compared to using only verbal descriptions. The uniqueness and challenges in our dataset call for the development of narrative comprehension techniques from the perspective of understanding characters.
summary: An NLP model that understands stories should be able to understand the characters in them. To support the development of neural models for this purpose, we construct a benchmark, Story2Personality. The task is to predict a movie character's MBTI or Big 5 personality types based on the narratives of the character. Experiments show that our task is challenging for the existing text classification models, as none is able to largely outperform random guesses. We further proposed a multi-view model for personality prediction using both verbal and non-verbal descriptions, which gives improvement compared to using only verbal descriptions. The uniqueness and challenges in our dataset call for the development of narrative comprehension techniques from the perspective of understanding characters.
abstract_zh: 理解故事的 NLP 模型应该能够理解故事中的人物。为了支持为此目的开发神经模型，我们构建了一个基准：Story2Personality。任务是根据角色的叙述来预测电影角色的 MBTI 或 Big 5 性格类型。实验表明，我们的任务对于现有的文本分类模型来说是具有挑战性的，因为没有一个模型能够在很大程度上超越随机猜测。我们进一步提出了一种使用言语和非言语描述进行人格预测的多视图模型，与仅使用言语描述相比，该模型有所改进。我们数据集的独特性和挑战要求从理解人物的角度发展叙事理解技术。

AI.tldr: 构建Story2Personality基准数据集，基于电影剧本预测虚构角色的MBTI或大五人格类型
AI.motivation: 现有文本分类模型难以有效预测角色人格类型，需开发叙事理解技术以提升角色分析能力
AI.method: 提出多视角模型，结合语言描述与非语言描述进行人格预测，优于仅使用语言描述的方法
AI.result: 现有模型难以超越随机猜测，多视角模型在预测性能上有所提升
AI.conclusion: 数据集的独特挑战凸显了从角色理解角度开发叙事理解技术的必要性

authors_text: Zeyu Huang,Juzhan Xu,Sisi Dai,Kai Xu,Hao Zhang,Hui Huang,Ruizhen Hu
title: NIFT: Neural Interaction Field and Template for Object Manipulation
title_zh: NIFT：用于对象操作的神经交互场和模板
abstract: We introduce NIFT, Neural Interaction Field and Template, a descriptive and robust interaction representation of object manipulations to facilitate imitation learning. Given a few object manipulation demos, NIFT guides the generation of the interaction imitation for a new object instance by matching the Neural Interaction Template (NIT) extracted from the demos in the target Neural Interaction Field (NIF) defined for the new object. Specifically, the NIF is a neural field that encodes the relationship between each spatial point and a given object, where the relative position is defined by a spherical distance function rather than occupancies or signed distances, which are commonly adopted by conventional neural fields but less informative. For a given demo interaction, the corresponding NIT is defined by a set of spatial points sampled in the demo NIF with associated neural features. To better capture the interaction, the points are sampled on the Interaction Bisector Surface (IBS), which consists of points that are equidistant to the two interacting objects and has been used extensively for interaction representation. With both point selection and pointwise features defined for better interaction encoding, NIT effectively guides the feature matching in the NIFs of the new object instances such that the relative poses are optimized to realize the manipulation while imitating the demo interactions. Experiments show that our NIFT solution outperforms state-of-the-art imitation learning methods for object manipulation and generalizes better to objects from new categories.
summary: We introduce NIFT, Neural Interaction Field and Template, a descriptive and robust interaction representation of object manipulations to facilitate imitation learning. Given a few object manipulation demos, NIFT guides the generation of the interaction imitation for a new object instance by matching the Neural Interaction Template (NIT) extracted from the demos in the target Neural Interaction Field (NIF) defined for the new object. Specifically, the NIF is a neural field that encodes the relationship between each spatial point and a given object, where the relative position is defined by a spherical distance function rather than occupancies or signed distances, which are commonly adopted by conventional neural fields but less informative. For a given demo interaction, the corresponding NIT is defined by a set of spatial points sampled in the demo NIF with associated neural features. To better capture the interaction, the points are sampled on the Interaction Bisector Surface (IBS), which consists of points that are equidistant to the two interacting objects and has been used extensively for interaction representation. With both point selection and pointwise features defined for better interaction encoding, NIT effectively guides the feature matching in the NIFs of the new object instances such that the relative poses are optimized to realize the manipulation while imitating the demo interactions. Experiments show that our NIFT solution outperforms state-of-the-art imitation learning methods for object manipulation and generalizes better to objects from new categories.
abstract_zh: 我们引入 NIFT（神经交互场和模板），这是一种描述性且鲁棒的对象操作交互表示，以促进模仿学习。给定一些对象操作演示，NIFT 通过匹配从演示中提取的神经交互模板 (NIT) 来指导为新对象定义的目标神经交互场 (NIF) 中的交互模仿的生成。具体来说，NIF 是一个神经场，它对每个空间点和给定对象之间的关系进行编码，其中相对位置由球面距离函数定义，而不是由占用或有符号距离定义，后者通常被传统神经场采用，但信息量较少。对于给定的演示交互，相应的 NIT 由演示 NIF 中采样的一组空间点以及相关的神经特征定义。为了更好地捕获交互，在交互平分面 (IBS) 上对点进行采样，该曲面由与两个交互对象等距的点组成，并已广泛用于交互表示。通过为更好的交互编码定义点选择和逐点特征，NIT 有效地指导新对象实例的 NIF 中的特征匹配，从而优化相对姿势以在模仿演示交互的同时实现操作。实验表明，我们的 NIFT 解决方案在对象操作方面优于最先进的模仿学习方法，并且可以更好地推广到新类别的对象。

AI.tldr: 提出NIFT方法，通过神经交互场和模板实现物体操作的模仿学习。
AI.motivation: 现有神经场方法依赖occupancies或signed distances表示交互关系，但信息量不足，难以有效指导新物体的操作模仿。
AI.method: 构建目标物体的神经交互场（NIF）与模板（NIT），通过交互双曲面（IBS）采样点并提取神经特征，匹配演示中的NIT以优化新物体的相对姿态。
AI.result: 实验表明NIFT在物体操作模仿任务中优于现有方法，并具有更好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: NIFT通过球面距离函数和IBS采样机制，提供了更精确的交互表示，推动了模仿学习在物体操作领域的应用。

search_text: NIFT: Neural Interaction Field and Template for Object Manipulation NIFT：用于对象操作的神经交互场和模板 We introduce NIFT, Neural Interaction Field and Template, a descriptive and robust interaction representation of object manipulations to facilitate imitation learning. Given a few object manipulation demos, NIFT guides the generation of the interaction imitation for a new object instance by matching the Neural Interaction Template (NIT) extracted from the demos in the target Neural Interaction Field (NIF) defined for the new object. Specifically, the NIF is a neural field that encodes the relationship between each spatial point and a given object, where the relative position is defined by a spherical distance function rather than occupancies or signed distances, which are commonly adopted by conventional neural fields but less informative. For a given demo interaction, the corresponding NIT is defined by a set of spatial points sampled in the demo NIF with associated neural features. To better capture the interaction, the points are sampled on the Interaction Bisector Surface (IBS), which consists of points that are equidistant to the two interacting objects and has been used extensively for interaction representation. With both point selection and pointwise features defined for better interaction encoding, NIT effectively guides the feature matching in the NIFs of the new object instances such that the relative poses are optimized to realize the manipulation while imitating the demo interactions. Experiments show that our NIFT solution outperforms state-of-the-art imitation learning methods for object manipulation and generalizes better to objects from new categories. 我们引入 NIFT（神经交互场和模板），这是一种描述性且鲁棒的对象操作交互表示，以促进模仿学习。给定一些对象操作演示，NIFT 通过匹配从演示中提取的神经交互模板 (NIT) 来指导为新对象定义的目标神经交互场 (NIF) 中的交互模仿的生成。具体来说，NIF 是一个神经场，它对每个空间点和给定对象之间的关系进行编码，其中相对位置由球面距离函数定义，而不是由占用或有符号距离定义，后者通常被传统神经场采用，但信息量较少。对于给定的演示交互，相应的 NIT 由演示 NIF 中采样的一组空间点以及相关的神经特征定义。为了更好地捕获交互，在交互平分面 (IBS) 上对点进行采样，该曲面由与两个交互对象等距的点组成，并已广泛用于交互表示。通过为更好的交互编码定义点选择和逐点特征，NIT 有效地指导新对象实例的 NIF 中的特征匹配，从而优化相对姿势以在模仿演示交互的同时实现操作。实验表明，我们的 NIFT 解决方案在对象操作方面优于最先进的模仿学习方法，并且可以更好地推广到新类别的对象。 提出NIFT方法，通过神经交互场和模板实现物体操作的模仿学习。 Zeyu Huang,Juzhan Xu,Sisi Dai,Kai Xu,Hao Zhang,Hui Huang,Ruizhen Hu cs.RO,cs.CV,cs.GR

authors_text: Jee-weon Jung,Hee-Soo Heo,Bong-Jin Lee,Jaesong Lee,Hye-jin Shim,Youngki Kwon,Joon Son Chung,Shinji Watanabe
title: Large-scale learning of generalised representations for speaker recognition
title_zh: 用于说话人识别的广义表示的大规模学习
abstract: The objective of this work is to develop a speaker recognition model to be used in diverse scenarios. We hypothesise that two components should be adequately configured to build such a model. First, adequate architecture would be required. We explore several recent state-of-the-art models, including ECAPA-TDNN and MFA-Conformer, as well as other baselines. Second, a massive amount of data would be required. We investigate several new training data configurations combining a few existing datasets. The most extensive configuration includes over 87k speakers' 10.22k hours of speech. Four evaluation protocols are adopted to measure how the trained model performs in diverse scenarios. Through experiments, we find that MFA-Conformer with the least inductive bias generalises the best. We also show that training with proposed large data configurations gives better performance. A boost in generalisation is observed, where the average performance on four evaluation protocols improves by more than 20%. In addition, we also demonstrate that these models' performances can improve even further when increasing capacity.
summary: The objective of this work is to develop a speaker recognition model to be used in diverse scenarios. We hypothesise that two components should be adequately configured to build such a model. First, adequate architecture would be required. We explore several recent state-of-the-art models, including ECAPA-TDNN and MFA-Conformer, as well as other baselines. Second, a massive amount of data would be required. We investigate several new training data configurations combining a few existing datasets. The most extensive configuration includes over 87k speakers' 10.22k hours of speech. Four evaluation protocols are adopted to measure how the trained model performs in diverse scenarios. Through experiments, we find that MFA-Conformer with the least inductive bias generalises the best. We also show that training with proposed large data configurations gives better performance. A boost in generalisation is observed, where the average performance on four evaluation protocols improves by more than 20%. In addition, we also demonstrate that these models' performances can improve even further when increasing capacity.
abstract_zh: 这项工作的目标是开发一个可用于不同场景的说话人识别模型。我们假设应该充分配置两个组件来构建这样的模型。首先，需要足够的架构。我们探索了几种最新的最先进模型，包括 ECAPA-TDNN 和 MFA-Conformer，以及其他基线。其次，需要大量的数据。我们研究了几种新的训练数据配置，结合了一些现有的数据集。最广泛的配置包括超过 87,000 名演讲者，10,220 小时的演讲时间。采用四种评估协议来衡量训练后的模型在不同场景中的表现。通过实验，我们发现具有最小归纳偏差的 MFA-Conformer 泛化效果最好。我们还表明，使用建议的大数据配置进行训练可以提供更好的性能。我们观察到泛化能力得到提升，四种评估协议的平均性能提高了 20% 以上。此外，我们还证明，当容量增加时，这些模型的性能可以进一步提高。

AI.tldr: 开发适用于多种场景的说话人识别模型，通过优化模型架构和大规模数据训练提升泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有说话人识别模型在不同场景下表现不稳定，需构建更具通用性的模型以适应多样化应用需求。
AI.method: 对比ECAPA-TDNN、MFA-Conformer等先进架构，结合多数据集构建超87k说话人、10.22k小时语音的训练集，并采用四种评估协议验证性能。
AI.result: MFA-Conformer在四种评估协议中平均性能提升超20%，且模型容量增加进一步优化了结果。
AI.conclusion: 合理设计模型架构配合大规模数据训练可显著提升说话人识别的泛化能力，未来研究可聚焦于更大容量模型优化。

authors_text: Yuying Hao,Yi Liu,Juncai Peng,Haoyi Xiong,Guowei Chen,Shiyu Tang,Zeyu Chen,Baohua Lai
title: RAIS: Robust and Accurate Interactive Segmentation via Continual Learning
title_zh: RAIS：通过持续学习实现稳健且准确的交互式细分
abstract: Interactive image segmentation aims at segmenting a target region through a way of human-computer interaction. Recent works based on deep learning have achieved excellent performance, while most of them focus on improving the accuracy of the training set and ignore potential improvement on the test set. In the inference phase, they tend to have a good performance on similar domains to the training set, and lack adaptability to domain shift, so they require more user efforts to obtain satisfactory results. In this work, we propose RAIS, a robust and accurate architecture for interactive segmentation with continuous learning, where the model can learn from both train and test data sets. For efficient learning on the test set, we propose a novel optimization strategy to update global and local parameters with a basic segmentation module and adaptation module, respectively. Moreover, we perform extensive experiments on several benchmarks that show our method can handle data distribution shifts and achieves SOTA performance compared with recent interactive segmentation methods. Besides, our method also shows its robustness in the datasets of remote sensing and medical imaging where the data domains are completely different between training and testing.
summary: Interactive image segmentation aims at segmenting a target region through a way of human-computer interaction. Recent works based on deep learning have achieved excellent performance, while most of them focus on improving the accuracy of the training set and ignore potential improvement on the test set. In the inference phase, they tend to have a good performance on similar domains to the training set, and lack adaptability to domain shift, so they require more user efforts to obtain satisfactory results. In this work, we propose RAIS, a robust and accurate architecture for interactive segmentation with continuous learning, where the model can learn from both train and test data sets. For efficient learning on the test set, we propose a novel optimization strategy to update global and local parameters with a basic segmentation module and adaptation module, respectively. Moreover, we perform extensive experiments on several benchmarks that show our method can handle data distribution shifts and achieves SOTA performance compared with recent interactive segmentation methods. Besides, our method also shows its robustness in the datasets of remote sensing and medical imaging where the data domains are completely different between training and testing.
abstract_zh: 交互式图像分割旨在通过人机交互的方式分割目标区域。最近基于深度学习的工作取得了优异的性能，但大多数都专注于提高训练集的准确性，而忽略了测试集的潜在改进。在推理阶段，它们往往在与训练集相似的领域上具有良好的性能，并且缺乏对领域转移的适应性，因此需要更多的用户努力才能获得满意的结果。在这项工作中，我们提出了 RAIS，这是一种稳健且准确的架构，用于通过持续学习进行交互式分割，其中模型可以从训练数据集和测试数据集中学习。为了在测试集上进行有效学习，我们提出了一种新颖的优化策略，分别使用基本分割模块和适应模块来更新全局和局部参数。此外，我们对多个基准进行了广泛的实验，表明与最近的交互式分割方法相比，我们的方法可以处理数据分布变化并实现 SOTA 性能。此外，我们的方法还显示了其在遥感和医学成像数据集中的鲁棒性，其中训练和测试的数据域完全不同。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RAIS，一种通过持续学习实现鲁棒且精确交互式分割的架构，使模型能从训练集和测试集共同学习以提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在训练集上表现优异，但面对测试集领域偏移时适应性不足，需更多用户交互才能获得满意结果。
AI.method: 设计包含基础分割模块和适配模块的架构，通过新颖优化策略分别更新全局和局部参数，实现测试集的高效持续学习。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中达到SOTA性能，尤其在遥感与医学影像等训练测试领域差异大的数据集上展现鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: RAIS通过持续学习有效应对领域偏移，在保持精度的同时减少用户交互需求，适用于跨领域分割任务。

authors_text: Zhicong Huang,Jingwen Zhao,Zhijie Zheng,Dihu Chena,Haifeng Hu
title: PSA-Det3D: Pillar Set Abstraction for 3D object Detection
title_zh: PSA-Det3D：用于 3D 物体检测的支柱集抽象
abstract: Small object detection for 3D point cloud is a challenging problem because of two limitations: (1) Perceiving small objects is much more diffcult than normal objects due to the lack of valid points. (2) Small objects are easily blocked which breaks the shape of their meshes in 3D point cloud. In this paper, we propose a pillar set abstraction (PSA) and foreground point compensation (FPC) and design a point-based detection network, PSA-Det3D, to improve the detection performance for small object. The PSA embeds a pillar query operation on the basis of set abstraction (SA) to expand its receptive field of the network, which can aggregate point-wise features effectively. To locate more occluded objects, we persent a proposal generation layer consisting of a foreground point segmentation and a FPC module. Both the foreground points and the estimated centers are finally fused together to generate the detection result. The experiments on the KITTI 3D detection benchmark show that our proposed PSA-Det3D outperforms other algorithms with high accuracy for small object detection.
summary: Small object detection for 3D point cloud is a challenging problem because of two limitations: (1) Perceiving small objects is much more diffcult than normal objects due to the lack of valid points. (2) Small objects are easily blocked which breaks the shape of their meshes in 3D point cloud. In this paper, we propose a pillar set abstraction (PSA) and foreground point compensation (FPC) and design a point-based detection network, PSA-Det3D, to improve the detection performance for small object. The PSA embeds a pillar query operation on the basis of set abstraction (SA) to expand its receptive field of the network, which can aggregate point-wise features effectively. To locate more occluded objects, we persent a proposal generation layer consisting of a foreground point segmentation and a FPC module. Both the foreground points and the estimated centers are finally fused together to generate the detection result. The experiments on the KITTI 3D detection benchmark show that our proposed PSA-Det3D outperforms other algorithms with high accuracy for small object detection.
abstract_zh: 3D 点云的小物体检测是一个具有挑战性的问题，因为有两个限制：（1）由于缺乏有效点，感知小物体比普通物体困难得多。 (2) 小物体很容易被遮挡，从而破坏 3D 点云中网格的形状。在本文中，我们提出了支柱集抽象（PSA）和前景点补偿（FPC），并设计了基于点的检测网络PSA-Det3D，以提高小物体的检测性能。 PSA在集合抽象（SA）的基础上嵌入了支柱查询操作来扩展其网络的感受野，可以有效地聚合逐点特征。为了定位更多被遮挡的物体，我们提出了一个由前景点分割和 FPC 模块组成的提议生成层。前景点和估计中心最终融合在一起生成检测结果。 KITTI 3D 检测基准上的实验表明，我们提出的 PSA-Det3D 在小物体检测方面优于其他算法，具有高精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PSA-Det3D方法，通过改进点云中小物体检测的性能，解决因点数不足和遮挡导致的检测难题。
AI.motivation: 3D点云中小物体检测面临两点挑战：有效点不足导致感知困难，以及遮挡导致网格形状断裂，现有方法难以准确检测。
AI.method: 设计了柱状集抽象（PSA）和前景点补偿（FPC）模块，通过扩展网络感受野并融合前景点与估计中心，生成检测结果。
AI.result: 在KITTI 3D检测基准测试中，PSA-Det3D在小物体检测精度上优于其他算法。
AI.conclusion: PSA-Det3D通过PSA和FPC模块有效解决了小物体检测中的点不足和遮挡问题，提升了检测性能。

search_text: PSA-Det3D: Pillar Set Abstraction for 3D object Detection PSA-Det3D：用于 3D 物体检测的支柱集抽象 Small object detection for 3D point cloud is a challenging problem because of two limitations: (1) Perceiving small objects is much more diffcult than normal objects due to the lack of valid points. (2) Small objects are easily blocked which breaks the shape of their meshes in 3D point cloud. In this paper, we propose a pillar set abstraction (PSA) and foreground point compensation (FPC) and design a point-based detection network, PSA-Det3D, to improve the detection performance for small object. The PSA embeds a pillar query operation on the basis of set abstraction (SA) to expand its receptive field of the network, which can aggregate point-wise features effectively. To locate more occluded objects, we persent a proposal generation layer consisting of a foreground point segmentation and a FPC module. Both the foreground points and the estimated centers are finally fused together to generate the detection result. The experiments on the KITTI 3D detection benchmark show that our proposed PSA-Det3D outperforms other algorithms with high accuracy for small object detection. 3D 点云的小物体检测是一个具有挑战性的问题，因为有两个限制：（1）由于缺乏有效点，感知小物体比普通物体困难得多。 (2) 小物体很容易被遮挡，从而破坏 3D 点云中网格的形状。在本文中，我们提出了支柱集抽象（PSA）和前景点补偿（FPC），并设计了基于点的检测网络PSA-Det3D，以提高小物体的检测性能。 PSA在集合抽象（SA）的基础上嵌入了支柱查询操作来扩展其网络的感受野，可以有效地聚合逐点特征。为了定位更多被遮挡的物体，我们提出了一个由前景点分割和 FPC 模块组成的提议生成层。前景点和估计中心最终融合在一起生成检测结果。 KITTI 3D 检测基准上的实验表明，我们提出的 PSA-Det3D 在小物体检测方面优于其他算法，具有高精度。 本文提出PSA-Det3D方法，通过改进点云中小物体检测的性能，解决因点数不足和遮挡导致的检测难题。 Zhicong Huang,Jingwen Zhao,Zhijie Zheng,Dihu Chena,Haifeng Hu cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Liangrui Pan,Lian Wang,Zhichao Feng,Zhujun Xu,Liwen Xu,Shaoliang Peng
title: MGTUNet: An new UNet for colon nuclei instance segmentation and quantification
title_zh: MGTUNet：用于结肠核实例分割和量化的新 UNet
abstract: Colorectal cancer (CRC) is among the top three malignant tumor types in terms of morbidity and mortality. Histopathological images are the gold standard for diagnosing colon cancer. Cellular nuclei instance segmentation and classification, and nuclear component regression tasks can aid in the analysis of the tumor microenvironment in colon tissue. Traditional methods are still unable to handle both types of tasks end-to-end at the same time, and have poor prediction accuracy and high application costs. This paper proposes a new UNet model for handling nuclei based on the UNet framework, called MGTUNet, which uses Mish, Group normalization and transposed convolution layer to improve the segmentation model, and a ranger optimizer to adjust the SmoothL1Loss values. Secondly, it uses different channels to segment and classify different types of nucleus, ultimately completing the nuclei instance segmentation and classification task, and the nuclei component regression task simultaneously. Finally, we did extensive comparison experiments using eight segmentation models. By comparing the three evaluation metrics and the parameter sizes of the models, MGTUNet obtained 0.6254 on PQ, 0.6359 on mPQ, and 0.8695 on R2. Thus, the experiments demonstrated that MGTUNet is now a state-of-the-art method for quantifying histopathological images of colon cancer.
summary: Colorectal cancer (CRC) is among the top three malignant tumor types in terms of morbidity and mortality. Histopathological images are the gold standard for diagnosing colon cancer. Cellular nuclei instance segmentation and classification, and nuclear component regression tasks can aid in the analysis of the tumor microenvironment in colon tissue. Traditional methods are still unable to handle both types of tasks end-to-end at the same time, and have poor prediction accuracy and high application costs. This paper proposes a new UNet model for handling nuclei based on the UNet framework, called MGTUNet, which uses Mish, Group normalization and transposed convolution layer to improve the segmentation model, and a ranger optimizer to adjust the SmoothL1Loss values. Secondly, it uses different channels to segment and classify different types of nucleus, ultimately completing the nuclei instance segmentation and classification task, and the nuclei component regression task simultaneously. Finally, we did extensive comparison experiments using eight segmentation models. By comparing the three evaluation metrics and the parameter sizes of the models, MGTUNet obtained 0.6254 on PQ, 0.6359 on mPQ, and 0.8695 on R2. Thus, the experiments demonstrated that MGTUNet is now a state-of-the-art method for quantifying histopathological images of colon cancer.
abstract_zh: 结直肠癌（CRC）是发病率和死亡率排名前三位的恶性肿瘤。组织病理学图像是诊断结肠癌的金标准。细胞核实例分割和分类以及核成分回归任务可以帮助分析结肠组织中的肿瘤微环境。传统方法仍然无法同时端到端地处理两类任务，并且预测精度较差，应用成本较高。本文提出了一种基于 UNet 框架的新的处理细胞核的 UNet 模型，称为 MGTUNet，它使用 Mish、Group Normalization 和转置卷积层来改进分割模型，并使用 Ranger 优化器来调整 SmoothL1Loss 值。其次，它使用不同的通道对不同类型的核进行分割和分类，最终同时完成核实例分割和分类任务以及核成分回归任务。最后，我们使用八种分割模型进行了广泛的比较实验。通过比较三个评估指标和模型的参数大小，MGTUNet 在 PQ 上获得 0.6254，在 mPQ 上获得 0.6359，在 R2 上获得 0.8695。因此，实验证明 MGTUNet 现在是量化结肠癌组织病理学图像的最先进方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MGTUNet模型，用于结肠癌组织病理图像中细胞核的实例分割、分类及成分回归任务。
AI.motivation: 传统方法无法同时端到端处理核分割与分类任务，且存在预测精度低、应用成本高的问题。
AI.method: 基于UNet框架，引入Mish激活函数、组归一化和转置卷积层优化模型，采用Ranger优化器调整损失函数，并通过多通道实现核分割与分类的联合任务。
AI.result: 在八种分割模型对比实验中，MGTUNet达到PQ=0.6254、mPQ=0.6359、R2=0.8695的指标，验证了其优越性。
AI.conclusion: MGTUNet在结肠癌组织病理图像量化任务中达到当前最优水平，为肿瘤微环境分析提供有效工具。

title: Improving Segmentation of Breast Ultrasound Images: Semi Automatic Two Pointers Histogram Splitting Technique
title_zh: 改善乳腺超声图像的分割：半自动两指针直方图分割技术
abstract: Automatically segmenting lesion area in breast ultrasound (BUS) images is a challenging one due to its noise, speckle and artifacts. Edge-map of BUS images also does not help because in most cases the edge-map gives no information whatsoever. Almost all segmentation technique takes the edge-map of the image as its first step, though there are a few algorithms that try to avoid edge-maps as well. Improving the edge-map of breast ultrasound images theoretically improves the chances of automatic segmentation to be more precise. In this paper, we propose a semi-automatic technique of histogram splitting using two pointers. Here the user only has to select two initially guessed points denoting a circle on the region of interest (ROI). The method will automatically study the internal histogram and split it using two pointers. The output BUS image has improved edge-map and ultimately the segmentation on it is better compared to regular segmentation using same algorithm and same initialization. Also, we further processed the edge-map to have less edge-pixels to area ratio, improving the homogeneity and the chances of easy segmentation in the future.
summary: Automatically segmenting lesion area in breast ultrasound (BUS) images is a challenging one due to its noise, speckle and artifacts. Edge-map of BUS images also does not help because in most cases the edge-map gives no information whatsoever. Almost all segmentation technique takes the edge-map of the image as its first step, though there are a few algorithms that try to avoid edge-maps as well. Improving the edge-map of breast ultrasound images theoretically improves the chances of automatic segmentation to be more precise. In this paper, we propose a semi-automatic technique of histogram splitting using two pointers. Here the user only has to select two initially guessed points denoting a circle on the region of interest (ROI). The method will automatically study the internal histogram and split it using two pointers. The output BUS image has improved edge-map and ultimately the segmentation on it is better compared to regular segmentation using same algorithm and same initialization. Also, we further processed the edge-map to have less edge-pixels to area ratio, improving the homogeneity and the chances of easy segmentation in the future.
abstract_zh: 由于存在噪声、斑点和伪影，自动分割乳腺超声 (BUS) 图像中的病变区域是一项具有挑战性的工作。总线图像的边缘图也没有帮助，因为在大多数情况下边缘图不提供任何信息。几乎所有分割技术都将图像的边缘图作为第一步，尽管有一些算法也试图避免边缘图。理论上，改进乳腺超声图像的边缘图可以提高自动分割更精确的机会。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用两个指针的半自动直方图分割技术。在这里，用户只需选择两个最初猜测的点来表示感兴趣区域 (ROI) 上的一个圆圈。该方法将自动研究内部直方图并使用两个指针将其分割。输出 BUS 图像改进了边缘图，最终其分割比使用相同算法和相同初始化的常规分割更好。此外，我们进一步处理边缘图，以减少边缘像素与面积的比率，从而提高均匀性和将来轻松分割的机会。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半自动双指针直方图分割技术，用于提升乳腺超声图像中病灶区域的分割精度。
AI.motivation: 乳腺超声图像因噪声、斑点和伪影导致自动分割困难，传统边缘图信息不足且分割效果有限，需改进边缘图质量以提升分割准确性。
AI.method: 用户标记感兴趣区域的两个初始点，算法通过双指针自动分析直方图并分割，优化边缘图后降低边缘像素与区域比例，增强分割可行性。
AI.result: 改进后的边缘图使分割效果优于传统方法，且处理后的边缘图具有更高均匀性，为后续分割提供更优基础。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过半自动直方图分割有效提升乳腺超声图像边缘图质量，为精准分割提供可行方案，具有临床应用潜力。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 该方法通过半自动直方图分割有效提升乳腺超声图像边缘图质量，为精准分割提供可行方案，具有临床应用潜力。

tldr: 本文提出一种半自动双指针直方图分割技术，用于提升乳腺超声图像中病灶区域的分割精度。
motivation: 乳腺超声图像因噪声、斑点和伪影导致自动分割困难，传统边缘图信息不足且分割效果有限，需改进边缘图质量以提升分割准确性。
method: 用户标记感兴趣区域的两个初始点，算法通过双指针自动分析直方图并分割，优化边缘图后降低边缘像素与区域比例，增强分割可行性。
result: 改进后的边缘图使分割效果优于传统方法，且处理后的边缘图具有更高均匀性，为后续分割提供更优基础。
conclusion: 该方法通过半自动直方图分割有效提升乳腺超声图像边缘图质量，为精准分割提供可行方案，具有临床应用潜力。
search_text: Improving Segmentation of Breast Ultrasound Images: Semi Automatic Two Pointers Histogram Splitting Technique 改善乳腺超声图像的分割：半自动两指针直方图分割技术 Automatically segmenting lesion area in breast ultrasound (BUS) images is a challenging one due to its noise, speckle and artifacts. Edge-map of BUS images also does not help because in most cases the edge-map gives no information whatsoever. Almost all segmentation technique takes the edge-map of the image as its first step, though there are a few algorithms that try to avoid edge-maps as well. Improving the edge-map of breast ultrasound images theoretically improves the chances of automatic segmentation to be more precise. In this paper, we propose a semi-automatic technique of histogram splitting using two pointers. Here the user only has to select two initially guessed points denoting a circle on the region of interest (ROI). The method will automatically study the internal histogram and split it using two pointers. The output BUS image has improved edge-map and ultimately the segmentation on it is better compared to regular segmentation using same algorithm and same initialization. Also, we further processed the edge-map to have less edge-pixels to area ratio, improving the homogeneity and the chances of easy segmentation in the future. 由于存在噪声、斑点和伪影，自动分割乳腺超声 (BUS) 图像中的病变区域是一项具有挑战性的工作。总线图像的边缘图也没有帮助，因为在大多数情况下边缘图不提供任何信息。几乎所有分割技术都将图像的边缘图作为第一步，尽管有一些算法也试图避免边缘图。理论上，改进乳腺超声图像的边缘图可以提高自动分割更精确的机会。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用两个指针的半自动直方图分割技术。在这里，用户只需选择两个最初猜测的点来表示感兴趣区域 (ROI) 上的一个圆圈。该方法将自动研究内部直方图并使用两个指针将其分割。输出 BUS 图像改进了边缘图，最终其分割比使用相同算法和相同初始化的常规分割更好。此外，我们进一步处理边缘图，以减少边缘像素与面积的比率，从而提高均匀性和将来轻松分割的机会。 本文提出一种半自动双指针直方图分割技术，用于提升乳腺超声图像中病灶区域的分割精度。 Rasheed Abid,S. Kaisar Alam eess.IV,cs.CV

title: A Multimodal Sensor Fusion Framework Robust to Missing Modalities for Person Recognition
title_zh: 一种对人识别缺失模态具有鲁棒性的多模态传感器融合框架
abstract: Utilizing the sensor characteristics of the audio, visible camera, and thermal camera, the robustness of person recognition can be enhanced. Existing multimodal person recognition frameworks are primarily formulated assuming that multimodal data is always available. In this paper, we propose a novel trimodal sensor fusion framework using the audio, visible, and thermal camera, which addresses the missing modality problem. In the framework, a novel deep latent embedding framework, termed the AVTNet, is proposed to learn multiple latent embeddings. Also, a novel loss function, termed missing modality loss, accounts for possible missing modalities based on the triplet loss calculation while learning the individual latent embeddings. Additionally, a joint latent embedding utilizing the trimodal data is learnt using the multi-head attention transformer, which assigns attention weights to the different modalities. The different latent embeddings are subsequently used to train a deep neural network. The proposed framework is validated on the Speaking Faces dataset. A comparative analysis with baseline algorithms shows that the proposed framework significantly increases the person recognition accuracy while accounting for missing modalities.
summary: Utilizing the sensor characteristics of the audio, visible camera, and thermal camera, the robustness of person recognition can be enhanced. Existing multimodal person recognition frameworks are primarily formulated assuming that multimodal data is always available. In this paper, we propose a novel trimodal sensor fusion framework using the audio, visible, and thermal camera, which addresses the missing modality problem. In the framework, a novel deep latent embedding framework, termed the AVTNet, is proposed to learn multiple latent embeddings. Also, a novel loss function, termed missing modality loss, accounts for possible missing modalities based on the triplet loss calculation while learning the individual latent embeddings. Additionally, a joint latent embedding utilizing the trimodal data is learnt using the multi-head attention transformer, which assigns attention weights to the different modalities. The different latent embeddings are subsequently used to train a deep neural network. The proposed framework is validated on the Speaking Faces dataset. A comparative analysis with baseline algorithms shows that the proposed framework significantly increases the person recognition accuracy while accounting for missing modalities.
abstract_zh: 利用音频、可见光相机和热感相机的传感器特性，可以增强人员识别的鲁棒性。现有的多模态人员识别框架主要是假设多模态数据始终可用的情况下制定的。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用音频、可见光和热感相机的新型三模态传感器融合框架，解决了模态缺失的问题。在该框架中，提出了一种新颖的深度潜在嵌入框架（称为 AVTNet）来学习多个潜在嵌入。此外，一种新颖的损失函数，称为缺失模态损失，在学习个体潜在嵌入的同时，根据三元组损失计算来解释可能缺失的模态。此外，利用多头注意力变换器学习利用三模态数据的联合潜在嵌入，该变换器将注意力权重分配给不同的模态。随后使用不同的潜在嵌入来训练深度神经网络。所提出的框架在 Talking Faces 数据集上得到了验证。与基线算法的比较分析表明，所提出的框架在考虑缺失模态的同时显着提高了人物识别的准确性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种鲁棒处理缺失模态的三模态传感器融合框架，用于提升人脸识别的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态人脸识别框架假设所有模态数据均可用，但实际场景中常出现模态缺失导致性能下降的问题。
AI.method: 设计AVTNet网络学习多模态潜在嵌入，结合缺失模态损失函数与多头注意力Transformer实现模态权重分配与联合嵌入学习。
AI.result: 在Speaking Faces数据集上验证，相较基线方法显著提升缺失模态情况下的识别准确率。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了多模态数据缺失问题，为实际复杂环境下的身份识别提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。

title: Optimal Settings for Cryptocurrency Trading Pairs
title_zh: 加密货币交易对的优化设置
abstract: The goal of cryptocurrencies is decentralization. In principle, all currencies have equal status. Unlike traditional stock markets, there is no default currency of denomination (fiat), thus the trading pairs can be set freely. However, it is impractical to set up a trading market between every two currencies. In order to control management costs and ensure sufficient liquidity, we must give priority to covering those large-volume trading pairs and ensure that all coins are reachable. We note that this is an optimization problem. Its particularity lies in: 1) the trading volume between most (>99.5%) possible trading pairs cannot be directly observed. 2) It satisfies the connectivity constraint, that is, all currencies are guaranteed to be tradable. To solve this problem, we use a two-stage process: 1) Fill in missing values based on a regularized, truncated eigenvalue decomposition, where the regularization term is used to control what extent missing values should be limited to zero. 2) Search for the optimal trading pairs, based on a branch and bound process, with heuristic search and pruning strategies. The experimental results show that: 1) If the number of denominated coins is not limited, we will get a more decentralized trading pair settings, which advocates the establishment of trading pairs directly between large currency pairs. 2) There is a certain room for optimization in all exchanges. The setting of inappropriate trading pairs is mainly caused by subjectively setting small coins to quote, or failing to track emerging big coins in time. 3) Too few trading pairs will lead to low coverage; too many trading pairs will need to be adjusted with markets frequently. Exchanges should consider striking an appropriate balance between them.
summary: The goal of cryptocurrencies is decentralization. In principle, all currencies have equal status. Unlike traditional stock markets, there is no default currency of denomination (fiat), thus the trading pairs can be set freely. However, it is impractical to set up a trading market between every two currencies. In order to control management costs and ensure sufficient liquidity, we must give priority to covering those large-volume trading pairs and ensure that all coins are reachable. We note that this is an optimization problem. Its particularity lies in: 1) the trading volume between most (>99.5%) possible trading pairs cannot be directly observed. 2) It satisfies the connectivity constraint, that is, all currencies are guaranteed to be tradable. To solve this problem, we use a two-stage process: 1) Fill in missing values based on a regularized, truncated eigenvalue decomposition, where the regularization term is used to control what extent missing values should be limited to zero. 2) Search for the optimal trading pairs, based on a branch and bound process, with heuristic search and pruning strategies. The experimental results show that: 1) If the number of denominated coins is not limited, we will get a more decentralized trading pair settings, which advocates the establishment of trading pairs directly between large currency pairs. 2) There is a certain room for optimization in all exchanges. The setting of inappropriate trading pairs is mainly caused by subjectively setting small coins to quote, or failing to track emerging big coins in time. 3) Too few trading pairs will lead to low coverage; too many trading pairs will need to be adjusted with markets frequently. Exchanges should consider striking an appropriate balance between them.
abstract_zh: 加密货币的目标是去中心化。原则上，所有货币都具有平等地位。与传统股票市场不同，没有默认的计价货币（法定货币），因此交易对可以自由设置。然而，每两种货币之间建立一个交易市场是不切实际的。为了控制管理成本，保证充足的流动性，我们要优先覆盖那些交易量大的交易对，保证所有币都可达。我们注意到这是一个优化问题。其特殊性在于：1）大多数（>99.5%）可能的交易对之间的交易量无法直接观察。 2）满足连通性约束，即保证所有币种都可以交易。为了解决这个问题，我们使用两阶段过程：1）基于正则化、截断特征值分解填充缺失值，其中正则化项用于控制缺失值应限制为零的程度。 2) 基于分支定界过程，采用启发式搜索和修剪策略，搜索最佳交易对。实验结果表明：1）如果计价币的数量不受限制，我们将得到更加去中心化的交易对设置，提倡大货币对之间直接建立交易对。 2）所有交易所都有一定的优化空间。交易对设置不当主要是由于主观设置小币进行报价，或者没有及时跟踪新兴大币造成的。 3）交易对太少会导致覆盖率低；太多的交易对需要随市场频繁调整。交易所应该考虑在它们之间取得适当的平衡。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过优化方法解决加密货币交易对设置问题，以平衡流动性、管理成本和市场覆盖。
AI.motivation: 加密货币市场缺乏默认法币，需自由设置交易对，但全面覆盖所有可能对不现实。需在控制成本的同时确保所有币种可交易，并解决数据缺失和连接性约束问题。
AI.method: 采用两阶段方法：1) 通过正则化截断特征值分解填补缺失交易量数据；2) 基于分支定界法结合启发式搜索和剪枝策略寻找最优交易对组合。
AI.result: 实验表明：1) 无币种数量限制时可实现更去中心化的交易对设置；2) 所有交易所均有优化空间，不当设置多源于主观选择小市值币种或未及时跟踪新兴大币种；3) 交易对数量过少或过多均存在弊端。
AI.conclusion: 交易所需在交易对覆盖范围与市场频繁调整之间寻求平衡，通过数据驱动方法优化交易对设置可提升市场效率。

The experimental results show that: 1) If the number of denominated coins is not limited, we will get a more decentralized trading pair settings, which advocates the establishment of trading pairs directly between large currency pairs. 2) There is a certain room for optimization in all exchanges. The setting of inappropriate trading pairs is mainly caused by subjectively setting small coins to quote, or failing to track emerging big coins in time. 3) Too few trading pairs will lead to low coverage; too many trading pairs will need to be adjusted with markets frequently. Exchanges should consider striking an appropriate balance between them. 加密货币的目标是去中心化。原则上，所有货币都具有平等地位。与传统股票市场不同，没有默认的计价货币（法定货币），因此交易对可以自由设置。然而，每两种货币之间建立一个交易市场是不切实际的。为了控制管理成本，保证充足的流动性，我们要优先覆盖那些交易量大的交易对，保证所有币都可达。我们注意到这是一个优化问题。其特殊性在于：1）大多数（>99.5%）可能的交易对之间的交易量无法直接观察。 2）满足连通性约束，即保证所有币种都可以交易。为了解决这个问题，我们使用两阶段过程：1）基于正则化、截断特征值分解填充缺失值，其中正则化项用于控制缺失值应限制为零的程度。 2) 基于分支定界过程，采用启发式搜索和修剪策略，搜索最佳交易对。实验结果表明：1）如果计价币的数量不受限制，我们将得到更加去中心化的交易对设置，提倡大货币对之间直接建立交易对。 2）所有交易所都有一定的优化空间。交易对设置不当主要是由于主观设置小币进行报价，或者没有及时跟踪新兴大币造成的。 3）交易对太少会导致覆盖率低；太多的交易对需要随市场频繁调整。交易所应该考虑在它们之间取得适当的平衡。 本文旨在通过优化方法解决加密货币交易对设置问题，以平衡流动性、管理成本和市场覆盖。 Di Zhang,Youzhou Zhou q-fin.TR,cs.AI,math.OC

authors_text: Yijin Huang,Junyan Lyu,Pujin Cheng,Roger Tam,Xiaoying Tang
title: SSiT: Saliency-guided Self-supervised Image Transformer for Diabetic Retinopathy Grading
title_zh: SSiT：用于糖尿病视网膜病变分级的显着性引导自监督图像转换器
abstract: Self-supervised Learning (SSL) has been widely applied to learn image representations through exploiting unlabeled images. However, it has not been fully explored in the medical image analysis field. In this work, Saliency-guided Self-Supervised image Transformer (SSiT) is proposed for Diabetic Retinopathy (DR) grading from fundus images. We novelly introduce saliency maps into SSL, with a goal of guiding self-supervised pre-training with domain-specific prior knowledge. Specifically, two saliency-guided learning tasks are employed in SSiT: (1) Saliency-guided contrastive learning is conducted based on the momentum contrast, wherein fundus images' saliency maps are utilized to remove trivial patches from the input sequences of the momentum-updated key encoder. Thus, the key encoder is constrained to provide target representations focusing on salient regions, guiding the query encoder to capture salient features. (2) The query encoder is trained to predict the saliency segmentation, encouraging the preservation of fine-grained information in the learned representations. To assess our proposed method, four publicly-accessible fundus image datasets are adopted. One dataset is employed for pre-training, while the three others are used to evaluate the pre-trained models' performance on downstream DR grading. The proposed SSiT significantly outperforms other representative state-of-the-art SSL methods on all downstream datasets and under various evaluation settings. For example, SSiT achieves a Kappa score of 81.88% on the DDR dataset under fine-tuning evaluation, outperforming all other ViT-based SSL methods by at least 9.48%.
summary: Self-supervised Learning (SSL) has been widely applied to learn image representations through exploiting unlabeled images. However, it has not been fully explored in the medical image analysis field. In this work, Saliency-guided Self-Supervised image Transformer (SSiT) is proposed for Diabetic Retinopathy (DR) grading from fundus images. We novelly introduce saliency maps into SSL, with a goal of guiding self-supervised pre-training with domain-specific prior knowledge. Specifically, two saliency-guided learning tasks are employed in SSiT: (1) Saliency-guided contrastive learning is conducted based on the momentum contrast, wherein fundus images' saliency maps are utilized to remove trivial patches from the input sequences of the momentum-updated key encoder. Thus, the key encoder is constrained to provide target representations focusing on salient regions, guiding the query encoder to capture salient features. (2) The query encoder is trained to predict the saliency segmentation, encouraging the preservation of fine-grained information in the learned representations. To assess our proposed method, four publicly-accessible fundus image datasets are adopted. One dataset is employed for pre-training, while the three others are used to evaluate the pre-trained models' performance on downstream DR grading. The proposed SSiT significantly outperforms other representative state-of-the-art SSL methods on all downstream datasets and under various evaluation settings. For example, SSiT achieves a Kappa score of 81.88% on the DDR dataset under fine-tuning evaluation, outperforming all other ViT-based SSL methods by at least 9.48%.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习（SSL）已被广泛应用于通过利用未标记的图像来学习图像表示。然而，它在医学图像分析领域尚未得到充分探索。在这项工作中，提出了显着性引导的自监督图像变换器（SSiT）用于眼底图像的糖尿病视网膜病变（DR）分级。我们新颖地将显着性图引入 SSL 中，目的是利用特定领域的先验知识指导自监督预训练。具体来说，SSiT中采用了两个显着性引导的学习任务：（1）基于动量对比度进行显着性引导的对比学习，其中利用眼底图像的显着性图从动量更新的关键编码器的输入序列中去除琐碎的补丁。因此，关键编码器被限制为提供关注显着区域的目标表示，引导查询编码器捕获显着特征。 (2) 训练查询编码器来预测显着性分割，鼓励在学习的表示中保留细粒度信息。为了评估我们提出的方法，采用了四个可公开访问的眼底图像数据集。一个数据集用于预训练，另外三个数据集用于评估预训练模型在下游 DR 分级上的性能。所提出的 SSiT 在所有下游数据集和各种评估设置下显着优于其他代表性的最先进的 SSL 方法。例如，SSiT 在微调评估下在 DDR 数据集上获得了 81.88% 的 Kappa 分数，比所有其他基于 ViT 的 SSL 方法至少高出 9.48%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于显著性引导的自监督图像Transformer（SSiT），用于从眼底图像中进行糖尿病视网膜病变（DR）分级。
AI.motivation: 自监督学习（SSL）在医学图像分析领域尚未充分探索，而显著性图能提供领域特定的先验知识，从而提升模型对关键区域的关注度。
AI.method: SSiT通过两个显著性引导任务进行预训练：（1）基于动量对比的显著性引导对比学习，利用显著性图去除冗余补丁；（2）训练查询编码器预测显著性分割，保留细粒度信息。
AI.result: 在四个公开眼底图像数据集上，SSiT在下游DR分级任务中显著优于其他SSL方法，例如在DDR数据集上微调评估的Kappa得分为81.88%，优于其他ViT-based SSL方法至少9.48%。
AI.conclusion: 将显著性图引入SSL能有效提升医学图像分析性能，SSiT在DR分级任务中展现出优越性。

title: Identities and periodic oscillations of divide-and-conquer recurrences splitting at half
title_zh: 分而治之的循环分裂的恒等式和周期性振荡
abstract: We study divide-and-conquer recurrences of the form \begin{equation*} f(n) = αf(\lfloor \tfrac n2\rfloor) + βf(\lceil \tfrac n2\rceil) + g(n) \qquad(n\ge2), \end{equation*} with $g(n)$ and $f(1)$ given, where $α,β\ge0$ with $α+β>0$; such recurrences appear often in analysis of computer algorithms, numeration systems, combinatorial sequences, and related areas. We show that the solution satisfies always the simple \emph{identity} \begin{equation*} f(n) = n^{\log_2(α+β)} P(\log_2n) - Q(n) \end{equation*} under an optimum (iff) condition on $g(n)$. This form is not only an identity but also an asymptotic expansion because $Q(n)$ is of a smaller order. Explicit forms for the \emph{continuity} of the periodic function $P$ are provided, together with a few other smoothness properties. We show how our results can be easily applied to many dozens of concrete examples collected from the literature, and how they can be extended in various directions. Our method of proof is surprisingly simple and elementary, but leads to the strongest types of results for all examples to which our theory applies.
summary: We study divide-and-conquer recurrences of the form \begin{equation*} f(n) = αf(\lfloor \tfrac n2\rfloor) + βf(\lceil \tfrac n2\rceil) + g(n) \qquad(n\ge2), \end{equation*} with $g(n)$ and $f(1)$ given, where $α,β\ge0$ with $α+β>0$; such recurrences appear often in analysis of computer algorithms, numeration systems, combinatorial sequences, and related areas. We show that the solution satisfies always the simple \emph{identity} \begin{equation*} f(n) = n^{\log_2(α+β)} P(\log_2n) - Q(n) \end{equation*} under an optimum (iff) condition on $g(n)$. This form is not only an identity but also an asymptotic expansion because $Q(n)$ is of a smaller order. Explicit forms for the \emph{continuity} of the periodic function $P$ are provided, together with a few other smoothness properties. We show how our results can be easily applied to many dozens of concrete examples collected from the literature, and how they can be extended in various directions. Our method of proof is surprisingly simple and elementary, but leads to the strongest types of results for all examples to which our theory applies.
abstract_zh: 我们研究 \begin{equation*} f(n) = αf(\lfloor \tfrac n2\rfloor) + βf(\lceil \tfrac n2\rceil) + g(n) \qquad(n\ge2), \end{equation*} 形式的分治递归，其中 $g(n)$ 和 $f(1)$ 给定，其中 $α,β\ge0$ 与$α+β>0$;这种重复经常出现在计算机算法、计数系统、组合序列和相关领域的分析中。我们证明，在 $g(n)$ 上的最佳 (iff) 条件下，该解始终满足简单的 \emph{identity} \begin{equation*} f(n) = n^{\log_2(α+β)} P(\log_2n) - Q(n) \end{equation*} 。这种形式不仅是恒等式，而且是渐近展开式，因为 $Q(n)$ 的阶数较小。提供了周期函数 $P$ 的 \emph{连续性} 的显式形式，以及一些其他平滑属性。我们展示了如何将我们的结果轻松应用于从文献中收集的数十个具体示例，以及如何将它们扩展到各个方向。我们的证明方法出奇地简单和基本，但对于我们的理论适用的所有例子来说，都会得出最有力的结果类型。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一类分治递归关系的恒等式及其周期性振荡特性，提出了在最优条件下解的表达式。
AI.motivation: 分治递归关系在算法分析、数值系统等领域广泛应用，但现有研究缺乏统一的解析解形式和周期性性质分析。
AI.method: 通过构造性证明方法，结合最优条件下的函数分解技术，推导出解的恒等式并分析周期函数的连续性与平滑性。
AI.result: 证明了解满足形式为f(n)=n^{log₂(α+β)}P(log₂n)-Q(n)的恒等式，其中Q(n)为更小阶项，且给出了周期函数P的连续性表达式。
AI.conclusion: 该方法以简洁方式解决了多类分治递归问题，为理论扩展和实际应用提供了统一框架，验证了其在多个文献案例中的有效性。

Explicit forms for the \emph{continuity} of the periodic function $P$ are provided, together with a few other smoothness properties. We show how our results can be easily applied to many dozens of concrete examples collected from the literature, and how they can be extended in various directions. Our method of proof is surprisingly simple and elementary, but leads to the strongest types of results for all examples to which our theory applies. 我们研究 \begin{equation*} f(n) = αf(\lfloor \tfrac n2\rfloor) + βf(\lceil \tfrac n2\rceil) + g(n) \qquad(n\ge2), \end{equation*} 形式的分治递归，其中 $g(n)$ 和 $f(1)$ 给定，其中 $α,β\ge0$ 与$α+β>0$;这种重复经常出现在计算机算法、计数系统、组合序列和相关领域的分析中。我们证明，在 $g(n)$ 上的最佳 (iff) 条件下，该解始终满足简单的 \emph{identity} \begin{equation*} f(n) = n^{\log_2(α+β)} P(\log_2n) - Q(n) \end{equation*} 。这种形式不仅是恒等式，而且是渐近展开式，因为 $Q(n)$ 的阶数较小。提供了周期函数 $P$ 的 \emph{连续性} 的显式形式，以及一些其他平滑属性。我们展示了如何将我们的结果轻松应用于从文献中收集的数十个具体示例，以及如何将它们扩展到各个方向。我们的证明方法出奇地简单和基本，但对于我们的理论适用的所有例子来说，都会得出最有力的结果类型。 本文研究了一类分治递归关系的恒等式及其周期性振荡特性，提出了在最优条件下解的表达式。 Hsien-Kuei Hwang,Svante Janson,Tsung-Hsi Tsai cs.DS,math.CO

title: IDM-Follower: A Model-Informed Deep Learning Method for Long-Sequence Car-Following Trajectory Prediction
title_zh: IDM-Follower：一种基于模型的深度学习方法，用于长序列跟车轨迹预测
abstract: Model-based and learning-based methods are two major types of methodologies to model car following behaviors. Model-based methods describe the car-following behaviors with explicit mathematical equations, while learning-based methods focus on getting a mapping between inputs and outputs. Both types of methods have advantages and weaknesses. Meanwhile, most car-following models are generative and only consider the inputs of the speed, position, and acceleration of the last time step. To address these issues, this study proposes a novel framework called IDM-Follower that can generate a sequence of following vehicle trajectory by a recurrent autoencoder informed by a physical car-following model, the Intelligent Driving Model (IDM).We implement a novel structure with two independent encoders and a self-attention decoder that could sequentially predict the following trajectories. A loss function considering the discrepancies between predictions and labeled data integrated with discrepancies from model-based predictions is implemented to update the neural network parameters. Numerical experiments with multiple settings on simulation and NGSIM datasets show that the IDM-Follower can improve the prediction performance compared to the model-based or learning-based methods alone. Analysis on different noise levels also shows good robustness of the model.
summary: Model-based and learning-based methods are two major types of methodologies to model car following behaviors. Model-based methods describe the car-following behaviors with explicit mathematical equations, while learning-based methods focus on getting a mapping between inputs and outputs. Both types of methods have advantages and weaknesses. Meanwhile, most car-following models are generative and only consider the inputs of the speed, position, and acceleration of the last time step. To address these issues, this study proposes a novel framework called IDM-Follower that can generate a sequence of following vehicle trajectory by a recurrent autoencoder informed by a physical car-following model, the Intelligent Driving Model (IDM).We implement a novel structure with two independent encoders and a self-attention decoder that could sequentially predict the following trajectories. A loss function considering the discrepancies between predictions and labeled data integrated with discrepancies from model-based predictions is implemented to update the neural network parameters. Numerical experiments with multiple settings on simulation and NGSIM datasets show that the IDM-Follower can improve the prediction performance compared to the model-based or learning-based methods alone. Analysis on different noise levels also shows good robustness of the model.
abstract_zh: 基于模型和基于学习的方法是对汽车跟随行为进行建模的两种主要方法。基于模型的方法用明确的数学方程描述跟车行为，而基于学习的方法则侧重于获取输入和输出之间的映射。两种方法都有优点和缺点。同时，大多数跟车模型都是生成式的，只考虑最后一个时间步的速度、位置和加速度的输入。为了解决这些问题，本研究提出了一种名为 IDM-Follower 的新颖框架，它可以通过物理跟随模型智能驾驶模型 (IDM) 通知的循环自动编码器生成一系列跟随车辆轨迹。我们实现了一种具有两个独立编码器和一个自注意力解码器的新颖结构，可以顺序预测跟随轨迹。考虑预测和标记数据之间的差异以及基于模型的预测的差异的损失函数被实现来更新神经网络参数。在仿真和 NGSIM 数据集上进行的多种设置的数值实验表明，与单独基于模型或基于学习的方法相比，IDM-Follower 可以提高预测性能。对不同噪声水平的分析也表明该模型具有良好的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为IDM-Follower的新框架，用于长序列跟车轨迹预测。
AI.motivation: 基于模型和基于学习的方法在建模跟车行为时各有优劣，现有模型通常只考虑前一时间步的速度、位置和加速度输入，缺乏对长序列轨迹的有效预测。
AI.method: 该方法结合物理跟车模型（IDM）与深度学习，采用两个独立编码器和一个自注意力解码器的结构，并引入考虑预测与标签数据以及模型预测差异的损失函数。
AI.result: 在仿真和NGSIM数据集上的实验表明，IDM-Follower相比单独使用基于模型或基于学习的方法具有更好的预测性能，并且在不同噪声水平下表现出良好的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: IDM-Follower通过融合物理模型与深度学习方法，有效提升了长序列跟车轨迹预测的准确性和鲁棒性。

title: Diffusion Models already have a Semantic Latent Space
title_zh: 扩散模型已经具有语义潜在空间
abstract: Diffusion models achieve outstanding generative performance in various domains. Despite their great success, they lack semantic latent space which is essential for controlling the generative process. To address the problem, we propose asymmetric reverse process (Asyrp) which discovers the semantic latent space in frozen pretrained diffusion models. Our semantic latent space, named h-space, has nice properties for accommodating semantic image manipulation: homogeneity, linearity, robustness, and consistency across timesteps. In addition, we introduce a principled design of the generative process for versatile editing and quality boost ing by quantifiable measures: editing strength of an interval and quality deficiency at a timestep. Our method is applicable to various architectures (DDPM++, iD- DPM, and ADM) and datasets (CelebA-HQ, AFHQ-dog, LSUN-church, LSUN- bedroom, and METFACES). Project page: https://kwonminki.github.io/Asyrp/
summary: Diffusion models achieve outstanding generative performance in various domains. Despite their great success, they lack semantic latent space which is essential for controlling the generative process. To address the problem, we propose asymmetric reverse process (Asyrp) which discovers the semantic latent space in frozen pretrained diffusion models. Our semantic latent space, named h-space, has nice properties for accommodating semantic image manipulation: homogeneity, linearity, robustness, and consistency across timesteps. In addition, we introduce a principled design of the generative process for versatile editing and quality boost ing by quantifiable measures: editing strength of an interval and quality deficiency at a timestep. Our method is applicable to various architectures (DDPM++, iD- DPM, and ADM) and datasets (CelebA-HQ, AFHQ-dog, LSUN-church, LSUN- bedroom, and METFACES). Project page: https://kwonminki.github.io/Asyrp/
abstract_zh: 扩散模型在各个领域都取得了出色的生成性能。尽管它们取得了巨大的成功，但它们缺乏对于控制生成过程至关重要的语义潜在空间。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了非对称逆向过程（Asyrp），它发现了冻结预训练扩散模型中的语义潜在空间。我们的语义潜在空间，称为 h 空间，具有适应语义图像操作的良好特性：同质性、线性、鲁棒性和跨时间步长的一致性。此外，我们还介绍了通过可量化措施进行多功能编辑和质量提升的生成过程的原则性设计：间隔的编辑强度和时间步长的质量缺陷。我们的方法适用于各种架构（DDPM++、iD-DPM 和 ADM）和数据集（CelebA-HQ、AFHQ-dog、LSUN-church、LSUN-bedroom 和 METFACES）。项目页面：https://kwonminki.github.io/Asyrp/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种方法，在冻结的预训练扩散模型中发现语义潜在空间（h-space），以实现可控的图像生成和编辑。
AI.motivation: 尽管扩散模型在生成任务中表现出色，但缺乏语义潜在空间，限制了生成过程的可控性，因此需要发现并利用这种空间以实现更灵活的图像编辑。
AI.method: 提出不对称反向过程（Asyrp），在冻结的预训练扩散模型中识别出具有同质性、线性、鲁棒性和时间步一致性的语义潜在空间h-space，并设计了基于可量化指标的生成过程，包括编辑强度和时间步的质量缺陷。
AI.result: 该方法在多种扩散模型架构（如DDPM++、iDDPM、ADM）和多个数据集（如CelebA-HQ、AFHQ-dog等）上验证了其有效性，实现了高质量的图像编辑和生成。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明了扩散模型中已存在语义潜在空间，并提供了有效利用该空间进行可控图像生成和编辑的方法，为未来研究提供了新方向。

authors_text: Jianqiu Chen,Mingshan Sun,Ye Zheng,Tianpeng Bao,Zhenyu He,Donghai Li,Guoqiang Jin,Rui Zhao,Liwei Wu,Xiaoke Jiang
title: Geo6D: Geometric Constraints Learning for 6D Pose Estimation
title_zh: Geo6D：6D 姿态估计的几何约束学习
abstract: Numerous 6D pose estimation methods have been proposed that employ end-to-end regression to directly estimate the target pose parameters. Since the visible features of objects are implicitly influenced by their poses, the network allows inferring the pose by analyzing the differences in features in the visible region. However, due to the unpredictable and unrestricted range of pose variations, the implicitly learned visible feature-pose constraints are insufficiently covered by the training samples, making the network vulnerable to unseen object poses. To tackle these challenges, we proposed a novel geometric constraints learning approach called Geo6D for direct regression 6D pose estimation methods. It introduces a pose transformation formula expressed in relative offset representation, which is leveraged as geometric constraints to reconstruct the input and output targets of the network. These reconstructed data enable the network to estimate the pose based on explicit geometric constraints and relative offset representation mitigates the issue of the pose distribution gap. Extensive experimental results show that when equipped with Geo6D, the direct 6D methods achieve state-of-the-art performance on multiple datasets and demonstrate significant effectiveness, even with only 10% amount of data.
summary: Numerous 6D pose estimation methods have been proposed that employ end-to-end regression to directly estimate the target pose parameters. Since the visible features of objects are implicitly influenced by their poses, the network allows inferring the pose by analyzing the differences in features in the visible region. However, due to the unpredictable and unrestricted range of pose variations, the implicitly learned visible feature-pose constraints are insufficiently covered by the training samples, making the network vulnerable to unseen object poses. To tackle these challenges, we proposed a novel geometric constraints learning approach called Geo6D for direct regression 6D pose estimation methods. It introduces a pose transformation formula expressed in relative offset representation, which is leveraged as geometric constraints to reconstruct the input and output targets of the network. These reconstructed data enable the network to estimate the pose based on explicit geometric constraints and relative offset representation mitigates the issue of the pose distribution gap. Extensive experimental results show that when equipped with Geo6D, the direct 6D methods achieve state-of-the-art performance on multiple datasets and demonstrate significant effectiveness, even with only 10% amount of data.
abstract_zh: 已经提出了许多采用端到端回归来直接估计目标姿态参数的 6D 姿态估计方法。由于物体的可见特征隐式地受到其姿态的影响，因此网络允许通过分析可见区域中特征的差异来推断姿态。然而，由于姿势变化的不可预测和不受限制的范围，隐式学习的可见特征姿势约束不能被训练样本充分覆盖，使得网络容易受到看不见的物体姿势的影响。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种称为 Geo6D 的新型几何约束学习方法，用于直接回归 6D 位姿估计方法。它引入了以相对偏移表示形式表示的位姿变换公式，利用该公式作为几何约束来重建网络的输入和输出目标。这些重建的数据使网络能够基于显式几何约束来估计姿势，并且相对偏移表示减轻了姿势分布间隙的问题。大量的实验结果表明，当配备 Geo6D 时，直接 6D 方法在多个数据集上实现了最先进的性能，并且即使只有 10% 的数据量也表现出显着的有效性。

AI.method: 引入基于相对偏移表示的姿态变换公式，作为几何约束重建网络输入输出目标。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上达到SOTA性能，且仅需10%训练数据即可显著提升效果。
AI.conclusion: Geo6D通过显式几何约束缓解姿态分布差距问题，有效提升直接回归方法性能。

search_text: Geo6D: Geometric Constraints Learning for 6D Pose Estimation Geo6D：6D 姿态估计的几何约束学习 Numerous 6D pose estimation methods have been proposed that employ end-to-end regression to directly estimate the target pose parameters. Since the visible features of objects are implicitly influenced by their poses, the network allows inferring the pose by analyzing the differences in features in the visible region. However, due to the unpredictable and unrestricted range of pose variations, the implicitly learned visible feature-pose constraints are insufficiently covered by the training samples, making the network vulnerable to unseen object poses. To tackle these challenges, we proposed a novel geometric constraints learning approach called Geo6D for direct regression 6D pose estimation methods. It introduces a pose transformation formula expressed in relative offset representation, which is leveraged as geometric constraints to reconstruct the input and output targets of the network. These reconstructed data enable the network to estimate the pose based on explicit geometric constraints and relative offset representation mitigates the issue of the pose distribution gap. Extensive experimental results show that when equipped with Geo6D, the direct 6D methods achieve state-of-the-art performance on multiple datasets and demonstrate significant effectiveness, even with only 10% amount of data. 已经提出了许多采用端到端回归来直接估计目标姿态参数的 6D 姿态估计方法。由于物体的可见特征隐式地受到其姿态的影响，因此网络允许通过分析可见区域中特征的差异来推断姿态。然而，由于姿势变化的不可预测和不受限制的范围，隐式学习的可见特征姿势约束不能被训练样本充分覆盖，使得网络容易受到看不见的物体姿势的影响。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种称为 Geo6D 的新型几何约束学习方法，用于直接回归 6D 位姿估计方法。它引入了以相对偏移表示形式表示的位姿变换公式，利用该公式作为几何约束来重建网络的输入和输出目标。这些重建的数据使网络能够基于显式几何约束来估计姿势，并且相对偏移表示减轻了姿势分布间隙的问题。大量的实验结果表明，当配备 Geo6D 时，直接 6D 方法在多个数据集上实现了最先进的性能，并且即使只有 10% 的数据量也表现出显着的有效性。 本文提出Geo6D方法，通过几何约束学习提升6D位姿估计的鲁棒性。 Jianqiu Chen,Mingshan Sun,Ye Zheng,Tianpeng Bao,Zhenyu He,Donghai Li,Guoqiang Jin,Rui Zhao,Liwei Wu,Xiaoke Jiang cs.CV

title: 3D Human Mesh Construction Leveraging Wi-Fi
title_zh: 利用 Wi-Fi 的 3D 人体网格结构
abstract: In this paper, we present, Wi-Mesh, a WiFi vision-based 3D human mesh construction system. Our system leverages the advances of WiFi to visualize the shape and deformations of the human body for 3D mesh construction. In particular, it leverages multiple transmitting and receiving antennas on WiFi devices to estimate the two-dimensional angle of arrival (2D AoA) of the WiFi signal reflections to enable WiFi devices to see the physical environment as we humans do. It then extracts only the images of the human body from the physical environment and leverages deep learning models to digitize the extracted human body into a 3D mesh representation. Experimental evaluation under various indoor environments shows that Wi-Mesh achieves an average vertices location error of 2.81cm and joint position error of 2.4cm, which is comparable to the systems that utilize specialized and dedicated hardware. The proposed system has the advantage of re-using the WiFi devices that already exist in the environment for potential mass adoption. It can also work in non-line of sight (NLoS), poor lighting conditions, and baggy clothes, where the camera-based systems do not work well.
summary: In this paper, we present, Wi-Mesh, a WiFi vision-based 3D human mesh construction system. Our system leverages the advances of WiFi to visualize the shape and deformations of the human body for 3D mesh construction. In particular, it leverages multiple transmitting and receiving antennas on WiFi devices to estimate the two-dimensional angle of arrival (2D AoA) of the WiFi signal reflections to enable WiFi devices to see the physical environment as we humans do. It then extracts only the images of the human body from the physical environment and leverages deep learning models to digitize the extracted human body into a 3D mesh representation. Experimental evaluation under various indoor environments shows that Wi-Mesh achieves an average vertices location error of 2.81cm and joint position error of 2.4cm, which is comparable to the systems that utilize specialized and dedicated hardware. The proposed system has the advantage of re-using the WiFi devices that already exist in the environment for potential mass adoption. It can also work in non-line of sight (NLoS), poor lighting conditions, and baggy clothes, where the camera-based systems do not work well.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了 Wi-Mesh，一种基于 WiFi 视觉的 3D 人体网格构建系统。我们的系统利用 WiFi 的进步来可视化人体的形状和变形，以进行 3D 网格构建。特别是，它利用 WiFi 设备上的多个发射和接收天线来估计 WiFi 信号反射的二维到达角 (2D AoA)，使 WiFi 设备能够像我们人类一样看到物理环境。然后，它仅从物理环境中提取人体图像，并利用深度学习模型将提取的人体数字化为 3D 网格表示。在各种室内环境下的实验评估表明，Wi-Mesh的平均顶点位置误差为2.81厘米，关节位置误差为2.4厘米，与使用专用硬件的系统相当。所提出的系统的优点是可以重复使用环境中已经存在的 WiFi 设备，以实现潜在的大规模采用。它还可以在非视线 (NLoS)、较差的照明条件和宽松的衣服等基于摄像头的系统无法正常工作的情况下工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Wi-Fi的3D人体网格构建系统Wi-Mesh，通过利用Wi-Fi信号的反射信息来重建人体的3D模型。
AI.motivation: 传统的基于摄像头的系统在非视线、光线不足或穿着宽松衣物等情况下表现不佳，而本文旨在利用现有的Wi-Fi设备实现无需额外硬件的3D人体重建。
AI.method: 该系统利用Wi-Fi设备上的多个天线估计信号反射的二维到达角（2D AoA），提取人体图像并使用深度学习模型将其转化为3D网格表示。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，Wi-Mesh在多种室内环境下实现了平均顶点位置误差2.81厘米和关节位置误差2.4厘米，性能可与使用专用硬件的系统相媲美。
AI.conclusion: Wi-Mesh利用现有Wi-Fi设备实现3D人体重建，在非视线、光线不足和宽松衣物等情况下表现良好，具备广泛的应用潜力。

title: Non-Iterative Scribble-Supervised Learning with Pacing Pseudo-Masks for Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: 用于医学图像分割的带有起搏伪掩模的非迭代涂鸦监督学习
abstract: Scribble-supervised medical image segmentation tackles the limitation of sparse masks. Conventional approaches alternate between: labeling pseudo-masks and optimizing network parameters. However, such iterative two-stage paradigm is unwieldy and could be trapped in poor local optima since the networks undesirably regress to the erroneous pseudo-masks. To address these issues, we propose a non-iterative method where a stream of varying (pacing) pseudo-masks teach a network via consistency training, named PacingPseudo. Our motivation lies first in a non-iterative process. Interestingly, it can be achieved gracefully by a siamese architecture, wherein a stream of pseudo-masks naturally assimilate a stream of predicted masks during training. Second, we make the consistency training effective with two necessary designs: (i) entropy regularization to obtain high-confidence pseudo-masks for effective teaching; and (ii) distorted augmentations to create discrepancy between the pseudo-mask and predicted-mask streams for consistency regularization. Third, we devise a new memory bank mechanism that provides an extra source of ensemble features to complement scarce labeled pixels. The efficacy of the proposed PacingPseudo is validated on three public medical image datasets, including the segmentation tasks of abdominal multi-organs, cardiac structures, and myocardium. Extensive experiments demonstrate our PacingPseudo improves the baseline by large margins and consistently outcompetes several previous methods. In some cases, our PacingPseudo achieves comparable performance with its fully-supervised counterparts, showing the feasibility of our method for the challenging scribble-supervised segmentation applications. The code and scribble annotations will be publicly available.
summary: Scribble-supervised medical image segmentation tackles the limitation of sparse masks. Conventional approaches alternate between: labeling pseudo-masks and optimizing network parameters. However, such iterative two-stage paradigm is unwieldy and could be trapped in poor local optima since the networks undesirably regress to the erroneous pseudo-masks. To address these issues, we propose a non-iterative method where a stream of varying (pacing) pseudo-masks teach a network via consistency training, named PacingPseudo. Our motivation lies first in a non-iterative process. Interestingly, it can be achieved gracefully by a siamese architecture, wherein a stream of pseudo-masks naturally assimilate a stream of predicted masks during training. Second, we make the consistency training effective with two necessary designs: (i) entropy regularization to obtain high-confidence pseudo-masks for effective teaching; and (ii) distorted augmentations to create discrepancy between the pseudo-mask and predicted-mask streams for consistency regularization. Third, we devise a new memory bank mechanism that provides an extra source of ensemble features to complement scarce labeled pixels. The efficacy of the proposed PacingPseudo is validated on three public medical image datasets, including the segmentation tasks of abdominal multi-organs, cardiac structures, and myocardium. Extensive experiments demonstrate our PacingPseudo improves the baseline by large margins and consistently outcompetes several previous methods. In some cases, our PacingPseudo achieves comparable performance with its fully-supervised counterparts, showing the feasibility of our method for the challenging scribble-supervised segmentation applications. The code and scribble annotations will be publicly available.
abstract_zh: 涂鸦监督的医学图像分割解决了稀疏掩模的局限性。传统方法交替使用：标记伪掩模和优化网络参数。然而，这种迭代的两阶段范式很笨重，并且可能陷入较差的局部最优，因为网络会不期望地回归到错误的伪掩模。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种非迭代方法，其中变化的（起搏）伪掩码流通过一致性训练来教导网络，称为 PacingPseudo。我们的动机首先在于非迭代过程。有趣的是，它可以通过暹罗架构优雅地实现，其中伪掩码流在训练期间自然地同化预测掩码流。其次，我们通过两个必要的设计使一致性训练有效：（i）熵正则化以获得高置信度的伪掩模以进行有效的教学； (ii) 扭曲增强，以在伪掩码和预测掩码流之间产生差异，以实现一致性正则化。第三，我们设计了一种新的内存库机制，它提供了额外的整体特征源来补充稀缺的标记像素。所提出的 PacingPseudo 的功效在三个公共医学图像数据集上得到了验证，包括腹部多器官、心脏结构和心肌的分割任务。大量实验表明，我们的 PacingPseudo 大幅提高了基线，并且始终优于以前的几种方法。在某些情况下，我们的 PacingPseudo 实现了与完全监督的同行相当的性能，这表明我们的方法对于具有挑战性的涂鸦监督分割应用程序的可行性。代码和涂鸦注释将公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种非迭代的scribble监督学习方法PacingPseudo，通过动态伪掩码流和一致性训练解决医学图像分割中稀疏标注的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统迭代两阶段方法易陷入局部最优且效率低下，本文通过非迭代流程结合Siamese架构和动态伪掩码流，提升分割模型的鲁棒性和准确性。
AI.method: 设计Siamese架构实现伪掩码流与预测掩码流的对齐，结合熵正则化生成高置信伪掩码、扭曲增强制造差异，并引入记忆库机制补充特征多样性。
AI.result: 在三个医学数据集（腹部器官、心脏结构、心肌）上显著优于基线和现有方法，部分场景性能接近全监督方法。
AI.conclusion: 非迭代一致性训练框架有效解决了scribble监督分割的挑战，验证了动态伪掩码流与特征集成机制的可行性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种非迭代的scribble监督学习方法PacingPseudo，通过动态伪掩码流和一致性训练解决医学图像分割中稀疏标注的局限性。
