search_text: Non-Iterative Scribble-Supervised Learning with Pacing Pseudo-Masks for Medical Image Segmentation 用于医学图像分割的带有起搏伪掩模的非迭代涂鸦监督学习 Scribble-supervised medical image segmentation tackles the limitation of sparse masks. Conventional approaches alternate between: labeling pseudo-masks and optimizing network parameters. However, such iterative two-stage paradigm is unwieldy and could be trapped in poor local optima since the networks undesirably regress to the erroneous pseudo-masks. To address these issues, we propose a non-iterative method where a stream of varying (pacing) pseudo-masks teach a network via consistency training, named PacingPseudo. Our motivation lies first in a non-iterative process. Interestingly, it can be achieved gracefully by a siamese architecture, wherein a stream of pseudo-masks naturally assimilate a stream of predicted masks during training. Second, we make the consistency training effective with two necessary designs: (i) entropy regularization to obtain high-confidence pseudo-masks for effective teaching; and (ii) distorted augmentations to create discrepancy between the pseudo-mask and predicted-mask streams for consistency regularization. Third, we devise a new memory bank mechanism that provides an extra source of ensemble features to complement scarce labeled pixels. The efficacy of the proposed PacingPseudo is validated on three public medical image datasets, including the segmentation tasks of abdominal multi-organs, cardiac structures, and myocardium. Extensive experiments demonstrate our PacingPseudo improves the baseline by large margins and consistently outcompetes several previous methods. In some cases, our PacingPseudo achieves comparable performance with its fully-supervised counterparts, showing the feasibility of our method for the challenging scribble-supervised segmentation applications. The code and scribble annotations will be publicly available. 涂鸦监督的医学图像分割解决了稀疏掩模的局限性。传统方法交替使用：标记伪掩模和优化网络参数。然而，这种迭代的两阶段范式很笨重，并且可能陷入较差的局部最优，因为网络会不期望地回归到错误的伪掩模。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种非迭代方法，其中变化的（起搏）伪掩码流通过一致性训练来教导网络，称为 PacingPseudo。我们的动机首先在于非迭代过程。有趣的是，它可以通过暹罗架构优雅地实现，其中伪掩码流在训练期间自然地同化预测掩码流。其次，我们通过两个必要的设计使一致性训练有效：（i）熵正则化以获得高置信度的伪掩模以进行有效的教学； (ii) 扭曲增强，以在伪掩码和预测掩码流之间产生差异，以实现一致性正则化。第三，我们设计了一种新的内存库机制，它提供了额外的整体特征源来补充稀缺的标记像素。所提出的 PacingPseudo 的功效在三个公共医学图像数据集上得到了验证，包括腹部多器官、心脏结构和心肌的分割任务。大量实验表明，我们的 PacingPseudo 大幅提高了基线，并且始终优于以前的几种方法。在某些情况下，我们的 PacingPseudo 实现了与完全监督的同行相当的性能，这表明我们的方法对于具有挑战性的涂鸦监督分割应用程序的可行性。代码和涂鸦注释将公开。 本文提出一种非迭代的scribble监督学习方法PacingPseudo，通过动态伪掩码流和一致性训练解决医学图像分割中稀疏标注的局限性。 Zefan Yang,Di Lin,Dong Ni,Yi Wang cs.CV

title: Discovering Many Diverse Solutions with Bayesian Optimization
title_zh: 通过贝叶斯优化发现多种不同的解决方案
abstract: Bayesian optimization (BO) is a popular approach for sample-efficient optimization of black-box objective functions. While BO has been successfully applied to a wide range of scientific applications, traditional approaches to single-objective BO only seek to find a single best solution. This can be a significant limitation in situations where solutions may later turn out to be intractable. For example, a designed molecule may turn out to violate constraints that can only be reasonably evaluated after the optimization process has concluded. To address this issue, we propose Rank-Ordered Bayesian Optimization with Trust-regions (ROBOT) which aims to find a portfolio of high-performing solutions that are diverse according to a user-specified diversity metric. We evaluate ROBOT on several real-world applications and show that it can discover large sets of high-performing diverse solutions while requiring few additional function evaluations compared to finding a single best solution.
summary: Bayesian optimization (BO) is a popular approach for sample-efficient optimization of black-box objective functions. While BO has been successfully applied to a wide range of scientific applications, traditional approaches to single-objective BO only seek to find a single best solution. This can be a significant limitation in situations where solutions may later turn out to be intractable. For example, a designed molecule may turn out to violate constraints that can only be reasonably evaluated after the optimization process has concluded. To address this issue, we propose Rank-Ordered Bayesian Optimization with Trust-regions (ROBOT) which aims to find a portfolio of high-performing solutions that are diverse according to a user-specified diversity metric. We evaluate ROBOT on several real-world applications and show that it can discover large sets of high-performing diverse solutions while requiring few additional function evaluations compared to finding a single best solution.
abstract_zh: 贝叶斯优化 (BO) 是一种流行的黑盒目标函数样本高效优化方法。虽然 BO 已成功应用于广泛的科学应用，但单目标 BO 的传统方法仅寻求找到单一的最佳解决方案。在解决方案后来变得棘手的情况下，这可能是一个重大限制。例如，设计的分子可能会违反约束，而这些约束只能在优化过程结束后才能合理评估。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了带有信任区域的排序贝叶斯优化（ROBOT），其目的是找到根据用户指定的多样性指标而多样化的高性能解决方案组合。我们在几个现实世界的应用程序上评估机器人，并表明它可以发现大量高性能的多样化解决方案，同时与寻找单一最佳解决方案相比，只需要很少的额外功能评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于贝叶斯优化的新方法ROBOT，旨在发现多个符合用户指定多样性指标的高性能解决方案，以克服传统贝叶斯优化仅寻找单一最优解的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统贝叶斯优化仅寻找单一最优解可能导致后续验证阶段出现不可行解（如分子设计违反约束），需通过多样性优化提前获取多个备选方案以应对不确定性。
AI.method: 提出Rank-Ordered Bayesian Optimization with Trust-regions（ROBOT）方法，结合排序机制与信任区域约束，在优化过程中主动探索多样化的高绩效解集。
AI.result: 在多个实际应用中验证ROBOT可高效生成大量高性能且多样化的解决方案，相比单一解优化仅需少量额外函数评估。
AI.conclusion: ROBOT方法有效平衡了优化效率与解的多样性，适用于需要多备选方案的科学优化场景。

authors_text: Lirui Wang,Kaiqing Zhang,Yunzhu Li,Yonglong Tian,Russ Tedrake
title: Does Learning from Decentralized Non-IID Unlabeled Data Benefit from Self Supervision?
title_zh: 从去中心化非独立同分布无标签数据中学习是否受益于自我监督？
abstract: Decentralized learning has been advocated and widely deployed to make efficient use of distributed datasets, with an extensive focus on supervised learning (SL) problems. Unfortunately, the majority of real-world data are unlabeled and can be highly heterogeneous across sources. In this work, we carefully study decentralized learning with unlabeled data through the lens of self-supervised learning (SSL), specifically contrastive visual representation learning. We study the effectiveness of a range of contrastive learning algorithms under decentralized learning settings, on relatively large-scale datasets including ImageNet-100, MS-COCO, and a new real-world robotic warehouse dataset. Our experiments show that the decentralized SSL (Dec-SSL) approach is robust to the heterogeneity of decentralized datasets, and learns useful representation for object classification, detection, and segmentation tasks. This robustness makes it possible to significantly reduce communication and reduce the participation ratio of data sources with only minimal drops in performance. Interestingly, using the same amount of data, the representation learned by Dec-SSL can not only perform on par with that learned by centralized SSL which requires communication and excessive data storage costs, but also sometimes outperform representations extracted from decentralized SL which requires extra knowledge about the data labels. Finally, we provide theoretical insights into understanding why data heterogeneity is less of a concern for Dec-SSL objectives, and introduce feature alignment and clustering techniques to develop a new Dec-SSL algorithm that further improves the performance, in the face of highly non-IID data. Our study presents positive evidence to embrace unlabeled data in decentralized learning, and we hope to provide new insights into whether and why decentralized SSL is effective.
summary: Decentralized learning has been advocated and widely deployed to make efficient use of distributed datasets, with an extensive focus on supervised learning (SL) problems. Unfortunately, the majority of real-world data are unlabeled and can be highly heterogeneous across sources. In this work, we carefully study decentralized learning with unlabeled data through the lens of self-supervised learning (SSL), specifically contrastive visual representation learning. We study the effectiveness of a range of contrastive learning algorithms under decentralized learning settings, on relatively large-scale datasets including ImageNet-100, MS-COCO, and a new real-world robotic warehouse dataset. Our experiments show that the decentralized SSL (Dec-SSL) approach is robust to the heterogeneity of decentralized datasets, and learns useful representation for object classification, detection, and segmentation tasks. This robustness makes it possible to significantly reduce communication and reduce the participation ratio of data sources with only minimal drops in performance. Interestingly, using the same amount of data, the representation learned by Dec-SSL can not only perform on par with that learned by centralized SSL which requires communication and excessive data storage costs, but also sometimes outperform representations extracted from decentralized SL which requires extra knowledge about the data labels. Finally, we provide theoretical insights into understanding why data heterogeneity is less of a concern for Dec-SSL objectives, and introduce feature alignment and clustering techniques to develop a new Dec-SSL algorithm that further improves the performance, in the face of highly non-IID data. Our study presents positive evidence to embrace unlabeled data in decentralized learning, and we hope to provide new insights into whether and why decentralized SSL is effective.
abstract_zh: 去中心化学习已被提倡并广泛部署，以有效利用分布式数据集，并广泛关注监督学习（SL）问题。不幸的是，大多数现实世界的数据都没有标签，并且不同来源的数据可能高度异构。在这项工作中，我们通过自我监督学习（SSL）的视角，特别是对比视觉表示学习，仔细研究了使用未标记数据的去中心化学习。我们研究了分散学习设置下一系列对比学习算法在相对较大规模的数据集（包括 ImageNet-100、MS-COCO 和新的现实世界机器人仓库数据集）上的有效性。我们的实验表明，去中心化 SSL (Dec-SSL) 方法对于去中心化数据集的异构性具有鲁棒性，并且可以学习对象分类、检测和分割任务的有用表示。这种鲁棒性使得可以显着减少通信并降低数据源的参与率，而性能下降却极小。有趣的是，使用相同数量的数据，Dec-SSL 学习到的表示不仅可以与需要通信和过多数据存储成本的中心化 SSL 学习到的表示相媲美，而且有时还优于从去中心化 SL 中提取的表示（需要有关数据标签的额外知识）。最后，我们提供了理论见解来理解为什么数据异构性对于 Dec-SSL 目标来说不太重要，并引入特征对齐和聚类技术来开发新的 Dec-SSL 算法，在面对高度非独立同分布的数据时，进一步提高性能。我们的研究提供了在去中心化学习中接受未标记数据的积极证据，我们希望为去中心化 SSL 是否有效以及为何有效提供新的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在去中心化学习中利用非独立同分布（Non-IID）的未标记数据进行自监督学习（SSL）的有效性，特别是对比视觉表征学习。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中的数据大多未标记且分布异构，传统监督学习难以高效处理，而去中心化学习需应对数据异构性和通信成本问题，因此探索SSL在该场景下的潜力具有重要意义。
AI.method: 通过实验评估多种对比学习算法在ImageNet-100、MS-COCO及真实仓储数据集上的表现，提出结合特征对齐与聚类技术的改进Dec-SSL算法，并提供理论分析解释其对数据异构性的鲁棒性。
AI.result: Dec-SSL在保持性能仅小幅下降的情况下显著降低通信需求与数据源参与比例，其表征能力可媲美集中式SSL且优于需标签知识的去中心化监督学习，理论分析进一步验证了其鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 去中心化SSL能有效利用未标记数据，为异构分布式环境下的学习任务提供高效解决方案，为未来研究提供了理论与实践依据。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 去中心化SSL能有效利用未标记数据，为异构分布式环境下的学习任务提供高效解决方案，为未来研究提供了理论与实践依据。

tldr: 本文研究了在去中心化学习中利用非独立同分布（Non-IID）的未标记数据进行自监督学习（SSL）的有效性，特别是对比视觉表征学习。
motivation: 现实世界中的数据大多未标记且分布异构，传统监督学习难以高效处理，而去中心化学习需应对数据异构性和通信成本问题，因此探索SSL在该场景下的潜力具有重要意义。
method: 通过实验评估多种对比学习算法在ImageNet-100、MS-COCO及真实仓储数据集上的表现，提出结合特征对齐与聚类技术的改进Dec-SSL算法，并提供理论分析解释其对数据异构性的鲁棒性。
result: Dec-SSL在保持性能仅小幅下降的情况下显著降低通信需求与数据源参与比例，其表征能力可媲美集中式SSL且优于需标签知识的去中心化监督学习，理论分析进一步验证了其鲁棒性。
conclusion: 去中心化SSL能有效利用未标记数据，为异构分布式环境下的学习任务提供高效解决方案，为未来研究提供了理论与实践依据。
search_text: Does Learning from Decentralized Non-IID Unlabeled Data Benefit from Self Supervision? 从去中心化非独立同分布无标签数据中学习是否受益于自我监督？ Decentralized learning has been advocated and widely deployed to make efficient use of distributed datasets, with an extensive focus on supervised learning (SL) problems. Unfortunately, the majority of real-world data are unlabeled and can be highly heterogeneous across sources. In this work, we carefully study decentralized learning with unlabeled data through the lens of self-supervised learning (SSL), specifically contrastive visual representation learning. We study the effectiveness of a range of contrastive learning algorithms under decentralized learning settings, on relatively large-scale datasets including ImageNet-100, MS-COCO, and a new real-world robotic warehouse dataset. Our experiments show that the decentralized SSL (Dec-SSL) approach is robust to the heterogeneity of decentralized datasets, and learns useful representation for object classification, detection, and segmentation tasks. This robustness makes it possible to significantly reduce communication and reduce the participation ratio of data sources with only minimal drops in performance. Interestingly, using the same amount of data, the representation learned by Dec-SSL can not only perform on par with that learned by centralized SSL which requires communication and excessive data storage costs, but also sometimes outperform representations extracted from decentralized SL which requires extra knowledge about the data labels. Finally, we provide theoretical insights into understanding why data heterogeneity is less of a concern for Dec-SSL objectives, and introduce feature alignment and clustering techniques to develop a new Dec-SSL algorithm that further improves the performance, in the face of highly non-IID data. Our study presents positive evidence to embrace unlabeled data in decentralized learning, and we hope to provide new insights into whether and why decentralized SSL is effective. 去中心化学习已被提倡并广泛部署，以有效利用分布式数据集，并广泛关注监督学习（SL）问题。不幸的是，大多数现实世界的数据都没有标签，并且不同来源的数据可能高度异构。在这项工作中，我们通过自我监督学习（SSL）的视角，特别是对比视觉表示学习，仔细研究了使用未标记数据的去中心化学习。我们研究了分散学习设置下一系列对比学习算法在相对较大规模的数据集（包括 ImageNet-100、MS-COCO 和新的现实世界机器人仓库数据集）上的有效性。我们的实验表明，去中心化 SSL (Dec-SSL) 方法对于去中心化数据集的异构性具有鲁棒性，并且可以学习对象分类、检测和分割任务的有用表示。这种鲁棒性使得可以显着减少通信并降低数据源的参与率，而性能下降却极小。有趣的是，使用相同数量的数据，Dec-SSL 学习到的表示不仅可以与需要通信和过多数据存储成本的中心化 SSL 学习到的表示相媲美，而且有时还优于从去中心化 SL 中提取的表示（需要有关数据标签的额外知识）。最后，我们提供了理论见解来理解为什么数据异构性对于 Dec-SSL 目标来说不太重要，并引入特征对齐和聚类技术来开发新的 Dec-SSL 算法，在面对高度非独立同分布的数据时，进一步提高性能。我们的研究提供了在去中心化学习中接受未标记数据的积极证据，我们希望为去中心化 SSL 是否有效以及为何有效提供新的见解。 本文研究了在去中心化学习中利用非独立同分布（Non-IID）的未标记数据进行自监督学习（SSL）的有效性，特别是对比视觉表征学习。 Lirui Wang,Kaiqing Zhang,Yunzhu Li,Yonglong Tian,Russ Tedrake cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Xiaoyu Cao,Jinyuan Jia,Zaixi Zhang,Neil Zhenqiang Gong
title: FedRecover: Recovering from Poisoning Attacks in Federated Learning using Historical Information
title_zh: FedRecover：使用历史信息从联邦学习中的中毒攻击中恢复
abstract: Federated learning is vulnerable to poisoning attacks in which malicious clients poison the global model via sending malicious model updates to the server. Existing defenses focus on preventing a small number of malicious clients from poisoning the global model via robust federated learning methods and detecting malicious clients when there are a large number of them. However, it is still an open challenge how to recover the global model from poisoning attacks after the malicious clients are detected. A naive solution is to remove the detected malicious clients and train a new global model from scratch, which incurs large cost that may be intolerable for resource-constrained clients such as smartphones and IoT devices. In this work, we propose FedRecover, which can recover an accurate global model from poisoning attacks with small cost for the clients. Our key idea is that the server estimates the clients' model updates instead of asking the clients to compute and communicate them during the recovery process. In particular, the server stores the global models and clients' model updates in each round, when training the poisoned global model. During the recovery process, the server estimates a client's model update in each round using its stored historical information. Moreover, we further optimize FedRecover to recover a more accurate global model using warm-up, periodic correction, abnormality fixing, and final tuning strategies, in which the server asks the clients to compute and communicate their exact model updates. Theoretically, we show that the global model recovered by FedRecover is close to or the same as that recovered by train-from-scratch under some assumptions. Empirically, our evaluation on four datasets, three federated learning methods, as well as untargeted and targeted poisoning attacks (e.g., backdoor attacks) shows that FedRecover is both accurate and efficient.
summary: Federated learning is vulnerable to poisoning attacks in which malicious clients poison the global model via sending malicious model updates to the server. Existing defenses focus on preventing a small number of malicious clients from poisoning the global model via robust federated learning methods and detecting malicious clients when there are a large number of them. However, it is still an open challenge how to recover the global model from poisoning attacks after the malicious clients are detected. A naive solution is to remove the detected malicious clients and train a new global model from scratch, which incurs large cost that may be intolerable for resource-constrained clients such as smartphones and IoT devices. In this work, we propose FedRecover, which can recover an accurate global model from poisoning attacks with small cost for the clients. Our key idea is that the server estimates the clients' model updates instead of asking the clients to compute and communicate them during the recovery process. In particular, the server stores the global models and clients' model updates in each round, when training the poisoned global model. During the recovery process, the server estimates a client's model update in each round using its stored historical information. Moreover, we further optimize FedRecover to recover a more accurate global model using warm-up, periodic correction, abnormality fixing, and final tuning strategies, in which the server asks the clients to compute and communicate their exact model updates. Theoretically, we show that the global model recovered by FedRecover is close to or the same as that recovered by train-from-scratch under some assumptions. Empirically, our evaluation on four datasets, three federated learning methods, as well as untargeted and targeted poisoning attacks (e.g., backdoor attacks) shows that FedRecover is both accurate and efficient.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习很容易受到中毒攻击，其中恶意客户端通过向服务器发送恶意模型更新来毒害全局模型。现有的防御措施侧重于通过强大的联邦学习方法来防止少数恶意客户端毒害全局模型，并在恶意客户端数量较多时进行检测。然而，在检测到恶意客户端后如何从中毒攻击中恢复全局模型仍然是一个开放的挑战。一种简单的解决方案是删除检测到的恶意客户端并从头开始训练新的全局模型，这会产生巨大的成本，这对于智能手机和物联网设备等资源有限的客户端来说可能是无法忍受的。在这项工作中，我们提出了 FedRecover，它可以为客户以很小的成本从中毒攻击中恢复准确的全局模型。我们的关键思想是服务器估计客户端的模型更新，而不是要求客户端在恢复过程中计算和传达它们。特别地，在训练中毒的全局模型时，服务器存储每轮的全局模型和客户端的模型更新。在恢复过程中，服务器使用其存储的历史信息来估计客户端在每一轮中的模型更新。此外，我们进一步优化 FedRecover，使用预热、定期校正、异常修复和最终调整策略来恢复更准确的全局模型，其中服务器要求客户端计算和传达其确切的模型更新。理论上，我们表明在某些假设下，FedRecover 恢复的全局模型与从头开始训练恢复的全局模型接近或相同。根据经验，我们对四个数据集、三种联邦学习方法以及非目标和目标投毒攻击（例如后门攻击）的评估表明，FedRecover 既准确又高效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FedRecover方法，通过利用历史信息以低成本恢复联邦学习中受投毒攻击后的全局模型。
AI.motivation: 现有防御措施难以在检测到恶意客户端后高效恢复全局模型，而从头开始训练新模型成本过高，尤其对资源受限设备不友好。
AI.method: 服务器通过存储历史全局模型和客户端更新，在恢复过程中估算客户端模型更新，结合预热、周期校正等策略优化恢复效果。
AI.result: 在四个数据集和多种攻击场景下，FedRecover在准确率和效率上均优于从头训练方法，且能有效抵御目标性和非目标性投毒攻击。
AI.conclusion: FedRecover通过历史信息估算机制实现了低成本、高精度的模型恢复，为联邦学习安全提供了实用解决方案。

authors_text: Andres Alvarez,Nico Denner,Zhe Feng,David Fischer,Yang Gao,Lukas Harsch,Sebastian Herz,Nick Le Large,Bach Nguyen,Carlos Rosero,Simon Schaefer,Alexander Terletskiy,Luca Wahl,Shaoxiang Wang,Jonona Yakupova,Haocen Yu
title: The Software Stack That Won the Formula Student Driverless Competition
title_zh: 赢得学生方程式无人驾驶竞赛的软件堆栈
comment: Published and presented at OCAR-ICRA2022, the 2nd Workshop on Opportunities and Challenges with Autonomous Racing at the IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2022. Recording available at https://icra2022.f1tenth.org/program.html
comments: Published and presented at OCAR-ICRA2022, the 2nd Workshop on Opportunities and Challenges with Autonomous Racing at the IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2022. Recording available at https://icra2022.f1tenth.org/program.html
abstract: This report describes our approach to design and evaluate a software stack for a race car capable of achieving competitive driving performance in the different disciplines of the Formula Student Driverless. By using a 360° LiDAR and optionally three cameras, we reliably recognize the plastic cones that mark the track boundaries at distances of around 35 m, enabling us to drive at the physical limits of the car. Using a GraphSLAM algorithm, we are able to map these cones with a root-mean-square error of less than 15 cm while driving at speeds of over 70 kph on a narrow track. The high-precision map is used in the trajectory planning to detect the lane boundaries using Delaunay triangulation and a parametric cubic spline. We calculate an optimized trajectory using a minimum curvature approach together with a GGS-diagram that takes the aerodynamics at different velocities into account. To track the target path with accelerations of up to 1.6 g, the control system is split into a PI controller for longitudinal control and model predictive controller for lateral control. Additionally, a low-level optimal control allocation is used. The software is realized in ROS C++ and tested in a custom simulation, as well as on the actual race track.
summary: This report describes our approach to design and evaluate a software stack for a race car capable of achieving competitive driving performance in the different disciplines of the Formula Student Driverless. By using a 360° LiDAR and optionally three cameras, we reliably recognize the plastic cones that mark the track boundaries at distances of around 35 m, enabling us to drive at the physical limits of the car. Using a GraphSLAM algorithm, we are able to map these cones with a root-mean-square error of less than 15 cm while driving at speeds of over 70 kph on a narrow track. The high-precision map is used in the trajectory planning to detect the lane boundaries using Delaunay triangulation and a parametric cubic spline. We calculate an optimized trajectory using a minimum curvature approach together with a GGS-diagram that takes the aerodynamics at different velocities into account. To track the target path with accelerations of up to 1.6 g, the control system is split into a PI controller for longitudinal control and model predictive controller for lateral control. Additionally, a low-level optimal control allocation is used. The software is realized in ROS C++ and tested in a custom simulation, as well as on the actual race track.
abstract_zh: 本报告描述了我们设计和评估赛车软件堆栈的方法，该软件堆栈能够在学生无人驾驶方程式的不同学科中实现有竞争力的驾驶性能。通过使用 360° LiDAR 和可选的三个摄像头，我们能够可靠地识别标​​记距离约 35 m 的赛道边界的塑料锥体，使我们能够在汽车的物理极限范围内行驶。使用 GraphSLAM 算法，当我们在狭窄的赛道上以超过 70 公里/小时的速度行驶时，我们能够以小于 15 厘米的均方根误差来绘制这些锥体。高精度地图用于轨迹规划，通过 Delaunay 三角测量和参数三次样条来检测车道边界。我们使用最小曲率方法以及考虑不同速度下的空气动力学的 GGS 图来计算优化轨迹。为了以高达 1.6 g 的加速度跟踪目标路径，控制系统分为用于纵向控制的 PI 控制器和用于横向控制的模型预测控制器。此外，还使用低级最优控制分配。该软件在 ROS C++ 中实现，并在自定义模拟以及实际赛道上进行了测试。

AI.tldr: 设计并评估用于Formula Student Driverless竞赛的高性能赛车软件栈
AI.motivation: 实现可靠赛道边界识别与高精度地图构建，提升赛车在复杂赛道的自动导航与轨迹规划能力
AI.method: 融合360° LiDAR与摄像头数据，采用GraphSLAM算法构建高精度地图，结合Delaunay三角化与参数三次样条规划轨迹，分层控制架构实现高动态响应
AI.result: 实现35米距离锥形标志识别，15cm级地图精度，70kph高速下1.6g加速度轨迹跟踪，实际赛道验证系统有效性
AI.conclusion: 多传感器融合与优化控制算法的集成方案成功实现竞赛级自动驾驶性能，验证了软件栈在极限工况下的可靠性

search_text: The Software Stack That Won the Formula Student Driverless Competition 赢得学生方程式无人驾驶竞赛的软件堆栈 This report describes our approach to design and evaluate a software stack for a race car capable of achieving competitive driving performance in the different disciplines of the Formula Student Driverless. By using a 360° LiDAR and optionally three cameras, we reliably recognize the plastic cones that mark the track boundaries at distances of around 35 m, enabling us to drive at the physical limits of the car. Using a GraphSLAM algorithm, we are able to map these cones with a root-mean-square error of less than 15 cm while driving at speeds of over 70 kph on a narrow track. The high-precision map is used in the trajectory planning to detect the lane boundaries using Delaunay triangulation and a parametric cubic spline. We calculate an optimized trajectory using a minimum curvature approach together with a GGS-diagram that takes the aerodynamics at different velocities into account. To track the target path with accelerations of up to 1.6 g, the control system is split into a PI controller for longitudinal control and model predictive controller for lateral control. Additionally, a low-level optimal control allocation is used. The software is realized in ROS C++ and tested in a custom simulation, as well as on the actual race track. 本报告描述了我们设计和评估赛车软件堆栈的方法，该软件堆栈能够在学生无人驾驶方程式的不同学科中实现有竞争力的驾驶性能。通过使用 360° LiDAR 和可选的三个摄像头，我们能够可靠地识别标​​记距离约 35 m 的赛道边界的塑料锥体，使我们能够在汽车的物理极限范围内行驶。使用 GraphSLAM 算法，当我们在狭窄的赛道上以超过 70 公里/小时的速度行驶时，我们能够以小于 15 厘米的均方根误差来绘制这些锥体。高精度地图用于轨迹规划，通过 Delaunay 三角测量和参数三次样条来检测车道边界。我们使用最小曲率方法以及考虑不同速度下的空气动力学的 GGS 图来计算优化轨迹。为了以高达 1.6 g 的加速度跟踪目标路径，控制系统分为用于纵向控制的 PI 控制器和用于横向控制的模型预测控制器。此外，还使用低级最优控制分配。该软件在 ROS C++ 中实现，并在自定义模拟以及实际赛道上进行了测试。 设计并评估用于Formula Student Driverless竞赛的高性能赛车软件栈 Andres Alvarez,Nico Denner,Zhe Feng,David Fischer,Yang Gao,Lukas Harsch,Sebastian Herz,Nick Le Large,Bach Nguyen,Carlos Rosero,Simon Schaefer,Alexander Terletskiy,Luca Wahl,Shaoxiang Wang,Jonona Yakupova,Haocen Yu cs.RO

title: Hierarchical classification at multiple operating points
title_zh: 多个工作点的层次分类
abstract: Many classification problems consider classes that form a hierarchy. Classifiers that are aware of this hierarchy may be able to make confident predictions at a coarse level despite being uncertain at the fine-grained level. While it is generally possible to vary the granularity of predictions using a threshold at inference time, most contemporary work considers only leaf-node prediction, and almost no prior work has compared methods at multiple operating points. We present an efficient algorithm to produce operating characteristic curves for any method that assigns a score to every class in the hierarchy. Applying this technique to evaluate existing methods reveals that top-down classifiers are dominated by a naive flat softmax classifier across the entire operating range. We further propose two novel loss functions and show that a soft variant of the structured hinge loss is able to significantly outperform the flat baseline. Finally, we investigate the poor accuracy of top-down classifiers and demonstrate that they perform relatively well on unseen classes. Code is available online at https://github.com/jvlmdr/hiercls.
summary: Many classification problems consider classes that form a hierarchy. Classifiers that are aware of this hierarchy may be able to make confident predictions at a coarse level despite being uncertain at the fine-grained level. While it is generally possible to vary the granularity of predictions using a threshold at inference time, most contemporary work considers only leaf-node prediction, and almost no prior work has compared methods at multiple operating points. We present an efficient algorithm to produce operating characteristic curves for any method that assigns a score to every class in the hierarchy. Applying this technique to evaluate existing methods reveals that top-down classifiers are dominated by a naive flat softmax classifier across the entire operating range. We further propose two novel loss functions and show that a soft variant of the structured hinge loss is able to significantly outperform the flat baseline. Finally, we investigate the poor accuracy of top-down classifiers and demonstrate that they perform relatively well on unseen classes. Code is available online at https://github.com/jvlmdr/hiercls.
abstract_zh: 许多分类问题都考虑形成层次结构的类。尽管在细粒度级别上不确定，但了解此层次结构的分类器可能能够在粗粒度级别上做出可靠的预测。虽然通常可以在推理时使用阈值来改变预测的粒度，但大多数当代工作仅考虑叶节点预测，并且几乎没有先前的工作在多个操作点上比较方法。我们提出了一种有效的算法，可以为任何为层次结构中的每个类别分配分数的方法生成操作特征曲线。应用这种技术来评估现有方法表明，自上而下的分类器在整个操作范围内主要由朴素的平坦 Softmax 分类器主导。我们进一步提出了两种新颖的损失函数，并表明结构化铰链损失的软变体能够显着优于平坦基线。最后，我们研究了自上而下分类器的较差准确性，并证明它们在看不见的类上表现相对较好。代码可在线获取：https://github.com/jvlmdr/hiercls。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在多层次分类任务中评估不同操作点的高效算法，并设计了新的损失函数以提升分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有分类方法多关注叶节点预测，缺乏对多操作点的比较，且层级分类器在细粒度不确定时难以利用层级结构优势。
AI.method: 开发了生成操作特征曲线的算法，提出两种新型损失函数（包括软结构化铰链损失），并分析层级分类器在未见类上的表现。
AI.result: 传统自上而下分类器在所有操作点均被平 softmax 分类器超越，而软结构化铰链损失显著优于基线；层级分类器在未见类上表现相对较好。
AI.conclusion: 需在多操作点评估层级分类方法，新损失函数有效提升性能，但自上而下方法存在固有局限性。

title: Gradient Backpropagation based Feature Attribution to Enable Explainable-AI on the Edge
title_zh: 基于梯度反向传播的特征归因，可在边缘实现可解释的人工智能
comment: To appear in 30th IFIP/IEEE International Conference on Very Large Scale Integration (VLSI-SoC 2022
comments: To appear in 30th IFIP/IEEE International Conference on Very Large Scale Integration (VLSI-SoC 2022
abstract: There has been a recent surge in the field of Explainable AI (XAI) which tackles the problem of providing insights into the behavior of black-box machine learning models. Within this field, \textit{feature attribution} encompasses methods which assign relevance scores to input features and visualize them as a heatmap. Designing flexible accelerators for multiple such algorithms is challenging since the hardware mapping of these algorithms has not been studied yet. In this work, we first analyze the dataflow of gradient backpropagation based feature attribution algorithms to determine the resource overhead required over inference. The gradient computation is optimized to minimize the memory overhead. Second, we develop a High-Level Synthesis (HLS) based configurable FPGA design that is targeted for edge devices and supports three feature attribution algorithms. Tile based computation is employed to maximally use on-chip resources while adhering to the resource constraints. Representative CNNs are trained on CIFAR-10 dataset and implemented on multiple Xilinx FPGAs using 16-bit fixed-point precision demonstrating flexibility of our library. Finally, through efficient reuse of allocated hardware resources, our design methodology demonstrates a pathway to repurpose inference accelerators to support feature attribution with minimal overhead, thereby enabling real-time XAI on the edge.
summary: There has been a recent surge in the field of Explainable AI (XAI) which tackles the problem of providing insights into the behavior of black-box machine learning models. Within this field, \textit{feature attribution} encompasses methods which assign relevance scores to input features and visualize them as a heatmap. Designing flexible accelerators for multiple such algorithms is challenging since the hardware mapping of these algorithms has not been studied yet. In this work, we first analyze the dataflow of gradient backpropagation based feature attribution algorithms to determine the resource overhead required over inference. The gradient computation is optimized to minimize the memory overhead. Second, we develop a High-Level Synthesis (HLS) based configurable FPGA design that is targeted for edge devices and supports three feature attribution algorithms. Tile based computation is employed to maximally use on-chip resources while adhering to the resource constraints. Representative CNNs are trained on CIFAR-10 dataset and implemented on multiple Xilinx FPGAs using 16-bit fixed-point precision demonstrating flexibility of our library. Finally, through efficient reuse of allocated hardware resources, our design methodology demonstrates a pathway to repurpose inference accelerators to support feature attribution with minimal overhead, thereby enabling real-time XAI on the edge.
abstract_zh: 最近可解释人工智能（XAI）领域出现了激增，它解决了提供对黑盒机器学习模型行为的洞察的问题。在该领域中，\textit{特征归因}包含为输入特征分配相关性分数并将其可视化为热图的方法。为多种此类算法设计灵活的加速器具有挑战性，因为尚未研究这些算法的硬件映射。在这项工作中，我们首先分析基于梯度反向传播的特征归因算法的数据流，以确定推理所需的资源开销。梯度计算经过优化以最小化内存开销。其次，我们开发了一种基于高级综合 (HLS) 的可配置 FPGA 设计，该设计针对边缘设备并支持三种特征归因算法。采用基于图块的计算来最大限度地利用片上资源，同时遵守资源限制。代表性 CNN 在 CIFAR-10 数据集上进行训练，并使用 16 位定点精度在多个 Xilinx FPGA 上实现，展示了我们库的灵活性。最后，通过有效地重用分配的硬件资源，我们的设计方法展示了一种重新利用推理加速器的途径，以最小的开销支持特征归因，从而在边缘实现实时 XAI。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于梯度反向传播的特征归因方法，旨在在边缘设备上实现可解释人工智能（XAI）。
AI.motivation: 现有硬件加速器难以灵活支持多种特征归因算法，且未研究其硬件映射，导致边缘设备难以实现实时XAI。
AI.method: 分析梯度反向传播算法的数据流以优化内存开销，并设计基于HLS的可配置FPGA架构，采用分块计算以适应资源约束。
AI.result: 在Xilinx FPGA上使用16位定点精度实现多个CNN模型，验证了设计的灵活性和资源复用效率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过高效复用硬件资源，以最小开销将推理加速器改造为支持特征归因的XAI系统，实现边缘实时可解释性。

Tile based computation is employed to maximally use on-chip resources while adhering to the resource constraints. Representative CNNs are trained on CIFAR-10 dataset and implemented on multiple Xilinx FPGAs using 16-bit fixed-point precision demonstrating flexibility of our library. Finally, through efficient reuse of allocated hardware resources, our design methodology demonstrates a pathway to repurpose inference accelerators to support feature attribution with minimal overhead, thereby enabling real-time XAI on the edge. 最近可解释人工智能（XAI）领域出现了激增，它解决了提供对黑盒机器学习模型行为的洞察的问题。在该领域中，\textit{特征归因}包含为输入特征分配相关性分数并将其可视化为热图的方法。为多种此类算法设计灵活的加速器具有挑战性，因为尚未研究这些算法的硬件映射。在这项工作中，我们首先分析基于梯度反向传播的特征归因算法的数据流，以确定推理所需的资源开销。梯度计算经过优化以最小化内存开销。其次，我们开发了一种基于高级综合 (HLS) 的可配置 FPGA 设计，该设计针对边缘设备并支持三种特征归因算法。采用基于图块的计算来最大限度地利用片上资源，同时遵守资源限制。代表性 CNN 在 CIFAR-10 数据集上进行训练，并使用 16 位定点精度在多个 Xilinx FPGA 上实现，展示了我们库的灵活性。最后，通过有效地重用分配的硬件资源，我们的设计方法展示了一种重新利用推理加速器的途径，以最小的开销支持特征归因，从而在边缘实现实时 XAI。 本文提出了一种基于梯度反向传播的特征归因方法，旨在在边缘设备上实现可解释人工智能（XAI）。 Ashwin Bhat,Adou Sangbone Assoa,Arijit Raychowdhury cs.AR,cs.AI,cs.LG,eess.IV

title: DOT-VAE: Disentangling One Factor at a Time
title_zh: DOT-VAE：一次解开一个因素
abstract: As we enter the era of machine learning characterized by an overabundance of data, discovery, organization, and interpretation of the data in an unsupervised manner becomes a critical need. One promising approach to this endeavour is the problem of Disentanglement, which aims at learning the underlying generative latent factors, called the factors of variation, of the data and encoding them in disjoint latent representations. Recent advances have made efforts to solve this problem for synthetic datasets generated by a fixed set of independent factors of variation. Here, we propose to extend this to real-world datasets with a countable number of factors of variations. We propose a novel framework which augments the latent space of a Variational Autoencoders with a disentangled space and is trained using a Wake-Sleep-inspired two-step algorithm for unsupervised disentanglement. Our network learns to disentangle interpretable, independent factors from the data ``one at a time", and encode it in different dimensions of the disentangled latent space, while making no prior assumptions about the number of factors or their joint distribution. We demonstrate its quantitative and qualitative effectiveness by evaluating the latent representations learned on two synthetic benchmark datasets; DSprites and 3DShapes and on a real datasets CelebA.
summary: As we enter the era of machine learning characterized by an overabundance of data, discovery, organization, and interpretation of the data in an unsupervised manner becomes a critical need. One promising approach to this endeavour is the problem of Disentanglement, which aims at learning the underlying generative latent factors, called the factors of variation, of the data and encoding them in disjoint latent representations. Recent advances have made efforts to solve this problem for synthetic datasets generated by a fixed set of independent factors of variation. Here, we propose to extend this to real-world datasets with a countable number of factors of variations. We propose a novel framework which augments the latent space of a Variational Autoencoders with a disentangled space and is trained using a Wake-Sleep-inspired two-step algorithm for unsupervised disentanglement. Our network learns to disentangle interpretable, independent factors from the data ``one at a time", and encode it in different dimensions of the disentangled latent space, while making no prior assumptions about the number of factors or their joint distribution. We demonstrate its quantitative and qualitative effectiveness by evaluating the latent representations learned on two synthetic benchmark datasets; DSprites and 3DShapes and on a real datasets CelebA.
abstract_zh: 随着我们进入以数据过多为特征的机器学习时代，以无监督的方式发现、组织和解释数据成为一项关键需求。这项工作的一个有希望的方法是解缠结问题，其目的是学习数据的潜在生成潜在因素，称为变异因素，并将它们编码为不相交的潜在表示。最近的进展已经努力解决由一组固定的独立变异因素生成的合成数据集的问题。在这里，我们建议将其扩展到具有可数个变化因素的现实世界数据集。我们提出了一种新颖的框架，它通过解纠缠空间增强了变分自动编码器的潜在空间，并使用唤醒-睡眠启发的两步算法进行训练，以实现无监督解纠缠。我们的网络学习“一次一个”地从数据中分离出可解释的独立因素，并将其编码在分离的潜在空间的不同维度中，同时不对因素的数量或其联合分布做出事先假设。我们通过评估在两个合成基准数据集 DSprites 和 3DShapes 以及真实数据集 CelebA 上学习的潜在表示来证明其定量和定性有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DOT-VAE框架，通过扩展变分自编码器的潜在空间，实现对现实数据集中可数变量因素的逐步解耦。
AI.motivation: 在数据丰富的机器学习时代，需要无监督方法发现数据潜在生成因素。现有方法多针对合成数据的固定独立因素，难以处理现实数据中数量可变且非独立的因素。
AI.method: 设计包含解耦潜在空间的VAE框架，采用启发自Wake-Sleep算法的两阶段训练策略，逐步学习并分离数据中的可解释独立因素，无需预设因素数量或联合分布。
AI.result: 在DSprites、3DShapes合成数据集和CelebA真实数据集上，定量与定性评估均验证了所学潜在表征的有效性。
AI.conclusion: DOT-VAE成功实现了对现实数据中变量因素的逐步解耦，无需先验假设因素数量或分布，展示了方法在合成与真实数据中的有效性。

title: Substring Density Estimation from Traces
title_zh: 根据迹线估计子串密度
abstract: In the trace reconstruction problem, one seeks to reconstruct a binary string $s$ from a collection of traces, each of which is obtained by passing $s$ through a deletion channel. It is known that $\exp(\tilde O(n^{1/5}))$ traces suffice to reconstruct any length-$n$ string with high probability. We consider a variant of the trace reconstruction problem where the goal is to recover a "density map" that indicates the locations of each length-$k$ substring throughout $s$. We show that $ε^{-2}\cdot \text{poly}(n)$ traces suffice to recover the density map with error at most $ε$. As a result, when restricted to a set of source strings whose minimum "density map distance" is at least $1/\text{poly}(n)$, the trace reconstruction problem can be solved with polynomially many traces.
summary: In the trace reconstruction problem, one seeks to reconstruct a binary string $s$ from a collection of traces, each of which is obtained by passing $s$ through a deletion channel. It is known that $\exp(\tilde O(n^{1/5}))$ traces suffice to reconstruct any length-$n$ string with high probability. We consider a variant of the trace reconstruction problem where the goal is to recover a "density map" that indicates the locations of each length-$k$ substring throughout $s$. We show that $ε^{-2}\cdot \text{poly}(n)$ traces suffice to recover the density map with error at most $ε$. As a result, when restricted to a set of source strings whose minimum "density map distance" is at least $1/\text{poly}(n)$, the trace reconstruction problem can be solved with polynomially many traces.
abstract_zh: 在踪迹重建问题中，人们试图从踪迹集合中重建二进制字符串 $s$，每个踪迹都是通过将 $s$ 通过删除通道来获得的。已知 $\exp(\tilde O(n^{1/5}))$ 迹足以以高概率重建任何长度为 $n$ 的字符串。我们考虑轨迹重建问题的一个变体，其目标是恢复一个“密度图”，该图指示整个 $s$ 中每个长度 $k$ 子串的位置。我们证明 $ε^{-2}\cdot \text{poly}(n)$ 迹线足以恢复密度图，误差最多为 $ε$。因此，当限制到最小“密度图距离”至少为 $1/\text{poly}(n)$ 的一组源字符串时，可以使用多项式多迹来解决迹重构问题。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过痕迹（traces）估计二进制字符串中所有长度为k的子串的密度分布。
AI.motivation: 传统痕迹重建问题旨在恢复原始字符串，但本文提出更精细的目标——通过密度映射定位子串位置，从而在特定条件下降低痕迹数量需求。
AI.method: 分析删除信道生成的痕迹，通过统计子串出现频率并结合误差分析，建立密度映射的估计方法。
AI.result: 证明使用ε⁻²·poly(n)条痕迹即可以误差不超过ε恢复密度映射；当字符串集合的密度映射距离不小于1/poly(n)时，可多项式数量痕迹完成重建。
AI.conclusion: 密度映射估计方法为痕迹重建提供了更高效的解决方案，尤其适用于满足特定距离条件的字符串集合。

authors_text: Fenglin Liu,Xuancheng Ren,Xian Wu,Wei Fan,Yuexian Zou,Xu Sun
title: Prophet Attention: Predicting Attention with Future Attention for Image Captioning
title_zh: 先知注意力：用图像字幕的未来注意力来预测注意力
abstract: Recently, attention based models have been used extensively in many sequence-to-sequence learning systems. Especially for image captioning, the attention based models are expected to ground correct image regions with proper generated words. However, for each time step in the decoding process, the attention based models usually use the hidden state of the current input to attend to the image regions. Under this setting, these attention models have a "deviated focus" problem that they calculate the attention weights based on previous words instead of the one to be generated, impairing the performance of both grounding and captioning. In this paper, we propose the Prophet Attention, similar to the form of self-supervision. In the training stage, this module utilizes the future information to calculate the "ideal" attention weights towards image regions. These calculated "ideal" weights are further used to regularize the "deviated" attention. In this manner, image regions are grounded with the correct words. The proposed Prophet Attention can be easily incorporated into existing image captioning models to improve their performance of both grounding and captioning. The experiments on the Flickr30k Entities and the MSCOCO datasets show that the proposed Prophet Attention consistently outperforms baselines in both automatic metrics and human evaluations. It is worth noticing that we set new state-of-the-arts on the two benchmark datasets and achieve the 1st place on the leaderboard of the online MSCOCO benchmark in terms of the default ranking score, i.e., CIDEr-c40.
summary: Recently, attention based models have been used extensively in many sequence-to-sequence learning systems. Especially for image captioning, the attention based models are expected to ground correct image regions with proper generated words. However, for each time step in the decoding process, the attention based models usually use the hidden state of the current input to attend to the image regions. Under this setting, these attention models have a "deviated focus" problem that they calculate the attention weights based on previous words instead of the one to be generated, impairing the performance of both grounding and captioning. In this paper, we propose the Prophet Attention, similar to the form of self-supervision. In the training stage, this module utilizes the future information to calculate the "ideal" attention weights towards image regions. These calculated "ideal" weights are further used to regularize the "deviated" attention. In this manner, image regions are grounded with the correct words. The proposed Prophet Attention can be easily incorporated into existing image captioning models to improve their performance of both grounding and captioning. The experiments on the Flickr30k Entities and the MSCOCO datasets show that the proposed Prophet Attention consistently outperforms baselines in both automatic metrics and human evaluations. It is worth noticing that we set new state-of-the-arts on the two benchmark datasets and achieve the 1st place on the leaderboard of the online MSCOCO benchmark in terms of the default ranking score, i.e., CIDEr-c40.
abstract_zh: 最近，基于注意力的模型已广泛用于许多序列到序列的学习系统。特别是对于图像字幕，基于注意力的模型有望用正确的生成单词来确定正确的图像区域。然而，对于解码过程中的每个时间步骤，基于注意力的模型通常使用当前输入的隐藏状态来关注图像区域。在这种设置下，这些注意力模型存在“焦点偏离”问题，即它们根据之前的单词而不是要生成的单词来计算注意力权重，从而损害了基础和字幕的性能。在本文中，我们提出了Prophet Attention，类似于自我监督的形式。在训练阶段，该模块利用未来信息来计算针对图像区域的“理想”注意力权重。这些计算出的“理想”权重进一步用于规范“偏差”注意力。以这种方式，图像区域以正确的单词为基础。所提出的 Prophet Attention 可以轻松地合并到现有的图像字幕模型中，以提高其基础和字幕的性能。在 Flickr30k 实体和 MSCOCO 数据集上的实验表明，所提出的 Prophet Attention 在自动指标和人类评估方面始终优于基线。值得注意的是，我们在两个基准数据集上创造了新的最先进水平，并在默认排名分数（即 CIDEr-c40）方面取得了在线 MSCOCO 基准排行榜上的第一名。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Prophet Attention的新方法，用于改进图像描述生成中的注意力机制。
AI.motivation: 传统的注意力模型在解码过程中使用当前输入的隐藏状态来关注图像区域，导致注意力权重基于先前生成的词语而非即将生成的词语，从而影响了图像区域的正确对齐和描述生成效果。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种类似自监督的方法，称为Prophet Attention。在训练阶段，该模块利用未来信息计算图像区域的“理想”注意力权重，并用这些权重来正则化“偏离”的注意力，从而实现图像区域与正确词语的对齐。
AI.result: 在Flickr30k Entities和MSCOCO数据集上的实验表明，该方法在自动指标和人工评估中均优于基线方法，并在MSCOCO在线基准测试中取得了新的最先进成果。
AI.conclusion: Prophet Attention方法能够有效改进图像描述生成中的注意力机制，提升图像区域对齐和描述生成的性能，具有良好的应用前景。

search_text: Prophet Attention: Predicting Attention with Future Attention for Image Captioning 先知注意力：用图像字幕的未来注意力来预测注意力 Recently, attention based models have been used extensively in many sequence-to-sequence learning systems. Especially for image captioning, the attention based models are expected to ground correct image regions with proper generated words. However, for each time step in the decoding process, the attention based models usually use the hidden state of the current input to attend to the image regions. Under this setting, these attention models have a "deviated focus" problem that they calculate the attention weights based on previous words instead of the one to be generated, impairing the performance of both grounding and captioning. In this paper, we propose the Prophet Attention, similar to the form of self-supervision. In the training stage, this module utilizes the future information to calculate the "ideal" attention weights towards image regions. These calculated "ideal" weights are further used to regularize the "deviated" attention. In this manner, image regions are grounded with the correct words. The proposed Prophet Attention can be easily incorporated into existing image captioning models to improve their performance of both grounding and captioning. The experiments on the Flickr30k Entities and the MSCOCO datasets show that the proposed Prophet Attention consistently outperforms baselines in both automatic metrics and human evaluations. It is worth noticing that we set new state-of-the-arts on the two benchmark datasets and achieve the 1st place on the leaderboard of the online MSCOCO benchmark in terms of the default ranking score, i.e., CIDEr-c40. 最近，基于注意力的模型已广泛用于许多序列到序列的学习系统。特别是对于图像字幕，基于注意力的模型有望用正确的生成单词来确定正确的图像区域。然而，对于解码过程中的每个时间步骤，基于注意力的模型通常使用当前输入的隐藏状态来关注图像区域。在这种设置下，这些注意力模型存在“焦点偏离”问题，即它们根据之前的单词而不是要生成的单词来计算注意力权重，从而损害了基础和字幕的性能。在本文中，我们提出了Prophet Attention，类似于自我监督的形式。在训练阶段，该模块利用未来信息来计算针对图像区域的“理想”注意力权重。这些计算出的“理想”权重进一步用于规范“偏差”注意力。以这种方式，图像区域以正确的单词为基础。所提出的 Prophet Attention 可以轻松地合并到现有的图像字幕模型中，以提高其基础和字幕的性能。在 Flickr30k 实体和 MSCOCO 数据集上的实验表明，所提出的 Prophet Attention 在自动指标和人类评估方面始终优于基线。值得注意的是，我们在两个基准数据集上创造了新的最先进水平，并在默认排名分数（即 CIDEr-c40）方面取得了在线 MSCOCO 基准排行榜上的第一名。 本文提出了一种名为Prophet Attention的新方法，用于改进图像描述生成中的注意力机制。 Fenglin Liu,Xuancheng Ren,Xian Wu,Wei Fan,Yuexian Zou,Xu Sun cs.CV,cs.CL

title: Palm up: Playing in the Latent Manifold for Unsupervised Pretraining
title_zh: 掌心向上：在潜在流形中进行无监督预训练
comment: Thirty-sixth Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022)
comments: Thirty-sixth Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022)
abstract: Large and diverse datasets have been the cornerstones of many impressive advancements in artificial intelligence. Intelligent creatures, however, learn by interacting with the environment, which changes the input sensory signals and the state of the environment. In this work, we aim to bring the best of both worlds and propose an algorithm that exhibits an exploratory behavior whilst it utilizes large diverse datasets. Our key idea is to leverage deep generative models that are pretrained on static datasets and introduce a dynamic model in the latent space. The transition dynamics simply mixes an action and a random sampled latent. It then applies an exponential moving average for temporal persistency, the resulting latent is decoded to image using pretrained generator. We then employ an unsupervised reinforcement learning algorithm to explore in this environment and perform unsupervised representation learning on the collected data. We further leverage the temporal information of this data to pair data points as a natural supervision for representation learning. Our experiments suggest that the learned representations can be successfully transferred to downstream tasks in both vision and reinforcement learning domains.
summary: Large and diverse datasets have been the cornerstones of many impressive advancements in artificial intelligence. Intelligent creatures, however, learn by interacting with the environment, which changes the input sensory signals and the state of the environment. In this work, we aim to bring the best of both worlds and propose an algorithm that exhibits an exploratory behavior whilst it utilizes large diverse datasets. Our key idea is to leverage deep generative models that are pretrained on static datasets and introduce a dynamic model in the latent space. The transition dynamics simply mixes an action and a random sampled latent. It then applies an exponential moving average for temporal persistency, the resulting latent is decoded to image using pretrained generator. We then employ an unsupervised reinforcement learning algorithm to explore in this environment and perform unsupervised representation learning on the collected data. We further leverage the temporal information of this data to pair data points as a natural supervision for representation learning. Our experiments suggest that the learned representations can be successfully transferred to downstream tasks in both vision and reinforcement learning domains.
abstract_zh: 庞大且多样化的数据集是人工智能领域许多令人印象深刻的进步的基石。然而，智能生物通过与环境交互来学习，这会改变输入的感官信号和环境状态。在这项工作中，我们的目标是两全其美，并提出一种在利用大量多样化数据集的同时表现出探索行为的算法。我们的关键思想是利用在静态数据集上预训练的深度生成模型，并在潜在空间中引入动态模型。过渡动力学简单地混合了动作和随机采样的潜在变量。然后，它应用指数移动平均值来实现时间持久性，使用预训练的生成器将生成的潜在图像解码为图像。然后，我们采用无监督强化学习算法在这种环境中进行探索，并对收集的数据执行无监督表示学习。我们进一步利用该数据的时间信息来配对数据点，作为表示学习的自然监督。我们的实验表明，学习到的表示可以成功地转移到视觉和强化学习领域的下游任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合生成模型与强化学习的无监督预训练方法，在潜在空间中动态探索以提升表示学习。
AI.motivation: 传统预训练依赖静态数据集，而生物学习通过环境交互动态调整。作者旨在融合两者优势，使模型在利用大规模数据的同时具备探索能力。
AI.method: 利用预训练生成模型构建潜在空间，通过动作与随机潜在变量混合生成动态轨迹，结合指数移动平均保持时序连贯性，并采用无监督强化学习探索环境，利用时序信息作为自然监督信号。
AI.result: 实验表明所学表示能有效迁移到视觉与强化学习下游任务，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过潜在空间动态探索机制，成功结合静态数据集与环境交互优势，为无监督表征学习提供新思路。

title: Machine and Deep Learning Methods with Manual and Automatic Labelling for News Classification in Bangla Language
title_zh: 用于孟加拉语新闻分类的具有手动和自动标记的机器和深度学习方法
abstract: Research in Natural Language Processing (NLP) has increasingly become important due to applications such as text classification, text mining, sentiment analysis, POS tagging, named entity recognition, textual entailment, and many others. This paper introduces several machine and deep learning methods with manual and automatic labelling for news classification in the Bangla language. We implemented several machine (ML) and deep learning (DL) algorithms. The ML algorithms are Logistic Regression (LR), Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD), Support Vector Machine (SVM), Random Forest (RF), and K-Nearest Neighbour (KNN), used with Bag of Words (BoW), Term Frequency-Inverse Document Frequency (TF-IDF), and Doc2Vec embedding models. The DL algorithms are Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM), Bidirectional LSTM (BiLSTM), Gated Recurrent Unit (GRU), and Convolutional Neural Network (CNN), used with Word2vec, Glove, and FastText word embedding models. We develop automatic labelling methods using Latent Dirichlet Allocation (LDA) and investigate the performance of single-label and multi-label article classification methods. To investigate performance, we developed from scratch Potrika, the largest and the most extensive dataset for news classification in the Bangla language, comprising 185.51 million words and 12.57 million sentences contained in 664,880 news articles in eight distinct categories, curated from six popular online news portals in Bangladesh for the period 2014-2020. GRU and Fasttext with 91.83% achieve the highest accuracy for manually-labelled data. For the automatic labelling case, KNN and Doc2Vec at 57.72% and 75% achieve the highest accuracy for single-label and multi-label data, respectively. The methods developed in this paper are expected to advance research in Bangla and other languages.

The DL algorithms are Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM), Bidirectional LSTM (BiLSTM), Gated Recurrent Unit (GRU), and Convolutional Neural Network (CNN), used with Word2vec, Glove, and FastText word embedding models. We develop automatic labelling methods using Latent Dirichlet Allocation (LDA) and investigate the performance of single-label and multi-label article classification methods. For the automatic labelling case, KNN and Doc2Vec at 57.72% and 75% achieve the highest accuracy for single-label and multi-label data, respectively. The methods developed in this paper are expected to advance research in Bangla and other languages.
abstract_zh: 由于文本分类、文本挖掘、情感分析、词性标注、命名实体识别、文本蕴涵等应用，自然语言处理 (NLP) 的研究变得越来越重要。本文介绍了几种用于孟加拉语新闻分类的机器和深度学习方法，具有手动和自动标记功能。我们实现了多种机器 (ML) 和深度学习 (DL) 算法。 ML 算法包括逻辑回归 (LR)、随机梯度下降 (SGD)、支持向量机 (SVM)、随机森林 (RF) 和 K 最近邻 (KNN)，与词袋 (BoW)、词频-逆文档频率 (TF-IDF) 和 Doc2Vec 嵌入模型结合使用。深度学习算法包括长短期记忆 (LSTM)、双向 LSTM (BiLSTM)、门控循环单元 (GRU) 和卷积神经网络 (CNN)，与 Word2vec、Glove 和 FastText 词嵌入模型一起使用。我们使用潜在狄利克雷分配（LDA）开发自动标记方法，并研究单标签和多标签文章分类方法的性能。为了调查性能，我们从头开始开发了 Potrika，这是最大、最广泛的孟加拉语新闻分类数据集，包含 8 个不同类别的 664,880 篇新闻文章中的 1.8551 亿个单词和 1257 万个句子，这些新闻文章是从 2014 年至 2020 年期间孟加拉国六个流行的在线新闻门户网站策划的。 GRU 和 Fasttext 达到了 91.83% 的手动标记数据的最高准确率。对于自动标记情况，KNN 和 Doc2Vec 分别以 57.72% 和 75% 实现了单标签和多标签数据的最高准确率。本文开发的方法有望推进孟加拉语和其他语言的研究。

AI.tldr: 该论文介绍了多种机器学习和深度学习方法，结合手动和自动标注技术，用于孟加拉语新闻分类。
AI.motivation: 由于孟加拉语等低资源语言的自然语言处理研究相对较少，需要开发有效的新闻分类方法以推动相关领域的发展。
AI.method: 采用逻辑回归、SVM、GRU等机器学习与深度学习算法，结合BoW、TF-IDF、Word2Vec等模型，并利用LDA进行自动标注，构建名为Potrika的孟加拉语新闻数据集。
AI.result: 手动标注数据中GRU+FastText达到91.83%最高准确率；自动标注中KNN+Doc2Vec在单标签和多标签任务中分别达到57.72%和75%。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架和数据集为孟加拉语及其他语言的自然语言处理研究提供了重要支持。

search_text: Machine and Deep Learning Methods with Manual and Automatic Labelling for News Classification in Bangla Language 用于孟加拉语新闻分类的具有手动和自动标记的机器和深度学习方法 Research in Natural Language Processing (NLP) has increasingly become important due to applications such as text classification, text mining, sentiment analysis, POS tagging, named entity recognition, textual entailment, and many others. This paper introduces several machine and deep learning methods with manual and automatic labelling for news classification in the Bangla language. We implemented several machine (ML) and deep learning (DL) algorithms. The ML algorithms are Logistic Regression (LR), Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD), Support Vector Machine (SVM), Random Forest (RF), and K-Nearest Neighbour (KNN), used with Bag of Words (BoW), Term Frequency-Inverse Document Frequency (TF-IDF), and Doc2Vec embedding models. The DL algorithms are Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM), Bidirectional LSTM (BiLSTM), Gated Recurrent Unit (GRU), and Convolutional Neural Network (CNN), used with Word2vec, Glove, and FastText word embedding models. We develop automatic labelling methods using Latent Dirichlet Allocation (LDA) and investigate the performance of single-label and multi-label article classification methods. To investigate performance, we developed from scratch Potrika, the largest and the most extensive dataset for news classification in the Bangla language, comprising 185.51 million words and 12.57 million sentences contained in 664,880 news articles in eight distinct categories, curated from six popular online news portals in Bangladesh for the period 2014-2020. GRU and Fasttext with 91.83% achieve the highest accuracy for manually-labelled data. For the automatic labelling case, KNN and Doc2Vec at 57.72% and 75% achieve the highest accuracy for single-label and multi-label data, respectively. The methods developed in this paper are expected to advance research in Bangla and other languages. 由于文本分类、文本挖掘、情感分析、词性标注、命名实体识别、文本蕴涵等应用，自然语言处理 (NLP) 的研究变得越来越重要。本文介绍了几种用于孟加拉语新闻分类的机器和深度学习方法，具有手动和自动标记功能。我们实现了多种机器 (ML) 和深度学习 (DL) 算法。 ML 算法包括逻辑回归 (LR)、随机梯度下降 (SGD)、支持向量机 (SVM)、随机森林 (RF) 和 K 最近邻 (KNN)，与词袋 (BoW)、词频-逆文档频率 (TF-IDF) 和 Doc2Vec 嵌入模型结合使用。深度学习算法包括长短期记忆 (LSTM)、双向 LSTM (BiLSTM)、门控循环单元 (GRU) 和卷积神经网络 (CNN)，与 Word2vec、Glove 和 FastText 词嵌入模型一起使用。我们使用潜在狄利克雷分配（LDA）开发自动标记方法，并研究单标签和多标签文章分类方法的性能。为了调查性能，我们从头开始开发了 Potrika，这是最大、最广泛的孟加拉语新闻分类数据集，包含 8 个不同类别的 664,880 篇新闻文章中的 1.8551 亿个单词和 1257 万个句子，这些新闻文章是从 2014 年至 2020 年期间孟加拉国六个流行的在线新闻门户网站策划的。 GRU 和 Fasttext 达到了 91.83% 的手动标记数据的最高准确率。对于自动标记情况，KNN 和 Doc2Vec 分别以 57.72% 和 75% 实现了单标签和多标签数据的最高准确率。本文开发的方法有望推进孟加拉语和其他语言的研究。 该论文介绍了多种机器学习和深度学习方法，结合手动和自动标注技术，用于孟加拉语新闻分类。 Istiak Ahmad,Fahad AlQurashi,Rashid Mehmood cs.AI

title: $r-$Adaptive Deep Learning Method for Solving Partial Differential Equations
title_zh: $r-$求解偏微分方程的自适应深度学习方法
abstract: We introduce an $r-$adaptive algorithm to solve Partial Differential Equations using a Deep Neural Network. The proposed method restricts to tensor product meshes and optimizes the boundary node locations in one dimension, from which we build two- or three-dimensional meshes. The method allows the definition of fixed interfaces to design conforming meshes, and enables changes in the topology, i.e., some nodes can jump across fixed interfaces. The method simultaneously optimizes the node locations and the PDE solution values over the resulting mesh. To numerically illustrate the performance of our proposed $r-$adaptive method, we apply it in combination with a collocation method, a Least Squares Method, and a Deep Ritz Method. We focus on the latter to solve one- and two-dimensional problems whose solutions are smooth, singular, and/or exhibit strong gradients.
summary: We introduce an $r-$adaptive algorithm to solve Partial Differential Equations using a Deep Neural Network. The proposed method restricts to tensor product meshes and optimizes the boundary node locations in one dimension, from which we build two- or three-dimensional meshes. The method allows the definition of fixed interfaces to design conforming meshes, and enables changes in the topology, i.e., some nodes can jump across fixed interfaces. The method simultaneously optimizes the node locations and the PDE solution values over the resulting mesh. To numerically illustrate the performance of our proposed $r-$adaptive method, we apply it in combination with a collocation method, a Least Squares Method, and a Deep Ritz Method. We focus on the latter to solve one- and two-dimensional problems whose solutions are smooth, singular, and/or exhibit strong gradients.
abstract_zh: 我们引入 $r-$adaptive 算法来使用深度神经网络求解偏微分方程。所提出的方法限制于张量积网格并优化一维边界节点位置，从中我们构建二维或三维网格。该方法允许定义固定接口来设计一致的网格，并允许改变拓扑，即某些节点可以跨越固定接口。该方法同时优化所得网格上的节点位置和 PDE 解值。为了从数字上说明我们提出的 $r-$adaptive 方法的性能，我们将其与搭配方法、最小二乘法和 Deep Ritz 方法结合应用。我们专注于后者来解决一维和二维问题，其解决方案是平滑的、奇异的和/或表现出强梯度的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度神经网络的r自适应算法，用于求解偏微分方程（PDE），通过优化张量积网格的边界节点位置，构建二维或三维网格并求解PDE。
AI.motivation: 传统PDE数值方法在处理复杂几何或梯度剧烈的解时存在网格生成困难和效率低下的问题，需开发自适应深度学习方法以提升精度和灵活性。
AI.method: 采用r自适应算法，优化一维边界节点位置并扩展至二维/三维网格，允许固定接口的拓扑变化，同时优化网格节点位置与PDE解值，结合配置法、最小二乘法及Deep Ritz方法进行数值验证。
AI.result: 方法在光滑、奇异性或强梯度的一维/二维问题中表现良好，尤其通过Deep Ritz方法验证了其对复杂解的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该r自适应深度学习方法通过优化网格与解值，为复杂PDE问题提供了灵活高效的求解框架，具有处理多尺度和复杂几何的潜力。

title: Learning Preferences for Interactive Autonomy
title_zh: 交互式自主的学习偏好
abstract: When robots enter everyday human environments, they need to understand their tasks and how they should perform those tasks. To encode these, reward functions, which specify the objective of a robot, are employed. However, designing reward functions can be extremely challenging for complex tasks and environments. A promising approach is to learn reward functions from humans. Recently, several robot learning works embrace this approach and leverage human demonstrations to learn the reward functions. Known as inverse reinforcement learning, this approach relies on a fundamental assumption: humans can provide near-optimal demonstrations to the robot. Unfortunately, this is rarely the case: human demonstrations to the robot are often suboptimal due to various reasons, e.g., difficulty of teleoperation, robot having high degrees of freedom, or humans' cognitive limitations. This thesis is an attempt towards learning reward functions from human users by using other, more reliable data modalities. Specifically, we study how reward functions can be learned using comparative feedback, in which the human user compares multiple robot trajectories instead of (or in addition to) providing demonstrations. To this end, we first propose various forms of comparative feedback, e.g., pairwise comparisons, best-of-many choices, rankings, scaled comparisons; and describe how a robot can use these various forms of human feedback to infer a reward function, which may be parametric or non-parametric. Next, we propose active learning techniques to enable the robot to ask for comparison feedback that optimizes for the expected information that will be gained from that user feedback. Finally, we demonstrate the applicability of our methods in a wide variety of domains, ranging from autonomous driving simulations to home robotics, from standard reinforcement learning benchmarks to lower-body exoskeletons.
summary: When robots enter everyday human environments, they need to understand their tasks and how they should perform those tasks. To encode these, reward functions, which specify the objective of a robot, are employed. However, designing reward functions can be extremely challenging for complex tasks and environments. A promising approach is to learn reward functions from humans. Recently, several robot learning works embrace this approach and leverage human demonstrations to learn the reward functions. Known as inverse reinforcement learning, this approach relies on a fundamental assumption: humans can provide near-optimal demonstrations to the robot. Unfortunately, this is rarely the case: human demonstrations to the robot are often suboptimal due to various reasons, e.g., difficulty of teleoperation, robot having high degrees of freedom, or humans' cognitive limitations. This thesis is an attempt towards learning reward functions from human users by using other, more reliable data modalities. Specifically, we study how reward functions can be learned using comparative feedback, in which the human user compares multiple robot trajectories instead of (or in addition to) providing demonstrations. To this end, we first propose various forms of comparative feedback, e.g., pairwise comparisons, best-of-many choices, rankings, scaled comparisons; and describe how a robot can use these various forms of human feedback to infer a reward function, which may be parametric or non-parametric. Next, we propose active learning techniques to enable the robot to ask for comparison feedback that optimizes for the expected information that will be gained from that user feedback. Finally, we demonstrate the applicability of our methods in a wide variety of domains, ranging from autonomous driving simulations to home robotics, from standard reinforcement learning benchmarks to lower-body exoskeletons.
abstract_zh: 当机器人进入人类的日常环境时，它们需要了解自己的任务以及应该如何执行这些任务。为了对这些进行编码，使用了指定机器人目标的奖励函数。然而，对于复杂的任务和环境，设计奖励函数可能极具挑战性。一种有前途的方法是向人类学习奖励函数。最近，一些机器人学习作品采用了这种方法，并利用人类演示来学习奖励函数。这种方法被称为逆强化学习，它依赖于一个基本假设：人类可以向机器人提供近乎最佳的演示。不幸的是，这种情况很少发生：由于各种原因，例如远程操作的困难、机器人具有高自由度或人类的认知限制，人类对机器人的演示通常不是最理想的。本论文试图通过使用其他更可靠的数据模式来学习人类用户的奖励函数。具体来说，我们研究如何使用比较反馈来学习奖励函数，其中人类用户比较多个机器人轨迹而不是（或除了提供演示之外）。为此，我们首先提出各种形式的比较反馈，例如成对比较、最佳选择、排名、规模比较；并描述机器人如何使用这些不同形式的人类反馈来推断奖励函数，该函数可以是参数的或非参数的。接下来，我们提出主动学习技术，使机器人能够请求比较反馈，从而优化从用户反馈中获得的预期信息。最后，我们展示了我们的方法在各个领域的适用性，从自动驾驶模拟到家庭机器人，从标准强化学习基准到下半身外骨骼。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过比较反馈学习机器人的奖励函数，以克服人类演示数据通常次优的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统逆强化学习依赖人类提供的近似最优演示，但实际中人类演示常因操作难度或认知限制而次优，需寻找更可靠的数据模态。
AI.method: 提出多种比较反馈形式（如成对比较、排名等），并设计主动学习策略优化反馈信息获取，结合参数化或非参数化方法推断奖励函数。
AI.result: 方法在自动驾驶模拟、家庭机器人、强化学习基准及外骨骼设备等多领域验证有效，展示了广泛适用性。
AI.conclusion: 比较反馈与主动学习结合可有效学习奖励函数，为复杂环境下的交互式自主系统提供可行方案。

search_text: Learning Preferences for Interactive Autonomy 交互式自主的学习偏好 When robots enter everyday human environments, they need to understand their tasks and how they should perform those tasks. To encode these, reward functions, which specify the objective of a robot, are employed. However, designing reward functions can be extremely challenging for complex tasks and environments. A promising approach is to learn reward functions from humans. Recently, several robot learning works embrace this approach and leverage human demonstrations to learn the reward functions. Known as inverse reinforcement learning, this approach relies on a fundamental assumption: humans can provide near-optimal demonstrations to the robot. Unfortunately, this is rarely the case: human demonstrations to the robot are often suboptimal due to various reasons, e.g., difficulty of teleoperation, robot having high degrees of freedom, or humans' cognitive limitations. This thesis is an attempt towards learning reward functions from human users by using other, more reliable data modalities. Specifically, we study how reward functions can be learned using comparative feedback, in which the human user compares multiple robot trajectories instead of (or in addition to) providing demonstrations. To this end, we first propose various forms of comparative feedback, e.g., pairwise comparisons, best-of-many choices, rankings, scaled comparisons; and describe how a robot can use these various forms of human feedback to infer a reward function, which may be parametric or non-parametric. Next, we propose active learning techniques to enable the robot to ask for comparison feedback that optimizes for the expected information that will be gained from that user feedback. Finally, we demonstrate the applicability of our methods in a wide variety of domains, ranging from autonomous driving simulations to home robotics, from standard reinforcement learning benchmarks to lower-body exoskeletons. 当机器人进入人类的日常环境时，它们需要了解自己的任务以及应该如何执行这些任务。为了对这些进行编码，使用了指定机器人目标的奖励函数。然而，对于复杂的任务和环境，设计奖励函数可能极具挑战性。一种有前途的方法是向人类学习奖励函数。最近，一些机器人学习作品采用了这种方法，并利用人类演示来学习奖励函数。这种方法被称为逆强化学习，它依赖于一个基本假设：人类可以向机器人提供近乎最佳的演示。不幸的是，这种情况很少发生：由于各种原因，例如远程操作的困难、机器人具有高自由度或人类的认知限制，人类对机器人的演示通常不是最理想的。本论文试图通过使用其他更可靠的数据模式来学习人类用户的奖励函数。具体来说，我们研究如何使用比较反馈来学习奖励函数，其中人类用户比较多个机器人轨迹而不是（或除了提供演示之外）。为此，我们首先提出各种形式的比较反馈，例如成对比较、最佳选择、排名、规模比较；并描述机器人如何使用这些不同形式的人类反馈来推断奖励函数，该函数可以是参数的或非参数的。接下来，我们提出主动学习技术，使机器人能够请求比较反馈，从而优化从用户反馈中获得的预期信息。最后，我们展示了我们的方法在各个领域的适用性，从自动驾驶模拟到家庭机器人，从标准强化学习基准到下半身外骨骼。 本文旨在通过比较反馈学习机器人的奖励函数，以克服人类演示数据通常次优的问题。 Erdem Bıyık cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.LG,stat.ML

title: Window-Based Distribution Shift Detection for Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: 深度神经网络基于窗口的分布偏移检测
abstract: To deploy and operate deep neural models in production, the quality of their predictions, which might be contaminated benignly or manipulated maliciously by input distributional deviations, must be monitored and assessed. Specifically, we study the case of monitoring the healthy operation of a deep neural network (DNN) receiving a stream of data, with the aim of detecting input distributional deviations over which the quality of the network's predictions is potentially damaged. Using selective prediction principles, we propose a distribution deviation detection method for DNNs. The proposed method is derived from a tight coverage generalization bound computed over a sample of instances drawn from the true underlying distribution. Based on this bound, our detector continuously monitors the operation of the network out-of-sample over a test window and fires off an alarm whenever a deviation is detected. Our novel detection method performs on-par or better than the state-of-the-art, while consuming substantially lower computation time (five orders of magnitude reduction) and space complexities. Unlike previous methods, which require at least linear dependence on the size of the source distribution for each detection, rendering them inapplicable to ``Google-Scale'' datasets, our approach eliminates this dependence, making it suitable for real-world applications.
summary: To deploy and operate deep neural models in production, the quality of their predictions, which might be contaminated benignly or manipulated maliciously by input distributional deviations, must be monitored and assessed. Specifically, we study the case of monitoring the healthy operation of a deep neural network (DNN) receiving a stream of data, with the aim of detecting input distributional deviations over which the quality of the network's predictions is potentially damaged. Using selective prediction principles, we propose a distribution deviation detection method for DNNs. The proposed method is derived from a tight coverage generalization bound computed over a sample of instances drawn from the true underlying distribution. Based on this bound, our detector continuously monitors the operation of the network out-of-sample over a test window and fires off an alarm whenever a deviation is detected. Our novel detection method performs on-par or better than the state-of-the-art, while consuming substantially lower computation time (five orders of magnitude reduction) and space complexities. Unlike previous methods, which require at least linear dependence on the size of the source distribution for each detection, rendering them inapplicable to ``Google-Scale'' datasets, our approach eliminates this dependence, making it suitable for real-world applications.
abstract_zh: 为了在生产中部署和操作深度神经模型，必须监视和评估其预测的质量，这些模型可能会受到输入分布偏差的良性污染或恶意操纵。具体来说，我们研究了监控接收数据流的深度神经网络（DNN）健康运行的情况，目的是检测输入分布偏差，从而可能损害网络预测的质量。利用选择性预测原理，我们提出了一种 DNN 分布偏差检测方法。所提出的方法源自对从真实基础分布中抽取的实例样本计算的紧密覆盖泛化界限。基于此界限，我们的检测器在测试窗口内持续监控样本外网络的运行情况，并在检测到偏差时发出警报。我们新颖的检测方法的性能与最先进的技术相当或更好，同时消耗的计算时间显着降低（减少了五个数量级）和空间复杂度。以前的方法需要至少线性依赖于每次检测的源分布大小，这使得它们不适用于“Google-Scale”数据集，而我们的方法消除了这种依赖性，使其适合实际应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于窗口的深度神经网络分布偏移检测方法，用于监控模型在生产环境中的预测质量。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在生产环境中可能因输入分布变化导致预测质量下降，需有效监控机制以确保可靠性，尤其在大规模数据场景下需降低计算复杂度。
AI.method: 基于选择性预测原则，通过计算真实分布样本的紧致覆盖泛化界，利用滑动窗口持续监测模型输出，并在检测到分布偏移时触发警报。
AI.result: 该方法在计算时间（降低5个数量级）和空间复杂度上显著优于现有方法，且检测性能与最先进方法相当或更优，适用于大规模数据场景。
AI.conclusion: 提出的分布偏移检测方法有效解决了传统方法对源分布规模的线性依赖问题，为实际应用提供了高效可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Navodini Wijethilake,Mithunjha Anandakumar,Cheng Zheng,Peter T. C. So,Murat Yildirim,Dushan N. Wadduwage
title: DEEP$^2$: Deep Learning Powered De-scattering with Excitation Patterning
title_zh: DEEP$^2$：深度学习驱动的激励模式去散射
abstract: Limited throughput is a key challenge in in-vivo deep-tissue imaging using nonlinear optical microscopy. Point scanning multiphoton microscopy, the current gold standard, is slow especially compared to the wide-field imaging modalities used for optically cleared or thin specimens. We recently introduced 'De-scattering with Excitation Patterning or DEEP', as a widefield alternative to point-scanning geometries. Using patterned multiphoton excitation, DEEP encodes spatial information inside tissue before scattering. However, to de-scatter at typical depths, hundreds of such patterned excitations are needed. In this work, we present DEEP$^2$, a deep learning based model, that can de-scatter images from just tens of patterned excitations instead of hundreds. Consequently, we improve DEEP's throughput by almost an order of magnitude. We demonstrate our method in multiple numerical and physical experiments including in-vivo cortical vasculature imaging up to four scattering lengths deep, in alive mice.
summary: Limited throughput is a key challenge in in-vivo deep-tissue imaging using nonlinear optical microscopy. Point scanning multiphoton microscopy, the current gold standard, is slow especially compared to the wide-field imaging modalities used for optically cleared or thin specimens. We recently introduced 'De-scattering with Excitation Patterning or DEEP', as a widefield alternative to point-scanning geometries. Using patterned multiphoton excitation, DEEP encodes spatial information inside tissue before scattering. However, to de-scatter at typical depths, hundreds of such patterned excitations are needed. In this work, we present DEEP$^2$, a deep learning based model, that can de-scatter images from just tens of patterned excitations instead of hundreds. Consequently, we improve DEEP's throughput by almost an order of magnitude. We demonstrate our method in multiple numerical and physical experiments including in-vivo cortical vasculature imaging up to four scattering lengths deep, in alive mice.
abstract_zh: 有限的通量是使用非线性光学显微镜进行体内深层组织成像的一个关键挑战。点扫描多光子显微镜（当前的黄金标准）速度较慢，尤其是与用于光学透明或薄样本的宽视场成像方式相比。我们最近推出了“通过激发图案或深度去散射”，作为点扫描几何形状的宽场替代方案。使用图案化多光子激发，DEEP 在散射之前对组织内部的空间信息进行编码。然而，为了在典型深度去散射，需要数百个这样的图案化激励。在这项工作中，我们提出了 DEEP$^2$，一种基于深度学习的模型，它可以从数十个而不是数百个图案激励中去散射图像。因此，我们将 DEEP 的吞吐量提高了几乎一个数量级。我们在多个数值和物理实验中展示了我们的方法，包括在活体小鼠体内进行高达四个散射长度的体内皮质脉管系统成像。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DEEP²方法，通过深度学习减少多光子显微镜中去散射所需的激发次数，提升深层组织成像吞吐量。
AI.motivation: 传统点扫描多光子显微镜速度慢，而宽场DEEP方法需数百次激发才能实现深层去散射，限制了成像效率。
AI.method: 基于深度学习模型DEEP²，利用模式化多光子激发编码组织信息，通过神经网络从少量激发数据中重建清晰图像。
AI.result: 吞吐量较原方法提升近10倍，在活体小鼠皮层血管成像中验证了四散射长度深度的有效性。
AI.conclusion: DEEP²通过深度学习显著加速深层组织成像，为活体动态研究提供了高效工具。

search_text: DEEP$^2$: Deep Learning Powered De-scattering with Excitation Patterning DEEP$^2$：深度学习驱动的激励模式去散射 Limited throughput is a key challenge in in-vivo deep-tissue imaging using nonlinear optical microscopy. Point scanning multiphoton microscopy, the current gold standard, is slow especially compared to the wide-field imaging modalities used for optically cleared or thin specimens. We recently introduced 'De-scattering with Excitation Patterning or DEEP', as a widefield alternative to point-scanning geometries. Using patterned multiphoton excitation, DEEP encodes spatial information inside tissue before scattering. However, to de-scatter at typical depths, hundreds of such patterned excitations are needed. In this work, we present DEEP$^2$, a deep learning based model, that can de-scatter images from just tens of patterned excitations instead of hundreds. Consequently, we improve DEEP's throughput by almost an order of magnitude. We demonstrate our method in multiple numerical and physical experiments including in-vivo cortical vasculature imaging up to four scattering lengths deep, in alive mice. 有限的通量是使用非线性光学显微镜进行体内深层组织成像的一个关键挑战。点扫描多光子显微镜（当前的黄金标准）速度较慢，尤其是与用于光学透明或薄样本的宽视场成像方式相比。我们最近推出了“通过激发图案或深度去散射”，作为点扫描几何形状的宽场替代方案。使用图案化多光子激发，DEEP 在散射之前对组织内部的空间信息进行编码。然而，为了在典型深度去散射，需要数百个这样的图案化激励。在这项工作中，我们提出了 DEEP$^2$，一种基于深度学习的模型，它可以从数十个而不是数百个图案激励中去散射图像。因此，我们将 DEEP 的吞吐量提高了几乎一个数量级。我们在多个数值和物理实验中展示了我们的方法，包括在活体小鼠体内进行高达四个散射长度的体内皮质脉管系统成像。 本文提出DEEP²方法，通过深度学习减少多光子显微镜中去散射所需的激发次数，提升深层组织成像吞吐量。 Navodini Wijethilake,Mithunjha Anandakumar,Cheng Zheng,Peter T. C. So,Murat Yildirim,Dushan N. Wadduwage eess.IV,cs.LG

title: Mitigating spectral bias for the multiscale operator learning
title_zh: 减轻多尺度算子学习的谱偏差
abstract: Neural operators have emerged as a powerful tool for learning the mapping between infinite-dimensional parameter and solution spaces of partial differential equations (PDEs). In this work, we focus on multiscale PDEs that have important applications such as reservoir modeling and turbulence prediction. We demonstrate that for such PDEs, the spectral bias towards low-frequency components presents a significant challenge for existing neural operators. To address this challenge, we propose a hierarchical attention neural operator (HANO) inspired by the hierarchical matrix approach. HANO features a scale-adaptive interaction range and self-attentions over a hierarchy of levels, enabling nested feature computation with controllable linear cost and encoding/decoding of multiscale solution space. We also incorporate an empirical $H^1$ loss function to enhance the learning of high-frequency components. Our numerical experiments demonstrate that HANO outperforms state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods for representative multiscale problems.
summary: Neural operators have emerged as a powerful tool for learning the mapping between infinite-dimensional parameter and solution spaces of partial differential equations (PDEs). In this work, we focus on multiscale PDEs that have important applications such as reservoir modeling and turbulence prediction. We demonstrate that for such PDEs, the spectral bias towards low-frequency components presents a significant challenge for existing neural operators. To address this challenge, we propose a hierarchical attention neural operator (HANO) inspired by the hierarchical matrix approach. HANO features a scale-adaptive interaction range and self-attentions over a hierarchy of levels, enabling nested feature computation with controllable linear cost and encoding/decoding of multiscale solution space. We also incorporate an empirical $H^1$ loss function to enhance the learning of high-frequency components. Our numerical experiments demonstrate that HANO outperforms state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods for representative multiscale problems.
abstract_zh: 神经算子已成为学习无限维参数与偏微分方程 (PDE) 解空间之间映射的强大工具。在这项工作中，我们重点关注具有重要应用的多尺度偏微分方程，例如油藏建模和湍流预测。我们证明，对于此类偏微分方程，低频分量的频谱偏差对现有神经算子提出了重大挑战。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种受分层矩阵方法启发的分层注意力神经算子（HANO）。 HANO 具有尺度自适应交互范围和层次结构上的自注意力，从而实现具有可控线性成本的嵌套特征计算以及多尺度解决方案空间的编码/解码。我们还结合了经验 $H^1$ 损失函数来增强高频分量的学习。我们的数值实验表明，对于代表性的多尺度问题，HANO 的性能优于最先进的 (SOTA) 方法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种缓解多尺度PDEs中频谱偏差的神经算子方法
AI.motivation: 现有神经算子在处理多尺度PDEs时存在对低频成分的偏向，难以有效学习高频特征，需改进方法
AI.method: 提出分层注意力神经算子（HANO），结合分层矩阵方法，利用分层自注意力机制和H¹损失函数增强高频学习
AI.result: 在多个多尺度问题上，HANO优于现有SOTA方法
AI.conclusion: HANO有效缓解了频谱偏差问题，提升了多尺度PDEs的求解性能
