authors_text: Syed Rizvi,Akash Awasthi,Maria J. Peláez,Zhihui Wang,Vittorio Cristini,Hien Van Nguyen,Prashant Dogra
title: Deep Learning-Derived Optimal Aviation Strategies to Control Pandemics
title_zh: 深度学习衍生的控制流行病的最佳航空策略
abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic has affected countries across the world, demanding drastic public health policies to mitigate the spread of infection, leading to economic crisis as a collateral damage. In this work, we investigated the impact of human mobility (described via international commercial flights) on COVID-19 infection dynamics at the global scale. For this, we developed a graph neural network-based framework referred to as Dynamic Connectivity GraphSAGE (DCSAGE), which operates over spatiotemporal graphs and is well-suited for dynamically changing adjacency information. To obtain insights on the relative impact of different geographical locations, due to their associated air traffic, on the evolution of the pandemic, we conducted local sensitivity analysis on our model through node perturbation experiments. From our analyses, we identified Western Europe, North America, and Middle East as the leading geographical locations fueling the pandemic, attributed to the enormity of air traffic originating or transiting through these regions. We used these observations to identify tangible air traffic reduction strategies that can have a high impact on controlling the pandemic, with minimal interference to human mobility. Our work provides a robust deep learning-based tool to study global pandemics and is of key relevance to policy makers to take informed decisions regarding air traffic restrictions during future outbreaks.
summary: The COVID-19 pandemic has affected countries across the world, demanding drastic public health policies to mitigate the spread of infection, leading to economic crisis as a collateral damage. In this work, we investigated the impact of human mobility (described via international commercial flights) on COVID-19 infection dynamics at the global scale. For this, we developed a graph neural network-based framework referred to as Dynamic Connectivity GraphSAGE (DCSAGE), which operates over spatiotemporal graphs and is well-suited for dynamically changing adjacency information. To obtain insights on the relative impact of different geographical locations, due to their associated air traffic, on the evolution of the pandemic, we conducted local sensitivity analysis on our model through node perturbation experiments. From our analyses, we identified Western Europe, North America, and Middle East as the leading geographical locations fueling the pandemic, attributed to the enormity of air traffic originating or transiting through these regions. We used these observations to identify tangible air traffic reduction strategies that can have a high impact on controlling the pandemic, with minimal interference to human mobility. Our work provides a robust deep learning-based tool to study global pandemics and is of key relevance to policy makers to take informed decisions regarding air traffic restrictions during future outbreaks.
abstract_zh: COVID-19 大流行已影响到世界各国，需要采取严厉的公共卫生政策来减轻感染的传播，从而导致经济危机作为附带损害。在这项工作中，我们调查了全球范围内人员流动（通过国际商业航班描述）对 COVID-19 感染动态的影响。为此，我们开发了一种基于图神经网络的框架，称为动态连接 GraphSAGE (DCSAGE)，它在时空图上运行，非常适合动态变化的邻接信息。为了深入了解不同地理位置因其相关的空中交通对大流行演变的相对影响，我们通过节点扰动实验对我们的模型进行了局部敏感性分析。根据我们的分析，我们确定西欧、北美和中东是加剧这一流行病的主要地理位置，因为源自或途经这些地区的空中交通量巨大。我们利用这些观察结果来确定切实可行的空中交通减少策略，这些策略可以对控制大流行产生重大影响，同时将对人员流动的干扰降至最低。我们的工作为研究全球流行病提供了一个强大的基于深度学习的工具，对于政策制定者在未来疫情爆发期间就空中交通限制做出明智的决定至关重要。

AI.tldr: 本文利用深度学习方法分析航空交通对全球疫情传播的影响，并提出有效的航空策略以控制疫情。
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情对全球造成严重影响，传统防疫措施导致经济危机，亟需在减少人类活动干扰的前提下，找到有效的航空交通管控策略。
AI.method: 提出动态连接图SAGE（DCSAGE）模型，基于时空图神经网络，结合节点扰动实验进行局部敏感性分析，评估不同地区航空流量对疫情传播的影响。
AI.result: 研究发现西欧、北美和中东因航空流量大成为疫情传播主要区域，并提出针对性的航空交通削减策略，有效控制疫情传播。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为全球疫情分析提供深度学习工具，帮助政策制定者制定科学的航空限制措施，平衡防疫与经济影响。

authors_text: Sihong He,Lynn Pepin,Guang Wang,Desheng Zhang,Fei Miao
title: Data-Driven Distributionally Robust Electric Vehicle Balancing for Mobility-on-Demand Systems under Demand and Supply Uncertainties
title_zh: 供需不确定性下的数据驱动分布式鲁棒电动汽车平衡按需出行系统
comment: This paper has been published in IROS2020
comments: This paper has been published in IROS2020
abstract: As electric vehicle (EV) technologies become mature, EV has been rapidly adopted in modern transportation systems, and is expected to provide future autonomous mobility-on-demand (AMoD) service with economic and societal benefits. However, EVs require frequent recharges due to their limited and unpredictable cruising ranges, and they have to be managed efficiently given the dynamic charging process. It is urgent and challenging to investigate a computationally efficient algorithm that provide EV AMoD system performance guarantees under model uncertainties, instead of using heuristic demand or charging models. To accomplish this goal, this work designs a data-driven distributionally robust optimization approach for vehicle supply-demand ratio and charging station utilization balancing, while minimizing the worst-case expected cost considering both passenger mobility demand uncertainties and EV supply uncertainties. We then derive an equivalent computationally tractable form for solving the distributionally robust problem in a computationally efficient way under ellipsoid uncertainty sets constructed from data. Based on E-taxi system data of Shenzhen city, we show that the average total balancing cost is reduced by 14.49%, the average unfairness of supply-demand ratio and utilization is reduced by 15.78% and 34.51% respectively with the distributionally robust vehicle balancing method, compared with solutions which do not consider model uncertainties.
summary: As electric vehicle (EV) technologies become mature, EV has been rapidly adopted in modern transportation systems, and is expected to provide future autonomous mobility-on-demand (AMoD) service with economic and societal benefits. However, EVs require frequent recharges due to their limited and unpredictable cruising ranges, and they have to be managed efficiently given the dynamic charging process. It is urgent and challenging to investigate a computationally efficient algorithm that provide EV AMoD system performance guarantees under model uncertainties, instead of using heuristic demand or charging models. To accomplish this goal, this work designs a data-driven distributionally robust optimization approach for vehicle supply-demand ratio and charging station utilization balancing, while minimizing the worst-case expected cost considering both passenger mobility demand uncertainties and EV supply uncertainties. We then derive an equivalent computationally tractable form for solving the distributionally robust problem in a computationally efficient way under ellipsoid uncertainty sets constructed from data. Based on E-taxi system data of Shenzhen city, we show that the average total balancing cost is reduced by 14.49%, the average unfairness of supply-demand ratio and utilization is reduced by 15.78% and 34.51% respectively with the distributionally robust vehicle balancing method, compared with solutions which do not consider model uncertainties.
abstract_zh: 随着电动汽车（EV）技术的成熟，电动汽车已在现代交通系统中迅速采用，并有望为未来的自动按需出行（AMoD）服务提供经济和社会效益。然而，由于电动汽车的续航里程有限且不可预测，因此需要频繁充电，并且在动态充电过程中必须对其进行有效管理。研究一种计算高效的算法，在模型不确定性下提供 EV AMoD 系统性能保证，而不是使用启发式需求或收费模型，是紧迫且具有挑战性的。为了实现这一目标，这项工作设计了一种数据驱动的分布式鲁棒优化方法，用于车辆供需比和充电站利用率平衡，同时考虑乘客出行需求的不确定性和电动汽车供应的不确定性，最大​​限度地降低最坏情况的预期成本。然后，我们推导出一个等效的计算可处理形式，用于在由数据构造的椭球不确定性集下以计算有效的方式解决分布鲁棒问题。基于深圳市电子出租车系统数据，我们发现，与不考虑模型不确定性的解决方案相比，分布式鲁棒车辆平衡方法的平均总平衡成本降低了14.49%，供需比和利用率的平均不公平性分别降低了15.78%和34.51%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种数据驱动的分布鲁棒优化方法，用于在需求和供应不确定性的条件下平衡电动车辆供需比和充电站利用率，同时最小化最坏情况下的预期成本。
AI.motivation: 随着电动车辆（EV）在自主出行即服务（AMoD）系统中的普及，其有限续航能力和动态充电需求导致供需管理复杂化。传统启发式模型无法有效应对不确定性，亟需计算高效的算法保障系统性能。
AI.method: 构建基于数据的椭球不确定性集，设计分布鲁棒优化模型，将原问题转化为可计算的对偶形式，并通过深圳E-taxi系统数据验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 实验显示，分布鲁棒方法使平均总平衡成本降低14.49%，供需比不公平性减少15.78%，充电站利用率不公平性降低34.51%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过考虑模型不确定性，有效提升了AMoD系统在电动车辆供需平衡中的鲁棒性与公平性，为实际应用提供了计算高效的解决方案。

search_text: Data-Driven Distributionally Robust Electric Vehicle Balancing for Mobility-on-Demand Systems under Demand and Supply Uncertainties 供需不确定性下的数据驱动分布式鲁棒电动汽车平衡按需出行系统 As electric vehicle (EV) technologies become mature, EV has been rapidly adopted in modern transportation systems, and is expected to provide future autonomous mobility-on-demand (AMoD) service with economic and societal benefits. However, EVs require frequent recharges due to their limited and unpredictable cruising ranges, and they have to be managed efficiently given the dynamic charging process. It is urgent and challenging to investigate a computationally efficient algorithm that provide EV AMoD system performance guarantees under model uncertainties, instead of using heuristic demand or charging models. To accomplish this goal, this work designs a data-driven distributionally robust optimization approach for vehicle supply-demand ratio and charging station utilization balancing, while minimizing the worst-case expected cost considering both passenger mobility demand uncertainties and EV supply uncertainties. We then derive an equivalent computationally tractable form for solving the distributionally robust problem in a computationally efficient way under ellipsoid uncertainty sets constructed from data. Based on E-taxi system data of Shenzhen city, we show that the average total balancing cost is reduced by 14.49%, the average unfairness of supply-demand ratio and utilization is reduced by 15.78% and 34.51% respectively with the distributionally robust vehicle balancing method, compared with solutions which do not consider model uncertainties. 随着电动汽车（EV）技术的成熟，电动汽车已在现代交通系统中迅速采用，并有望为未来的自动按需出行（AMoD）服务提供经济和社会效益。然而，由于电动汽车的续航里程有限且不可预测，因此需要频繁充电，并且在动态充电过程中必须对其进行有效管理。研究一种计算高效的算法，在模型不确定性下提供 EV AMoD 系统性能保证，而不是使用启发式需求或收费模型，是紧迫且具有挑战性的。为了实现这一目标，这项工作设计了一种数据驱动的分布式鲁棒优化方法，用于车辆供需比和充电站利用率平衡，同时考虑乘客出行需求的不确定性和电动汽车供应的不确定性，最大​​限度地降低最坏情况的预期成本。然后，我们推导出一个等效的计算可处理形式，用于在由数据构造的椭球不确定性集下以计算有效的方式解决分布鲁棒问题。基于深圳市电子出租车系统数据，我们发现，与不考虑模型不确定性的解决方案相比，分布式鲁棒车辆平衡方法的平均总平衡成本降低了14.49%，供需比和利用率的平均不公平性分别降低了15.78%和34.51%。 本文提出一种数据驱动的分布鲁棒优化方法，用于在需求和供应不确定性的条件下平衡电动车辆供需比和充电站利用率，同时最小化最坏情况下的预期成本。 Sihong He,Lynn Pepin,Guang Wang,Desheng Zhang,Fei Miao math.OC,cs.RO,stat.AP

title: Backdoor Attack and Defense in Federated Generative Adversarial Network-based Medical Image Synthesis
title_zh: 基于联邦生成对抗网络的医学图像合成中的后门攻击和防御
comment: 25 pages, 7 figures. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2207.00762
comments: 25 pages, 7 figures. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2207.00762
abstract: Deep Learning-based image synthesis techniques have been applied in healthcare research for generating medical images to support open research and augment medical datasets. Training generative adversarial neural networks (GANs) usually require large amounts of training data. Federated learning (FL) provides a way of training a central model using distributed data while keeping raw data locally. However, given that the FL server cannot access the raw data, it is vulnerable to backdoor attacks, an adversarial by poisoning training data. Most backdoor attack strategies focus on classification models and centralized domains. It is still an open question if the existing backdoor attacks can affect GAN training and, if so, how to defend against the attack in the FL setting. In this work, we investigate the overlooked issue of backdoor attacks in federated GANs (FedGANs). The success of this attack is subsequently determined to be the result of some local discriminators overfitting the poisoned data and corrupting the local GAN equilibrium, which then further contaminates other clients when averaging the generator's parameters and yields high generator loss. Therefore, we proposed FedDetect, an efficient and effective way of defending against the backdoor attack in the FL setting, which allows the server to detect the client's adversarial behavior based on their losses and block the malicious clients. Our extensive experiments on two medical datasets with different modalities demonstrate the backdoor attack on FedGANs can result in synthetic images with low fidelity. After detecting and suppressing the detected malicious clients using the proposed defense strategy, we show that FedGANs can synthesize high-quality medical datasets (with labels) for data augmentation to improve classification models' performance.
summary: Deep Learning-based image synthesis techniques have been applied in healthcare research for generating medical images to support open research and augment medical datasets. Training generative adversarial neural networks (GANs) usually require large amounts of training data. Federated learning (FL) provides a way of training a central model using distributed data while keeping raw data locally. However, given that the FL server cannot access the raw data, it is vulnerable to backdoor attacks, an adversarial by poisoning training data. Most backdoor attack strategies focus on classification models and centralized domains. It is still an open question if the existing backdoor attacks can affect GAN training and, if so, how to defend against the attack in the FL setting. In this work, we investigate the overlooked issue of backdoor attacks in federated GANs (FedGANs). The success of this attack is subsequently determined to be the result of some local discriminators overfitting the poisoned data and corrupting the local GAN equilibrium, which then further contaminates other clients when averaging the generator's parameters and yields high generator loss. Therefore, we proposed FedDetect, an efficient and effective way of defending against the backdoor attack in the FL setting, which allows the server to detect the client's adversarial behavior based on their losses and block the malicious clients. Our extensive experiments on two medical datasets with different modalities demonstrate the backdoor attack on FedGANs can result in synthetic images with low fidelity. After detecting and suppressing the detected malicious clients using the proposed defense strategy, we show that FedGANs can synthesize high-quality medical datasets (with labels) for data augmentation to improve classification models' performance.
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习的图像合成技术已应用于医疗保健研究中，用于生成医学图像以支持开放研究和增强医学数据集。训练生成对抗神经网络（GAN）通常需要大量训练数据。联邦学习（FL）提供了一种使用分布式数据训练中央模型，同时将原始数据保留在本地的方法。然而，鉴于 FL 服务器无法访问原始数据，它很容易受到后门攻击，这是一种通过毒害训练数据的对抗性攻击。大多数后门攻击策略侧重于分类模型和集中域。现有的后门攻击是否会影响 GAN 训练，如果会影响，如何在 FL 设置中防御攻击，仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在这项工作中，我们研究了联合 GAN (FedGAN) 中被忽视的后门攻击问题。这次攻击的成功随后被确定为一些局部判别器过度拟合中毒数据并破坏局部 GAN 平衡的结果，从而在对生成器参数进行平均时进一步污染其他客户端并产生较高的生成器损失。因此，我们提出了FedDetect，一种高效且有效的FL设置中防御后门攻击的方法，它允许服务器根据客户端的损失来检测客户端的对抗行为并阻止恶意客户端。我们对两个不同模式的医学数据集进行的广泛实验表明，对 FedGAN 的后门攻击可能会导致合成图像保真度低。使用所提出的防御策略检测和抑制检测到的恶意客户端后，我们表明 FedGAN 可以合成高质量的医疗数据集（带标签）进行数据增强，以提高分类模型的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究联邦生成对抗网络（FedGANs）中的后门攻击问题，并提出了一种名为FedDetect的防御方法，以检测和阻止恶意客户端，确保生成高质量的医疗图像。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习（FL）在医疗图像合成中应用广泛，但其无法访问原始数据的特性使其易受后门攻击。现有研究多集中于分类模型，而针对FedGANs的后门攻击及防御机制仍不明确。
AI.method: 通过分析本地判别器对中毒数据的过拟合现象，发现其会破坏本地GAN平衡并污染其他客户端。提出FedDetect方法，基于客户端损失值检测恶意行为并阻断恶意客户端。
AI.result: 在两个不同模态的医疗数据集上验证，后门攻击会导致合成图像保真度降低；使用FedDetect防御后，FedGANs能生成高质量医疗数据集，提升分类模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 后门攻击可显著影响FedGANs的生成质量，但FedDetect通过损失分析有效检测并抑制恶意客户端，为联邦学习环境下的医疗图像合成提供了安全保障。

Therefore, we proposed FedDetect, an efficient and effective way of defending against the backdoor attack in the FL setting, which allows the server to detect the client's adversarial behavior based on their losses and block the malicious clients. Our extensive experiments on two medical datasets with different modalities demonstrate the backdoor attack on FedGANs can result in synthetic images with low fidelity. After detecting and suppressing the detected malicious clients using the proposed defense strategy, we show that FedGANs can synthesize high-quality medical datasets (with labels) for data augmentation to improve classification models' performance. 基于深度学习的图像合成技术已应用于医疗保健研究中，用于生成医学图像以支持开放研究和增强医学数据集。训练生成对抗神经网络（GAN）通常需要大量训练数据。联邦学习（FL）提供了一种使用分布式数据训练中央模型，同时将原始数据保留在本地的方法。然而，鉴于 FL 服务器无法访问原始数据，它很容易受到后门攻击，这是一种通过毒害训练数据的对抗性攻击。大多数后门攻击策略侧重于分类模型和集中域。现有的后门攻击是否会影响 GAN 训练，如果会影响，如何在 FL 设置中防御攻击，仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在这项工作中，我们研究了联合 GAN (FedGAN) 中被忽视的后门攻击问题。这次攻击的成功随后被确定为一些局部判别器过度拟合中毒数据并破坏局部 GAN 平衡的结果，从而在对生成器参数进行平均时进一步污染其他客户端并产生较高的生成器损失。因此，我们提出了FedDetect，一种高效且有效的FL设置中防御后门攻击的方法，它允许服务器根据客户端的损失来检测客户端的对抗行为并阻止恶意客户端。我们对两个不同模式的医学数据集进行的广泛实验表明，对 FedGAN 的后门攻击可能会导致合成图像保真度低。使用所提出的防御策略检测和抑制检测到的恶意客户端后，我们表明 FedGAN 可以合成高质量的医疗数据集（带标签）进行数据增强，以提高分类模型的性能。 本文研究联邦生成对抗网络（FedGANs）中的后门攻击问题，并提出了一种名为FedDetect的防御方法，以检测和阻止恶意客户端，确保生成高质量的医疗图像。 Ruinan Jin,Xiaoxiao Li cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.CR,cs.LG

authors_text: Gary Wang,Ekin D. Cubuk,Andrew Rosenberg,Shuyang Cheng,Ron J. Weiss,Bhuvana Ramabhadran,Pedro J. Moreno,Quoc V. Le,Daniel S. Park
title: G-Augment: Searching for the Meta-Structure of Data Augmentation Policies for ASR
title_zh: G-Augment：寻找 ASR 数据增强策略的元结构
comment: 6 pages, accepted at SLT 2022. Updated with copyright
comments: 6 pages, accepted at SLT 2022. Updated with copyright
abstract: Data augmentation is a ubiquitous technique used to provide robustness to automatic speech recognition (ASR) training. However, even as so much of the ASR training process has become automated and more "end-to-end", the data augmentation policy (what augmentation functions to use, and how to apply them) remains hand-crafted. We present Graph-Augment, a technique to define the augmentation space as directed acyclic graphs (DAGs) and search over this space to optimize the augmentation policy itself. We show that given the same computational budget, policies produced by G-Augment are able to perform better than SpecAugment policies obtained by random search on fine-tuning tasks on CHiME-6 and AMI. G-Augment is also able to establish a new state-of-the-art ASR performance on the CHiME-6 evaluation set (30.7% WER). We further demonstrate that G-Augment policies show better transfer properties across warm-start to cold-start training and model size compared to random-searched SpecAugment policies.
summary: Data augmentation is a ubiquitous technique used to provide robustness to automatic speech recognition (ASR) training. However, even as so much of the ASR training process has become automated and more "end-to-end", the data augmentation policy (what augmentation functions to use, and how to apply them) remains hand-crafted. We present Graph-Augment, a technique to define the augmentation space as directed acyclic graphs (DAGs) and search over this space to optimize the augmentation policy itself. We show that given the same computational budget, policies produced by G-Augment are able to perform better than SpecAugment policies obtained by random search on fine-tuning tasks on CHiME-6 and AMI. G-Augment is also able to establish a new state-of-the-art ASR performance on the CHiME-6 evaluation set (30.7% WER). We further demonstrate that G-Augment policies show better transfer properties across warm-start to cold-start training and model size compared to random-searched SpecAugment policies.
abstract_zh: 数据增强是一种普遍存在的技术，用于为自动语音识别 (ASR) 训练提供鲁棒性。然而，即使 ASR 训练过程已经变得自动化并且更加“端到端”，数据增强策略（使用哪些增强功能以​​及如何应用它们）仍然是手工制定的。我们提出了图增强，一种将增强空间定义为有向无环图（DAG）并搜索该空间以优化增强策略本身的技术。我们表明，在相同的计算预算下，G-Augment 生成的策略能够比通过对 CHiME-6 和 AMI 上的微调任务进行随机搜索获得的 SpecAugment 策略表现得更好。 G-Augment 还能够在 CHiME-6 评估集上建立新的最先进的 ASR 性能（30.7% WER）。我们进一步证明，与随机搜索的 SpecAugment 策略相比，G-Augment 策略在热启动到冷启动训练和模型大小方面表现出更好的传输属性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出G-Augment方法，通过将数据增强策略表示为有向无环图（DAG）并搜索最优策略，以提升自动语音识别（ASR）的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管ASR训练已高度自动化，但数据增强策略仍依赖人工设计，限制了性能优化和跨任务迁移能力。现有方法如SpecAugment难以系统化探索最优策略。
AI.method: 将数据增强空间建模为DAG结构，通过搜索算法（如强化学习或束搜索）在图中寻找最优增强策略组合，替代传统手工设计的规则。
AI.result: 在CHiME-6数据集上达到30.7% WER的新SOTA结果，且在计算预算相同的情况下优于随机搜索的SpecAugment策略；策略在模型规模和训练阶段迁移性更优。
AI.conclusion: G-Augment通过结构化搜索有效优化了数据增强策略，证明了自动化策略搜索在ASR中的潜力，为未来研究提供了新的方向。

title: Exiting the Simulation: The Road to Robust and Resilient Autonomous Vehicles at Scale
title_zh: 退出模拟：通往强大且有弹性的大规模自动驾驶汽车之路
abstract: In the past two decades, autonomous driving has been catalyzed into reality by the growing capabilities of machine learning. This paradigm shift possesses significant potential to transform the future of mobility and reshape our society as a whole. With the recent advances in perception, planning, and control capabilities, autonomous driving technologies are being rolled out for public trials, yet we remain far from being able to rigorously ensure the resilient operations of these systems across the long-tailed nature of the driving environment. Given the limitations of real-world testing, autonomous vehicle simulation stands as the critical component in exploring the edge of autonomous driving capabilities, developing the robust behaviors required for successful real-world operation, and enabling the extraction of hidden risks from these complex systems prior to deployment. This paper presents the current state-of-the-art simulation frameworks and methodologies used in the development of autonomous driving systems, with a focus on outlining how simulation is used to build the resiliency required for real-world operation and the methods developed to bridge the gap between simulation and reality. A synthesis of the key challenges surrounding autonomous driving simulation is presented, specifically highlighting the opportunities to further advance the ability to continuously learn in simulation and effectively transfer the learning into the real-world - enabling autonomous vehicles to exit the guardrails of simulation and deliver robust and resilient operations at scale.
summary: In the past two decades, autonomous driving has been catalyzed into reality by the growing capabilities of machine learning. This paradigm shift possesses significant potential to transform the future of mobility and reshape our society as a whole. With the recent advances in perception, planning, and control capabilities, autonomous driving technologies are being rolled out for public trials, yet we remain far from being able to rigorously ensure the resilient operations of these systems across the long-tailed nature of the driving environment. Given the limitations of real-world testing, autonomous vehicle simulation stands as the critical component in exploring the edge of autonomous driving capabilities, developing the robust behaviors required for successful real-world operation, and enabling the extraction of hidden risks from these complex systems prior to deployment. This paper presents the current state-of-the-art simulation frameworks and methodologies used in the development of autonomous driving systems, with a focus on outlining how simulation is used to build the resiliency required for real-world operation and the methods developed to bridge the gap between simulation and reality. A synthesis of the key challenges surrounding autonomous driving simulation is presented, specifically highlighting the opportunities to further advance the ability to continuously learn in simulation and effectively transfer the learning into the real-world - enabling autonomous vehicles to exit the guardrails of simulation and deliver robust and resilient operations at scale.
abstract_zh: 在过去的二十年里，机器学习能力的不断增强促使自动驾驶变成了现实。这种范式转变具有改变移动出行的未来并重塑整个社会的巨大潜力。随着感知、规划和控制能力的最新进步，自动驾驶技术正在推出公开试验，但我们还远远无法严格确保这些系统在驾驶环境的长尾性质下的弹性运行。考虑到现实世界测试的局限性，自动驾驶汽车仿真是探索自动驾驶能力边缘、开发成功现实世界操作所需的稳健行为以及在部署之前从这些复杂系统中提取隐藏风险的关键组成部分。本文介绍了当前自动驾驶系统开发中使用的最先进的仿真框架和方法，重点概述了如何使用仿真来构建现实世界操作所需的弹性，以及为弥合仿真与现实之间的差距而开发的方法。总结了围绕自动驾驶仿真的关键挑战，特别强调了进一步提高在仿真中持续学习的能力并将学习有效地转移到现实世界的机会 - 使自动驾驶汽车能够摆脱仿真的护栏，并大规模提供稳健和有弹性的操作。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了自动驾驶系统开发中用于构建现实世界鲁棒性的仿真框架与方法，并探讨了仿真与现实之间的差距弥合技术。
AI.motivation: 现实世界测试存在局限性，无法覆盖复杂多变的驾驶环境，需依赖仿真技术探索边缘场景、开发鲁棒行为并提取潜在风险。
AI.method: 总结当前仿真框架与方法，重点分析仿真如何提升系统韧性，并提出持续学习与知识迁移的解决方案以弥合仿真与现实差距。
AI.result: 系统梳理了自动驾驶仿真的关键技术挑战，明确了通过持续学习与迁移学习实现仿真到现实有效转化的路径。
AI.conclusion: 需进一步提升仿真系统的持续学习能力与现实迁移效率，使自动驾驶车辆突破仿真限制，实现规模化鲁棒运行。

A synthesis of the key challenges surrounding autonomous driving simulation is presented, specifically highlighting the opportunities to further advance the ability to continuously learn in simulation and effectively transfer the learning into the real-world - enabling autonomous vehicles to exit the guardrails of simulation and deliver robust and resilient operations at scale. 在过去的二十年里，机器学习能力的不断增强促使自动驾驶变成了现实。这种范式转变具有改变移动出行的未来并重塑整个社会的巨大潜力。随着感知、规划和控制能力的最新进步，自动驾驶技术正在推出公开试验，但我们还远远无法严格确保这些系统在驾驶环境的长尾性质下的弹性运行。考虑到现实世界测试的局限性，自动驾驶汽车仿真是探索自动驾驶能力边缘、开发成功现实世界操作所需的稳健行为以及在部署之前从这些复杂系统中提取隐藏风险的关键组成部分。本文介绍了当前自动驾驶系统开发中使用的最先进的仿真框架和方法，重点概述了如何使用仿真来构建现实世界操作所需的弹性，以及为弥合仿真与现实之间的差距而开发的方法。总结了围绕自动驾驶仿真的关键挑战，特别强调了进一步提高在仿真中持续学习的能力并将学习有效地转移到现实世界的机会 - 使自动驾驶汽车能够摆脱仿真的护栏，并大规模提供稳健和有弹性的操作。 本文综述了自动驾驶系统开发中用于构建现实世界鲁棒性的仿真框架与方法，并探讨了仿真与现实之间的差距弥合技术。 Richard Chakra cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Thomas Lew,Sumeet Singh,Mario Prats,Jeffrey Bingham,Jonathan Weisz,Benjie Holson,Xiaohan Zhang,Vikas Sindhwani,Yao Lu,Fei Xia,Peng Xu,Tingnan Zhang,Jie Tan,Montserrat Gonzalez
title: Robotic Table Wiping via Reinforcement Learning and Whole-body Trajectory Optimization
title_zh: 通过强化学习和全身轨迹优化的机器人擦桌子
abstract: We propose a framework to enable multipurpose assistive mobile robots to autonomously wipe tables to clean spills and crumbs. This problem is challenging, as it requires planning wiping actions while reasoning over uncertain latent dynamics of crumbs and spills captured via high-dimensional visual observations. Simultaneously, we must guarantee constraints satisfaction to enable safe deployment in unstructured cluttered environments. To tackle this problem, we first propose a stochastic differential equation to model crumbs and spill dynamics and absorption with a robot wiper. Using this model, we train a vision-based policy for planning wiping actions in simulation using reinforcement learning (RL). To enable zero-shot sim-to-real deployment, we dovetail the RL policy with a whole-body trajectory optimization framework to compute base and arm joint trajectories that execute the desired wiping motions while guaranteeing constraints satisfaction. We extensively validate our approach in simulation and on hardware. Video: https://youtu.be/inORKP4F3EI
summary: We propose a framework to enable multipurpose assistive mobile robots to autonomously wipe tables to clean spills and crumbs. This problem is challenging, as it requires planning wiping actions while reasoning over uncertain latent dynamics of crumbs and spills captured via high-dimensional visual observations. Simultaneously, we must guarantee constraints satisfaction to enable safe deployment in unstructured cluttered environments. To tackle this problem, we first propose a stochastic differential equation to model crumbs and spill dynamics and absorption with a robot wiper. Using this model, we train a vision-based policy for planning wiping actions in simulation using reinforcement learning (RL). To enable zero-shot sim-to-real deployment, we dovetail the RL policy with a whole-body trajectory optimization framework to compute base and arm joint trajectories that execute the desired wiping motions while guaranteeing constraints satisfaction. We extensively validate our approach in simulation and on hardware. Video: https://youtu.be/inORKP4F3EI
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个框架，使多功能辅助移动机器人能够自动擦拭桌子以清洁溢出物和面包屑。这个问题具有挑战性，因为它需要规划擦拭动作，同时对通过高维视觉观察捕获的碎屑和溢出物的不确定潜在动态进行推理。同时，我们必须保证约束满足，以便能够在非结构化杂乱环境中安全部署。为了解决这个问题，我们首先提出一个随机微分方程来模拟机器人雨刷器的碎屑和溢出动力学以及吸收。使用该模型，我们训练基于视觉的策略，以使用强化学习（RL）在模拟中规划擦拭动作。为了实现零次模拟到真实部署，我们将强化学习策略与全身轨迹优化框架相结合，以计算执行所需擦拭运动的底座和手臂关节轨迹，同时保证约束满足。我们在模拟和硬件上广泛验证了我们的方法。视频：https://youtu.be/inORKP4F3EI

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种框架，使多功能辅助移动机器人能够自主擦除桌子上的溢出物和碎屑，同时满足复杂环境中的安全约束。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人难以在杂乱无序的环境中安全有效地完成清洁任务，需处理视觉观测中的不确定性并保证动作安全性。
AI.method: 建立随机微分方程建模碎屑动态，结合强化学习训练视觉策略，并通过全身轨迹优化生成满足约束的机械臂与底盘运动轨迹。
AI.result: 方法在仿真环境和实际硬件中均验证有效，成功实现从仿真到现实的零样本迁移。
AI.conclusion: 该框架展示了强化学习与运动规划结合在复杂服务机器人任务中的可行性，为类人清洁操作提供新思路。

title: Cluster and Aggregate: Face Recognition with Large Probe Set
title_zh: 聚类和聚合：使用大型探针组进行人脸识别
abstract: Feature fusion plays a crucial role in unconstrained face recognition where inputs (probes) comprise of a set of $N$ low quality images whose individual qualities vary. Advances in attention and recurrent modules have led to feature fusion that can model the relationship among the images in the input set. However, attention mechanisms cannot scale to large $N$ due to their quadratic complexity and recurrent modules suffer from input order sensitivity. We propose a two-stage feature fusion paradigm, Cluster and Aggregate, that can both scale to large $N$ and maintain the ability to perform sequential inference with order invariance. Specifically, Cluster stage is a linear assignment of $N$ inputs to $M$ global cluster centers, and Aggregation stage is a fusion over $M$ clustered features. The clustered features play an integral role when the inputs are sequential as they can serve as a summarization of past features. By leveraging the order-invariance of incremental averaging operation, we design an update rule that achieves batch-order invariance, which guarantees that the contributions of early image in the sequence do not diminish as time steps increase. Experiments on IJB-B and IJB-S benchmark datasets show the superiority of the proposed two-stage paradigm in unconstrained face recognition. Code and pretrained models are available in https://github.com/mk-minchul/caface
summary: Feature fusion plays a crucial role in unconstrained face recognition where inputs (probes) comprise of a set of $N$ low quality images whose individual qualities vary. Advances in attention and recurrent modules have led to feature fusion that can model the relationship among the images in the input set. However, attention mechanisms cannot scale to large $N$ due to their quadratic complexity and recurrent modules suffer from input order sensitivity. We propose a two-stage feature fusion paradigm, Cluster and Aggregate, that can both scale to large $N$ and maintain the ability to perform sequential inference with order invariance. Specifically, Cluster stage is a linear assignment of $N$ inputs to $M$ global cluster centers, and Aggregation stage is a fusion over $M$ clustered features. The clustered features play an integral role when the inputs are sequential as they can serve as a summarization of past features. By leveraging the order-invariance of incremental averaging operation, we design an update rule that achieves batch-order invariance, which guarantees that the contributions of early image in the sequence do not diminish as time steps increase. Experiments on IJB-B and IJB-S benchmark datasets show the superiority of the proposed two-stage paradigm in unconstrained face recognition. Code and pretrained models are available in https://github.com/mk-minchul/caface
abstract_zh: 特征融合在无约束人脸识别中发挥着至关重要的作用，其中输入（探针）由一组 $N$ 低质量图像组成，其个体质量各不相同。注意力和循环模块的进步带来了特征融合，可以对输入集中图像之间的关系进行建模。然而，由于注意力机制的二次复杂度和循环模块受到输入顺序敏感性的影响，注意力机制无法扩展到大的$N$。我们提出了一种两阶段特征融合范式，即 Cluster 和 Aggregate，它既可以扩展到较大的 $N$，又可以保持执行具有顺序不变性的顺序推理的能力。具体来说，聚类阶段是将 $N$ 个输入线性分配到 $M$ 个全局聚类中心，而聚合阶段是 $M$ 个聚类特征的融合。当输入是连续的时，聚类特征发挥着不可或缺的作用，因为它们可以作为过去特征的总结。通过利用增量平均操作的顺序不变性，我们设计了一种实现批量顺序不变性的更新规则，这保证了序列中早期图像的贡献不会随着时间步长的增加而减少。 IJB-B 和 IJB-S 基准数据集上的实验表明了所提出的两阶段范式在无约束人脸识别中的优越性。代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/mk-minchul/caface 中找到

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Cluster and Aggregate的两阶段特征融合方法，用于处理大规模低质量人脸图像集的无约束人脸识别任务。
AI.motivation: 现有注意力机制在处理大规模输入时计算复杂度高，循环模块对输入顺序敏感，难以同时满足大规模探针集处理与顺序不变性需求。
AI.method: 采用两阶段架构：第一阶段将N个输入分配到M个全局聚类中心（Cluster），第二阶段对聚类特征进行融合（Aggregate）。通过增量平均操作实现顺序不变性，保证早期图像贡献不随时间衰减。
AI.result: 在IJB-B和IJB-S基准数据集上的实验表明，该方法在无约束人脸识别任务中优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: Cluster and Aggregate方法有效解决了大规模探针集处理与顺序不变性矛盾，在人脸识别任务中表现出优越性能。

authors_text: Zhenrui Yue,Huimin Zeng,Bernhard Kratzwald,Stefan Feuerriegel,Dong Wang
title: QA Domain Adaptation using Hidden Space Augmentation and Self-Supervised Contrastive Adaptation
title_zh: 使用隐藏空间增强和自监督对比适应的 QA 域适应
abstract: Question answering (QA) has recently shown impressive results for answering questions from customized domains. Yet, a common challenge is to adapt QA models to an unseen target domain. In this paper, we propose a novel self-supervised framework called QADA for QA domain adaptation. QADA introduces a novel data augmentation pipeline used to augment training QA samples. Different from existing methods, we enrich the samples via hidden space augmentation. For questions, we introduce multi-hop synonyms and sample augmented token embeddings with Dirichlet distributions. For contexts, we develop an augmentation method which learns to drop context spans via a custom attentive sampling strategy. Additionally, contrastive learning is integrated in the proposed self-supervised adaptation framework QADA. Unlike existing approaches, we generate pseudo labels and propose to train the model via a novel attention-based contrastive adaptation method. The attention weights are used to build informative features for discrepancy estimation that helps the QA model separate answers and generalize across source and target domains. To the best of our knowledge, our work is the first to leverage hidden space augmentation and attention-based contrastive adaptation for self-supervised domain adaptation in QA. Our evaluation shows that QADA achieves considerable improvements on multiple target datasets over state-of-the-art baselines in QA domain adaptation.
summary: Question answering (QA) has recently shown impressive results for answering questions from customized domains. Yet, a common challenge is to adapt QA models to an unseen target domain. In this paper, we propose a novel self-supervised framework called QADA for QA domain adaptation. QADA introduces a novel data augmentation pipeline used to augment training QA samples. Different from existing methods, we enrich the samples via hidden space augmentation. For questions, we introduce multi-hop synonyms and sample augmented token embeddings with Dirichlet distributions. For contexts, we develop an augmentation method which learns to drop context spans via a custom attentive sampling strategy. Additionally, contrastive learning is integrated in the proposed self-supervised adaptation framework QADA. Unlike existing approaches, we generate pseudo labels and propose to train the model via a novel attention-based contrastive adaptation method. The attention weights are used to build informative features for discrepancy estimation that helps the QA model separate answers and generalize across source and target domains. To the best of our knowledge, our work is the first to leverage hidden space augmentation and attention-based contrastive adaptation for self-supervised domain adaptation in QA. Our evaluation shows that QADA achieves considerable improvements on multiple target datasets over state-of-the-art baselines in QA domain adaptation.
abstract_zh: 问答 (QA) 最近在回答定制领域的问题方面取得了令人印象深刻的成果。然而，一个常见的挑战是使 QA 模型适应未知的目标领域。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为 QADA 的新型自监督框架，用于 QA 领域适应。 QADA 引入了一种新颖的数据增强管道，用于增强训练 QA 样本。与现有方法不同，我们通过隐藏空间增强来丰富样本。对于问题，我们引入了多跳同义词和带有狄利克雷分布的示例增强令牌嵌入。对于上下文，我们开发了一种增强方法，该方法学习通过自定义的关注采样策略来删除上下文跨度。此外，对比学习被集成到提出的自我监督适应框架 QADA 中。与现有方法不同，我们生成伪标签，并建议通过一种新颖的基于注意力的对比适应方法来训练模型。注意力权重用于构建用于差异估计的信息特征，帮助 QA 模型分离答案并在源域和目标域之间进行泛化。据我们所知，我们的工作是第一个利用隐藏空间增强和基于注意力的对比适应来进行 QA 中自我监督的领域适应的工作。我们的评估表明，与 QA 领域适应的最先进基线相比，QADA 在多个目标数据集上取得了相当大的改进。

AI.tldr: 提出一种自监督框架QADA，通过隐藏空间增强和对比自适应方法，解决问答模型在未见过目标领域的适应问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在问答领域适应中存在数据增强不足和对比学习效果有限的问题，需结合隐藏空间增强与注意力机制提升模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 采用隐藏空间增强生成多跳同义词及狄利克雷分布嵌入，结合注意力采样策略增强上下文；通过伪标签与注意力权重构建对比自适应框架，优化领域差异特征学习。
AI.result: QADA在多个目标数据集上显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在QA领域自监督适应中首次结合隐藏空间增强与注意力对比自适应，有效提升模型跨领域泛化能力。

search_text: QA Domain Adaptation using Hidden Space Augmentation and Self-Supervised Contrastive Adaptation 使用隐藏空间增强和自监督对比适应的 QA 域适应 Question answering (QA) has recently shown impressive results for answering questions from customized domains. Yet, a common challenge is to adapt QA models to an unseen target domain. In this paper, we propose a novel self-supervised framework called QADA for QA domain adaptation. QADA introduces a novel data augmentation pipeline used to augment training QA samples. Different from existing methods, we enrich the samples via hidden space augmentation. For questions, we introduce multi-hop synonyms and sample augmented token embeddings with Dirichlet distributions. For contexts, we develop an augmentation method which learns to drop context spans via a custom attentive sampling strategy. Additionally, contrastive learning is integrated in the proposed self-supervised adaptation framework QADA. Unlike existing approaches, we generate pseudo labels and propose to train the model via a novel attention-based contrastive adaptation method. The attention weights are used to build informative features for discrepancy estimation that helps the QA model separate answers and generalize across source and target domains. To the best of our knowledge, our work is the first to leverage hidden space augmentation and attention-based contrastive adaptation for self-supervised domain adaptation in QA. Our evaluation shows that QADA achieves considerable improvements on multiple target datasets over state-of-the-art baselines in QA domain adaptation. 问答 (QA) 最近在回答定制领域的问题方面取得了令人印象深刻的成果。然而，一个常见的挑战是使 QA 模型适应未知的目标领域。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为 QADA 的新型自监督框架，用于 QA 领域适应。 QADA 引入了一种新颖的数据增强管道，用于增强训练 QA 样本。与现有方法不同，我们通过隐藏空间增强来丰富样本。对于问题，我们引入了多跳同义词和带有狄利克雷分布的示例增强令牌嵌入。对于上下文，我们开发了一种增强方法，该方法学习通过自定义的关注采样策略来删除上下文跨度。此外，对比学习被集成到提出的自我监督适应框架 QADA 中。与现有方法不同，我们生成伪标签，并建议通过一种新颖的基于注意力的对比适应方法来训练模型。注意力权重用于构建用于差异估计的信息特征，帮助 QA 模型分离答案并在源域和目标域之间进行泛化。据我们所知，我们的工作是第一个利用隐藏空间增强和基于注意力的对比适应来进行 QA 中自我监督的领域适应的工作。我们的评估表明，与 QA 领域适应的最先进基线相比，QADA 在多个目标数据集上取得了相当大的改进。 提出一种自监督框架QADA，通过隐藏空间增强和对比自适应方法，解决问答模型在未见过目标领域的适应问题。 Zhenrui Yue,Huimin Zeng,Bernhard Kratzwald,Stefan Feuerriegel,Dong Wang cs.CL,cs.AI

title: Modeling Animal Vocalizations through Synthesizers
title_zh: 通过合成器模拟动物发声
abstract: Modeling real-world sound is a fundamental problem in the creative use of machine learning and many other fields, including human speech processing and bioacoustics. Transformer-based generative models and some prior work (e.g., DDSP) are known to produce realistic sound, although they have limited control and are hard to interpret. As an alternative, we aim to use modular synthesizers, i.e., compositional, parametric electronic musical instruments, for modeling non-music sounds. However, inferring synthesizer parameters given a target sound, i.e., the parameter inference task, is not trivial for general sounds, and past research has typically focused on musical sound. In this work, we optimize a differentiable synthesizer from TorchSynth in order to model, emulate, and creatively generate animal vocalizations. We compare an array of optimization methods, from gradient-based search to genetic algorithms, for inferring its parameters, and then demonstrate how one can control and interpret the parameters for modeling non-music sounds.
summary: Modeling real-world sound is a fundamental problem in the creative use of machine learning and many other fields, including human speech processing and bioacoustics. Transformer-based generative models and some prior work (e.g., DDSP) are known to produce realistic sound, although they have limited control and are hard to interpret. As an alternative, we aim to use modular synthesizers, i.e., compositional, parametric electronic musical instruments, for modeling non-music sounds. However, inferring synthesizer parameters given a target sound, i.e., the parameter inference task, is not trivial for general sounds, and past research has typically focused on musical sound. In this work, we optimize a differentiable synthesizer from TorchSynth in order to model, emulate, and creatively generate animal vocalizations. We compare an array of optimization methods, from gradient-based search to genetic algorithms, for inferring its parameters, and then demonstrate how one can control and interpret the parameters for modeling non-music sounds.
abstract_zh: 对现实世界的声音进行建模是机器学习和许多其他领域（包括人类语音处理和生物声学）创造性应用的一个基本问题。基于 Transformer 的生成模型和一些先前的工作（例如 DDSP）众所周知可以产生逼真的声音，尽管它们的控制有限并且难以解释。作为替代方案，我们的目标是使用模块化合成器，即组合的参数电子乐器，来对非音乐声音进行建模。然而，对于一般声音来说，推断给定目标声音的合成器参数（即参数推断任务）并不是微不足道的，过去的研究通常集中在音乐声音上。在这项工作中，我们优化了 TorchSynth 的可微分合成器，以便建模、模拟和创造性地生成动物发声。我们比较了一系列优化方法，从基于梯度的搜索到遗传算法，用于推断其参数，然后演示如何控制和解释用于建模非音乐声音的参数。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过模块化合成器建模和生成动物声学信号，探索参数推断方法以实现对非音乐声音的可控建模。
AI.motivation: 现有生成模型（如Transformer、DDSP）虽能生成逼真声音，但缺乏可解释性和控制性，而合成器参数推断在非音乐领域研究不足。
AI.method: 优化TorchSynth的可微分合成器，对比梯度下降、遗传算法等参数推断方法，验证其对动物声学信号的建模能力。
AI.result: 成功实现动物发声的合成器参数推断，证明了合成器框架在非音乐声音建模中的有效性与可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 合成器参数化方法为非音乐声音（如动物声学）建模提供了可控且可解释的替代方案，未来可扩展至更复杂声学场景。

title: Black Box Model Explanations and the Human Interpretability Expectations -- An Analysis in the Context of Homicide Prediction
title_zh: 黑盒模型解释和人类可解释性期望——凶杀预测背景下的分析
abstract: Strategies based on Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) have promoted better human interpretability of the results of black box models. This opens up the possibility of questioning whether explanations created by XAI methods meet human expectations. The XAI methods being currently used (Ciu, Dalex, Eli5, Lofo, Shap, and Skater) provide various forms of explanations, including global rankings of relevance of features, which allow for an overview of how the model is explained as a result of its inputs and outputs. These methods provide for an increase in the explainability of the model and a greater interpretability grounded on the context of the problem. Intending to shed light on the explanations generated by XAI methods and their interpretations, this research addresses a real-world classification problem related to homicide prediction, already peer-validated, replicated its proposed black box model and used 6 different XAI methods to generate explanations and 6 different human experts. The results were generated through calculations of correlations, comparative analysis and identification of relationships between all ranks of features produced. It was found that even though it is a model that is difficult to explain, 75\% of the expectations of human experts were met, with approximately 48\% agreement between results from XAI methods and human experts. The results allow for answering questions such as: "Are the Expectation of Interpretation generated among different human experts similar?", "Do the different XAI methods generate similar explanations for the proposed problem?", "Can explanations generated by XAI methods meet human expectation of Interpretations?", and "Can Explanations and Expectations of Interpretation work together?".
summary: Strategies based on Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) have promoted better human interpretability of the results of black box models. This opens up the possibility of questioning whether explanations created by XAI methods meet human expectations. The XAI methods being currently used (Ciu, Dalex, Eli5, Lofo, Shap, and Skater) provide various forms of explanations, including global rankings of relevance of features, which allow for an overview of how the model is explained as a result of its inputs and outputs. These methods provide for an increase in the explainability of the model and a greater interpretability grounded on the context of the problem. Intending to shed light on the explanations generated by XAI methods and their interpretations, this research addresses a real-world classification problem related to homicide prediction, already peer-validated, replicated its proposed black box model and used 6 different XAI methods to generate explanations and 6 different human experts. The results were generated through calculations of correlations, comparative analysis and identification of relationships between all ranks of features produced. It was found that even though it is a model that is difficult to explain, 75\% of the expectations of human experts were met, with approximately 48\% agreement between results from XAI methods and human experts. The results allow for answering questions such as: "Are the Expectation of Interpretation generated among different human experts similar?", "Do the different XAI methods generate similar explanations for the proposed problem?", "Can explanations generated by XAI methods meet human expectation of Interpretations?", and "Can Explanations and Expectations of Interpretation work together?".
abstract_zh: 基于可解释人工智能（XAI）的策略促进了人类对黑盒模型结果的更好解释。这引发了质疑 XAI 方法创建的解释是否符合人类期望的可能性。当前使用的 XAI 方法（Ciu、Dalex、Eli5、Lofo、Shap 和 Skater）提供了各种形式的解释，包括特征相关性的全局排名，从而可以概述如何根据其输入和输出来解释模型。这些方法提高了模型的可解释性，并基于问题的上下文提供了更大的可解释性。为了阐明 XAI 方法生成的解释及其解释，本研究解决了与凶杀预测相关的现实世界分类问题，该问题已经经过同行验证，复制了其提出的黑盒模型，并使用 6 种不同的 XAI 方法和 6 名不同的人类专家来生成解释。结果是通过计算相关性、比较分析和识别所产生的所有等级特征之间的关系而生成的。结果发现，尽管这是一个难以解释的模型，但仍满足了人类专家 75% 的期望，XAI 方法的结果与人类专家的结果大约有 48% 的一致性。结果可以回答以下问题：“不同人类专家生成的解释期望是否相似？”、“不同的 XAI 方法对所提出的问题生成相似的解释吗？”、“XAI 方法生成的解释能否满足人类对解释的期望？”以及“解释和解释期望可以一起工作吗？”。

AI.tldr: 本文研究可解释人工智能（XAI）方法生成的黑箱模型解释是否符合人类专家对 homicide 预测问题的可解释性期望。
AI.motivation: 尽管XAI方法提升了模型的可解释性，但现有研究缺乏对XAI解释与人类专家解释期望之间匹配程度的系统验证，尤其在高风险领域如 homicide 预测中需确保解释的可靠性。
AI.method: 复现已验证的 homicide 预测黑箱模型，采用6种XAI方法（Ciu、Dalex等）生成特征重要性排名，并与6位人类专家的解释期望进行相关性分析、比较分析及关系识别。
AI.result: 75%的人类专家期望被满足，XAI方法与专家解释的约48%存在一致性；不同XAI方法间解释差异显著，但部分关键特征共识较高。
AI.conclusion: XAI方法能部分满足人类对模型解释的期望，但存在显著差异，需进一步优化解释方法以增强与人类认知的一致性，特别是在高风险决策场景中。

search_text: Black Box Model Explanations and the Human Interpretability Expectations -- An Analysis in the Context of Homicide Prediction 黑盒模型解释和人类可解释性期望——凶杀预测背景下的分析 Strategies based on Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) have promoted better human interpretability of the results of black box models. This opens up the possibility of questioning whether explanations created by XAI methods meet human expectations. The XAI methods being currently used (Ciu, Dalex, Eli5, Lofo, Shap, and Skater) provide various forms of explanations, including global rankings of relevance of features, which allow for an overview of how the model is explained as a result of its inputs and outputs. These methods provide for an increase in the explainability of the model and a greater interpretability grounded on the context of the problem. Intending to shed light on the explanations generated by XAI methods and their interpretations, this research addresses a real-world classification problem related to homicide prediction, already peer-validated, replicated its proposed black box model and used 6 different XAI methods to generate explanations and 6 different human experts. The results were generated through calculations of correlations, comparative analysis and identification of relationships between all ranks of features produced. It was found that even though it is a model that is difficult to explain, 75\% of the expectations of human experts were met, with approximately 48\% agreement between results from XAI methods and human experts. The results allow for answering questions such as: "Are the Expectation of Interpretation generated among different human experts similar?", "Do the different XAI methods generate similar explanations for the proposed problem?", "Can explanations generated by XAI methods meet human expectation of Interpretations?", and "Can Explanations and Expectations of Interpretation work together?". 基于可解释人工智能（XAI）的策略促进了人类对黑盒模型结果的更好解释。这引发了质疑 XAI 方法创建的解释是否符合人类期望的可能性。当前使用的 XAI 方法（Ciu、Dalex、Eli5、Lofo、Shap 和 Skater）提供了各种形式的解释，包括特征相关性的全局排名，从而可以概述如何根据其输入和输出来解释模型。这些方法提高了模型的可解释性，并基于问题的上下文提供了更大的可解释性。为了阐明 XAI 方法生成的解释及其解释，本研究解决了与凶杀预测相关的现实世界分类问题，该问题已经经过同行验证，复制了其提出的黑盒模型，并使用 6 种不同的 XAI 方法和 6 名不同的人类专家来生成解释。结果是通过计算相关性、比较分析和识别所产生的所有等级特征之间的关系而生成的。结果发现，尽管这是一个难以解释的模型，但仍满足了人类专家 75% 的期望，XAI 方法的结果与人类专家的结果大约有 48% 的一致性。结果可以回答以下问题：“不同人类专家生成的解释期望是否相似？”、“不同的 XAI 方法对所提出的问题生成相似的解释吗？”、“XAI 方法生成的解释能否满足人类对解释的期望？”以及“解释和解释期望可以一起工作吗？”。 本文研究可解释人工智能（XAI）方法生成的黑箱模型解释是否符合人类专家对 homicide 预测问题的可解释性期望。 José Ribeiro,Níkolas Carneiro,Ronnie Alves cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Yuhao Chen,Hayden Gunraj,E. Zhixuan Zeng,Robbie Meyer,Maximilian Gilles,Alexander Wong
title: MMRNet: Improving Reliability for Multimodal Object Detection and Segmentation for Bin Picking via Multimodal Redundancy
title_zh: MMRNet：通过多模态冗余提高多模态目标检测和箱拣选分割的可靠性
abstract: Recently, there has been tremendous interest in industry 4.0 infrastructure to address labor shortages in global supply chains. Deploying artificial intelligence-enabled robotic bin picking systems in real world has become particularly important for reducing stress and physical demands of workers while increasing speed and efficiency of warehouses. To this end, artificial intelligence-enabled robotic bin picking systems may be used to automate order picking, but with the risk of causing expensive damage during an abnormal event such as sensor failure. As such, reliability becomes a critical factor for translating artificial intelligence research to real world applications and products. In this paper, we propose a reliable object detection and segmentation system with MultiModal Redundancy (MMRNet) for tackling object detection and segmentation for robotic bin picking using data from different modalities. This is the first system that introduces the concept of multimodal redundancy to address sensor failure issues during deployment. In particular, we realize the multimodal redundancy framework with a gate fusion module and dynamic ensemble learning. Finally, we present a new label-free multi-modal consistency (MC) score that utilizes the output from all modalities to measure the overall system output reliability and uncertainty. Through experiments, we demonstrate that in an event of missing modality, our system provides a much more reliable performance compared to baseline models. We also demonstrate that our MC score is a more reliability indicator for outputs during inference time compared to the model generated confidence scores that are often over-confident.

Deploying artificial intelligence-enabled robotic bin picking systems in real world has become particularly important for reducing stress and physical demands of workers while increasing speed and efficiency of warehouses. To this end, artificial intelligence-enabled robotic bin picking systems may be used to automate order picking, but with the risk of causing expensive damage during an abnormal event such as sensor failure. As such, reliability becomes a critical factor for translating artificial intelligence research to real world applications and products. In this paper, we propose a reliable object detection and segmentation system with MultiModal Redundancy (MMRNet) for tackling object detection and segmentation for robotic bin picking using data from different modalities. This is the first system that introduces the concept of multimodal redundancy to address sensor failure issues during deployment. In particular, we realize the multimodal redundancy framework with a gate fusion module and dynamic ensemble learning. Finally, we present a new label-free multi-modal consistency (MC) score that utilizes the output from all modalities to measure the overall system output reliability and uncertainty. Through experiments, we demonstrate that in an event of missing modality, our system provides a much more reliable performance compared to baseline models. We also demonstrate that our MC score is a more reliability indicator for outputs during inference time compared to the model generated confidence scores that are often over-confident.
abstract_zh: 最近，人们对工业 4.0 基础设施产生了极大的兴趣，以解决全球供应链中的劳动力短缺问题。在现实世界中部署支持人工智能的机器人垃圾箱拣选系统对于减轻工人的压力和体力需求，同时提高仓库的速度和效率变得尤为重要。为此，支持人工智能的机器人箱拣选系统可用于自动化订单拣选，但在传感器故障等异常事件期间存在造成昂贵损坏的风险。因此，可靠性成为将人工智能研究转化为现实世界应用和产品的关键因素。在本文中，我们提出了一种具有多模态冗余（MMRNet）的可靠对象检测和分割系统，用于使用来自不同模态的数据来处理机器人垃圾箱拣选的对象检测和分割。这是第一个引入多模式冗余概念来解决部署期间传感器故障问题的系统。特别是，我们通过门融合模块和动态集成学习实现了多模态冗余框架。最后，我们提出了一种新的无标签多模态一致性（MC）评分，它利用所有模态的输出来衡量整个系统输出的可靠性和不确定性。通过实验，我们证明，在缺少模态的情况下，与基线模型相比，我们的系统提供了更可靠的性能。我们还证明，与模型生成的置信度分数（通常过于自信）相比，我们的 MC 分数是推理时间内输出的更可靠的指标。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MMRNet系统，通过多模态冗余技术提升分拣机器人目标检测与分割的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 工业自动化中，传感器故障可能导致分拣系统损坏，现有方法在异常情况下可靠性不足，需提升系统鲁棒性以保障实际应用。
AI.method: 设计多模态冗余框架，包含门控融合模块和动态集成学习，并引入无标签多模态一致性（MC）分数评估输出可靠性。
AI.result: 实验表明，MMRNet在模态缺失时性能优于基线模型，且MC分数比传统置信度更准确反映输出可靠性。
AI.conclusion: MMRNet是首个利用多模态冗余提升分拣系统可靠性的方法，为工业场景提供更鲁棒的解决方案及可靠性评估指标。

authors_text: Yue Zhang,Hongliang Fei,Dingcheng Li,Tan Yu,Ping Li
title: Prompting through Prototype: A Prototype-based Prompt Learning on Pretrained Vision-Language Models
title_zh: 通过原型进行提示：预训练视觉语言模型的基于原型的提示学习
abstract: Prompt learning is a new learning paradigm which reformulates downstream tasks as similar pretraining tasks on pretrained models by leveraging textual prompts. Recent works have demonstrated that prompt learning is particularly useful for few-shot learning, where there is limited training data. Depending on the granularity of prompts, those methods can be roughly divided into task-level prompting and instance-level prompting. Task-level prompting methods learn one universal prompt for all input samples, which is efficient but ineffective to capture subtle differences among different classes. Instance-level prompting methods learn a specific prompt for each input, though effective but inefficient. In this work, we develop a novel prototype-based prompt learning method to overcome the above limitations. In particular, we focus on few-shot image recognition tasks on pretrained vision-language models (PVLMs) and develop a method of prompting through prototype (PTP), where we define $K$ image prototypes and $K$ prompt prototypes. In PTP, the image prototype represents a centroid of a certain image cluster in the latent space and a prompt prototype is defined as a soft prompt in the continuous space. The similarity between a query image and an image prototype determines how much this prediction relies on the corresponding prompt prototype. Hence, in PTP, similar images will utilize similar prompting ways. Through extensive experiments on seven real-world benchmarks, we show that PTP is an effective method to leverage the latent knowledge and adaptive to various PVLMs. Moreover, through detailed analysis, we discuss pros and cons for prompt learning and parameter-efficient fine-tuning under the context of few-shot learning.
summary: Prompt learning is a new learning paradigm which reformulates downstream tasks as similar pretraining tasks on pretrained models by leveraging textual prompts. Recent works have demonstrated that prompt learning is particularly useful for few-shot learning, where there is limited training data. Depending on the granularity of prompts, those methods can be roughly divided into task-level prompting and instance-level prompting. Task-level prompting methods learn one universal prompt for all input samples, which is efficient but ineffective to capture subtle differences among different classes. Instance-level prompting methods learn a specific prompt for each input, though effective but inefficient. In this work, we develop a novel prototype-based prompt learning method to overcome the above limitations. In particular, we focus on few-shot image recognition tasks on pretrained vision-language models (PVLMs) and develop a method of prompting through prototype (PTP), where we define $K$ image prototypes and $K$ prompt prototypes. In PTP, the image prototype represents a centroid of a certain image cluster in the latent space and a prompt prototype is defined as a soft prompt in the continuous space. The similarity between a query image and an image prototype determines how much this prediction relies on the corresponding prompt prototype. Hence, in PTP, similar images will utilize similar prompting ways. Through extensive experiments on seven real-world benchmarks, we show that PTP is an effective method to leverage the latent knowledge and adaptive to various PVLMs. Moreover, through detailed analysis, we discuss pros and cons for prompt learning and parameter-efficient fine-tuning under the context of few-shot learning.
abstract_zh: 提示学习是一种新的学习范式，它通过利用文本提示将下游任务重新表述为预训练模型上的类似预训练任务。最近的研究表明，即时学习对于训练数据有限的小样本学习特别有用。根据提示的粒度，这些方法可以大致分为任务级提示和实例级提示。任务级提示方法为所有输入样本学习一种通用提示，这种方法很有效，但无法有效捕获不同类别之间的细微差异。实例级提示方法为每个输入学习特定的提示，虽然有效但效率低下。在这项工作中，我们开发了一种新颖的基于原型的即时学习方法来克服上述限制。特别是，我们专注于预训练视觉语言模型（PVLM）上的少镜头图像识别任务，并开发了一种通过原型提示的方法（PTP），其中我们定义了 $K$ 图像原型和 $K$ 提示原型。在PTP中，图像原型代表潜在空间中某个图像簇的质心，提示原型被定义为连续空间中的软提示。查询图像与图像原型之间的相似度决定了该预测对相应提示原型的依赖程度。因此，在PTP中，相似的图像会采用相似的提示方式。通过对七个现实世界基准的广泛实验，我们表明 PTP 是一种利用潜在知识并适应各种 PVLM 的有效方法。此外，通过详细分析，我们讨论了在少样本学习的背景下快速学习和参数高效微调的利弊。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于原型的提示学习方法（PTP），用于在预训练视觉-语言模型（PVLMs）上进行少样本图像识别任务。
AI.motivation: 传统提示学习方法在少样本场景下存在效率与效果的矛盾：任务级提示泛化性差，实例级提示效率低。本文旨在设计一种兼顾效率与效果的新型提示学习框架。
AI.method: 定义K个图像原型和K个提示原型，图像原型表示潜在空间中的聚类中心，提示原型为连续空间中的软提示。通过查询图像与图像原型的相似度动态选择对应的提示原型进行预测。
AI.result: 在七个现实基准数据集上的实验表明，PTP有效利用潜在知识并适配多种PVLMs，同时通过分析讨论了提示学习与参数高效微调方法的优劣。
AI.conclusion: PTP通过原型关联机制实现了少样本场景下提示学习的效率与效果平衡，为视觉-语言模型的微调提供了新思路。

search_text: Prompting through Prototype: A Prototype-based Prompt Learning on Pretrained Vision-Language Models 通过原型进行提示：预训练视觉语言模型的基于原型的提示学习 Prompt learning is a new learning paradigm which reformulates downstream tasks as similar pretraining tasks on pretrained models by leveraging textual prompts. Recent works have demonstrated that prompt learning is particularly useful for few-shot learning, where there is limited training data. Depending on the granularity of prompts, those methods can be roughly divided into task-level prompting and instance-level prompting. Task-level prompting methods learn one universal prompt for all input samples, which is efficient but ineffective to capture subtle differences among different classes. Instance-level prompting methods learn a specific prompt for each input, though effective but inefficient. In this work, we develop a novel prototype-based prompt learning method to overcome the above limitations. In particular, we focus on few-shot image recognition tasks on pretrained vision-language models (PVLMs) and develop a method of prompting through prototype (PTP), where we define $K$ image prototypes and $K$ prompt prototypes. In PTP, the image prototype represents a centroid of a certain image cluster in the latent space and a prompt prototype is defined as a soft prompt in the continuous space. The similarity between a query image and an image prototype determines how much this prediction relies on the corresponding prompt prototype. Hence, in PTP, similar images will utilize similar prompting ways. Through extensive experiments on seven real-world benchmarks, we show that PTP is an effective method to leverage the latent knowledge and adaptive to various PVLMs. Moreover, through detailed analysis, we discuss pros and cons for prompt learning and parameter-efficient fine-tuning under the context of few-shot learning. 提示学习是一种新的学习范式，它通过利用文本提示将下游任务重新表述为预训练模型上的类似预训练任务。最近的研究表明，即时学习对于训练数据有限的小样本学习特别有用。根据提示的粒度，这些方法可以大致分为任务级提示和实例级提示。任务级提示方法为所有输入样本学习一种通用提示，这种方法很有效，但无法有效捕获不同类别之间的细微差异。实例级提示方法为每个输入学习特定的提示，虽然有效但效率低下。在这项工作中，我们开发了一种新颖的基于原型的即时学习方法来克服上述限制。特别是，我们专注于预训练视觉语言模型（PVLM）上的少镜头图像识别任务，并开发了一种通过原型提示的方法（PTP），其中我们定义了 $K$ 图像原型和 $K$ 提示原型。在PTP中，图像原型代表潜在空间中某个图像簇的质心，提示原型被定义为连续空间中的软提示。查询图像与图像原型之间的相似度决定了该预测对相应提示原型的依赖程度。因此，在PTP中，相似的图像会采用相似的提示方式。通过对七个现实世界基准的广泛实验，我们表明 PTP 是一种利用潜在知识并适应各种 PVLM 的有效方法。此外，通过详细分析，我们讨论了在少样本学习的背景下快速学习和参数高效微调的利弊。 本文提出一种基于原型的提示学习方法（PTP），用于在预训练视觉-语言模型（PVLMs）上进行少样本图像识别任务。 Yue Zhang,Hongliang Fei,Dingcheng Li,Tan Yu,Ping Li cs.CL,cs.CV

authors_text: Joshua Cesare Placidi,Yishu Miao,Zixu Wang,Lucia Specia
title: Scene Text Recognition with Semantics
title_zh: 场景文本语义识别
abstract: Scene Text Recognition (STR) models have achieved high performance in recent years on benchmark datasets where text images are presented with minimal noise. Traditional STR recognition pipelines take a cropped image as sole input and attempt to identify the characters present. This infrastructure can fail in instances where the input image is noisy or the text is partially obscured. This paper proposes using semantic information from the greater scene to contextualise predictions. We generate semantic vectors using object tags and fuse this information into a transformer-based architecture. The results demonstrate that our multimodal approach yields higher performance than traditional benchmark models, particularly on noisy instances.
summary: Scene Text Recognition (STR) models have achieved high performance in recent years on benchmark datasets where text images are presented with minimal noise. Traditional STR recognition pipelines take a cropped image as sole input and attempt to identify the characters present. This infrastructure can fail in instances where the input image is noisy or the text is partially obscured. This paper proposes using semantic information from the greater scene to contextualise predictions. We generate semantic vectors using object tags and fuse this information into a transformer-based architecture. The results demonstrate that our multimodal approach yields higher performance than traditional benchmark models, particularly on noisy instances.
abstract_zh: 近年来，场景文本识别（STR）模型在文本图像以最小噪声呈现的基准数据集上取得了高性能。传统的 STR 识别流程将裁剪后的图像作为唯一输入，并尝试识别存在的字符。在输入图像有噪声或文本部分模糊的情况下，该基础设施可能会失败。本文提出使用来自更大场景的语义信息来进行上下文预测。我们使用对象标签生成语义向量，并将这些信息融合到基于变压器的架构中。结果表明，我们的多模式方法比传统基准模型具有更高的性能，特别是在噪声实例上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合场景语义信息的多模态方法，以提升复杂场景下的文本识别性能。
AI.motivation: 传统场景文本识别方法在噪声或遮挡环境下表现不佳，需借助场景语义信息增强模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过物体标签生成语义向量，将其与Transformer架构融合，构建多模态识别模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在噪声文本实例上的识别准确率优于传统基准模型。
AI.conclusion: 语义信息与视觉特征的融合能有效提升场景文本识别的抗干扰能力。

title: A Clinical Dataset for the Evaluation of Motion Planners in Medical Applications
title_zh: 用于评估医疗应用中运动规划器的临床数据集
comment: 4 pages, 3 figures, to appear at the workshop "Evaluating Motion Planning Performance: Metrics, Tools, Datasets, and Experimental Design" at IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS), Japan, October 23 - October 27, 2022
comments: 4 pages, 3 figures, to appear at the workshop "Evaluating Motion Planning Performance: Metrics, Tools, Datasets, and Experimental Design" at IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS), Japan, October 23 - October 27, 2022
abstract: The prospect of using autonomous robots to enhance the capabilities of physicians and enable novel procedures has led to considerable efforts in developing medical robots and incorporating autonomous capabilities. Motion planning is a core component for any such system working in an environment that demands near perfect levels of safety, reliability, and precision. Despite the extensive and promising work that has gone into developing motion planners for medical robots, a standardized and clinically-meaningful way to compare existing algorithms and evaluate novel planners and robots is not well established. We present the Medical Motion Planning Dataset (Med-MPD), a publicly-available dataset of real clinical scenarios in various organs for the purpose of evaluating motion planners for minimally-invasive medical robots. Our goal is that this dataset serve as a first step towards creating a larger robust medical motion planning benchmark framework, advance research into medical motion planners, and lift some of the burden of generating medical evaluation data.
summary: The prospect of using autonomous robots to enhance the capabilities of physicians and enable novel procedures has led to considerable efforts in developing medical robots and incorporating autonomous capabilities. Motion planning is a core component for any such system working in an environment that demands near perfect levels of safety, reliability, and precision. Despite the extensive and promising work that has gone into developing motion planners for medical robots, a standardized and clinically-meaningful way to compare existing algorithms and evaluate novel planners and robots is not well established. We present the Medical Motion Planning Dataset (Med-MPD), a publicly-available dataset of real clinical scenarios in various organs for the purpose of evaluating motion planners for minimally-invasive medical robots. Our goal is that this dataset serve as a first step towards creating a larger robust medical motion planning benchmark framework, advance research into medical motion planners, and lift some of the burden of generating medical evaluation data.
abstract_zh: 使用自主机器人来增强医生的能力并实现新颖的手术的前景导致人们在开发医疗机器人和整合自主功能方面付出了巨大的努力。运动规划是任何在需要近乎完美的安全性、可靠性和精度的环境中工作的此类系统的核心组件。尽管在开发医疗机器人运动规划器方面已经开展了广泛且有前途的工作，但尚未建立一种标准化且具有临床意义的方法来比较现有算法并评估新颖的规划器和机器人。我们提出了医疗运动规划数据集（Med-MPD），这是一个公开的各种器官真实临床场景数据集，用于评估微创医疗机器人的运动规划器。我们的目标是，该数据集作为创建更强大的医学运动规划基准框架的第一步，推进对医学运动规划器的研究，并减轻生成医学评估数据的一些负担。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个用于评估医疗机器人运动规划器的临床数据集Med-MPD，包含多种器官的真实场景数据。
AI.motivation: 现有医疗机器人运动规划算法缺乏标准化的临床评估方法，难以比较不同算法性能并推动技术发展。
AI.method: 收集多种器官的临床手术场景数据，构建公开数据集供研究者测试和验证运动规划算法。
AI.result: 发布了Med-MPD数据集，为医疗机器人运动规划研究提供基准测试工具，降低数据生成难度。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集是建立医疗运动规划领域全面评估框架的重要基础，有助于加速相关算法和机器人技术的创新。

Motion planning is a core component for any such system working in an environment that demands near perfect levels of safety, reliability, and precision. We present the Medical Motion Planning Dataset (Med-MPD), a publicly-available dataset of real clinical scenarios in various organs for the purpose of evaluating motion planners for minimally-invasive medical robots. Our goal is that this dataset serve as a first step towards creating a larger robust medical motion planning benchmark framework, advance research into medical motion planners, and lift some of the burden of generating medical evaluation data. 使用自主机器人来增强医生的能力并实现新颖的手术的前景导致人们在开发医疗机器人和整合自主功能方面付出了巨大的努力。运动规划是任何在需要近乎完美的安全性、可靠性和精度的环境中工作的此类系统的核心组件。尽管在开发医疗机器人运动规划器方面已经开展了广泛且有前途的工作，但尚未建立一种标准化且具有临床意义的方法来比较现有算法并评估新颖的规划器和机器人。我们提出了医疗运动规划数据集（Med-MPD），这是一个公开的各种器官真实临床场景数据集，用于评估微创医疗机器人的运动规划器。我们的目标是，该数据集作为创建更强大的医学运动规划基准框架的第一步，推进对医学运动规划器的研究，并减轻生成医学评估数据的一些负担。 本文提出一个用于评估医疗机器人运动规划器的临床数据集Med-MPD，包含多种器官的真实场景数据。 Inbar Fried,Jason A. Akulian,Ron Alterovitz cs.RO

title: Grounded Video Situation Recognition
title_zh: 接地视频态势识别
comment: Accepted to NeurIPS 2022. Project Page: https://zeeshank95.github.io/grvidsitu
comments: Accepted to NeurIPS 2022. Project Page: https://zeeshank95.github.io/grvidsitu
abstract: Dense video understanding requires answering several questions such as who is doing what to whom, with what, how, why, and where. Recently, Video Situation Recognition (VidSitu) is framed as a task for structured prediction of multiple events, their relationships, and actions and various verb-role pairs attached to descriptive entities. This task poses several challenges in identifying, disambiguating, and co-referencing entities across multiple verb-role pairs, but also faces some challenges of evaluation. In this work, we propose the addition of spatio-temporal grounding as an essential component of the structured prediction task in a weakly supervised setting, and present a novel three stage Transformer model, VideoWhisperer, that is empowered to make joint predictions. In stage one, we learn contextualised embeddings for video features in parallel with key objects that appear in the video clips to enable fine-grained spatio-temporal reasoning. The second stage sees verb-role queries attend and pool information from object embeddings, localising answers to questions posed about the action. The final stage generates these answers as captions to describe each verb-role pair present in the video. Our model operates on a group of events (clips) simultaneously and predicts verbs, verb-role pairs, their nouns, and their grounding on-the-fly. When evaluated on a grounding-augmented version of the VidSitu dataset, we observe a large improvement in entity captioning accuracy, as well as the ability to localize verb-roles without grounding annotations at training time.

Recently, Video Situation Recognition (VidSitu) is framed as a task for structured prediction of multiple events, their relationships, and actions and various verb-role pairs attached to descriptive entities. In this work, we propose the addition of spatio-temporal grounding as an essential component of the structured prediction task in a weakly supervised setting, and present a novel three stage Transformer model, VideoWhisperer, that is empowered to make joint predictions. In stage one, we learn contextualised embeddings for video features in parallel with key objects that appear in the video clips to enable fine-grained spatio-temporal reasoning. The second stage sees verb-role queries attend and pool information from object embeddings, localising answers to questions posed about the action. The final stage generates these answers as captions to describe each verb-role pair present in the video. Our model operates on a group of events (clips) simultaneously and predicts verbs, verb-role pairs, their nouns, and their grounding on-the-fly. When evaluated on a grounding-augmented version of the VidSitu dataset, we observe a large improvement in entity captioning accuracy, as well as the ability to localize verb-roles without grounding annotations at training time.
abstract_zh: 密集的视频理解需要回答几个问题，例如谁对谁做了什么、用了什么、如何、为什么以及在哪里。最近，视频情境识别（VidSitu）被定义为一项任务，用于对多个事件、它们的关系、动作以及附加到描述性实体的各种动词角色对进行结构化预测。这项任务在跨多个动词角色对识别、消除歧义和共同引用实体方面提出了一些挑战，但也面临着一些评估挑战。在这项工作中，我们建议添加时空基础作为弱监督环境中结构化预测任务的重要组成部分，并提出一种新颖的三阶段 Transformer 模型 VideoWhisperer，该模型能够进行联合预测。在第一阶段，我们与视频剪辑中出现的关键对象并行学习视频特征的上下文嵌入，以实现细粒度的时空推理。第二阶段涉及动词角色查询，并从对象嵌入中汇集信息，本地化有关操作的问题的答案。最后阶段生成这些答案作为字幕来描述视频中出现的每个动词角色对。我们的模型同时对一组事件（剪辑）进行操作，并即时预测动词、动词角色对、它们的名词及其基础。当在 VidSitu 数据集的基础增强版本上进行评估时，我们观察到实体字幕准确性有了很大的提高，并且在训练时无需基础注释即可定位动词角色的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于时空定位的视频情境识别方法，通过三阶段Transformer模型实现多事件、动作及角色关系的联合预测。
AI.motivation: 现有视频理解任务在实体识别、消歧及共指解析方面存在挑战，且缺乏对时空定位的有效评估方法。
AI.method: 设计三阶段VideoWhisperer模型：第一阶段学习视频特征与关键对象的上下文嵌入，第二阶段通过动词-角色查询定位动作信息，第三阶段生成描述动词-角色对的字幕。
AI.result: 在增强时空定位的VidSitu数据集上，实体描述准确率显著提升，且无需训练时的定位标注即可实现动词-角色定位。
AI.conclusion: 时空定位作为结构化预测的核心组件，能有效提升视频情境识别的准确性与可解释性。

authors_text: Ruolin Ye,Wenqiang Xu,Haoyuan Fu,Rajat Kumar Jenamani,Vy Nguyen,Cewu Lu,Katherine Dimitropoulou,Tapomayukh Bhattacharjee
title: RCareWorld: A Human-centric Simulation World for Caregiving Robots
title_zh: RCareWorld：以人为本的护理机器人模拟世界
abstract: We present RCareWorld, a human-centric simulation world for physical and social robotic caregiving designed with inputs from stakeholders, including care recipients, caregivers, occupational therapists, and roboticists. RCareWorld has realistic human models of care recipients with mobility limitations and caregivers, home environments with multiple levels of accessibility and assistive devices, and robots commonly used for caregiving. It interfaces with various physics engines to model diverse material types necessary for simulating caregiving scenarios, and provides the capability to plan, control, and learn both human and robot control policies by integrating with state-of-the-art external planning and learning libraries, and VR devices. We propose a set of realistic caregiving tasks in RCareWorld as a benchmark for physical robotic caregiving and provide baseline control policies for them. We illustrate the high-fidelity simulation capabilities of RCareWorld by demonstrating the execution of a policy learnt in simulation for one of these tasks on a real-world setup. Additionally, we perform a real-world social robotic caregiving experiment using behaviors modeled in RCareWorld. Robotic caregiving, though potentially impactful towards enhancing the quality of life of care recipients and caregivers, is a field with many barriers to entry due to its interdisciplinary facets. RCareWorld takes the first step towards building a realistic simulation world for robotic caregiving that would enable researchers worldwide to contribute to this impactful field. Demo videos and supplementary materials can be found at: https://emprise.cs.cornell.edu/rcareworld/.
summary: We present RCareWorld, a human-centric simulation world for physical and social robotic caregiving designed with inputs from stakeholders, including care recipients, caregivers, occupational therapists, and roboticists. RCareWorld has realistic human models of care recipients with mobility limitations and caregivers, home environments with multiple levels of accessibility and assistive devices, and robots commonly used for caregiving. It interfaces with various physics engines to model diverse material types necessary for simulating caregiving scenarios, and provides the capability to plan, control, and learn both human and robot control policies by integrating with state-of-the-art external planning and learning libraries, and VR devices. We propose a set of realistic caregiving tasks in RCareWorld as a benchmark for physical robotic caregiving and provide baseline control policies for them. We illustrate the high-fidelity simulation capabilities of RCareWorld by demonstrating the execution of a policy learnt in simulation for one of these tasks on a real-world setup. Additionally, we perform a real-world social robotic caregiving experiment using behaviors modeled in RCareWorld. Robotic caregiving, though potentially impactful towards enhancing the quality of life of care recipients and caregivers, is a field with many barriers to entry due to its interdisciplinary facets. RCareWorld takes the first step towards building a realistic simulation world for robotic caregiving that would enable researchers worldwide to contribute to this impactful field. Demo videos and supplementary materials can be found at: https://emprise.cs.cornell.edu/rcareworld/.
abstract_zh: 我们推出了 RCareWorld，这是一个以人为中心的物理和社交机器人护理模拟世界，根据利益相关者（包括护理接受者、护理人员、职业治疗师和机器人专家）的意见而设计。 RCareWorld 拥有行动不便的护理对象和护理人员的逼真人体模型、具有多级无障碍设施和辅助设备的家庭环境，以及常用的护理机器人。它与各种物理引擎接口，对模拟护理场景所需的各种材料类型进行建模，并通过与最先进的外部规划和学习库以及 VR 设备集成，提供规划、控制和学习人类和机器人控制策略的能力。我们在 RCareWorld 中提出了一组现实的护理任务作为物理机器人护理的基准，并为它们提供基线控制策略。我们通过演示在现实世界设置中针对其中一项任务的模拟中学习到的策略的执行情况来说明 RCareWorld 的高保真模拟功能。此外，我们使用 RCareWorld 中建模的行为进行了现实世界的社交机器人护理实验。机器人护理虽然对提高护理接受者和护理人员的生活质量具有潜在影响，但由于其跨学科方面，该领域存在许多进入壁垒。 RCareWorld 朝着构建机器人护理的真实模拟世界迈出了第一步，这将使世界各地的研究人员能够为这个有影响力的领域做出贡献。演示视频和补充材料可在以下网址找到：https://emprise.cs.cornell.edu/rcareworld/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RCareWorld，一个以人类为中心的护理机器人仿真平台，旨在解决护理机器人研究中的跨学科挑战。
AI.motivation: 护理机器人领域因涉及多学科交叉而存在研究门槛，缺乏真实场景的仿真工具限制了技术发展。
AI.method: 构建包含受限行动人类模型、多层级家居环境及护理机器人的高保真仿真系统，集成物理引擎、VR设备及先进算法库，设计基准护理任务并提供控制策略。
AI.result: 实现仿真策略在真实场景的迁移验证，完成社会交互护理实验，开源基准任务与数据集。
AI.conclusion: RCareWorld为全球研究者提供了标准化的护理机器人仿真平台，推动该领域技术突破与应用落地。

Demo videos and supplementary materials can be found at: https://emprise.cs.cornell.edu/rcareworld/. 我们推出了 RCareWorld，这是一个以人为中心的物理和社交机器人护理模拟世界，根据利益相关者（包括护理接受者、护理人员、职业治疗师和机器人专家）的意见而设计。 RCareWorld 拥有行动不便的护理对象和护理人员的逼真人体模型、具有多级无障碍设施和辅助设备的家庭环境，以及常用的护理机器人。它与各种物理引擎接口，对模拟护理场景所需的各种材料类型进行建模，并通过与最先进的外部规划和学习库以及 VR 设备集成，提供规划、控制和学习人类和机器人控制策略的能力。我们在 RCareWorld 中提出了一组现实的护理任务作为物理机器人护理的基准，并为它们提供基线控制策略。我们通过演示在现实世界设置中针对其中一项任务的模拟中学习到的策略的执行情况来说明 RCareWorld 的高保真模拟功能。此外，我们使用 RCareWorld 中建模的行为进行了现实世界的社交机器人护理实验。机器人护理虽然对提高护理接受者和护理人员的生活质量具有潜在影响，但由于其跨学科方面，该领域存在许多进入壁垒。 RCareWorld 朝着构建机器人护理的真实模拟世界迈出了第一步，这将使世界各地的研究人员能够为这个有影响力的领域做出贡献。演示视频和补充材料可在以下网址找到：https://emprise.cs.cornell.edu/rcareworld/。 本文提出RCareWorld，一个以人类为中心的护理机器人仿真平台，旨在解决护理机器人研究中的跨学科挑战。 Ruolin Ye,Wenqiang Xu,Haoyuan Fu,Rajat Kumar Jenamani,Vy Nguyen,Cewu Lu,Katherine Dimitropoulou,Tapomayukh Bhattacharjee cs.RO

authors_text: Laura Hanu,James Thewlis,Yuki M. Asano,Christian Rupprecht
title: VTC: Improving Video-Text Retrieval with User Comments
title_zh: VTC：利用用户评论改进视频文本检索
comment: Accepted paper at the European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV) 2022
comments: Accepted paper at the European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV) 2022
abstract: Multi-modal retrieval is an important problem for many applications, such as recommendation and search. Current benchmarks and even datasets are often manually constructed and consist of mostly clean samples where all modalities are well-correlated with the content. Thus, current video-text retrieval literature largely focuses on video titles or audio transcripts, while ignoring user comments, since users often tend to discuss topics only vaguely related to the video. Despite the ubiquity of user comments online, there is currently no multi-modal representation learning datasets that includes comments. In this paper, we a) introduce a new dataset of videos, titles and comments; b) present an attention-based mechanism that allows the model to learn from sometimes irrelevant data such as comments; c) show that by using comments, our method is able to learn better, more contextualised, representations for image, video and audio representations. Project page: https://unitaryai.github.io/vtc-paper.
summary: Multi-modal retrieval is an important problem for many applications, such as recommendation and search. Current benchmarks and even datasets are often manually constructed and consist of mostly clean samples where all modalities are well-correlated with the content. Thus, current video-text retrieval literature largely focuses on video titles or audio transcripts, while ignoring user comments, since users often tend to discuss topics only vaguely related to the video. Despite the ubiquity of user comments online, there is currently no multi-modal representation learning datasets that includes comments. In this paper, we a) introduce a new dataset of videos, titles and comments; b) present an attention-based mechanism that allows the model to learn from sometimes irrelevant data such as comments; c) show that by using comments, our method is able to learn better, more contextualised, representations for image, video and audio representations. Project page: https://unitaryai.github.io/vtc-paper.
abstract_zh: Multi-modal retrieval is an important problem for many applications, such as recommendation and search.当前的基准甚至数据集通常是手动构建的，并且大部分由干净的样本组成，其中所有模式都与内容良好相关。因此，当前的视频文本检索文献主要关注视频标题或音频文字记录，而忽略用户评论，因为用户往往倾向于讨论仅与视频模糊相关的主题。 Despite the ubiquity of user comments online, there is currently no multi-modal representation learning datasets that includes comments. In this paper, we a) introduce a new dataset of videos, titles and comments; b) present an attention-based mechanism that allows the model to learn from sometimes irrelevant data such as comments; c）表明，通过使用评论，我们的方法能够学习更好、更情境化的图像、视频和音频表示。 Project page: https://unitaryai.github.io/vtc-paper.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VTC方法，通过引入用户评论改进视频-文本检索性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视频-文本检索数据集多依赖标题或音频转录，忽视了用户评论中蕴含的丰富上下文信息，而评论数据尚未被有效利用。
AI.method: 构建包含视频、标题和评论的新数据集，设计基于注意力机制的模型以学习处理与视频内容相关性较低的评论数据。
AI.result: 实验表明，结合评论信息后，模型能学习到更精准的多模态表征，显著提升检索效果。
AI.conclusion: 用户评论作为补充信息源，可有效增强视频-文本检索系统的上下文理解能力。
