title: A Continuum of Generation Tasks for Investigating Length Bias and Degenerate Repetition
title_zh: 用于研究长度偏差和简并重复的连续生成任务
abstract: Language models suffer from various degenerate behaviors. These differ between tasks: machine translation (MT) exhibits length bias, while tasks like story generation exhibit excessive repetition. Recent work has attributed the difference to task constrainedness, but evidence for this claim has always involved many confounding variables. To study this question directly, we introduce a new experimental framework that allows us to smoothly vary task constrainedness, from MT at one end to fully open-ended generation at the other, while keeping all other aspects fixed. We find that: (1) repetition decreases smoothly with constrainedness, explaining the difference in repetition across tasks; (2) length bias surprisingly also decreases with constrainedness, suggesting some other cause for the difference in length bias; (3) across the board, these problems affect the mode, not the whole distribution; (4) the differences cannot be attributed to a change in the entropy of the distribution, since another method of changing the entropy, label smoothing, does not produce the same effect.
summary: Language models suffer from various degenerate behaviors. These differ between tasks: machine translation (MT) exhibits length bias, while tasks like story generation exhibit excessive repetition. Recent work has attributed the difference to task constrainedness, but evidence for this claim has always involved many confounding variables. To study this question directly, we introduce a new experimental framework that allows us to smoothly vary task constrainedness, from MT at one end to fully open-ended generation at the other, while keeping all other aspects fixed. We find that: (1) repetition decreases smoothly with constrainedness, explaining the difference in repetition across tasks; (2) length bias surprisingly also decreases with constrainedness, suggesting some other cause for the difference in length bias; (3) across the board, these problems affect the mode, not the whole distribution; (4) the differences cannot be attributed to a change in the entropy of the distribution, since another method of changing the entropy, label smoothing, does not produce the same effect.
abstract_zh: 语言模型遭受各种退化行为的困扰。这些任务之间存在差异：机器翻译（MT）表现出长度偏差，而故事生成等任务则表现出过度重复。最近的研究将这种差异归因于任务限制，但这一说法的证据总是涉及许多混杂变量。为了直接研究这个问题，我们引入了一种新的实验框架，使我们能够平滑地改变任务约束，从一端的机器翻译到另一端的完全开放式生成，同时保持所有其他方面固定。我们发现：（1）重复随着约束而平滑减少，这解释了不同任务之间重复的差异； (2)令人惊讶的是，长度偏差也随着约束而减小，这表明长度偏差差异的其他原因； （3）全面来看，这些问题影响的是模式，而不是整个分布； (4) 差异不能归因于分布熵的变化，因为改变熵的另一种方法，即标签平滑，不会产生相同的效果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新框架，通过平滑调整任务约束性来研究生成任务中的长度偏差和退化重复问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究将不同任务的生成问题差异归因于约束性，但缺乏直接证据且存在混淆变量，需设计可控实验验证该假设。
AI.method: 构建连续任务框架，在固定其他条件的情况下，从机器翻译（高约束）到开放生成（低约束）逐步调整任务约束性。
AI.result: 重复率随约束性增加而降低；长度偏差同样减少，表明其成因可能非约束性；问题影响生成模式而非整体分布；熵变化无法解释这些现象。
AI.conclusion: 任务约束性影响生成质量，但长度偏差差异需其他解释，未来研究需探索新因素。

authors_text: Oswin So,Paul Drews,Thomas Balch,Velin Dimitrov,Guy Rosman,Evangelos A. Theodorou
title: MPOGames: Efficient Multimodal Partially Observable Dynamic Games
title_zh: MPOGames：高效多模态部分可观察动态博弈
abstract: Game theoretic methods have become popular for planning and prediction in situations involving rich multi-agent interactions. However, these methods often assume the existence of a single local Nash equilibria and are hence unable to handle uncertainty in the intentions of different agents. While maximum entropy (MaxEnt) dynamic games try to address this issue, practical approaches solve for MaxEnt Nash equilibria using linear-quadratic approximations which are restricted to unimodal responses and unsuitable for scenarios with multiple local Nash equilibria. By reformulating the problem as a POMDP, we propose MPOGames, a method for efficiently solving MaxEnt dynamic games that captures the interactions between local Nash equilibria. We show the importance of uncertainty-aware game theoretic methods via a two-agent merge case study. Finally, we prove the real-time capabilities of our approach with hardware experiments on a 1/10th scale car platform.
summary: Game theoretic methods have become popular for planning and prediction in situations involving rich multi-agent interactions. However, these methods often assume the existence of a single local Nash equilibria and are hence unable to handle uncertainty in the intentions of different agents. While maximum entropy (MaxEnt) dynamic games try to address this issue, practical approaches solve for MaxEnt Nash equilibria using linear-quadratic approximations which are restricted to unimodal responses and unsuitable for scenarios with multiple local Nash equilibria. By reformulating the problem as a POMDP, we propose MPOGames, a method for efficiently solving MaxEnt dynamic games that captures the interactions between local Nash equilibria. We show the importance of uncertainty-aware game theoretic methods via a two-agent merge case study. Finally, we prove the real-time capabilities of our approach with hardware experiments on a 1/10th scale car platform.
abstract_zh: 博弈论方法在涉及丰富的多智能体交互的情况下已变得流行于规划和预测。然而，这些方法通常假设存在单个局部纳什均衡，因此无法处理不同主体意图的不确定性。虽然最大熵 (MaxEnt) 动态博弈试图解决这个问题，但实际方法使用线性二次近似来解决 MaxEnt 纳什均衡，该近似仅限于单峰响应，不适合具有多个局部纳什均衡的场景。通过将问题重新表述为 POMDP，我们提出了 MPOGames，这是一种有效解决 MaxEnt 动态博弈的方法，该方法捕获局部纳什均衡之间的相互作用。我们通过两个智能体合并案例研究展示了不确定性博弈论方法的重要性。最后，我们通过 1/10 比例汽车平台上的硬件实验证明了我们方法的实时能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MPOGames方法，通过将多智能体动态博弈问题建模为部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP），高效求解存在多个局部纳什均衡的不确定性博弈场景。
AI.motivation: 传统博弈论方法受限于单一纳什均衡假设，无法处理智能体意图不确定性；最大熵动态博弈的现有解决方案因线性二次近似而难以应对多模态响应和复杂均衡结构。
AI.method: 将多模态部分可观测动态博弈问题转化为POMDP框架，设计MPOGames算法通过不确定性感知机制捕捉局部均衡间的交互关系。
AI.result: 通过双智能体合并场景验证了方法对不确定性的处理优势，并在1/10比例汽车平台的硬件实验中证明了算法的实时性与有效性。
AI.conclusion: MPOGames突破了传统方法在均衡结构和不确定性建模上的限制，为复杂多智能体交互场景提供了高效的博弈求解框架。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出MPOGames方法，通过将多智能体动态博弈问题建模为部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP），高效求解存在多个局部纳什均衡的不确定性博弈场景。

search_text: MPOGames: Efficient Multimodal Partially Observable Dynamic Games MPOGames：高效多模态部分可观察动态博弈 Game theoretic methods have become popular for planning and prediction in situations involving rich multi-agent interactions. However, these methods often assume the existence of a single local Nash equilibria and are hence unable to handle uncertainty in the intentions of different agents. While maximum entropy (MaxEnt) dynamic games try to address this issue, practical approaches solve for MaxEnt Nash equilibria using linear-quadratic approximations which are restricted to unimodal responses and unsuitable for scenarios with multiple local Nash equilibria. By reformulating the problem as a POMDP, we propose MPOGames, a method for efficiently solving MaxEnt dynamic games that captures the interactions between local Nash equilibria. We show the importance of uncertainty-aware game theoretic methods via a two-agent merge case study. Finally, we prove the real-time capabilities of our approach with hardware experiments on a 1/10th scale car platform. 博弈论方法在涉及丰富的多智能体交互的情况下已变得流行于规划和预测。然而，这些方法通常假设存在单个局部纳什均衡，因此无法处理不同主体意图的不确定性。虽然最大熵 (MaxEnt) 动态博弈试图解决这个问题，但实际方法使用线性二次近似来解决 MaxEnt 纳什均衡，该近似仅限于单峰响应，不适合具有多个局部纳什均衡的场景。通过将问题重新表述为 POMDP，我们提出了 MPOGames，这是一种有效解决 MaxEnt 动态博弈的方法，该方法捕获局部纳什均衡之间的相互作用。我们通过两个智能体合并案例研究展示了不确定性博弈论方法的重要性。最后，我们通过 1/10 比例汽车平台上的硬件实验证明了我们方法的实时能力。 本文提出MPOGames方法，通过将多智能体动态博弈问题建模为部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP），高效求解存在多个局部纳什均衡的不确定性博弈场景。 Oswin So,Paul Drews,Thomas Balch,Velin Dimitrov,Guy Rosman,Evangelos A. Theodorou cs.GT,cs.RO,math.OC

authors_text: Benjamin T. Jones,Michael Hu,Vladimir G. Kim,Adriana Schulz
title: Self-Supervised Representation Learning for CAD
title_zh: CAD 的自监督表示学习
abstract: The design of man-made objects is dominated by computer aided design (CAD) tools. Assisting design with data-driven machine learning methods is hampered by lack of labeled data in CAD's native format; the parametric boundary representation (B-Rep). Several data sets of mechanical parts in B-Rep format have recently been released for machine learning research. However, large scale databases are largely unlabeled, and labeled datasets are small. Additionally, task specific label sets are rare, and costly to annotate. This work proposes to leverage unlabeled CAD geometry on supervised learning tasks. We learn a novel, hybrid implicit/explicit surface representation for B-Rep geometry, and show that this pre-training significantly improves few-shot learning performance and also achieves state-of-the-art performance on several existing B-Rep benchmarks.
summary: The design of man-made objects is dominated by computer aided design (CAD) tools. Assisting design with data-driven machine learning methods is hampered by lack of labeled data in CAD's native format; the parametric boundary representation (B-Rep). Several data sets of mechanical parts in B-Rep format have recently been released for machine learning research. However, large scale databases are largely unlabeled, and labeled datasets are small. Additionally, task specific label sets are rare, and costly to annotate. This work proposes to leverage unlabeled CAD geometry on supervised learning tasks. We learn a novel, hybrid implicit/explicit surface representation for B-Rep geometry, and show that this pre-training significantly improves few-shot learning performance and also achieves state-of-the-art performance on several existing B-Rep benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 人造物体的设计以计算机辅助设计（CAD）工具为主。由于缺乏 CAD 原生格式的标记数据，使用数据驱动的机器学习方法辅助设计受到阻碍；参数边界表示（B-Rep）。最近发布了几个 B-Rep 格式的机械零件数据集，用于机器学习研究。然而，大型数据库大部分是未标记的，并且标记的数据集很小。此外，特定于任务的标签集很少见，而且注释成本高昂。这项工作建议在监督学习任务中利用未标记的 CAD 几何图形。我们学习了一种新颖的 B-Rep 几何混合隐式/显式表面表示，并表明这种预训练显着提高了小样本学习性能，并且在几个现有的 B-Rep 基准上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自监督学习的CAD几何表征方法，解决B-Rep格式数据标注不足的问题。
AI.motivation: CAD原生格式B-Rep数据缺乏标注，导致监督学习任务难以开展，现有数据集规模小且标注成本高。
AI.method: 设计混合隐式/显式表面表征模型，通过预训练利用未标注CAD几何数据提升模型性能。
AI.result: 在少样本学习场景下性能显著提升，并在多个B-Rep基准测试中达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效缓解CAD数据标注困境，为几何理解任务提供通用表征学习框架。

title: Graph Regularized Probabilistic Matrix Factorization for Drug-Drug Interactions Prediction
title_zh: 用于药物相互作用预测的图正则概率矩阵分解
abstract: Co-administration of two or more drugs simultaneously can result in adverse drug reactions. Identifying drug-drug interactions (DDIs) is necessary, especially for drug development and for repurposing old drugs. DDI prediction can be viewed as a matrix completion task, for which matrix factorization (MF) appears as a suitable solution. This paper presents a novel Graph Regularized Probabilistic Matrix Factorization (GRPMF) method, which incorporates expert knowledge through a novel graph-based regularization strategy within an MF framework. An efficient and sounded optimization algorithm is proposed to solve the resulting non-convex problem in an alternating fashion. The performance of the proposed method is evaluated through the DrugBank dataset, and comparisons are provided against state-of-the-art techniques. The results demonstrate the superior performance of GRPMF when compared to its counterparts.
summary: Co-administration of two or more drugs simultaneously can result in adverse drug reactions. Identifying drug-drug interactions (DDIs) is necessary, especially for drug development and for repurposing old drugs. DDI prediction can be viewed as a matrix completion task, for which matrix factorization (MF) appears as a suitable solution. This paper presents a novel Graph Regularized Probabilistic Matrix Factorization (GRPMF) method, which incorporates expert knowledge through a novel graph-based regularization strategy within an MF framework. An efficient and sounded optimization algorithm is proposed to solve the resulting non-convex problem in an alternating fashion. The performance of the proposed method is evaluated through the DrugBank dataset, and comparisons are provided against state-of-the-art techniques. The results demonstrate the superior performance of GRPMF when compared to its counterparts.
abstract_zh: 同时服用两种或多种药物可能会导致药物不良反应。识别药物相互作用 (DDI) 是必要的，特别是对于药物开发和旧药物的再利用。 DDI 预测可以被视为矩阵完成任务，其中矩阵分解 (MF) 是一个合适的解决方案。本文提出了一种新颖的图正则化概率矩阵分解（GRPMF）方法，该方法通过 MF 框架内的新颖的基于图的正则化策略融合了专家知识。提出了一种有效且合理的优化算法，以交替方式解决由此产生的非凸问题。所提出方法的性能通过 DrugBank 数据集进行评估，并与最先进的技术进行比较。结果表明，与同类产品相比，GRPMF 具有优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图正则化的概率矩阵分解方法（GRPMF），用于预测药物-药物相互作用（DDIs），通过结合专家知识提升预测性能。
AI.motivation: 联合用药可能导致不良反应，准确预测DDIs对药物研发和再利用至关重要。传统方法在捕捉药物间复杂关系上存在不足，需引入专家知识增强模型。
AI.method: 设计图正则化概率矩阵分解（GRPMF）框架，在矩阵分解中融入图结构正则化项，并提出交替优化算法解决非凸问题。
AI.result: 在DrugBank数据集上实验表明，GRPMF相比现有方法在DDI预测任务中取得更优性能。
AI.conclusion: 图正则化策略有效整合了药物关联先验知识，GRPMF在DDI预测中展现出优越性，为药物相互作用研究提供新思路。

title: Routine Usage of AI-based Chest X-ray Reading Support in a Multi-site Medical Supply Center
title_zh: 基于人工智能的胸部 X 射线读取支持在多站点医疗供应中心的日常使用
abstract: Research question: How can we establish an AI support for reading of chest X-rays in clinical routine and which benefits emerge for the clinicians and radiologists. Can it perform 24/7 support for practicing clinicians? 2. Findings: We installed an AI solution for Chest X-ray in a given structure (MVZ Uhlenbrock & Partner, Germany). We could demonstrate the practicability, performance, and benefits in 10 connected clinical sites. 3. Meaning: A commercially available AI solution for the evaluation of Chest X-ray images is able to help radiologists and clinical colleagues 24/7 in a complex environment. The system performs in a robust manner, supporting radiologists and clinical colleagues in their important decisions, in practises and hospitals regardless of the user and X-ray system type producing the image-data.
summary: Research question: How can we establish an AI support for reading of chest X-rays in clinical routine and which benefits emerge for the clinicians and radiologists. Can it perform 24/7 support for practicing clinicians? 2. Findings: We installed an AI solution for Chest X-ray in a given structure (MVZ Uhlenbrock & Partner, Germany). We could demonstrate the practicability, performance, and benefits in 10 connected clinical sites. 3. Meaning: A commercially available AI solution for the evaluation of Chest X-ray images is able to help radiologists and clinical colleagues 24/7 in a complex environment. The system performs in a robust manner, supporting radiologists and clinical colleagues in their important decisions, in practises and hospitals regardless of the user and X-ray system type producing the image-data.
abstract_zh: 研究问题：我们如何在临床常规中建立人工智能支持读取胸部 X 光片，以及为临床医生和放射科医生带来哪些好处。它可以为执业临床医生提供 24/7 支持吗？ 2. 结果：我们在给定结构中安装了用于胸部 X 光检查的人工智能解决方案（MVZ Uhlenbrock & Partner，德国）。我们可以在 10 个相连的临床站点中展示其实用性、性能和优势。 3. 意义：用于评估胸部 X 射线图像的商用人工智能解决方案能够在复杂的环境中为放射科医生和临床同事提供 24/7 的帮助。该系统以稳健的方式运行，支持放射科医生和临床同事在实践和医院中做出重要决策，无论用户和生成图像数据的 X 射线系统类型如何。

search_text: Routine Usage of AI-based Chest X-ray Reading Support in a Multi-site Medical Supply Center 基于人工智能的胸部 X 射线读取支持在多站点医疗供应中心的日常使用 Research question: How can we establish an AI support for reading of chest X-rays in clinical routine and which benefits emerge for the clinicians and radiologists. Can it perform 24/7 support for practicing clinicians? 2. Findings: We installed an AI solution for Chest X-ray in a given structure (MVZ Uhlenbrock & Partner, Germany). We could demonstrate the practicability, performance, and benefits in 10 connected clinical sites. 3. Meaning: A commercially available AI solution for the evaluation of Chest X-ray images is able to help radiologists and clinical colleagues 24/7 in a complex environment. The system performs in a robust manner, supporting radiologists and clinical colleagues in their important decisions, in practises and hospitals regardless of the user and X-ray system type producing the image-data. 研究问题：我们如何在临床常规中建立人工智能支持读取胸部 X 光片，以及为临床医生和放射科医生带来哪些好处。它可以为执业临床医生提供 24/7 支持吗？ 2. 结果：我们在给定结构中安装了用于胸部 X 光检查的人工智能解决方案（MVZ Uhlenbrock & Partner，德国）。我们可以在 10 个相连的临床站点中展示其实用性、性能和优势。 3. 意义：用于评估胸部 X 射线图像的商用人工智能解决方案能够在复杂的环境中为放射科医生和临床同事提供 24/7 的帮助。该系统以稳健的方式运行，支持放射科医生和临床同事在实践和医院中做出重要决策，无论用户和生成图像数据的 X 射线系统类型如何。 评估AI辅助胸片阅读系统在多站点医疗中心的常规应用可行性及临床效益 Karsten Ridder,Alexander Preuhs,Axel Mertins,Clemens Joerger eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Pengfei Li,Beiwen Tian,Yongliang Shi,Xiaoxue Chen,Hao Zhao,Guyue Zhou,Ya-Qin Zhang
title: TOIST: Task Oriented Instance Segmentation Transformer with Noun-Pronoun Distillation
title_zh: TOIST：具有名词代词蒸馏功能的面向任务的实例分割变压器
comment: Accepted by NeurIPS 2022. Codes are available at https://github.com/AIR-DISCOVER/TOIST
comments: Accepted by NeurIPS 2022. Codes are available at https://github.com/AIR-DISCOVER/TOIST
abstract: Current referring expression comprehension algorithms can effectively detect or segment objects indicated by nouns, but how to understand verb reference is still under-explored. As such, we study the challenging problem of task oriented detection, which aims to find objects that best afford an action indicated by verbs like sit comfortably on. Towards a finer localization that better serves downstream applications like robot interaction, we extend the problem into task oriented instance segmentation. A unique requirement of this task is to select preferred candidates among possible alternatives. Thus we resort to the transformer architecture which naturally models pair-wise query relationships with attention, leading to the TOIST method. In order to leverage pre-trained noun referring expression comprehension models and the fact that we can access privileged noun ground truth during training, a novel noun-pronoun distillation framework is proposed. Noun prototypes are generated in an unsupervised manner and contextual pronoun features are trained to select prototypes. As such, the network remains noun-agnostic during inference. We evaluate TOIST on the large-scale task oriented dataset COCO-Tasks and achieve +10.9% higher $\rm{mAP^{box}}$ than the best-reported results. The proposed noun-pronoun distillation can boost $\rm{mAP^{box}}$ and $\rm{mAP^{mask}}$ by +2.8% and +3.8%. Codes and models are publicly available at https://github.com/AIR-DISCOVER/TOIST.
summary: Current referring expression comprehension algorithms can effectively detect or segment objects indicated by nouns, but how to understand verb reference is still under-explored. As such, we study the challenging problem of task oriented detection, which aims to find objects that best afford an action indicated by verbs like sit comfortably on. Towards a finer localization that better serves downstream applications like robot interaction, we extend the problem into task oriented instance segmentation. A unique requirement of this task is to select preferred candidates among possible alternatives. Thus we resort to the transformer architecture which naturally models pair-wise query relationships with attention, leading to the TOIST method. In order to leverage pre-trained noun referring expression comprehension models and the fact that we can access privileged noun ground truth during training, a novel noun-pronoun distillation framework is proposed. Noun prototypes are generated in an unsupervised manner and contextual pronoun features are trained to select prototypes. As such, the network remains noun-agnostic during inference. We evaluate TOIST on the large-scale task oriented dataset COCO-Tasks and achieve +10.9% higher $\rm{mAP^{box}}$ than the best-reported results. The proposed noun-pronoun distillation can boost $\rm{mAP^{box}}$ and $\rm{mAP^{mask}}$ by +2.8% and +3.8%. Codes and models are publicly available at https://github.com/AIR-DISCOVER/TOIST.
abstract_zh: 目前的指称表达理解算法可以有效地检测或分割名词所指示的对象，但如何理解动词指称仍处于探索之中。因此，我们研究了面向任务的检测这一具有挑战性的问题，其目的是找到最能承担由动词（如舒服地坐在上面）表示的动作的物体。为了更好地服务于机器人交互等下游应用程序的更精细的定位，我们将问题扩展到面向任务的实例分割。这项任务的一个独特要求是从可能的替代方案中选择首选候选人。因此，我们采用 Transformer 架构，该架构通过注意力自然地模拟成对查询关系，从而产生了 TOIST 方法。为了利用预先训练的名词指代表达理解模型以及我们可以在训练期间访问特权名词基本事实的事实，提出了一种新颖的名词代词蒸馏框架。名词原型以无监督的方式生成，并且训练上下文代词特征来选择原型。因此，网络在推理过程中仍然与名词无关。我们在面向大规模任务的数据集 COCO-Tasks 上评估 TOIST，并取得比最佳报告结果高 10.9% 的 $\rm{mAP^{box}}$。所提出的名词-代词蒸馏可以将 $\rm{mAP^{box}}$ 和 $\rm{mAP^{mask}}$ 提高 +2.8% 和 +3.8%。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/AIR-DISCOVER/TOIST 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TOIST方法，解决任务导向的实例分割问题，通过动词参考理解定位最佳执行动作的对象。
AI.motivation: 现有方法能有效处理名词参考，但动词参考理解不足，而任务导向检测需精准定位可执行动作的对象以支持机器人交互等下游应用。
AI.method: 基于Transformer架构构建TOIST，利用注意力机制建模查询关系，并提出名词-代词蒸馏框架：通过无监督生成名词原型，训练上下文代词特征选择原型，使模型推理时保持名词无关性。
AI.result: 在COCO-Tasks数据集上，TOIST的mAP^box较最优结果提升10.9%，蒸馏框架使mAP^box和mAP^mask分别提升2.8%和3.8%。
AI.conclusion: TOIST通过Transformer架构和名词-代词蒸馏有效解决任务导向实例分割问题，为动词参考理解提供新思路。

authors_text: Vladimir Fomenko,Ismail Elezi,Deva Ramanan,Laura Leal-Taixé,Aljoša Ošep
title: Learning to Discover and Detect Objects
title_zh: 学习发现和检测物体
abstract: We tackle the problem of novel class discovery and localization (NCDL). In this setting, we assume a source dataset with supervision for only some object classes. Instances of other classes need to be discovered, classified, and localized automatically based on visual similarity without any human supervision. To tackle NCDL, we propose a two-stage object detection network Region-based NCDL (RNCDL) that uses a region proposal network to localize regions of interest (RoIs). We then train our network to learn to classify each RoI, either as one of the known classes, seen in the source dataset, or one of the novel classes, with a long-tail distribution constraint on the class assignments, reflecting the natural frequency of classes in the real world. By training our detection network with this objective in an end-to-end manner, it learns to classify all region proposals for a large variety of classes, including those not part of the labeled object class vocabulary. Our experiments conducted using COCO and LVIS datasets reveal that our method is significantly more effective than multi-stage pipelines that rely on traditional clustering algorithms. Furthermore, we demonstrate the generality of our approach by applying our method to a large-scale Visual Genome dataset, where our network successfully learns to detect various semantic classes without direct supervision.
summary: We tackle the problem of novel class discovery and localization (NCDL). In this setting, we assume a source dataset with supervision for only some object classes. Instances of other classes need to be discovered, classified, and localized automatically based on visual similarity without any human supervision. To tackle NCDL, we propose a two-stage object detection network Region-based NCDL (RNCDL) that uses a region proposal network to localize regions of interest (RoIs). We then train our network to learn to classify each RoI, either as one of the known classes, seen in the source dataset, or one of the novel classes, with a long-tail distribution constraint on the class assignments, reflecting the natural frequency of classes in the real world. By training our detection network with this objective in an end-to-end manner, it learns to classify all region proposals for a large variety of classes, including those not part of the labeled object class vocabulary. Our experiments conducted using COCO and LVIS datasets reveal that our method is significantly more effective than multi-stage pipelines that rely on traditional clustering algorithms. Furthermore, we demonstrate the generality of our approach by applying our method to a large-scale Visual Genome dataset, where our network successfully learns to detect various semantic classes without direct supervision.
abstract_zh: We tackle the problem of novel class discovery and localization (NCDL). In this setting, we assume a source dataset with supervision for only some object classes.其他类的实例需要根据视觉相似性自动发现、分类和定位，而无需任何人工监督。为了解决 NCDL，我们提出了一种基于区域的 NCDL (RNCDL) 的两阶段对象检测网络，它使用区域提议网络来定位感兴趣区域 (RoI)。然后，我们训练我们的网络学习对每个 RoI 进行分类，要么作为源数据集中看到的已知类别之一，要么作为新类别之一，对类别分配具有长尾分布约束，反映现实世界中类别的自然频率。通过以端到端的方式训练我们的检测网络，它可以学习对各种类别的所有区域建议进行分类，包括那些不属于标记对象类别词汇的类别。我们使用 COCO 和 LVIS 数据集进行的实验表明，我们的方法比依赖传统聚类算法的多级管道更有效。此外，我们通过将我们的方法应用于大规模视觉基因组数据集来证明我们方法的通用性，其中我们的网络在没有直接监督的情况下成功学习检测各种语义类别。

AI.tldr: 本文主要解决在无监督条件下自动发现和检测新类别物体的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖多阶段流程和传统聚类算法，难以有效处理长尾分布问题，需更高效且无需人工监督的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出两阶段检测网络RNCDL，结合区域建议网络和长尾分布约束，实现端到端分类与定位。
AI.result: 在COCO和LVIS数据集上表现优于传统方法，且在Visual Genome数据集上成功检测多种语义类别。
AI.conclusion: 提出的RNCDL方法有效解决NCDL问题，具有良好的通用性和大规模数据集适应性。

search_text: Learning to Discover and Detect Objects 学习发现和检测物体 We tackle the problem of novel class discovery and localization (NCDL). In this setting, we assume a source dataset with supervision for only some object classes. Instances of other classes need to be discovered, classified, and localized automatically based on visual similarity without any human supervision. To tackle NCDL, we propose a two-stage object detection network Region-based NCDL (RNCDL) that uses a region proposal network to localize regions of interest (RoIs). We then train our network to learn to classify each RoI, either as one of the known classes, seen in the source dataset, or one of the novel classes, with a long-tail distribution constraint on the class assignments, reflecting the natural frequency of classes in the real world. By training our detection network with this objective in an end-to-end manner, it learns to classify all region proposals for a large variety of classes, including those not part of the labeled object class vocabulary. Our experiments conducted using COCO and LVIS datasets reveal that our method is significantly more effective than multi-stage pipelines that rely on traditional clustering algorithms. Furthermore, we demonstrate the generality of our approach by applying our method to a large-scale Visual Genome dataset, where our network successfully learns to detect various semantic classes without direct supervision. We tackle the problem of novel class discovery and localization (NCDL). In this setting, we assume a source dataset with supervision for only some object classes.其他类的实例需要根据视觉相似性自动发现、分类和定位，而无需任何人工监督。为了解决 NCDL，我们提出了一种基于区域的 NCDL (RNCDL) 的两阶段对象检测网络，它使用区域提议网络来定位感兴趣区域 (RoI)。然后，我们训练我们的网络学习对每个 RoI 进行分类，要么作为源数据集中看到的已知类别之一，要么作为新类别之一，对类别分配具有长尾分布约束，反映现实世界中类别的自然频率。通过以端到端的方式训练我们的检测网络，它可以学习对各种类别的所有区域建议进行分类，包括那些不属于标记对象类别词汇的类别。我们使用 COCO 和 LVIS 数据集进行的实验表明，我们的方法比依赖传统聚类算法的多级管道更有效。此外，我们通过将我们的方法应用于大规模视觉基因组数据集来证明我们方法的通用性，其中我们的网络在没有直接监督的情况下成功学习检测各种语义类别。 本文主要解决在无监督条件下自动发现和检测新类别物体的问题。 Vladimir Fomenko,Ismail Elezi,Deva Ramanan,Laura Leal-Taixé,Aljoša Ošep cs.CV

authors_text: Tal Reiss,Niv Cohen,Eliahu Horwitz,Ron Abutbul,Yedid Hoshen
title: Anomaly Detection Requires Better Representations
title_zh: 异常检测需要更好的表示
abstract: Anomaly detection seeks to identify unusual phenomena, a central task in science and industry. The task is inherently unsupervised as anomalies are unexpected and unknown during training. Recent advances in self-supervised representation learning have directly driven improvements in anomaly detection. In this position paper, we first explain how self-supervised representations can be easily used to achieve state-of-the-art performance in commonly reported anomaly detection benchmarks. We then argue that tackling the next generation of anomaly detection tasks requires new technical and conceptual improvements in representation learning.
summary: Anomaly detection seeks to identify unusual phenomena, a central task in science and industry. The task is inherently unsupervised as anomalies are unexpected and unknown during training. Recent advances in self-supervised representation learning have directly driven improvements in anomaly detection. In this position paper, we first explain how self-supervised representations can be easily used to achieve state-of-the-art performance in commonly reported anomaly detection benchmarks. We then argue that tackling the next generation of anomaly detection tasks requires new technical and conceptual improvements in representation learning.
abstract_zh: 异常检测旨在识别异常现象，这是科学和工业的核心任务。该任务本质上是无人监督的，因为训练期间异常是意外且未知的。自监督表示学习的最新进展直接推动了异常检测的改进。在这篇立场文件中，我们首先解释如何轻松地使用自监督表示在常见报告的异常检测基准中实现最先进的性能。然后我们认为，解决下一代异常检测任务需要表示学习方面的新技术和概念改进。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了自监督表示学习在异常检测中的应用，并指出未来需要更先进的表示学习方法。
AI.motivation: 异常检测依赖无监督学习，但现有方法在处理复杂任务时存在局限，需改进表示学习以应对下一代挑战。
AI.method: 通过分析自监督表示学习的应用，并提出未来技术与概念改进的方向。
AI.result: 展示了自监督方法在基准测试中的有效性，并指出当前方法的不足。
AI.conclusion: 未来异常检测的发展依赖于更先进的表示学习技术和理论创新。

title: Multi-view Tracking Using Weakly Supervised Human Motion Prediction
title_zh: 使用弱监督人体运动预测的多视图跟踪
abstract: Multi-view approaches to people-tracking have the potential to better handle occlusions than single-view ones in crowded scenes. They often rely on the tracking-by-detection paradigm, which involves detecting people first and then connecting the detections. In this paper, we argue that an even more effective approach is to predict people motion over time and infer people's presence in individual frames from these. This enables to enforce consistency both over time and across views of a single temporal frame. We validate our approach on the PETS2009 and WILDTRACK datasets and demonstrate that it outperforms state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Multi-view approaches to people-tracking have the potential to better handle occlusions than single-view ones in crowded scenes. They often rely on the tracking-by-detection paradigm, which involves detecting people first and then connecting the detections. In this paper, we argue that an even more effective approach is to predict people motion over time and infer people's presence in individual frames from these. This enables to enforce consistency both over time and across views of a single temporal frame. We validate our approach on the PETS2009 and WILDTRACK datasets and demonstrate that it outperforms state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 在拥挤的场景中，多视图的人员跟踪方法比单视图的方法有可能更好地处理遮挡问题。他们通常依赖于检测跟踪范例，其中涉及首先检测人员，然后连接检测。在本文中，我们认为更有效的方法是预测人们随时间的运动，并从中推断出人们在各个帧中的存在。这使得能够在时间上和单个时间帧的视图之间强制执行一致性。我们在 PETS2009 和 WILDTRACK 数据集上验证了我们的方法，并证明它优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于弱监督人体运动预测的多视角人群跟踪方法，通过预测时间运动轨迹并推断单帧中的人体存在状态，提升遮挡场景下的跟踪性能。
AI.motivation: 传统多视角跟踪依赖检测-关联范式，难以有效处理遮挡问题。通过预测时间运动轨迹可增强时序与跨视角一致性，从而提升跟踪鲁棒性。
AI.method: 构建弱监督运动预测模型，通过预测时间维度的人体运动轨迹，结合多视角信息推断单帧中的人体存在状态，实现跨视角跟踪一致性约束。
AI.result: 在PETS2009和WILDTRACK数据集上验证，相比现有最先进方法，跟踪精度显著提升，尤其在遮挡场景下表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 基于运动预测的多视角跟踪方法能有效提升遮挡场景下的跟踪性能，为弱监督视频分析提供了新思路。

authors_text: Paul-Edouard Sarlin,Mihai Dusmanu,Johannes L. Schönberger,Pablo Speciale,Lukas Gruber,Viktor Larsson,Ondrej Miksik,Marc Pollefeys
title: LaMAR: Benchmarking Localization and Mapping for Augmented Reality
title_zh: LaMAR：增强现实定位和测绘基准测试
comment: Accepted at ECCV 2022, website at https://lamar.ethz.ch/
comments: Accepted at ECCV 2022, website at https://lamar.ethz.ch/
abstract: Localization and mapping is the foundational technology for augmented reality (AR) that enables sharing and persistence of digital content in the real world. While significant progress has been made, researchers are still mostly driven by unrealistic benchmarks not representative of real-world AR scenarios. These benchmarks are often based on small-scale datasets with low scene diversity, captured from stationary cameras, and lack other sensor inputs like inertial, radio, or depth data. Furthermore, their ground-truth (GT) accuracy is mostly insufficient to satisfy AR requirements. To close this gap, we introduce LaMAR, a new benchmark with a comprehensive capture and GT pipeline that co-registers realistic trajectories and sensor streams captured by heterogeneous AR devices in large, unconstrained scenes. To establish an accurate GT, our pipeline robustly aligns the trajectories against laser scans in a fully automated manner. As a result, we publish a benchmark dataset of diverse and large-scale scenes recorded with head-mounted and hand-held AR devices. We extend several state-of-the-art methods to take advantage of the AR-specific setup and evaluate them on our benchmark. The results offer new insights on current research and reveal promising avenues for future work in the field of localization and mapping for AR.
summary: Localization and mapping is the foundational technology for augmented reality (AR) that enables sharing and persistence of digital content in the real world. While significant progress has been made, researchers are still mostly driven by unrealistic benchmarks not representative of real-world AR scenarios. These benchmarks are often based on small-scale datasets with low scene diversity, captured from stationary cameras, and lack other sensor inputs like inertial, radio, or depth data. Furthermore, their ground-truth (GT) accuracy is mostly insufficient to satisfy AR requirements. To close this gap, we introduce LaMAR, a new benchmark with a comprehensive capture and GT pipeline that co-registers realistic trajectories and sensor streams captured by heterogeneous AR devices in large, unconstrained scenes. To establish an accurate GT, our pipeline robustly aligns the trajectories against laser scans in a fully automated manner. As a result, we publish a benchmark dataset of diverse and large-scale scenes recorded with head-mounted and hand-held AR devices. We extend several state-of-the-art methods to take advantage of the AR-specific setup and evaluate them on our benchmark. The results offer new insights on current research and reveal promising avenues for future work in the field of localization and mapping for AR.
abstract_zh: 定位和地图绘制是增强现实 (AR) 的基础技术，可实现现实世界中数字内容的共享和持久化。尽管已经取得了重大进展，但研究人员仍然主要受到不切实际的基准的驱动，这些基准不能代表现实世界的 AR 场景。这些基准通常基于场景多样性较低的小规模数据集，从固定摄像机捕获，并且缺乏其他传感器输入，例如惯性、无线电或深度数据。此外，它们的地面实况（GT）精度大多不足以满足 AR 要求。为了弥补这一差距，我们推出了 LaMAR，这是一个具有全面捕获和 GT 管道的新基准，可共同注册异构 AR 设备在大型无约束场景中捕获的真实轨迹和传感器流。为了建立准确的 GT，我们的管道以全自动方式根据激光扫描稳健地对齐轨迹。因此，我们发布了使用头戴式和手持式 AR 设备记录的多样化大规模场景的基准数据集。我们扩展了几种最先进的方法来利用 AR 特定的设置并根据我们的基准对其进行评估。研究结果为当前研究提供了新的见解，并揭示了 AR 定位和地图领域未来工作的有前景的途径。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LaMAR基准测试，旨在为增强现实（AR）中的定位与建图提供更真实、大规模的评估框架。
AI.motivation: 现有AR定位与建图基准存在数据规模小、场景单一、传感器信息不足及地面真实值精度低等问题，难以反映真实应用场景。
AI.method: 通过异构AR设备在大型场景中采集多传感器数据，利用激光扫描自动对齐轨迹生成高精度地面真实值，并扩展现有算法进行评估。
AI.result: 揭示了当前方法的局限性，验证了多传感器融合的有效性，并为AR定位与建图的未来研究方向提供了依据。
AI.conclusion: LaMAR为AR领域提供了更贴近实际的基准测试，推动了定位与建图技术的改进与创新。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出LaMAR基准测试，旨在为增强现实（AR）中的定位与建图提供更真实、大规模的评估框架。

ai_content.method: 通过异构AR设备在大型场景中采集多传感器数据，利用激光扫描自动对齐轨迹生成高精度地面真实值，并扩展现有算法进行评估。

search_text: LaMAR: Benchmarking Localization and Mapping for Augmented Reality LaMAR：增强现实定位和测绘基准测试 Localization and mapping is the foundational technology for augmented reality (AR) that enables sharing and persistence of digital content in the real world. While significant progress has been made, researchers are still mostly driven by unrealistic benchmarks not representative of real-world AR scenarios. These benchmarks are often based on small-scale datasets with low scene diversity, captured from stationary cameras, and lack other sensor inputs like inertial, radio, or depth data. Furthermore, their ground-truth (GT) accuracy is mostly insufficient to satisfy AR requirements. To close this gap, we introduce LaMAR, a new benchmark with a comprehensive capture and GT pipeline that co-registers realistic trajectories and sensor streams captured by heterogeneous AR devices in large, unconstrained scenes. To establish an accurate GT, our pipeline robustly aligns the trajectories against laser scans in a fully automated manner. As a result, we publish a benchmark dataset of diverse and large-scale scenes recorded with head-mounted and hand-held AR devices. We extend several state-of-the-art methods to take advantage of the AR-specific setup and evaluate them on our benchmark. The results offer new insights on current research and reveal promising avenues for future work in the field of localization and mapping for AR. 定位和地图绘制是增强现实 (AR) 的基础技术，可实现现实世界中数字内容的共享和持久化。尽管已经取得了重大进展，但研究人员仍然主要受到不切实际的基准的驱动，这些基准不能代表现实世界的 AR 场景。这些基准通常基于场景多样性较低的小规模数据集，从固定摄像机捕获，并且缺乏其他传感器输入，例如惯性、无线电或深度数据。此外，它们的地面实况（GT）精度大多不足以满足 AR 要求。为了弥补这一差距，我们推出了 LaMAR，这是一个具有全面捕获和 GT 管道的新基准，可共同注册异构 AR 设备在大型无约束场景中捕获的真实轨迹和传感器流。为了建立准确的 GT，我们的管道以全自动方式根据激光扫描稳健地对齐轨迹。因此，我们发布了使用头戴式和手持式 AR 设备记录的多样化大规模场景的基准数据集。我们扩展了几种最先进的方法来利用 AR 特定的设置并根据我们的基准对其进行评估。研究结果为当前研究提供了新的见解，并揭示了 AR 定位和地图领域未来工作的有前景的途径。 本文提出LaMAR基准测试，旨在为增强现实（AR）中的定位与建图提供更真实、大规模的评估框架。 Paul-Edouard Sarlin,Mihai Dusmanu,Johannes L. Schönberger,Pablo Speciale,Lukas Gruber,Viktor Larsson,Ondrej Miksik,Marc Pollefeys cs.CV

authors_text: Yifan Xu,Nicklas Hansen,Zirui Wang,Yung-Chieh Chan,Hao Su,Zhuowen Tu
title: On the Feasibility of Cross-Task Transfer with Model-Based Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 基于模型的强化学习跨任务迁移的可行性
abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) algorithms can solve challenging control problems directly from image observations, but they often require millions of environment interactions to do so. Recently, model-based RL algorithms have greatly improved sample-efficiency by concurrently learning an internal model of the world, and supplementing real environment interactions with imagined rollouts for policy improvement. However, learning an effective model of the world from scratch is challenging, and in stark contrast to humans that rely heavily on world understanding and visual cues for learning new skills. In this work, we investigate whether internal models learned by modern model-based RL algorithms can be leveraged to solve new, distinctly different tasks faster. We propose Model-Based Cross-Task Transfer (XTRA), a framework for sample-efficient online RL with scalable pretraining and finetuning of learned world models. By offline multi-task pretraining and online cross-task finetuning, we achieve substantial improvements over a baseline trained from scratch; we improve mean performance of model-based algorithm EfficientZero by 23%, and by as much as 71% in some instances.
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) algorithms can solve challenging control problems directly from image observations, but they often require millions of environment interactions to do so. Recently, model-based RL algorithms have greatly improved sample-efficiency by concurrently learning an internal model of the world, and supplementing real environment interactions with imagined rollouts for policy improvement. However, learning an effective model of the world from scratch is challenging, and in stark contrast to humans that rely heavily on world understanding and visual cues for learning new skills. In this work, we investigate whether internal models learned by modern model-based RL algorithms can be leveraged to solve new, distinctly different tasks faster. We propose Model-Based Cross-Task Transfer (XTRA), a framework for sample-efficient online RL with scalable pretraining and finetuning of learned world models. By offline multi-task pretraining and online cross-task finetuning, we achieve substantial improvements over a baseline trained from scratch; we improve mean performance of model-based algorithm EfficientZero by 23%, and by as much as 71% in some instances.
abstract_zh: 强化学习（RL）算法可以直接从图像观察中解决具有挑战性的控制问题，但它们通常需要数百万次环境交互才能做到这一点。最近，基于模型的强化学习算法通过同时学习世界的内部模型，并通过想象的部署来补充真实环境交互以改进策略，极大地提高了样本效率。然而，从头开始学习有效的世界模型具有挑战性，这与严重依赖世界理解和视觉提示来学习新技能的人类形成鲜明对比。在这项工作中，我们研究了是否可以利用现代基于模型的 RL 算法学习的内部模型来更快地解决新的、截然不同的任务。我们提出了基于模型的跨任务转移（XTRA），这是一种样本高效的在线强化学习框架，具有可扩展的预训练和学习世界模型的微调。通过离线多任务预训练和在线跨任务微调，我们在从头开始训练的基线上取得了实质性的改进；我们将基于模型的算法 EfficientZero 的平均性能提高了 23%，在某些情况下提高了 71%。

AI.tldr: 本文研究基于模型的强化学习在跨任务迁移中的可行性，提出XTRA框架通过预训练和微调世界模型提升样本效率。
AI.motivation: 传统基于模型的强化学习虽样本效率高，但学习有效世界模型仍具挑战，而人类能利用已有知识快速学习新技能，需探索模型迁移潜力。
AI.method: 提出XTRA框架，结合离线多任务预训练与在线跨任务微调，通过预训练世界模型加速新任务学习。
AI.result: 在EfficientZero基线基础上，平均性能提升23%，部分场景最高提升71%。
AI.conclusion: XTRA验证了基于模型的强化学习在跨任务迁移中的有效性，展示了预训练模型对新任务的加速潜力。

authors_text: Xin Liu,Xiaofei Shao,Bo Wang,Yali Li,Shengjin Wang
title: GraphCSPN: Geometry-Aware Depth Completion via Dynamic GCNs
title_zh: GraphCSPN：通过动态 GCN 实现几何感知深度补全
abstract: Image guided depth completion aims to recover per-pixel dense depth maps from sparse depth measurements with the help of aligned color images, which has a wide range of applications from robotics to autonomous driving. However, the 3D nature of sparse-to-dense depth completion has not been fully explored by previous methods. In this work, we propose a Graph Convolution based Spatial Propagation Network (GraphCSPN) as a general approach for depth completion. First, unlike previous methods, we leverage convolution neural networks as well as graph neural networks in a complementary way for geometric representation learning. In addition, the proposed networks explicitly incorporate learnable geometric constraints to regularize the propagation process performed in three-dimensional space rather than in two-dimensional plane. Furthermore, we construct the graph utilizing sequences of feature patches, and update it dynamically with an edge attention module during propagation, so as to better capture both the local neighboring features and global relationships over long distance. Extensive experiments on both indoor NYU-Depth-v2 and outdoor KITTI datasets demonstrate that our method achieves the state-of-the-art performance, especially when compared in the case of using only a few propagation steps. Code and models are available at the project page.
summary: Image guided depth completion aims to recover per-pixel dense depth maps from sparse depth measurements with the help of aligned color images, which has a wide range of applications from robotics to autonomous driving. However, the 3D nature of sparse-to-dense depth completion has not been fully explored by previous methods. In this work, we propose a Graph Convolution based Spatial Propagation Network (GraphCSPN) as a general approach for depth completion. First, unlike previous methods, we leverage convolution neural networks as well as graph neural networks in a complementary way for geometric representation learning. In addition, the proposed networks explicitly incorporate learnable geometric constraints to regularize the propagation process performed in three-dimensional space rather than in two-dimensional plane. Furthermore, we construct the graph utilizing sequences of feature patches, and update it dynamically with an edge attention module during propagation, so as to better capture both the local neighboring features and global relationships over long distance. Extensive experiments on both indoor NYU-Depth-v2 and outdoor KITTI datasets demonstrate that our method achieves the state-of-the-art performance, especially when compared in the case of using only a few propagation steps. Code and models are available at the project page.
abstract_zh: 图像引导深度补全旨在借助对齐的彩色图像从稀疏深度测量中恢复每像素密集深度图，该技术具有从机器人到自动驾驶的广泛应用。然而，之前的方法尚未充分探索稀疏到密集深度补全的 3D 本质。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于图卷积的空间传播网络（GraphCSPN）作为深度补全的通用方法。首先，与以前的方法不同，我们以互补的方式利用卷积神经网络和图神经网络进行几何表示学习。此外，所提出的网络明确地结合了可学习的几何约束，以规范在三维空间而不是二维平面中执行的传播过程。此外，我们利用特征块序列构建图，并在传播过程中使用边缘注意模块动态更新它，以便更好地捕获局部相邻特征和长距离的全局关系。在室内 NYU-Depth-v2 和室外 KITTI 数据集上进行的大量实验表明，我们的方法实现了最先进的性能，特别是与仅使用几个传播步骤的情况进行比较时。代码和模型可在项目页面获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GraphCSPN方法，通过动态图卷积网络实现几何感知的深度补全，从稀疏深度测量和对齐颜色图像中恢复密集深度图。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未充分探索稀疏到密集深度补全的三维特性，缺乏对三维空间传播过程的几何约束建模。
AI.method: 结合卷积神经网络与图神经网络进行几何表征学习，利用可学习几何约束在三维空间正则化传播过程，并通过动态边注意力模块更新特征图序列构建的图结构。
AI.result: 在NYU-Depth-v2和KITTI数据集上均达到SOTA性能，尤其在少量传播步骤下表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 通过三维几何约束与动态图结构的结合，有效提升了深度补全的精度与鲁棒性。

Furthermore, we construct the graph utilizing sequences of feature patches, and update it dynamically with an edge attention module during propagation, so as to better capture both the local neighboring features and global relationships over long distance. Extensive experiments on both indoor NYU-Depth-v2 and outdoor KITTI datasets demonstrate that our method achieves the state-of-the-art performance, especially when compared in the case of using only a few propagation steps. Code and models are available at the project page. 图像引导深度补全旨在借助对齐的彩色图像从稀疏深度测量中恢复每像素密集深度图，该技术具有从机器人到自动驾驶的广泛应用。然而，之前的方法尚未充分探索稀疏到密集深度补全的 3D 本质。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于图卷积的空间传播网络（GraphCSPN）作为深度补全的通用方法。首先，与以前的方法不同，我们以互补的方式利用卷积神经网络和图神经网络进行几何表示学习。此外，所提出的网络明确地结合了可学习的几何约束，以规范在三维空间而不是二维平面中执行的传播过程。此外，我们利用特征块序列构建图，并在传播过程中使用边缘注意模块动态更新它，以便更好地捕获局部相邻特征和长距离的全局关系。在室内 NYU-Depth-v2 和室外 KITTI 数据集上进行的大量实验表明，我们的方法实现了最先进的性能，特别是与仅使用几个传播步骤的情况进行比较时。代码和模型可在项目页面获取。 本文提出GraphCSPN方法，通过动态图卷积网络实现几何感知的深度补全，从稀疏深度测量和对齐颜色图像中恢复密集深度图。 Xin Liu,Xiaofei Shao,Bo Wang,Yali Li,Shengjin Wang cs.CV,cs.AI

title: Two-level Data Augmentation for Calibrated Multi-view Detection
title_zh: 用于校准多视图检测的两级数据增强
abstract: Data augmentation has proven its usefulness to improve model generalization and performance. While it is commonly applied in computer vision application when it comes to multi-view systems, it is rarely used. Indeed geometric data augmentation can break the alignment among views. This is problematic since multi-view data tend to be scarce and it is expensive to annotate. In this work we propose to solve this issue by introducing a new multi-view data augmentation pipeline that preserves alignment among views. Additionally to traditional augmentation of the input image we also propose a second level of augmentation applied directly at the scene level. When combined with our simple multi-view detection model, our two-level augmentation pipeline outperforms all existing baselines by a significant margin on the two main multi-view multi-person detection datasets WILDTRACK and MultiviewX.
summary: Data augmentation has proven its usefulness to improve model generalization and performance. While it is commonly applied in computer vision application when it comes to multi-view systems, it is rarely used. Indeed geometric data augmentation can break the alignment among views. This is problematic since multi-view data tend to be scarce and it is expensive to annotate. In this work we propose to solve this issue by introducing a new multi-view data augmentation pipeline that preserves alignment among views. Additionally to traditional augmentation of the input image we also propose a second level of augmentation applied directly at the scene level. When combined with our simple multi-view detection model, our two-level augmentation pipeline outperforms all existing baselines by a significant margin on the two main multi-view multi-person detection datasets WILDTRACK and MultiviewX.
abstract_zh: 数据增强已证明其对于提高模型泛化和性能的有用性。虽然它通常应用于计算机视觉应用中的多视图系统，但很少使用。事实上，几何数据增强可以打破视图之间的对齐。这是有问题的，因为多视图数据往往稀缺并且注释成本昂贵。在这项工作中，我们建议通过引入一种新的多视图数据增强管道来解决这个问题，该管道可以保持视图之间的对齐。除了传统的输入图像增强之外，我们还提出了直接应用于场景级别的第二级增强。当与我们简单的多视图检测模型相结合时，我们的两级增强管道在两个主要多视图多人检测数据集 WILDTRACK 和 MultiviewX 上明显优于所有现有基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种两级数据增强方法，用于解决多视角检测中视角对齐问题并提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 多视角数据稀缺且标注成本高，传统几何数据增强会破坏视角对齐，导致检测性能下降。
AI.method: 设计包含图像级传统增强和场景级增强的两级数据增强流程，结合简单多视角检测模型。
AI.result: 在WILDTRACK和MultiviewX数据集上显著优于所有现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 两级增强方法有效保持视角对齐并提升多视角检测性能，验证了其有效性。

authors_text: William van den Bogert,James Lorenz,Xili Yi,Nima Fazeli,Albert J. Shih
title: Lumped-Parameter Modeling and Control for Robotic High-Viscosity Fluid Dispensing in Additive Manufacturing
title_zh: 增材制造中机器人高粘度流体点胶的集总参数建模和控制
abstract: In this paper, we present a novel flow model and compensation strategy for high-viscosity fluid deposition that yields high quality parts in the face of large transient delays and nonlinearity. Robotic high-viscosity fluid deposition is an essential process for a broad range of manufacturing applications including additive manufacturing, adhesive and sealant dispensing, and soft robotics. However, high-viscosity fluid deposition without compensation can lead to poor part quality and defects due to large transient delays and complex fluid dynamics. Our computationally efficient model is well-suited to real-time control and can be quickly calibrated and our compensation strategy leverages an iterative Linear-Quadratic Regulator to compute compensated deposition paths that can be deployed on most dispensing systems, without additional hardware. We demonstrate the improvements provided by our method when 3D printing using a robotic manipulator.
summary: In this paper, we present a novel flow model and compensation strategy for high-viscosity fluid deposition that yields high quality parts in the face of large transient delays and nonlinearity. Robotic high-viscosity fluid deposition is an essential process for a broad range of manufacturing applications including additive manufacturing, adhesive and sealant dispensing, and soft robotics. However, high-viscosity fluid deposition without compensation can lead to poor part quality and defects due to large transient delays and complex fluid dynamics. Our computationally efficient model is well-suited to real-time control and can be quickly calibrated and our compensation strategy leverages an iterative Linear-Quadratic Regulator to compute compensated deposition paths that can be deployed on most dispensing systems, without additional hardware. We demonstrate the improvements provided by our method when 3D printing using a robotic manipulator.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种用于高粘度流体沉积的新型流动模型和补偿策略，可在面对大瞬态延迟和非线性时产生高质量的零件。机器人高粘度流体沉积是各种制造应用的重要工艺，包括增材制造、粘合剂和密封剂点胶以及软机器人。然而，由于大的瞬态延迟和复杂的流体动力学，未经补偿的高粘度流体沉积可能会导致零件质量较差和缺陷。我们的计算高效模型非常适合实时控制，并且可以快速校准，我们的补偿策略利用迭代线性二次调节器来计算补偿沉积路径，该路径可以部署在大多数点胶系统上，无需额外的硬件。我们展示了我们的方法在使用机器人操纵器进行 3D 打印时所提供的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于高粘度流体沉积的集总参数模型和补偿策略，以提高增材制造中零件的质量。
AI.motivation: 高粘度流体沉积在许多制造应用中至关重要，但其复杂的流体动力学和大瞬态延迟可能导致零件质量差和缺陷。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种计算高效的模型，适用于实时控制，并利用迭代线性二次调节器计算补偿沉积路径。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在使用机器人机械臂进行3D打印时显著提高了零件质量。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够在大多数沉积系统上部署，无需额外硬件，为高粘度流体沉积提供了一种有效的解决方案。

authors_text: Yoshiki Masuyama,Xuankai Chang,Samuele Cornell,Shinji Watanabe,Nobutaka Ono
title: End-to-End Integration of Speech Recognition, Dereverberation, Beamforming, and Self-Supervised Learning Representation
title_zh: 语音识别、去混响、波束成形和自监督学习表示的端到端集成
abstract: Self-supervised learning representation (SSLR) has demonstrated its significant effectiveness in automatic speech recognition (ASR), mainly with clean speech. Recent work pointed out the strength of integrating SSLR with single-channel speech enhancement for ASR in noisy environments. This paper further advances this integration by dealing with multi-channel input. We propose a novel end-to-end architecture by integrating dereverberation, beamforming, SSLR, and ASR within a single neural network. Our system achieves the best performance reported in the literature on the CHiME-4 6-channel track with a word error rate (WER) of 1.77%. While the WavLM-based strong SSLR demonstrates promising results by itself, the end-to-end integration with the weighted power minimization distortionless response beamformer, which simultaneously performs dereverberation and denoising, improves WER significantly. Its effectiveness is also validated on the REVERB dataset.
summary: Self-supervised learning representation (SSLR) has demonstrated its significant effectiveness in automatic speech recognition (ASR), mainly with clean speech. Recent work pointed out the strength of integrating SSLR with single-channel speech enhancement for ASR in noisy environments. This paper further advances this integration by dealing with multi-channel input. We propose a novel end-to-end architecture by integrating dereverberation, beamforming, SSLR, and ASR within a single neural network. Our system achieves the best performance reported in the literature on the CHiME-4 6-channel track with a word error rate (WER) of 1.77%. While the WavLM-based strong SSLR demonstrates promising results by itself, the end-to-end integration with the weighted power minimization distortionless response beamformer, which simultaneously performs dereverberation and denoising, improves WER significantly. Its effectiveness is also validated on the REVERB dataset.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习表示（SSLR）已在自动语音识别（ASR）中证明了其显着的有效性，主要是在干净语音方面。最近的工作指出了将 SSLR 与单通道语音增强相结合以实现噪声环境中 ASR 的优势。本文通过处理多通道输入进一步推进了这种集成。我们提出了一种新颖的端到端架构，将去混响、波束成形、SSLR 和 ASR 集成到单个神经网络中。我们的系统在 CHiME-4 6 通道轨道上实现了文献中报道的最佳性能，字错误率 (WER) 为 1.77%。虽然基于 WavLM 的强 SSLR 本身就显示出了有希望的结果，但与加权功率最小化无失真响应波束形成器的端到端集成（同时执行去混响和降噪）显着提高了 WER。其有效性也在 REVERB 数据集上得到了验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的语音识别系统，整合了去混响、波束成形、自监督学习表示（SSLR）和自动语音识别（ASR），以提升多通道环境下的语音识别性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管自监督学习表示（SSLR）在干净语音的ASR中表现优异，但现有研究主要集中在单通道语音增强。本文旨在通过多通道输入和端到端集成，进一步提升噪声环境下的ASR效果。
AI.method: 设计了一种端到端神经网络架构，将去混响、波束成形、SSLR和ASR模块整合，采用加权功率最小化无失真响应波束成形器同时实现去混响和降噪，并结合WavLM等强SSLR模型。
AI.result: 在CHiME-4 6通道数据集上实现了1.77%的词错误率（WER），在REVERB数据集上也验证了有效性，表明端到端集成显著优于单独使用SSLR。
AI.conclusion: 多通道端到端集成方法有效提升了ASR性能，尤其在复杂噪声环境中，为实际应用提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。

ai_content_json.method: 设计了一种端到端神经网络架构，将去混响、波束成形、SSLR和ASR模块整合，采用加权功率最小化无失真响应波束成形器同时实现去混响和降噪，并结合WavLM等强SSLR模型。
ai_content_json.result: 在CHiME-4 6通道数据集上实现了1.77%的词错误率（WER），在REVERB数据集上也验证了有效性，表明端到端集成显著优于单独使用SSLR。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 多通道端到端集成方法有效提升了ASR性能，尤其在复杂噪声环境中，为实际应用提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。

method: 设计了一种端到端神经网络架构，将去混响、波束成形、SSLR和ASR模块整合，采用加权功率最小化无失真响应波束成形器同时实现去混响和降噪，并结合WavLM等强SSLR模型。

search_text: End-to-End Integration of Speech Recognition, Dereverberation, Beamforming, and Self-Supervised Learning Representation 语音识别、去混响、波束成形和自监督学习表示的端到端集成 Self-supervised learning representation (SSLR) has demonstrated its significant effectiveness in automatic speech recognition (ASR), mainly with clean speech. Recent work pointed out the strength of integrating SSLR with single-channel speech enhancement for ASR in noisy environments. This paper further advances this integration by dealing with multi-channel input. We propose a novel end-to-end architecture by integrating dereverberation, beamforming, SSLR, and ASR within a single neural network. Our system achieves the best performance reported in the literature on the CHiME-4 6-channel track with a word error rate (WER) of 1.77%. While the WavLM-based strong SSLR demonstrates promising results by itself, the end-to-end integration with the weighted power minimization distortionless response beamformer, which simultaneously performs dereverberation and denoising, improves WER significantly. Its effectiveness is also validated on the REVERB dataset. 自监督学习表示（SSLR）已在自动语音识别（ASR）中证明了其显着的有效性，主要是在干净语音方面。最近的工作指出了将 SSLR 与单通道语音增强相结合以实现噪声环境中 ASR 的优势。本文通过处理多通道输入进一步推进了这种集成。我们提出了一种新颖的端到端架构，将去混响、波束成形、SSLR 和 ASR 集成到单个神经网络中。我们的系统在 CHiME-4 6 通道轨道上实现了文献中报道的最佳性能，字错误率 (WER) 为 1.77%。虽然基于 WavLM 的强 SSLR 本身就显示出了有希望的结果，但与加权功率最小化无失真响应波束形成器的端到端集成（同时执行去混响和降噪）显着提高了 WER。其有效性也在 REVERB 数据集上得到了验证。 本文提出了一种端到端的语音识别系统，整合了去混响、波束成形、自监督学习表示（SSLR）和自动语音识别（ASR），以提升多通道环境下的语音识别性能。 Yoshiki Masuyama,Xuankai Chang,Samuele Cornell,Shinji Watanabe,Nobutaka Ono cs.SD,eess.AS

title: Towards a neural architecture of language: Deep learning versus logistics of access in neural architectures for compositional processing
title_zh: 走向语言的神经架构：深度学习与神经架构中用于组合处理的访问逻辑
abstract: Recently, a number of articles have argued that deep learning models such as GPT could also capture key aspects of language processing in the human mind and brain. However, I will argue that these models are not suitable as neural models of human language. Firstly, because they fail on fundamental boundary conditions, such as the amount of learning they require. This would in fact imply that the mechanisms of GPT and brain language processing are fundamentally different. Secondly, because they do not possess the logistics of access needed for compositional and productive human language processing. Neural architectures could possess logistics of access based on small-world like network structures, in which processing does not consist of symbol manipulation but of controlling the flow of activation. In this view, two complementary approaches would be needed to investigate the relation between brain and cognition. Investigating learning methods could reveal how 'learned cognition' as found in deep learning could develop in the brain. However, neural architectures with logistics of access should also be developed to account for 'productive cognition' as required for natural or artificial human language processing. Later on, these approaches could perhaps be combined to see how such architectures could develop by learning and development from a simpler basis.
summary: Recently, a number of articles have argued that deep learning models such as GPT could also capture key aspects of language processing in the human mind and brain. However, I will argue that these models are not suitable as neural models of human language. Firstly, because they fail on fundamental boundary conditions, such as the amount of learning they require. This would in fact imply that the mechanisms of GPT and brain language processing are fundamentally different. Secondly, because they do not possess the logistics of access needed for compositional and productive human language processing. Neural architectures could possess logistics of access based on small-world like network structures, in which processing does not consist of symbol manipulation but of controlling the flow of activation. In this view, two complementary approaches would be needed to investigate the relation between brain and cognition. Investigating learning methods could reveal how 'learned cognition' as found in deep learning could develop in the brain. However, neural architectures with logistics of access should also be developed to account for 'productive cognition' as required for natural or artificial human language processing. Later on, these approaches could perhaps be combined to see how such architectures could develop by learning and development from a simpler basis.
abstract_zh: 最近，许多文章认为 GPT 等深度学习模型也可以捕获人类思维和大脑中语言处理的关键方面。然而，我认为这些模型不适合作为人类语言的神经模型。首先，因为它们在基本边界条件上失败了，例如它们所需的学习量。这实际上意味着 GPT 和大脑语言处理的机制根本不同。其次，因为它们不具备组合和富有成效的人类语言处理所需的访问后勤。神经架构可以拥有基于类似小世界的网络结构的访问逻辑，其中处理不包括符号操作，而是控制激活流。按照这种观点，需要两种互补的方法来研究大脑和认知之间的关系。研究学习方法可以揭示深度学习中的“习得认知”如何在大脑中发展。然而，还应该开发具有访问逻辑的神经架构，以考虑自然或人工人类语言处理所需的“生产性认知”。稍后，也许可以将这些方法结合起来，看看如何通过从更简单的基础上学习和开发来开发此类架构。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了深度学习模型（如GPT）在模拟人类语言处理机制方面的不足，并提出基于小世界网络结构的神经架构作为替代方案。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型在学习效率和组合性语言处理的物流机制上存在局限，无法准确反映人脑语言处理的特性。
AI.method: 通过分析GPT模型的边界条件缺陷，提出需结合学习方法与具备物流访问机制的神经架构（如小世界网络）进行研究。
AI.result: 论证了GPT与人脑语言处理机制存在本质差异，并指出需发展兼具学习能力与组合性处理能力的新型神经架构。
AI.conclusion: 未来需同时研究学习驱动的认知与物流访问驱动的认知，最终整合二者以构建更接近人类语言处理的模型。

title: PoseGPT: Quantization-based 3D Human Motion Generation and Forecasting
title_zh: PoseGPT：基于量化的 3D 人体运动生成和预测
abstract: We address the problem of action-conditioned generation of human motion sequences. Existing work falls into two categories: forecast models conditioned on observed past motions, or generative models conditioned on action labels and duration only. In contrast, we generate motion conditioned on observations of arbitrary length, including none. To solve this generalized problem, we propose PoseGPT, an auto-regressive transformer-based approach which internally compresses human motion into quantized latent sequences. An auto-encoder first maps human motion to latent index sequences in a discrete space, and vice-versa. Inspired by the Generative Pretrained Transformer (GPT), we propose to train a GPT-like model for next-index prediction in that space; this allows PoseGPT to output distributions on possible futures, with or without conditioning on past motion. The discrete and compressed nature of the latent space allows the GPT-like model to focus on long-range signal, as it removes low-level redundancy in the input signal. Predicting discrete indices also alleviates the common pitfall of predicting averaged poses, a typical failure case when regressing continuous values, as the average of discrete targets is not a target itself. Our experimental results show that our proposed approach achieves state-of-the-art results on HumanAct12, a standard but small scale dataset, as well as on BABEL, a recent large scale MoCap dataset, and on GRAB, a human-object interactions dataset.
summary: We address the problem of action-conditioned generation of human motion sequences. Existing work falls into two categories: forecast models conditioned on observed past motions, or generative models conditioned on action labels and duration only. In contrast, we generate motion conditioned on observations of arbitrary length, including none. To solve this generalized problem, we propose PoseGPT, an auto-regressive transformer-based approach which internally compresses human motion into quantized latent sequences. An auto-encoder first maps human motion to latent index sequences in a discrete space, and vice-versa. Inspired by the Generative Pretrained Transformer (GPT), we propose to train a GPT-like model for next-index prediction in that space; this allows PoseGPT to output distributions on possible futures, with or without conditioning on past motion. The discrete and compressed nature of the latent space allows the GPT-like model to focus on long-range signal, as it removes low-level redundancy in the input signal. Predicting discrete indices also alleviates the common pitfall of predicting averaged poses, a typical failure case when regressing continuous values, as the average of discrete targets is not a target itself. Our experimental results show that our proposed approach achieves state-of-the-art results on HumanAct12, a standard but small scale dataset, as well as on BABEL, a recent large scale MoCap dataset, and on GRAB, a human-object interactions dataset.
abstract_zh: 我们解决了人体运动序列的动作条件生成问题。现有的工作分为两类：以观察到的过去运动为条件的预测模型，或仅以动作标签和持续时间为条件的生成模型。相比之下，我们根据任意长度的观察（包括无长度）来生成运动。为了解决这个普遍问题，我们提出了 PoseGPT，一种基于自回归变压器的方法，它在内部将人体运动压缩为量化的潜在序列。自动编码器首先将人体运动映射到离散空间中的潜在索引序列，反之亦然。受生成预训练变压器（GPT）的启发，我们建议训练一个类似 GPT 的模型来预测该空间的下一个索引；这使得 PoseGPT 能够输出可能的未来的分布，无论是否以过去的运动为条件。潜在空间的离散和压缩性质允许类 GPT 模型专注于远程信号，因为它消除了输入信号中的低级冗余。预测离散指数还可以缓解预测平均姿态的常见陷阱，这是回归连续值时的典型失败情况，因为离散目标的平均值不是目标本身。我们的实验结果表明，我们提出的方法在 HumanAct12（一个标准但小规模的数据集）、BABEL（最近的大规模 MoCap 数据集）和 GRAB（人与物体交互数据集）上实现了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PoseGPT，一种基于量化的人体3D运动生成与预测方法，能够处理任意长度的观察输入。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅能处理固定长度的历史动作或依赖动作标签，无法灵活应对不同长度的观察输入，限制了模型的通用性。
AI.method: 通过自编码器将人体运动压缩为离散潜在序列，利用类似GPT的自回归Transformer模型预测潜在索引，减少冗余并避免连续值回归的平均姿态问题。
AI.result: 在HumanAct12、BABEL和GRAB数据集上均取得当时最优性能，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 量化方法有效提升了运动生成与预测的准确性，展示了离散潜在空间在建模复杂人体运动中的优势。

Our experimental results show that our proposed approach achieves state-of-the-art results on HumanAct12, a standard but small scale dataset, as well as on BABEL, a recent large scale MoCap dataset, and on GRAB, a human-object interactions dataset. 我们解决了人体运动序列的动作条件生成问题。现有的工作分为两类：以观察到的过去运动为条件的预测模型，或仅以动作标签和持续时间为条件的生成模型。相比之下，我们根据任意长度的观察（包括无长度）来生成运动。为了解决这个普遍问题，我们提出了 PoseGPT，一种基于自回归变压器的方法，它在内部将人体运动压缩为量化的潜在序列。自动编码器首先将人体运动映射到离散空间中的潜在索引序列，反之亦然。受生成预训练变压器（GPT）的启发，我们建议训练一个类似 GPT 的模型来预测该空间的下一个索引；这使得 PoseGPT 能够输出可能的未来的分布，无论是否以过去的运动为条件。潜在空间的离散和压缩性质允许类 GPT 模型专注于远程信号，因为它消除了输入信号中的低级冗余。预测离散指数还可以缓解预测平均姿态的常见陷阱，这是回归连续值时的典型失败情况，因为离散目标的平均值不是目标本身。我们的实验结果表明，我们提出的方法在 HumanAct12（一个标准但小规模的数据集）、BABEL（最近的大规模 MoCap 数据集）和 GRAB（人与物体交互数据集）上实现了最先进的结果。 本文提出PoseGPT，一种基于量化的人体3D运动生成与预测方法，能够处理任意长度的观察输入。 Thomas Lucas,Fabien Baradel,Philippe Weinzaepfel,Grégory Rogez cs.CV

authors_text: Pengjin Wei,Guohang Yan,Yikang Li,Kun Fang,Jie Yang,Wei Liu
title: Online LiDAR-Camera Extrinsic Parameters Self-checking
title_zh: 激光雷达相机外参数在线自检
comment: There are some errors in the methodology section of the paper, which is currently being revised
comments: There are some errors in the methodology section of the paper, which is currently being revised
abstract: With the development of neural networks and the increasing popularity of automatic driving, the calibration of the LiDAR and the camera has attracted more and more attention. This calibration task is multi-modal, where the rich color and texture information captured by the camera and the accurate three-dimensional spatial information from the LiDAR is incredibly significant for downstream tasks. Current research interests mainly focus on obtaining accurate calibration results through information fusion. However, they seldom analyze whether the calibrated results are correct or not, which could be of significant importance in real-world applications. For example, in large-scale production, the LiDARs and the cameras of each smart car have to get well-calibrated as the car leaves the production line, while in the rest of the car life period, the poses of the LiDARs and cameras should also get continually supervised to ensure the security. To this end, this paper proposes a self-checking algorithm to judge whether the extrinsic parameters are well-calibrated by introducing a binary classification network based on the fused information from the camera and the LiDAR. Moreover, since there is no such dataset for the task in this work, we further generate a new dataset branch from the KITTI dataset tailored for the task. Our experiments on the proposed dataset branch demonstrate the performance of our method. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to address the significance of continually checking the calibrated extrinsic parameters for autonomous driving. The code is open-sourced on the Github website at https://github.com/OpenCalib/LiDAR2camera_self-check.

To this end, this paper proposes a self-checking algorithm to judge whether the extrinsic parameters are well-calibrated by introducing a binary classification network based on the fused information from the camera and the LiDAR. Moreover, since there is no such dataset for the task in this work, we further generate a new dataset branch from the KITTI dataset tailored for the task. Our experiments on the proposed dataset branch demonstrate the performance of our method. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to address the significance of continually checking the calibrated extrinsic parameters for autonomous driving. The code is open-sourced on the Github website at https://github.com/OpenCalib/LiDAR2camera_self-check.
abstract_zh: 随着神经网络的发展和自动驾驶的日益普及，激光雷达和摄像头的标定越来越受到人们的关注。该校准任务是多模态的，其中相机捕获的丰富的颜色和纹理信息以及来自激光雷达的准确的三维空间信息对于下游任务非常重要。目前的研究兴趣主要集中在通过信息融合获得准确的标定结果。然而，他们很少分析校准结果是否正确，这在实际应用中可能非常重要。例如，在大规模生产中，每辆智能汽车的激光雷达和摄像头都必须在汽车离开生产线时进行良好的校准，而在汽车的剩余使用寿命期间，激光雷达和摄像头的姿态也应该得到持续的监控，以确保安全。为此，本文提出了一种自检算法，通过引入基于相机和激光雷达融合信息的二元分类网络来判断外部参数是否校准良好。此外，由于本工作中的任务没有这样的数据集，我们进一步从专为该任务定制的 KITTI 数据集生成一个新的数据集分支。我们对所提出的数据集分支的实验证明了我们方法的性能。据我们所知，这是第一项探讨持续检查自动驾驶校准的外部参数的重要性的工作。该代码在 Github 网站上开源：https://github.com/OpenCalib/LiDAR2camera_self-check。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于融合信息的二分类网络算法，用于判断激光雷达与摄像头的外参标定是否准确，并生成新的数据集以验证方法有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究聚焦于获取准确标定结果，但缺乏对结果正确性的验证机制，而实际应用中（如大规模生产及车辆生命周期内）持续监督标定结果对自动驾驶安全至关重要。
AI.method: 引入基于摄像头与激光雷达融合信息的二分类网络，设计自检算法判断外参标定质量；从KITTI数据集生成定制化新数据集分支进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验结果验证了所提方法在新数据集上的性能，表明该算法能有效检测标定误差。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次提出持续检查自动驾驶系统中激光雷达-摄像头外参标定准确性的方法，为实际应用中的安全性保障提供新思路。

authors_text: Marouane Tliba,Aymen Sekhri,Mohamed Amine Kerkouri,Aladine Chetouani
title: Deep-based quality assessment of medical images through domain adaptation
title_zh: 通过领域适应对医学图像进行深度质量评估
abstract: Predicting the quality of multimedia content is often needed in different fields. In some applications, quality metrics are crucial with a high impact, and can affect decision making such as diagnosis from medical multimedia. In this paper, we focus on such applications by proposing an efficient and shallow model for predicting the quality of medical images without reference from a small amount of annotated data. Our model is based on convolution self-attention that aims to model complex representation from relevant local characteristics of images, which itself slide over the image to interpolate the global quality score. We also apply domain adaptation learning in unsupervised and semi-supervised manner. The proposed model is evaluated through a dataset composed of several images and their corresponding subjective scores. The obtained results showed the efficiency of the proposed method, but also, the relevance of the applying domain adaptation to generalize over different multimedia domains regarding the downstream task of perceptual quality prediction. \footnote{Funded by the TIC-ART project, Regional fund (Region Centre-Val de Loire)}
summary: Predicting the quality of multimedia content is often needed in different fields. In some applications, quality metrics are crucial with a high impact, and can affect decision making such as diagnosis from medical multimedia. In this paper, we focus on such applications by proposing an efficient and shallow model for predicting the quality of medical images without reference from a small amount of annotated data. Our model is based on convolution self-attention that aims to model complex representation from relevant local characteristics of images, which itself slide over the image to interpolate the global quality score. We also apply domain adaptation learning in unsupervised and semi-supervised manner. The proposed model is evaluated through a dataset composed of several images and their corresponding subjective scores. The obtained results showed the efficiency of the proposed method, but also, the relevance of the applying domain adaptation to generalize over different multimedia domains regarding the downstream task of perceptual quality prediction. \footnote{Funded by the TIC-ART project, Regional fund (Region Centre-Val de Loire)}
abstract_zh: 不同领域经常需要预测多媒体内容的质量。在某些应用中，质量指标至关重要，影响很大，可以影响医疗多媒体诊断等决策。在本文中，我们通过提出一种高效且浅层的模型来重点关注此类应用，该模型可以在不参考少量注释数据的情况下预测医学图像的质量。我们的模型基于卷积自注意力，旨在根据图像的相关局部特征对复杂表示进行建模，其本身在图像上滑动以插值全局质量得分。我们还以无监督和半监督的方式应用领域适应学习。所提出的模型通过由多个图像及其相应的主观分数组成的数据集进行评估。获得的结果显示了所提出方法的效率，而且还显示了应用域自适应来泛化关于感知质量预测的下游任务的不同多媒体域的相关性。 \footnote{由 TIC-ART 项目、区域基金（区域中心-卢瓦尔河谷）资助}

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的医学图像质量评估方法，通过领域自适应技术解决小样本标注数据下的质量预测问题。
AI.motivation: 医学图像质量评估对诊断决策至关重要，但传统方法依赖大量标注数据且难以跨领域泛化，需开发高效且适应不同领域的质量预测模型。
AI.method: 设计浅层卷积自注意力模型，通过局部特征滑动窗口生成全局质量分数，并结合无监督/半监督领域自适应提升跨领域泛化能力。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在医学图像质量预测任务中表现优异，且领域自适应显著增强了模型在不同多媒体领域的泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提模型有效解决了小样本医学图像质量评估问题，验证了领域自适应在跨领域感知质量预测任务中的关键作用。

We also apply domain adaptation learning in unsupervised and semi-supervised manner. The proposed model is evaluated through a dataset composed of several images and their corresponding subjective scores. The obtained results showed the efficiency of the proposed method, but also, the relevance of the applying domain adaptation to generalize over different multimedia domains regarding the downstream task of perceptual quality prediction. \footnote{Funded by the TIC-ART project, Regional fund (Region Centre-Val de Loire)} 不同领域经常需要预测多媒体内容的质量。在某些应用中，质量指标至关重要，影响很大，可以影响医疗多媒体诊断等决策。在本文中，我们通过提出一种高效且浅层的模型来重点关注此类应用，该模型可以在不参考少量注释数据的情况下预测医学图像的质量。我们的模型基于卷积自注意力，旨在根据图像的相关局部特征对复杂表示进行建模，其本身在图像上滑动以插值全局质量得分。我们还以无监督和半监督的方式应用领域适应学习。所提出的模型通过由多个图像及其相应的主观分数组成的数据集进行评估。获得的结果显示了所提出方法的效率，而且还显示了应用域自适应来泛化关于感知质量预测的下游任务的不同多媒体域的相关性。 \footnote{由 TIC-ART 项目、区域基金（区域中心-卢瓦尔河谷）资助} 本文提出一种基于深度学习的医学图像质量评估方法，通过领域自适应技术解决小样本标注数据下的质量预测问题。 Marouane Tliba,Aymen Sekhri,Mohamed Amine Kerkouri,Aladine Chetouani eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Vinod Kumar Chauhan,Soheila Molaei,Marzia Hoque Tania,Anshul Thakur,Tingting Zhu,David A. Clifton
title: Adversarial De-confounding in Individualised Treatment Effects Estimation
title_zh: 个体化治疗效果估计中的对抗性去混杂
abstract: Observational studies have recently received significant attention from the machine learning community due to the increasingly available non-experimental observational data and the limitations of the experimental studies, such as considerable cost, impracticality, small and less representative sample sizes, etc. In observational studies, de-confounding is a fundamental problem of individualised treatment effects (ITE) estimation. This paper proposes disentangled representations with adversarial training to selectively balance the confounders in the binary treatment setting for the ITE estimation. The adversarial training of treatment policy selectively encourages treatment-agnostic balanced representations for the confounders and helps to estimate the ITE in the observational studies via counterfactual inference. Empirical results on synthetic and real-world datasets, with varying degrees of confounding, prove that our proposed approach improves the state-of-the-art methods in achieving lower error in the ITE estimation.
summary: Observational studies have recently received significant attention from the machine learning community due to the increasingly available non-experimental observational data and the limitations of the experimental studies, such as considerable cost, impracticality, small and less representative sample sizes, etc. In observational studies, de-confounding is a fundamental problem of individualised treatment effects (ITE) estimation. This paper proposes disentangled representations with adversarial training to selectively balance the confounders in the binary treatment setting for the ITE estimation. The adversarial training of treatment policy selectively encourages treatment-agnostic balanced representations for the confounders and helps to estimate the ITE in the observational studies via counterfactual inference. Empirical results on synthetic and real-world datasets, with varying degrees of confounding, prove that our proposed approach improves the state-of-the-art methods in achieving lower error in the ITE estimation.
abstract_zh: 由于非实验观察数据的日益增多以及实验研究的局限性，例如成本高昂、不切实际、样本量小且代表性较差等，观察性研究最近受到了机器学习界的广泛关注。在观察性研究中，去混杂是个体化治疗效果（ITE）估计的一个基本问题。本文提出了通过对抗性训练进行解缠结表示，以选择性地平衡 ITE 估计的二元处理设置中的混杂因素。治疗政策的对抗性训练有选择地鼓励对混杂因素进行与治疗无关的平衡表示，并有助于通过反事实推理来估计观察研究中的 ITE。具有不同程度混杂的合成数据集和真实数据集的实证结果证明，我们提出的方法改进了最先进的方法，以实现较低的 ITE 估计误差。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种对抗去混杂方法，用于改善观察性研究中个体化治疗效果（ITE）估计的准确性。
AI.motivation: 观察性研究因实验研究成本高、样本量小等问题受到关注，但其核心挑战在于如何有效消除混杂变量对治疗效果估计的干扰。
AI.method: 通过对抗训练生成解耦表示，选择性平衡二元治疗场景下的混杂变量，利用反事实推理估计ITE。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实数据集上验证，该方法在不同程度的混杂情况下均优于现有最先进方法，ITE估计误差更低。
AI.conclusion: 对抗去混杂方法能有效提升观察性研究中个体化治疗效果估计的准确性，为因果推断提供新思路。

authors_text: Georgios Rizos,Jenna Lawson,Simon Mitchell,Pranay Shah,Xin Wen,Cristina Banks-Leite,Robert Ewers,Bjoern W. Schuller
title: Propagating Variational Model Uncertainty for Bioacoustic Call Label Smoothing
title_zh: 生物声学呼叫标签平滑的传播变分模型不确定性
abstract: We focus on using the predictive uncertainty signal calculated by Bayesian neural networks to guide learning in the self-same task the model is being trained on. Not opting for costly Monte Carlo sampling of weights, we propagate the approximate hidden variance in an end-to-end manner, throughout a variational Bayesian adaptation of a ResNet with attention and squeeze-and-excitation blocks, in order to identify data samples that should contribute less into the loss value calculation. We, thus, propose uncertainty-aware, data-specific label smoothing, where the smoothing probability is dependent on this epistemic uncertainty. We show that, through the explicit usage of the epistemic uncertainty in the loss calculation, the variational model is led to improved predictive and calibration performance. This core machine learning methodology is exemplified at wildlife call detection, from audio recordings made via passive acoustic monitoring equipment in the animals' natural habitats, with the future goal of automating large scale annotation in a trustworthy manner.
summary: We focus on using the predictive uncertainty signal calculated by Bayesian neural networks to guide learning in the self-same task the model is being trained on. Not opting for costly Monte Carlo sampling of weights, we propagate the approximate hidden variance in an end-to-end manner, throughout a variational Bayesian adaptation of a ResNet with attention and squeeze-and-excitation blocks, in order to identify data samples that should contribute less into the loss value calculation. We, thus, propose uncertainty-aware, data-specific label smoothing, where the smoothing probability is dependent on this epistemic uncertainty. We show that, through the explicit usage of the epistemic uncertainty in the loss calculation, the variational model is led to improved predictive and calibration performance. This core machine learning methodology is exemplified at wildlife call detection, from audio recordings made via passive acoustic monitoring equipment in the animals' natural habitats, with the future goal of automating large scale annotation in a trustworthy manner.
abstract_zh: 我们专注于使用贝叶斯神经网络计算的预测不确定性信号来指导模型正在训练的同一任务中的学习。我们不选择昂贵的权重蒙特卡洛采样，而是以端到端的方式传播近似隐藏方差，通过带有注意力和挤压和激励块的 ResNet 的变分贝叶斯适应，以便识别对损失值计算贡献较小的数据样本。因此，我们提出了不确定性感知、特定于数据的标签平滑，其中平滑概率取决于这种认知不确定性。我们表明，通过在损失计算中明确使用认知不确定性，变分模型可以提高预测和校准性能。这种核心机器学习方法在野生动物呼叫检测中得到了例证，通过动物自然栖息地的被动声学监测设备录制的音频记录，未来的目标是以值得信赖的方式自动化大规模注释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于变分模型不确定性的生物声学叫声标签平滑方法，通过贝叶斯神经网络提升野生动物叫声检测的预测与校准性能。
AI.motivation: 传统标签平滑方法无法自适应数据不确定性，而生物声学数据常存在标注噪声，需利用模型不确定性指导学习以提高检测可靠性。
AI.method: 设计端到端变分贝叶斯ResNet架构，结合注意力机制与squeeze-and-excitation模块，传播隐藏方差并生成数据特定的不确定性感知标签平滑概率。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在野生动物叫声检测任务中显著提升模型预测准确性与校准效果，为大规模自动化注释提供可信方案。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模认识不确定性并指导损失计算，可有效提升模型性能，该方法为生物声学数据处理提供了新的不确定性驱动学习范式。

authors_text: Zhifeng Wang,Yao Yang,Chunyan Zeng,Shuai Kong,Shixiong Feng,Nan Zhao
title: Audio Tampering Detection Based on Shallow and Deep Feature Representation Learning
title_zh: 基于浅层和深层特征表示学习的音频篡改检测
abstract: Digital audio tampering detection can be used to verify the authenticity of digital audio. However, most current methods use standard electronic network frequency (ENF) databases for visual comparison analysis of ENF continuity of digital audio or perform feature extraction for classification by machine learning methods. ENF databases are usually tricky to obtain, visual methods have weak feature representation, and machine learning methods have more information loss in features, resulting in low detection accuracy. This paper proposes a fusion method of shallow and deep features to fully use ENF information by exploiting the complementary nature of features at different levels to more accurately describe the changes in inconsistency produced by tampering operations to raw digital audio. The method achieves 97.03% accuracy on three classic databases: Carioca 1, Carioca 2, and New Spanish. In addition, we have achieved an accuracy of 88.31% on the newly constructed database GAUDI-DI. Experimental results show that the proposed method is superior to the state-of-the-art method.
summary: Digital audio tampering detection can be used to verify the authenticity of digital audio. However, most current methods use standard electronic network frequency (ENF) databases for visual comparison analysis of ENF continuity of digital audio or perform feature extraction for classification by machine learning methods. ENF databases are usually tricky to obtain, visual methods have weak feature representation, and machine learning methods have more information loss in features, resulting in low detection accuracy. This paper proposes a fusion method of shallow and deep features to fully use ENF information by exploiting the complementary nature of features at different levels to more accurately describe the changes in inconsistency produced by tampering operations to raw digital audio. The method achieves 97.03% accuracy on three classic databases: Carioca 1, Carioca 2, and New Spanish. In addition, we have achieved an accuracy of 88.31% on the newly constructed database GAUDI-DI. Experimental results show that the proposed method is superior to the state-of-the-art method.
abstract_zh: 数字音频篡改检测可用于验证数字音频的真实性。然而，当前大多数方法使用标准电子网络频率（ENF）数据库对数字音频的ENF连续性进行视觉比较分析，或者通过机器学习方法进行特征提取以进行分类。 ENF数据库通常难以获取，视觉方法特征表示较弱，机器学习方法特征信息损失较多，导致检测精度较低。本文提出一种浅层特征和深层特征融合的方法，充分利用ENF信息，利用不同层次特征的互补性，更准确地描述原始数字音频篡改操作产生的不一致变化。该方法在 Carioca 1、Carioca 2 和 New Spanish 三个经典数据库上达到了 97.03% 的准确率。此外，我们在新建的数据库GAUDI-DI上取得了88.31%的准确率。实验结果表明，所提出的方法优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合浅层和深层特征表示学习的音频篡改检测方法，以提高检测准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖难以获取的ENF数据库或机器学习特征提取，存在信息丢失和特征表示能力弱的问题，导致检测精度较低。
AI.method: 通过融合浅层和深层特征，利用不同层次特征的互补性，更准确描述篡改操作引起的原始音频不一致性。
AI.result: 在Carioca 1、Carioca 2、New Spanish三个经典数据库上达到97.03%准确率，在新构建的GAUDI-DI数据库上达到88.31%准确率。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在实验结果上优于现有最先进的检测方法。
