search_text: Audio Tampering Detection Based on Shallow and Deep Feature Representation Learning 基于浅层和深层特征表示学习的音频篡改检测 Digital audio tampering detection can be used to verify the authenticity of digital audio. However, most current methods use standard electronic network frequency (ENF) databases for visual comparison analysis of ENF continuity of digital audio or perform feature extraction for classification by machine learning methods. ENF databases are usually tricky to obtain, visual methods have weak feature representation, and machine learning methods have more information loss in features, resulting in low detection accuracy. This paper proposes a fusion method of shallow and deep features to fully use ENF information by exploiting the complementary nature of features at different levels to more accurately describe the changes in inconsistency produced by tampering operations to raw digital audio. The method achieves 97.03% accuracy on three classic databases: Carioca 1, Carioca 2, and New Spanish. In addition, we have achieved an accuracy of 88.31% on the newly constructed database GAUDI-DI. Experimental results show that the proposed method is superior to the state-of-the-art method. 数字音频篡改检测可用于验证数字音频的真实性。然而，当前大多数方法使用标准电子网络频率（ENF）数据库对数字音频的ENF连续性进行视觉比较分析，或者通过机器学习方法进行特征提取以进行分类。 ENF数据库通常难以获取，视觉方法特征表示较弱，机器学习方法特征信息损失较多，导致检测精度较低。本文提出一种浅层特征和深层特征融合的方法，充分利用ENF信息，利用不同层次特征的互补性，更准确地描述原始数字音频篡改操作产生的不一致变化。该方法在 Carioca 1、Carioca 2 和 New Spanish 三个经典数据库上达到了 97.03% 的准确率。此外，我们在新建的数据库GAUDI-DI上取得了88.31%的准确率。实验结果表明，所提出的方法优于最先进的方法。 本文提出了一种结合浅层和深层特征表示学习的音频篡改检测方法，以提高检测准确性。 Zhifeng Wang,Yao Yang,Chunyan Zeng,Shuai Kong,Shixiong Feng,Nan Zhao cs.SD,eess.AS

title: ADPS: Asymmetric Distillation Post-Segmentation for Image Anomaly Detection
title_zh: ADPS：用于图像异常检测的非对称蒸馏后分割
abstract: Knowledge Distillation-based Anomaly Detection (KDAD) methods rely on the teacher-student paradigm to detect and segment anomalous regions by contrasting the unique features extracted by both networks. However, existing KDAD methods suffer from two main limitations: 1) the student network can effortlessly replicate the teacher network's representations, and 2) the features of the teacher network serve solely as a ``reference standard" and are not fully leveraged. Toward this end, we depart from the established paradigm and instead propose an innovative approach called Asymmetric Distillation Post-Segmentation (ADPS). Our ADPS employs an asymmetric distillation paradigm that takes distinct forms of the same image as the input of the teacher-student networks, driving the student network to learn discriminating representations for anomalous regions. Meanwhile, a customized Weight Mask Block (WMB) is proposed to generate a coarse anomaly localization mask that transfers the distilled knowledge acquired from the asymmetric paradigm to the teacher network. Equipped with WMB, the proposed Post-Segmentation Module (PSM) is able to effectively detect and segment abnormal regions with fine structures and clear boundaries. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed ADPS outperforms the state-of-the-art methods in detecting and segmenting anomalies. Surprisingly, ADPS significantly improves Average Precision (AP) metric by 9% and 20% on the MVTec AD and KolektorSDD2 datasets, respectively.
summary: Knowledge Distillation-based Anomaly Detection (KDAD) methods rely on the teacher-student paradigm to detect and segment anomalous regions by contrasting the unique features extracted by both networks. However, existing KDAD methods suffer from two main limitations: 1) the student network can effortlessly replicate the teacher network's representations, and 2) the features of the teacher network serve solely as a ``reference standard" and are not fully leveraged. Toward this end, we depart from the established paradigm and instead propose an innovative approach called Asymmetric Distillation Post-Segmentation (ADPS). Our ADPS employs an asymmetric distillation paradigm that takes distinct forms of the same image as the input of the teacher-student networks, driving the student network to learn discriminating representations for anomalous regions. Meanwhile, a customized Weight Mask Block (WMB) is proposed to generate a coarse anomaly localization mask that transfers the distilled knowledge acquired from the asymmetric paradigm to the teacher network. Equipped with WMB, the proposed Post-Segmentation Module (PSM) is able to effectively detect and segment abnormal regions with fine structures and clear boundaries. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed ADPS outperforms the state-of-the-art methods in detecting and segmenting anomalies. Surprisingly, ADPS significantly improves Average Precision (AP) metric by 9% and 20% on the MVTec AD and KolektorSDD2 datasets, respectively.
abstract_zh: 基于知识蒸馏的异常检测（KDAD）方法依靠师生范式，通过对比两个网络提取的独特特征来检测和分割异常区域。然而，现有的 KDAD 方法存在两个主要局限性：1）学生网络可以毫不费力地复制教师网络的表示，2）教师网络的特征仅作为“参考标准”而没有得到充分利用。为此，我们脱离了既定的范式，而是提出了一种称为非对称蒸馏后分割（ADPS）的创新方法。我们的 ADPS 采用了一种非对称蒸馏范式，该范式将同一图像的不同形式作为输入同时，提出了一种定制的权重掩模块（WMB）来生成粗略的异常定位掩模，将从非对称范式获得的蒸馏知识传输到教师网络。配备WMB的后分割模块（PSM）能够有效地检测和分割具有精细结构和清晰边界的异常区域。实验结果表明，所提出的ADPS优于传统的ADPS。令人惊讶的是，ADPS 在 MVTec AD 和 KolektorSDD2 数据集上的平均精度 (AP) 指标分别显着提高了 9% 和 20%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为ADPS的异步蒸馏后分割方法，用于改进图像异常检测中的知识蒸馏技术，解决现有方法在特征复制和利用上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有基于知识蒸馏的异常检测方法存在学生网络易复制教师网络特征、教师网络特征未被充分利用的缺陷，需通过创新方法提升检测与分割效果。
AI.method: 设计异步蒸馏范式，使教师和学生网络输入不同图像形式，并引入自定义权重掩码块（WMB）生成粗略异常定位掩码，将蒸馏知识反馈至教师网络，结合后分割模块（PSM）实现精细分割。
AI.result: 在MVTec AD和KolektorSDD2数据集上，ADPS的平均精度（AP）分别提升9%和20%，显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: ADPS通过异步蒸馏与权重掩码机制有效解决了知识蒸馏中的特征复制问题，实现了更精准的异常检测与分割。

title: Efficient, probabilistic analysis of combinatorial neural codes
title_zh: 组合神经代码的高效概率分析
abstract: Artificial and biological neural networks (ANNs and BNNs) can encode inputs in the form of combinations of individual neurons' activities. These combinatorial neural codes present a computational challenge for direct and efficient analysis due to their high dimensionality and often large volumes of data. Here we improve the computational complexity -- from factorial to quadratic time -- of direct algebraic methods previously applied to small examples and apply them to large neural codes generated by experiments. These methods provide a novel and efficient way of probing algebraic, geometric, and topological characteristics of combinatorial neural codes and provide insights into how such characteristics are related to learning and experience in neural networks. We introduce a procedure to perform hypothesis testing on the intrinsic features of neural codes using information geometry. We then apply these methods to neural activities from an ANN for image classification and a BNN for 2D navigation to, without observing any inputs or outputs, estimate the structure and dimensionality of the stimulus or task space. Additionally, we demonstrate how an ANN varies its internal representations across network depth and during learning.
summary: Artificial and biological neural networks (ANNs and BNNs) can encode inputs in the form of combinations of individual neurons' activities. These combinatorial neural codes present a computational challenge for direct and efficient analysis due to their high dimensionality and often large volumes of data. Here we improve the computational complexity -- from factorial to quadratic time -- of direct algebraic methods previously applied to small examples and apply them to large neural codes generated by experiments. These methods provide a novel and efficient way of probing algebraic, geometric, and topological characteristics of combinatorial neural codes and provide insights into how such characteristics are related to learning and experience in neural networks. We introduce a procedure to perform hypothesis testing on the intrinsic features of neural codes using information geometry. We then apply these methods to neural activities from an ANN for image classification and a BNN for 2D navigation to, without observing any inputs or outputs, estimate the structure and dimensionality of the stimulus or task space. Additionally, we demonstrate how an ANN varies its internal representations across network depth and during learning.
abstract_zh: 人工和生物神经网络（ANN 和 BNN）可以以单个神经元活动组合的形式对输入进行编码。这些组合神经代码由于其高维性和通常大量的数据而对直接有效的分析提出了计算挑战。在这里，我们改进了先前应用于小示例的直接代数方法的计算复杂性（从阶乘时间到二次时间），并将它们应用于实验生成的大型神经代码。这些方法提供了一种新颖且有效的方法来探测组合神经代码的代数、几何和拓扑特征，并提供了对这些特征如何与神经网络中的学习和经验相关的见解。我们介绍了一种使用信息几何对神经代码的内在特征进行假设检验的过程。然后，我们将这些方法应用于用于图像分类的 ANN 和用于 2D 导航的 BNN 的神经活动，在不观察任何输入或输出的情况下，估计刺激或任务空间的结构和维度。此外，我们还演示了人工神经网络如何在网络深度和学习过程中改变其内部表示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效方法，通过降低计算复杂度来分析组合神经码的代数、几何和拓扑特性，并应用于人工和生物神经网络。
AI.motivation: 组合神经码因高维数据和大数据量导致传统分析方法效率低下，需开发更高效的计算工具以揭示其与学习和经验的关联。
AI.method: 改进直接代数方法的计算复杂度（从阶乘级到二次级），结合信息几何进行假设检验，无需输入输出即可分析神经码结构。
AI.result: 成功应用于图像分类ANN和二维导航BNN，估计了刺激/任务空间的维度，并展示了ANN内部表征随深度和学习的变化。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为解析神经码的数学特性提供了新途径，深化了对神经网络结构及学习机制的理解。

Here we improve the computational complexity -- from factorial to quadratic time -- of direct algebraic methods previously applied to small examples and apply them to large neural codes generated by experiments. These methods provide a novel and efficient way of probing algebraic, geometric, and topological characteristics of combinatorial neural codes and provide insights into how such characteristics are related to learning and experience in neural networks. We introduce a procedure to perform hypothesis testing on the intrinsic features of neural codes using information geometry. We then apply these methods to neural activities from an ANN for image classification and a BNN for 2D navigation to, without observing any inputs or outputs, estimate the structure and dimensionality of the stimulus or task space. Additionally, we demonstrate how an ANN varies its internal representations across network depth and during learning. 人工和生物神经网络（ANN 和 BNN）可以以单个神经元活动组合的形式对输入进行编码。这些组合神经代码由于其高维性和通常大量的数据而对直接有效的分析提出了计算挑战。在这里，我们改进了先前应用于小示例的直接代数方法的计算复杂性（从阶乘时间到二次时间），并将它们应用于实验生成的大型神经代码。这些方法提供了一种新颖且有效的方法来探测组合神经代码的代数、几何和拓扑特征，并提供了对这些特征如何与神经网络中的学习和经验相关的见解。我们介绍了一种使用信息几何对神经代码的内在特征进行假设检验的过程。然后，我们将这些方法应用于用于图像分类的 ANN 和用于 2D 导航的 BNN 的神经活动，在不观察任何输入或输出的情况下，估计刺激或任务空间的结构和维度。此外，我们还演示了人工神经网络如何在网络深度和学习过程中改变其内部表示。 本文提出了一种高效方法，通过降低计算复杂度来分析组合神经码的代数、几何和拓扑特性，并应用于人工和生物神经网络。 Thomas F Burns,Irwansyah cs.NE,q-bio.NC

authors_text: Ali Tourani,Hriday Bavle,Jose Luis Sanchez-Lopez,Holger Voos
title: Visual SLAM: What are the Current Trends and What to Expect?
title_zh: 视觉 SLAM：当前趋势是什么以及预期是什么？
abstract: Vision-based sensors have shown significant performance, accuracy, and efficiency gain in Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) systems in recent years. In this regard, Visual Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (VSLAM) methods refer to the SLAM approaches that employ cameras for pose estimation and map generation. We can see many research works that demonstrated VSLAMs can outperform traditional methods, which rely only on a particular sensor, such as a Lidar, even with lower costs. VSLAM approaches utilize different camera types (e.g., monocular, stereo, and RGB-D), have been tested on various datasets (e.g., KITTI, TUM RGB-D, and EuRoC) and in dissimilar environments (e.g., indoors and outdoors), and employ multiple algorithms and methodologies to have a better understanding of the environment. The mentioned variations have made this topic popular for researchers and resulted in a wide range of VSLAMs methodologies. In this regard, the primary intent of this survey is to present the recent advances in VSLAM systems, along with discussing the existing challenges and trends. We have given an in-depth literature survey of forty-five impactful papers published in the domain of VSLAMs. We have classified these manuscripts by different characteristics, including the novelty domain, objectives, employed algorithms, and semantic level. We also discuss the current trends and future directions that may help researchers investigate them.

The mentioned variations have made this topic popular for researchers and resulted in a wide range of VSLAMs methodologies. In this regard, the primary intent of this survey is to present the recent advances in VSLAM systems, along with discussing the existing challenges and trends. We have given an in-depth literature survey of forty-five impactful papers published in the domain of VSLAMs. We have classified these manuscripts by different characteristics, including the novelty domain, objectives, employed algorithms, and semantic level. We also discuss the current trends and future directions that may help researchers investigate them.
abstract_zh: 近年来，基于视觉的传感器在同步定位与建图 (SLAM) 系统中显示出显着的性能、准确性和效率提升。在这方面，视觉同步定位与建图（VSLAM）方法是指使用相机进行姿态估计和地图生成的SLAM方法。我们可以看到许多研究工作表明，VSLAM 的性能优于仅依赖特定传感器（例如激光雷达）的传统方法，而且成本更低。 VSLAM 方法利用不同的相机类型（例如单目、立体和 RGB-D），已在各种数据集（例如 KITTI、TUM RGB-D 和 EuRoC）和不同的环境（例如室内和室外）中进行了测试，并采用多种算法和方法来更好地了解环境。上述变化使该主题受到研究人员的欢迎，并产生了广泛的 VSLAM 方法。在这方面，本次调查的主要目的是展示 VSLAM 系统的最新进展，并讨论现有的挑战和趋势。我们对 VSLAM 领域发表的 45 篇有影响力的论文进行了深入的文献调查。我们根据不同的特征对这些手稿进行了分类，包括新颖性领域、目标、采用的算法和语义级别。我们还讨论了可能有助于研究人员进行研究的当前趋势和未来方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了视觉SLAM（VSLAM）领域的最新进展，讨论了现有挑战与未来趋势。
AI.motivation: 传统SLAM方法依赖单一传感器（如激光雷达）存在成本高、适应性差等问题，而VSLAM通过摄像头实现更优性能与成本效益，亟需系统性总结其研究现状与发展方向。
AI.method: 通过分析45篇关键文献，按创新领域、目标、算法类型及语义层级对VSLAM方法进行分类，并结合多场景测试数据（如KITTI、TUM RGB-D）探讨技术演进与挑战。
AI.result: 明确了VSLAM在算法优化、多传感器融合及语义理解方面的核心趋势，指出现有方法在动态环境鲁棒性、计算效率及跨场景泛化能力上的不足。
AI.conclusion: VSLAM研究需进一步突破实时性与精度平衡，并结合人工智能提升环境语义感知能力，未来可能向轻量化与多模态融合方向发展。

title: A Robust Pedestrian Detection Approach for Autonomous Vehicles
title_zh: 适用于自动驾驶汽车的稳健行人检测方法
abstract: Nowadays, utilizing Advanced Driver-Assistance Systems (ADAS) has absorbed a huge interest as a potential solution for reducing road traffic issues. Despite recent technological advances in such systems, there are still many inquiries that need to be overcome. For instance, ADAS requires accurate and real-time detection of pedestrians in various driving scenarios. To solve the mentioned problem, this paper aims to fine-tune the YOLOv5s framework for handling pedestrian detection challenges on the real-world instances of Caltech pedestrian dataset. We also introduce a developed toolbox for preparing training and test data and annotations of Caltech pedestrian dataset into the format recognizable by YOLOv5. Experimental results of utilizing our approach show that the mean Average Precision (mAP) of our fine-tuned model for pedestrian detection task is more than 91 percent when performing at the highest rate of 70 FPS. Moreover, the experiments on the Caltech pedestrian dataset samples have verified that our proposed approach is an effective and accurate method for pedestrian detection and can outperform other existing methodologies.
summary: Nowadays, utilizing Advanced Driver-Assistance Systems (ADAS) has absorbed a huge interest as a potential solution for reducing road traffic issues. Despite recent technological advances in such systems, there are still many inquiries that need to be overcome. For instance, ADAS requires accurate and real-time detection of pedestrians in various driving scenarios. To solve the mentioned problem, this paper aims to fine-tune the YOLOv5s framework for handling pedestrian detection challenges on the real-world instances of Caltech pedestrian dataset. We also introduce a developed toolbox for preparing training and test data and annotations of Caltech pedestrian dataset into the format recognizable by YOLOv5. Experimental results of utilizing our approach show that the mean Average Precision (mAP) of our fine-tuned model for pedestrian detection task is more than 91 percent when performing at the highest rate of 70 FPS. Moreover, the experiments on the Caltech pedestrian dataset samples have verified that our proposed approach is an effective and accurate method for pedestrian detection and can outperform other existing methodologies.
abstract_zh: 如今，先进驾驶辅助系统 (ADAS) 作为减少道路交通问题的潜在解决方案引起了人们的极大兴趣。尽管此类系统最近取得了技术进步，但仍有许多问题需要解决。例如，ADAS需要在各种驾驶场景下准确、实时地检测行人。为了解决上述问题，本文旨在微调 YOLOv5s 框架，以处理加州理工学院行人数据集的真实实例上的行人检测挑战。我们还引入了一个开发的工具箱，用于将加州理工学院行人数据集的训练和测试数据以及注释准备为 YOLOv5 可识别的格式。利用我们的方法的实验结果表明，当以 70 FPS 的最高速率执行时，我们的行人检测任务微调模型的平均精度 (mAP) 超过 91%。此外，在加州理工学院行人数据集样本上的实验验证了我们提出的方法是一种有效且准确的行人检测方法，并且可以优于其他现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过改进YOLOv5s框架，提升自动驾驶车辆在复杂场景下的行人检测准确率和实时性。
AI.motivation: 现有ADAS系统在行人检测中存在准确性不足和实时性欠佳的问题，需解决多变驾驶场景下的检测挑战。
AI.method: 对YOLOv5s模型进行微调，并开发数据处理工具箱将Caltech数据集适配至YOLOv5框架。
AI.result: 优化后的模型在Caltech数据集上达到91%+的mAP，且保持70 FPS的实时检测速度，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了行人检测的准确率与效率，为自动驾驶安全提供了可靠的技术支持。

authors_text: Abhra Chaudhuri,Massimiliano Mancini,Yanbei Chen,Zeynep Akata,Anjan Dutta
title: Cross-Modal Fusion Distillation for Fine-Grained Sketch-Based Image Retrieval
title_zh: 用于基于草图的细粒度图像检索的跨模态融合蒸馏
abstract: Representation learning for sketch-based image retrieval has mostly been tackled by learning embeddings that discard modality-specific information. As instances from different modalities can often provide complementary information describing the underlying concept, we propose a cross-attention framework for Vision Transformers (XModalViT) that fuses modality-specific information instead of discarding them. Our framework first maps paired datapoints from the individual photo and sketch modalities to fused representations that unify information from both modalities. We then decouple the input space of the aforementioned modality fusion network into independent encoders of the individual modalities via contrastive and relational cross-modal knowledge distillation. Such encoders can then be applied to downstream tasks like cross-modal retrieval. We demonstrate the expressive capacity of the learned representations by performing a wide range of experiments and achieving state-of-the-art results on three fine-grained sketch-based image retrieval benchmarks: Shoe-V2, Chair-V2 and Sketchy. Implementation is available at https://github.com/abhrac/xmodal-vit.
summary: Representation learning for sketch-based image retrieval has mostly been tackled by learning embeddings that discard modality-specific information. As instances from different modalities can often provide complementary information describing the underlying concept, we propose a cross-attention framework for Vision Transformers (XModalViT) that fuses modality-specific information instead of discarding them. Our framework first maps paired datapoints from the individual photo and sketch modalities to fused representations that unify information from both modalities. We then decouple the input space of the aforementioned modality fusion network into independent encoders of the individual modalities via contrastive and relational cross-modal knowledge distillation. Such encoders can then be applied to downstream tasks like cross-modal retrieval. We demonstrate the expressive capacity of the learned representations by performing a wide range of experiments and achieving state-of-the-art results on three fine-grained sketch-based image retrieval benchmarks: Shoe-V2, Chair-V2 and Sketchy. Implementation is available at https://github.com/abhrac/xmodal-vit.
abstract_zh: 基于草图的图像检索的表示学习主要是通过学习丢弃特定于模态信息的嵌入来解决的。由于来自不同模态的实例通常可以提供描述基本概念的补充信息，因此我们提出了一种视觉变换器（XModalViT）的交叉注意框架，该框架融合特定于模态的信息而不是丢弃它们。我们的框架首先将来自单个照片和草图模式的配对数据点映射到统一来自两种模式的信息的融合表示。然后，我们通过对比和关系跨模态知识蒸馏将上述模态融合网络的输入空间解耦为各个模态的独立编码器。然后，此类编码器可以应用于下游任务，例如跨模式检索。我们通过进行广泛的实验并在三个基于细粒度草图的图像检索基准（Shoe-V2、Chair-V2 和 Sketchy）上取得最先进的结果，展示了学习到的表示的表达能力。可以在 https://github.com/abhrac/xmodal-vit 进行实施。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种跨模态融合蒸馏框架XModalViT，用于细粒度草图图像检索，通过融合图像和草图的模态特定信息提升检索效果。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在学习嵌入时丢弃模态特定信息，导致信息损失，而不同模态可能包含互补信息，需有效融合以提升检索性能。
AI.method: 提出XModalViT框架，通过跨注意力机制融合图像与草图的模态信息，并利用对比和关系跨模态知识蒸馏解耦为独立编码器，用于下游检索任务。
AI.result: 在Shoe-V2、Chair-V2和Sketchy三个基准上达到SOTA结果，证明了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过有效融合跨模态信息，XModalViT提升了细粒度草图图像检索性能，展示了跨模态知识蒸馏在多模态任务中的潜力。

search_text: Cross-Modal Fusion Distillation for Fine-Grained Sketch-Based Image Retrieval 用于基于草图的细粒度图像检索的跨模态融合蒸馏 Representation learning for sketch-based image retrieval has mostly been tackled by learning embeddings that discard modality-specific information. As instances from different modalities can often provide complementary information describing the underlying concept, we propose a cross-attention framework for Vision Transformers (XModalViT) that fuses modality-specific information instead of discarding them. Our framework first maps paired datapoints from the individual photo and sketch modalities to fused representations that unify information from both modalities. We then decouple the input space of the aforementioned modality fusion network into independent encoders of the individual modalities via contrastive and relational cross-modal knowledge distillation. Such encoders can then be applied to downstream tasks like cross-modal retrieval. We demonstrate the expressive capacity of the learned representations by performing a wide range of experiments and achieving state-of-the-art results on three fine-grained sketch-based image retrieval benchmarks: Shoe-V2, Chair-V2 and Sketchy. Implementation is available at https://github.com/abhrac/xmodal-vit. 基于草图的图像检索的表示学习主要是通过学习丢弃特定于模态信息的嵌入来解决的。由于来自不同模态的实例通常可以提供描述基本概念的补充信息，因此我们提出了一种视觉变换器（XModalViT）的交叉注意框架，该框架融合特定于模态的信息而不是丢弃它们。我们的框架首先将来自单个照片和草图模式的配对数据点映射到统一来自两种模式的信息的融合表示。然后，我们通过对比和关系跨模态知识蒸馏将上述模态融合网络的输入空间解耦为各个模态的独立编码器。然后，此类编码器可以应用于下游任务，例如跨模式检索。我们通过进行广泛的实验并在三个基于细粒度草图的图像检索基准（Shoe-V2、Chair-V2 和 Sketchy）上取得最先进的结果，展示了学习到的表示的表达能力。可以在 https://github.com/abhrac/xmodal-vit 进行实施。 本文提出了一种跨模态融合蒸馏框架XModalViT，用于细粒度草图图像检索，通过融合图像和草图的模态特定信息提升检索效果。 Abhra Chaudhuri,Massimiliano Mancini,Yanbei Chen,Zeynep Akata,Anjan Dutta cs.CV,cs.LG

title: RLM-Tracking: Online Multi-Pedestrian Tracking Supported by Relative Location Mapping
title_zh: RLM-Tracking：相对位置映射支持的在线多人跟踪
abstract: The problem of multi-object tracking is a fundamental computer vision research focus, widely used in public safety, transport, autonomous vehicles, robotics, and other regions involving artificial intelligence. Because of the complexity of natural scenes, object occlusion and semi-occlusion usually occur in fundamental tracking tasks. These can easily lead to ID switching, object loss, detect errors, and misaligned limitation boxes. These conditions have a significant impact on the precision of multi-object tracking. In this paper, we design a new multi-object tracker for the above issues that contains an object \textbf{Relative Location Mapping} (RLM) model and \textbf{Target Region Density} (TRD) model. The new tracker is more sensitive to the differences in position relationships between objects. It can introduce low-score detection frames into different regions in real-time according to the density of object regions in the video. This improves the accuracy of object tracking without consuming extensive arithmetic resources. Our study shows that the proposed model has considerably enhanced the HOTA and DF1 measurements on the MOT17 and MOT20 data sets when applied to the advanced MOT method.
summary: The problem of multi-object tracking is a fundamental computer vision research focus, widely used in public safety, transport, autonomous vehicles, robotics, and other regions involving artificial intelligence. Because of the complexity of natural scenes, object occlusion and semi-occlusion usually occur in fundamental tracking tasks. These can easily lead to ID switching, object loss, detect errors, and misaligned limitation boxes. These conditions have a significant impact on the precision of multi-object tracking. In this paper, we design a new multi-object tracker for the above issues that contains an object \textbf{Relative Location Mapping} (RLM) model and \textbf{Target Region Density} (TRD) model. The new tracker is more sensitive to the differences in position relationships between objects. It can introduce low-score detection frames into different regions in real-time according to the density of object regions in the video. This improves the accuracy of object tracking without consuming extensive arithmetic resources. Our study shows that the proposed model has considerably enhanced the HOTA and DF1 measurements on the MOT17 and MOT20 data sets when applied to the advanced MOT method.
abstract_zh: 多目标跟踪问题是计算机视觉的一个基础研究热点，广泛应用于公共安全、交通、自动驾驶汽车、机器人和其他涉及人工智能的领域。由于自然场景的复杂性，在基本跟踪任务中通常会出现对象遮挡和半遮挡。这些很容易导致 ID 切换、对象丢失、检测错误和限制框未对齐。这些条件对多目标跟踪的精度有显着影响。在本文中，我们针对上述问题设计了一种新的多目标跟踪器，其中包含对象相对位置映射（RLM）模型和目标区域密度（TRD）模型。新的跟踪器对物体之间位置关系的差异更加敏感。它可以根据视频中物体区域的密度，实时将低分检测帧引入到不同的区域。这提高了对象跟踪的准确性，而无需消耗大量的算术资源。我们的研究表明，当应用于先进的 MOT 方法时，所提出的模型大大增强了 MOT17 和 MOT20 数据集上的 HOTA 和 DF1 测量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于相对位置映射（RLM）和目标区域密度（TRD）模型的在线多行人跟踪方法，以解决复杂场景下的遮挡和ID切换问题。
AI.motivation: 现有跟踪方法在自然场景中因遮挡和半遮挡导致ID切换、目标丢失和检测误差，影响跟踪精度，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计包含相对位置映射（RLM）模型和目标区域密度（TRD）模型的跟踪器，通过实时分析物体位置关系差异及区域密度，动态分配低分检测帧以提升精度。
AI.result: 在MOT17和MOT20数据集上，所提模型显著提升了HOTA和DF1指标，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: RLM-Tracking通过结合相对位置关系与区域密度分析，在不增加计算资源消耗的情况下有效提升了多目标跟踪的准确性。

authors_text: Germán Mora Martín,Stirling Scholes,Alice Ruget,Robert K. Henderson,Jonathan Leach,Istvan Gyongy
title: Video super-resolution for single-photon LIDAR
title_zh: 单光子激光雷达的视频超分辨率
abstract: 3D Time-of-Flight (ToF) image sensors are used widely in applications such as self-driving cars, Augmented Reality (AR) and robotics. When implemented with Single-Photon Avalanche Diodes (SPADs), compact, array format sensors can be made that offer accurate depth maps over long distances, without the need for mechanical scanning. However, array sizes tend to be small, leading to low lateral resolution, which combined with low Signal-to-Noise Ratio (SNR) levels under high ambient illumination, may lead to difficulties in scene interpretation. In this paper, we use synthetic depth sequences to train a 3D Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) for denoising and upscaling (x4) depth data. Experimental results, based on synthetic as well as real ToF data, are used to demonstrate the effectiveness of the scheme. With GPU acceleration, frames are processed at >30 frames per second, making the approach suitable for low-latency imaging, as required for obstacle avoidance.
summary: 3D Time-of-Flight (ToF) image sensors are used widely in applications such as self-driving cars, Augmented Reality (AR) and robotics. When implemented with Single-Photon Avalanche Diodes (SPADs), compact, array format sensors can be made that offer accurate depth maps over long distances, without the need for mechanical scanning. However, array sizes tend to be small, leading to low lateral resolution, which combined with low Signal-to-Noise Ratio (SNR) levels under high ambient illumination, may lead to difficulties in scene interpretation. In this paper, we use synthetic depth sequences to train a 3D Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) for denoising and upscaling (x4) depth data. Experimental results, based on synthetic as well as real ToF data, are used to demonstrate the effectiveness of the scheme. With GPU acceleration, frames are processed at >30 frames per second, making the approach suitable for low-latency imaging, as required for obstacle avoidance.
abstract_zh: 3D 飞行时间 (ToF) 图像传感器广泛用于自动驾驶汽车、增强现实 (AR) 和机器人等应用。当使用单光子雪崩二极管 (SPAD) 实现时，可以制造紧凑的阵列格式传感器，无需机械扫描即可提供长距离的精确深度图。然而，阵列尺寸往往较小，导致横向分辨率较低，再加上高环境照明下的低信噪比（SNR）水平，可能会导致场景解释困难。在本文中，我们使用合成深度序列来训练 3D 卷积神经网络 (CNN)，以对深度数据进行去噪和放大 (x4)。基于合成和真实 ToF 数据的实验结果用于证明该方案的有效性。通过 GPU 加速，帧处理速度 > 30 帧/秒，使得该方法适合低延迟成像，满足避障所需。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用3D卷积神经网络对单光子LiDAR的深度图像进行去噪和超分辨率处理，以提升横向分辨率和信噪比。
AI.motivation: 单光子LiDAR传感器因阵列尺寸小和高环境光下信噪比低，导致深度图像分辨率不足，影响场景理解与障碍物识别。
AI.method: 基于合成深度序列训练3D CNN模型，实现深度数据的去噪与4倍超分辨率重建，并通过GPU加速实现实时处理。
AI.result: 实验表明方法在合成与真实ToF数据上均有效，处理速度超30fps，满足低延迟成像需求。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著提升单光子LiDAR深度图像质量，适用于自动驾驶等需要实时高精度环境感知的场景。

ai_content.conclusion: 该方法显著提升单光子LiDAR深度图像质量，适用于自动驾驶等需要实时高精度环境感知的场景。

ai_content_json.method: 基于合成深度序列训练3D CNN模型，实现深度数据的去噪与4倍超分辨率重建，并通过GPU加速实现实时处理。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 该方法显著提升单光子LiDAR深度图像质量，适用于自动驾驶等需要实时高精度环境感知的场景。

search_text: Video super-resolution for single-photon LIDAR 单光子激光雷达的视频超分辨率 3D Time-of-Flight (ToF) image sensors are used widely in applications such as self-driving cars, Augmented Reality (AR) and robotics. When implemented with Single-Photon Avalanche Diodes (SPADs), compact, array format sensors can be made that offer accurate depth maps over long distances, without the need for mechanical scanning. However, array sizes tend to be small, leading to low lateral resolution, which combined with low Signal-to-Noise Ratio (SNR) levels under high ambient illumination, may lead to difficulties in scene interpretation. In this paper, we use synthetic depth sequences to train a 3D Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) for denoising and upscaling (x4) depth data. Experimental results, based on synthetic as well as real ToF data, are used to demonstrate the effectiveness of the scheme. With GPU acceleration, frames are processed at >30 frames per second, making the approach suitable for low-latency imaging, as required for obstacle avoidance. 3D 飞行时间 (ToF) 图像传感器广泛用于自动驾驶汽车、增强现实 (AR) 和机器人等应用。当使用单光子雪崩二极管 (SPAD) 实现时，可以制造紧凑的阵列格式传感器，无需机械扫描即可提供长距离的精确深度图。然而，阵列尺寸往往较小，导致横向分辨率较低，再加上高环境照明下的低信噪比（SNR）水平，可能会导致场景解释困难。在本文中，我们使用合成深度序列来训练 3D 卷积神经网络 (CNN)，以对深度数据进行去噪和放大 (x4)。基于合成和真实 ToF 数据的实验结果用于证明该方案的有效性。通过 GPU 加速，帧处理速度 > 30 帧/秒，使得该方法适合低延迟成像，满足避障所需。 本文提出使用3D卷积神经网络对单光子LiDAR的深度图像进行去噪和超分辨率处理，以提升横向分辨率和信噪比。 Germán Mora Martín,Stirling Scholes,Alice Ruget,Robert K. Henderson,Jonathan Leach,Istvan Gyongy eess.IV,cs.CV,physics.optics

authors_text: Felix Rosberg,Eren Erdal Aksoy,Fernando Alonso-Fernandez,Cristofer Englund
title: FaceDancer: Pose- and Occlusion-Aware High Fidelity Face Swapping
title_zh: FaceDancer：姿势和遮挡感知的高保真脸部交换
comment: Fixed the supplementary material layout in the end (past references). Added link to video results, which is mentioned in Results but was missing in the supplementary material
comments: Fixed the supplementary material layout in the end (past references). Added link to video results, which is mentioned in Results but was missing in the supplementary material
abstract: In this work, we present a new single-stage method for subject agnostic face swapping and identity transfer, named FaceDancer. We have two major contributions: Adaptive Feature Fusion Attention (AFFA) and Interpreted Feature Similarity Regularization (IFSR). The AFFA module is embedded in the decoder and adaptively learns to fuse attribute features and features conditioned on identity information without requiring any additional facial segmentation process. In IFSR, we leverage the intermediate features in an identity encoder to preserve important attributes such as head pose, facial expression, lighting, and occlusion in the target face, while still transferring the identity of the source face with high fidelity. We conduct extensive quantitative and qualitative experiments on various datasets and show that the proposed FaceDancer outperforms other state-of-the-art networks in terms of identityn transfer, while having significantly better pose preservation than most of the previous methods.
summary: In this work, we present a new single-stage method for subject agnostic face swapping and identity transfer, named FaceDancer. We have two major contributions: Adaptive Feature Fusion Attention (AFFA) and Interpreted Feature Similarity Regularization (IFSR). The AFFA module is embedded in the decoder and adaptively learns to fuse attribute features and features conditioned on identity information without requiring any additional facial segmentation process. In IFSR, we leverage the intermediate features in an identity encoder to preserve important attributes such as head pose, facial expression, lighting, and occlusion in the target face, while still transferring the identity of the source face with high fidelity. We conduct extensive quantitative and qualitative experiments on various datasets and show that the proposed FaceDancer outperforms other state-of-the-art networks in terms of identityn transfer, while having significantly better pose preservation than most of the previous methods.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的单阶段方法，用于与主体无关的面部交换和身份转移，名为 FaceDancer。我们有两个主要贡献：自适应特征融合注意力（AFFA）和解释特征相似性正则化（IFSR）。 AFFA 模块嵌入在解码器中，自适应地学习融合属性特征和以身份信息为条件的特征，而不需要任何额外的面部分割过程。在 IFSR 中，我们利用身份编码器中的中间特征来保留目标面部的重要属性，例如头部姿势、面部表情、光照和遮挡，同时仍然以高保真度传输源面部的身份。我们对各种数据集进行了广泛的定量和定性实验，结果表明，所提出的 FaceDancer 在身份转移方面优于其他最先进的网络，同时比大多数以前的方法具有更好的姿势保留。

AI.tldr: 提出一种单阶段高保真换脸方法FaceDancer，解决姿态和遮挡问题，实现身份转移。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在姿态保持和遮挡处理上存在不足，需提升换脸真实性和准确性。
AI.method: 提出自适应特征融合注意力（AFFA）和解释性特征相似性正则化（IFSR），分别用于特征融合和保留目标面部属性。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上，FaceDancer在身份转移和姿态保持上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: FaceDancer通过创新模块有效提升换脸质量，尤其在姿态和遮挡处理上表现突出。

authors_text: Chengqian Gao,Ke Xu,Liu Liu,Deheng Ye,Peilin Zhao,Zhiqiang Xu
title: Robust Offline Reinforcement Learning with Gradient Penalty and Constraint Relaxation
title_zh: 具有梯度惩罚和约束松弛的鲁棒离线强化学习
abstract: A promising paradigm for offline reinforcement learning (RL) is to constrain the learned policy to stay close to the dataset behaviors, known as policy constraint offline RL. However, existing works heavily rely on the purity of the data, exhibiting performance degradation or even catastrophic failure when learning from contaminated datasets containing impure trajectories of diverse levels. e.g., expert level, medium level, etc., while offline contaminated data logs exist commonly in the real world. To mitigate this, we first introduce gradient penalty over the learned value function to tackle the exploding Q-functions. We then relax the closeness constraints towards non-optimal actions with critic weighted constraint relaxation. Experimental results show that the proposed techniques effectively tame the non-optimal trajectories for policy constraint offline RL methods, evaluated on a set of contaminated D4RL Mujoco and Adroit datasets.
summary: A promising paradigm for offline reinforcement learning (RL) is to constrain the learned policy to stay close to the dataset behaviors, known as policy constraint offline RL. However, existing works heavily rely on the purity of the data, exhibiting performance degradation or even catastrophic failure when learning from contaminated datasets containing impure trajectories of diverse levels. e.g., expert level, medium level, etc., while offline contaminated data logs exist commonly in the real world. To mitigate this, we first introduce gradient penalty over the learned value function to tackle the exploding Q-functions. We then relax the closeness constraints towards non-optimal actions with critic weighted constraint relaxation. Experimental results show that the proposed techniques effectively tame the non-optimal trajectories for policy constraint offline RL methods, evaluated on a set of contaminated D4RL Mujoco and Adroit datasets.
abstract_zh: 离线强化学习 (RL) 的一个有前途的范例是限制学习策略以接近数据集行为，称为策略约束离线 RL。然而，现有的工作严重依赖于数据的纯度，当从包含不同级别的不纯轨迹的污染数据集中学习时，会表现出性能下降甚至灾难性的失败。例如，专家级、中等级等，而离线污染数据日志在现实世界中普遍存在。为了缓解这个问题，我们首先在学习的值函数上引入梯度惩罚来解决 Q 函数爆炸问题。然后，我们通过评论家加权约束放松来放松对非最优行为的紧密度约束。实验结果表明，所提出的技术有效地驯服了策略约束离线 RL 方法的非最优轨迹，并在一组受污染的 D4RL Mujoco 和 Adroit 数据集上进行了评估。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决离线强化学习中受污染数据集导致的性能退化问题，提出梯度惩罚与约束松弛方法以提升鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有离线RL方法依赖数据纯净度，但现实数据常含污染轨迹，导致性能下降或失败，需提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: 引入价值函数梯度惩罚抑制Q函数爆炸，并采用批评者加权约束松弛放宽对非最优动作的限制。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提方法在受污染的D4RL Mujoco和Adroit数据集上有效抑制非最优轨迹，提升政策约束离线RL性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过梯度惩罚与约束松弛有效应对污染数据，为离线RL在现实场景中的应用提供鲁棒性保障。

title: Estimating the coverage in 3d reconstructions of the colon from colonoscopy videos
title_zh: 根据结肠镜检查视频估计结肠 3D 重建的覆盖范围
comment: Accepted at Imaging Systems for GI Endoscopy workshop, the 25th International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention - MICCAI 2022 ISGIE
comments: Accepted at Imaging Systems for GI Endoscopy workshop, the 25th International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention - MICCAI 2022 ISGIE
abstract: Colonoscopy is the most common procedure for early detection and removal of polyps, a critical component of colorectal cancer prevention. Insufficient visual coverage of the colon surface during the procedure often results in missed polyps. To mitigate this issue, reconstructing the 3D surfaces of the colon in order to visualize the missing regions has been proposed. However, robustly estimating the local and global coverage from such a reconstruction has not been thoroughly investigated until now. In this work, we present a new method to estimate the coverage from a reconstructed colon pointcloud. Our method splits a reconstructed colon into segments and estimates the coverage of each segment by estimating the area of the missing surfaces. We achieve a mean absolute coverage error of 3-6\% on colon segments generated from synthetic colonoscopy data and real colonography CT scans. In addition, we show good qualitative results on colon segments reconstructed from real colonoscopy videos.
summary: Colonoscopy is the most common procedure for early detection and removal of polyps, a critical component of colorectal cancer prevention. Insufficient visual coverage of the colon surface during the procedure often results in missed polyps. To mitigate this issue, reconstructing the 3D surfaces of the colon in order to visualize the missing regions has been proposed. However, robustly estimating the local and global coverage from such a reconstruction has not been thoroughly investigated until now. In this work, we present a new method to estimate the coverage from a reconstructed colon pointcloud. Our method splits a reconstructed colon into segments and estimates the coverage of each segment by estimating the area of the missing surfaces. We achieve a mean absolute coverage error of 3-6\% on colon segments generated from synthetic colonoscopy data and real colonography CT scans. In addition, we show good qualitative results on colon segments reconstructed from real colonoscopy videos.
abstract_zh: 结肠镜检查是早期发现和切除息肉的最常见手术，息肉是预防结直肠癌的重要组成部分。手术过程中结肠表面的视觉覆盖不足通常会导致漏掉息肉。为了缓解这个问题，有人提出重建结肠的 3D 表面以可视化缺失的区域。然而，迄今为止，尚未对这种重建的本地和全球覆盖范围进行稳健估计。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新方法来估计重建的结肠点云的覆盖范围。我们的方法将重建的结肠分成多个片段，并通过估计缺失表面的面积来估计每个片段的覆盖范围。我们对合成结肠镜检查数据和真实结肠造影 CT 扫描生成的结肠段实现了 3-6% 的平均绝对覆盖误差。此外，我们对根据真实结肠镜检查视频重建的结肠段显示出良好的定性结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从结肠镜视频的3D重建中估计结肠表面覆盖范围的新方法。
AI.motivation: 结肠镜检查中视觉覆盖不足可能导致息肉遗漏，而现有方法未能有效评估3D重建的覆盖范围。
AI.method: 将重建的结肠分割为多个片段，通过计算缺失表面面积估计各片段覆盖范围。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实CT扫描生成的结肠片段上实现3-6%的平均绝对覆盖误差，且在真实结肠镜视频重建中表现良好。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可有效评估3D重建覆盖范围，提升结肠镜检查的可靠性与息肉检测能力。

search_text: Estimating the coverage in 3d reconstructions of the colon from colonoscopy videos 根据结肠镜检查视频估计结肠 3D 重建的覆盖范围 Colonoscopy is the most common procedure for early detection and removal of polyps, a critical component of colorectal cancer prevention. Insufficient visual coverage of the colon surface during the procedure often results in missed polyps. To mitigate this issue, reconstructing the 3D surfaces of the colon in order to visualize the missing regions has been proposed. However, robustly estimating the local and global coverage from such a reconstruction has not been thoroughly investigated until now. In this work, we present a new method to estimate the coverage from a reconstructed colon pointcloud. Our method splits a reconstructed colon into segments and estimates the coverage of each segment by estimating the area of the missing surfaces. We achieve a mean absolute coverage error of 3-6\% on colon segments generated from synthetic colonoscopy data and real colonography CT scans. In addition, we show good qualitative results on colon segments reconstructed from real colonoscopy videos. 结肠镜检查是早期发现和切除息肉的最常见手术，息肉是预防结直肠癌的重要组成部分。手术过程中结肠表面的视觉覆盖不足通常会导致漏掉息肉。为了缓解这个问题，有人提出重建结肠的 3D 表面以可视化缺失的区域。然而，迄今为止，尚未对这种重建的本地和全球覆盖范围进行稳健估计。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新方法来估计重建的结肠点云的覆盖范围。我们的方法将重建的结肠分成多个片段，并通过估计缺失表面的面积来估计每个片段的覆盖范围。我们对合成结肠镜检查数据和真实结肠造影 CT 扫描生成的结肠段实现了 3-6% 的平均绝对覆盖误差。此外，我们对根据真实结肠镜检查视频重建的结肠段显示出良好的定性结果。 本文提出一种从结肠镜视频的3D重建中估计结肠表面覆盖范围的新方法。 Emmanuelle Muhlethaler,Erez Posner,Moshe Bouhnik cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: EGG-GAE: scalable graph neural networks for tabular data imputation
title_zh: EGG-GAE：用于表格数据插补的可扩展图神经网络
abstract: Missing data imputation (MDI) is crucial when dealing with tabular datasets across various domains. Autoencoders can be trained to reconstruct missing values, and graph autoencoders (GAE) can additionally consider similar patterns in the dataset when imputing new values for a given instance. However, previously proposed GAEs suffer from scalability issues, requiring the user to define a similarity metric among patterns to build the graph connectivity beforehand. In this paper, we leverage recent progress in latent graph imputation to propose a novel EdGe Generation Graph AutoEncoder (EGG-GAE) for missing data imputation that overcomes these two drawbacks. EGG-GAE works on randomly sampled mini-batches of the input data (hence scaling to larger datasets), and it automatically infers the best connectivity across the mini-batch for each architecture layer. We also experiment with several extensions, including an ensemble strategy for inference and the inclusion of what we call prototype nodes, obtaining significant improvements, both in terms of imputation error and final downstream accuracy, across multiple benchmarks and baselines.
summary: Missing data imputation (MDI) is crucial when dealing with tabular datasets across various domains. Autoencoders can be trained to reconstruct missing values, and graph autoencoders (GAE) can additionally consider similar patterns in the dataset when imputing new values for a given instance. However, previously proposed GAEs suffer from scalability issues, requiring the user to define a similarity metric among patterns to build the graph connectivity beforehand. In this paper, we leverage recent progress in latent graph imputation to propose a novel EdGe Generation Graph AutoEncoder (EGG-GAE) for missing data imputation that overcomes these two drawbacks. EGG-GAE works on randomly sampled mini-batches of the input data (hence scaling to larger datasets), and it automatically infers the best connectivity across the mini-batch for each architecture layer. We also experiment with several extensions, including an ensemble strategy for inference and the inclusion of what we call prototype nodes, obtaining significant improvements, both in terms of imputation error and final downstream accuracy, across multiple benchmarks and baselines.
abstract_zh: 在处理跨不同领域的表格数据集时，缺失数据插补 (MDI) 至关重要。可以训练自动编码器来重建缺失值，并且图自动编码器（GAE）在为给定实例输入新值时还可以考虑数据集中的类似模式。然而，之前提出的 GAE 存在可扩展性问题，要求用户定义模式之间的相似性度量以预先构建图连接性。在本文中，我们利用潜在图插补方面的最新进展，提出了一种新颖的边缘生成图自动编码器（EGG-GAE），用于缺失数据插补，克服了这两个缺点。 EGG-GAE 适用于输入数据的随机采样小批量（因此可以扩展到更大的数据集），并且它会自动推断每个架构层的小批量中的最佳连接性。我们还尝试了几种扩展，包括用于推理的集成策略和包含我们所谓的原型节点，在多个基准和基线的插补误差和最终下游准确性方面获得了显着的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可扩展的图自编码器EGG-GAE，用于解决表格数据缺失值填补问题，通过自动推断图连接性提升模型效率。
AI.motivation: 传统图自编码器需人工定义相似度度量构建图结构，存在可扩展性差和依赖先验知识的缺陷，限制了其在大规模数据中的应用。
AI.method: 基于潜在图填补技术，EGG-GAE采用随机小批量数据训练，自动推断每层最佳图连接性，并引入集成策略与原型节点优化模型性能。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，EGG-GAE在填补误差和下游任务准确率上均显著优于现有方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: EGG-GAE通过自动化图连接推断和扩展性设计，为大规模表格数据缺失值填补提供了高效解决方案，且扩展方法进一步提升了模型表现。

title: Efficient delivery of Robotics Programming educational content using Cloud Robotics
title_zh: 使用 Cloud Robotics 高效交付机器人编程教育内容
comment: 7th International Conference on Robotics and Automation Engineering, ICRAE, 2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2210.03936
comments: 7th International Conference on Robotics and Automation Engineering, ICRAE, 2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2210.03936
abstract: In this paper, we report on our use of cloud-robotics solutions to teach a Robotics Applications Programming course at Zurich University of Applied Sciences (ZHAW). The usage of Kubernetes based cloud computing environment combined with real robots -- turtlebots and Niryo arms -- allowed us to: 1) minimize the set up times required to provide a Robotic Operating System (ROS) simulation and development environment to all students independently of their laptop architecture and OS; 2) provide a seamless "simulation to real" experience preserving the exciting experience of writing software interacting with the physical world; and 3) sharing GPUs across multiple student groups, thus using resources efficiently. We describe our requirements, solution design, experience working with the solution in the educational context and areas where it can be further improved. This may be of interest to other educators who may want to replicate our experience.
summary: In this paper, we report on our use of cloud-robotics solutions to teach a Robotics Applications Programming course at Zurich University of Applied Sciences (ZHAW). The usage of Kubernetes based cloud computing environment combined with real robots -- turtlebots and Niryo arms -- allowed us to: 1) minimize the set up times required to provide a Robotic Operating System (ROS) simulation and development environment to all students independently of their laptop architecture and OS; 2) provide a seamless "simulation to real" experience preserving the exciting experience of writing software interacting with the physical world; and 3) sharing GPUs across multiple student groups, thus using resources efficiently. We describe our requirements, solution design, experience working with the solution in the educational context and areas where it can be further improved. This may be of interest to other educators who may want to replicate our experience.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们报告了我们使用云机器人解决方案在苏黎世应用科学大学 (ZHAW) 教授机器人应用编程课程的情况。使用基于 Kubernetes 的云计算环境与真实的机器人（海龟机器人和 Niryo 手臂）相结合，使我们能够：1）最大限度地缩短为所有学生提供独立于笔记本电脑架构和操作系统的机器人操作系统（ROS）模拟和开发环境所需的设置时间； 2）提供无缝的“模拟到真实”体验，保留编写与物理世界交互的软件的令人兴奋的体验； 3) 在多个学生组之间共享 GPU，从而有效地利用资源。我们描述了我们的要求、解决方案设计、在教育环境中使用该解决方案的经验以及可以进一步改进的领域。这可能会引起其他想要复制我们经验的教育工作者的兴趣。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出利用云机器人技术结合Kubernetes平台，为机器人编程课程提供高效的教学环境。
AI.motivation: 传统机器人编程教学受限于学生设备差异、仿真环境搭建复杂及硬件资源不足，需寻找更高效的教育解决方案。
AI.method: 基于Kubernetes构建云端ROS开发环境，集成TurtleBot和Niryo机械臂实现实时交互，并通过GPU资源共享优化资源利用率。
AI.result: 成功实现跨平台快速部署、仿真与实体机器人无缝衔接，资源利用率提升，学生可同时进行复杂编程实践。
AI.conclusion: 云机器人框架显著提升教学效率和资源利用率，为教育机构提供可复用的机器人编程教学范式，未来可进一步优化实时交互性能。

The usage of Kubernetes based cloud computing environment combined with real robots -- turtlebots and Niryo arms -- allowed us to: 1) minimize the set up times required to provide a Robotic Operating System (ROS) simulation and development environment to all students independently of their laptop architecture and OS; 2) provide a seamless "simulation to real" experience preserving the exciting experience of writing software interacting with the physical world; and 3) sharing GPUs across multiple student groups, thus using resources efficiently. We describe our requirements, solution design, experience working with the solution in the educational context and areas where it can be further improved. This may be of interest to other educators who may want to replicate our experience. 在本文中，我们报告了我们使用云机器人解决方案在苏黎世应用科学大学 (ZHAW) 教授机器人应用编程课程的情况。使用基于 Kubernetes 的云计算环境与真实的机器人（海龟机器人和 Niryo 手臂）相结合，使我们能够：1）最大限度地缩短为所有学生提供独立于笔记本电脑架构和操作系统的机器人操作系统（ROS）模拟和开发环境所需的设置时间； 2）提供无缝的“模拟到真实”体验，保留编写与物理世界交互的软件的令人兴奋的体验； 3) 在多个学生组之间共享 GPU，从而有效地利用资源。我们描述了我们的要求、解决方案设计、在教育环境中使用该解决方案的经验以及可以进一步改进的领域。这可能会引起其他想要复制我们经验的教育工作者的兴趣。 本论文提出利用云机器人技术结合Kubernetes平台，为机器人编程课程提供高效的教学环境。 Sean Murphy,Leonardo Militano,Giovanni Toffetti,Remo Maurer cs.RO

title: A scan-specific unsupervised method for parallel MRI reconstruction via implicit neural representation
title_zh: 通过隐式神经表示进行并行 MRI 重建的扫描特定无监督方法
abstract: Parallel imaging is a widely-used technique to accelerate magnetic resonance imaging (MRI). However, current methods still perform poorly in reconstructing artifact-free MRI images from highly undersampled k-space data. Recently, implicit neural representation (INR) has emerged as a new deep learning paradigm for learning the internal continuity of an object. In this study, we adopted INR to parallel MRI reconstruction. The MRI image was modeled as a continuous function of spatial coordinates. This function was parameterized by a neural network and learned directly from the measured k-space itself without additional fully sampled high-quality training data. Benefitting from the powerful continuous representations provided by INR, the proposed method outperforms existing methods by suppressing the aliasing artifacts and noise, especially at higher acceleration rates and smaller sizes of the auto-calibration signals. The high-quality results and scanning specificity make the proposed method hold the potential for further accelerating the data acquisition of parallel MRI.
summary: Parallel imaging is a widely-used technique to accelerate magnetic resonance imaging (MRI). However, current methods still perform poorly in reconstructing artifact-free MRI images from highly undersampled k-space data. Recently, implicit neural representation (INR) has emerged as a new deep learning paradigm for learning the internal continuity of an object. In this study, we adopted INR to parallel MRI reconstruction. The MRI image was modeled as a continuous function of spatial coordinates. This function was parameterized by a neural network and learned directly from the measured k-space itself without additional fully sampled high-quality training data. Benefitting from the powerful continuous representations provided by INR, the proposed method outperforms existing methods by suppressing the aliasing artifacts and noise, especially at higher acceleration rates and smaller sizes of the auto-calibration signals. The high-quality results and scanning specificity make the proposed method hold the potential for further accelerating the data acquisition of parallel MRI.
abstract_zh: 并行成像是一种广泛使用的加速磁共振成像 (MRI) 的技术。然而，当前的方法在从高度欠采样的 k 空间数据重建无伪影 MRI 图像方面仍然表现不佳。最近，隐式神经表示（INR）已成为一种新的深度学习范式，用于学习对象的内部连续性。在本研究中，我们采用 INR 来并行 MRI 重建。 MRI 图像被建模为空间坐标的连续函数。该函数由神经网络参数化，并直接从测量的 k 空间本身学习，无需额外的完全采样的高质量训练数据。受益于 INR 提供的强大连续表示，所提出的方法通过抑制混叠伪影和噪声而优于现有方法，特别是在更高的加速度和更小的自动校准信号尺寸下。高质量的结果和扫描特异性使得该方法具有进一步加速并行 MRI 数据采集的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于隐式神经表示（INR）的无监督方法，用于加速磁共振成像（MRI）的并行重建。
AI.motivation: 现有并行MRI方法在高度欠采样的k空间数据重建中存在伪影和噪声问题，且依赖额外的全采样训练数据，限制了其应用。
AI.method: 将MRI图像建模为空间坐标的连续函数，通过神经网络直接从k空间数据中学习参数化表示，无需依赖全采样训练数据。
AI.result: 该方法在高加速率和小尺寸自动校准信号下显著抑制了混叠伪影和噪声，重建质量优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法具有扫描特异性，为并行MRI的进一步加速提供了潜力。

title: LightEA: A Scalable, Robust, and Interpretable Entity Alignment Framework via Three-view Label Propagation
title_zh: LightEA：通过三视图标签传播实现可扩展、稳健且可解释的实体对齐框架
abstract: Entity Alignment (EA) aims to find equivalent entity pairs between KGs, which is the core step of bridging and integrating multi-source KGs. In this paper, we argue that existing GNN-based EA methods inherit the inborn defects from their neural network lineage: weak scalability and poor interpretability. Inspired by recent studies, we reinvent the Label Propagation algorithm to effectively run on KGs and propose a non-neural EA framework -- LightEA, consisting of three efficient components: (i) Random Orthogonal Label Generation, (ii) Three-view Label Propagation, and (iii) Sparse Sinkhorn Iteration. According to the extensive experiments on public datasets, LightEA has impressive scalability, robustness, and interpretability. With a mere tenth of time consumption, LightEA achieves comparable results to state-of-the-art methods across all datasets and even surpasses them on many.
summary: Entity Alignment (EA) aims to find equivalent entity pairs between KGs, which is the core step of bridging and integrating multi-source KGs. In this paper, we argue that existing GNN-based EA methods inherit the inborn defects from their neural network lineage: weak scalability and poor interpretability. Inspired by recent studies, we reinvent the Label Propagation algorithm to effectively run on KGs and propose a non-neural EA framework -- LightEA, consisting of three efficient components: (i) Random Orthogonal Label Generation, (ii) Three-view Label Propagation, and (iii) Sparse Sinkhorn Iteration. According to the extensive experiments on public datasets, LightEA has impressive scalability, robustness, and interpretability. With a mere tenth of time consumption, LightEA achieves comparable results to state-of-the-art methods across all datasets and even surpasses them on many.
abstract_zh: 实体对齐（EA）旨在找到知识图谱之间的等效实体对，这是桥接和集成多源知识图谱的核心步骤。在本文中，我们认为现有的基于 GNN 的 EA 方法继承了其神经网络谱系的先天缺陷：可扩展性弱和可解释性差。受最近研究的启发，我们重新发明了标签传播算法，以有效地在 KG 上运行，并提出了一个非神经 EA 框架——LightEA，由三个高效组件组成：(i) 随机正交标签生成、(ii) 三视图标签传播和 (iii) 稀疏 Sinkhorn 迭代。根据对公共数据集的大量实验，LightEA 具有令人印象深刻的可扩展性、鲁棒性和可解释性。 LightEA 仅花费十分之一的时间，就在所有数据集上实现了与最先进方法相当的结果，甚至在许多方面超越了它们。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可扩展、鲁棒且可解释的实体对齐框架LightEA，通过三视图标签传播算法解决现有GNN方法的缺陷。
AI.motivation: 现有基于图神经网络的实体对齐方法存在可扩展性差和可解释性弱的固有缺陷，需设计非神经网络的替代方案。
AI.method: 提出LightEA框架，包含三个核心组件：随机正交标签生成、三视图标签传播和稀疏Sinkhorn迭代，基于改进的标签传播算法实现非神经网络实体对齐。
AI.result: 实验表明LightEA在多个公开数据集上仅消耗现有方法1/10的计算时间，效果与最先进方法相当甚至更优，验证了其可扩展性、鲁棒性和可解释性优势。
AI.conclusion: LightEA通过三视图标签传播有效解决了实体对齐的可扩展性、鲁棒性和可解释性问题，为知识图谱融合提供了新的高效方法。

title: Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning for Furniture Layout in Virtual Indoor Scenes
title_zh: 虚拟室内场景中家具布局的分层强化学习
comment: Accepted by Reinforcement Learning for Real Life Workshop @ NeurIPS 2022
comments: Accepted by Reinforcement Learning for Real Life Workshop @ NeurIPS 2022
abstract: In real life, the decoration of 3D indoor scenes through designing furniture layout provides a rich experience for people. In this paper, we explore the furniture layout task as a Markov decision process (MDP) in virtual reality, which is solved by hierarchical reinforcement learning (HRL). The goal is to produce a proper two-furniture layout in the virtual reality of the indoor scenes. In particular, we first design a simulation environment and introduce the HRL formulation for a two-furniture layout. We then apply a hierarchical actor-critic algorithm with curriculum learning to solve the MDP. We conduct our experiments on a large-scale real-world interior layout dataset that contains industrial designs from professional designers. Our numerical results demonstrate that the proposed model yields higher-quality layouts as compared with the state-of-art models.
summary: In real life, the decoration of 3D indoor scenes through designing furniture layout provides a rich experience for people. In this paper, we explore the furniture layout task as a Markov decision process (MDP) in virtual reality, which is solved by hierarchical reinforcement learning (HRL). The goal is to produce a proper two-furniture layout in the virtual reality of the indoor scenes. In particular, we first design a simulation environment and introduce the HRL formulation for a two-furniture layout. We then apply a hierarchical actor-critic algorithm with curriculum learning to solve the MDP. We conduct our experiments on a large-scale real-world interior layout dataset that contains industrial designs from professional designers. Our numerical results demonstrate that the proposed model yields higher-quality layouts as compared with the state-of-art models.
abstract_zh: 在现实生活中，通过设计家具布局来装饰3D室内场景，为人们提供了丰富的体验。在本文中，我们将家具布局任务探索为虚拟现实中的马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），并通过分层强化学习（HRL）来解决。目标是在室内场景的虚拟现实中产生适当的两家具布局。特别是，我们首先设计了一个模拟环境，并引入了两家具布局的 HRL 公式。然后，我们应用分层演员批评算法和课程学习来解决 MDP。我们在包含专业设计师的工业设计的大型真实室内布局数据集上进行实验。我们的数值结果表明，与最先进的模型相比，所提出的模型产生了更高质量的布局。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于分层强化学习的虚拟室内场景家具布局方法。
AI.motivation: 现实中的室内设计需要高质量家具布局方案，但现有方法难以兼顾复杂约束与布局合理性。
AI.method: 将家具布局建模为马尔可夫决策过程，设计分层强化学习框架并结合课程学习的分层actor-critic算法。
AI.result: 在包含专业设计师工业数据的大型数据集上，生成的布局质量优于现有先进模型。
AI.conclusion: 分层强化学习能有效解决虚拟室内场景的家具布局问题，为智能室内设计提供新思路。

search_text: Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning for Furniture Layout in Virtual Indoor Scenes 虚拟室内场景中家具布局的分层强化学习 In real life, the decoration of 3D indoor scenes through designing furniture layout provides a rich experience for people. In this paper, we explore the furniture layout task as a Markov decision process (MDP) in virtual reality, which is solved by hierarchical reinforcement learning (HRL). The goal is to produce a proper two-furniture layout in the virtual reality of the indoor scenes. In particular, we first design a simulation environment and introduce the HRL formulation for a two-furniture layout. We then apply a hierarchical actor-critic algorithm with curriculum learning to solve the MDP. We conduct our experiments on a large-scale real-world interior layout dataset that contains industrial designs from professional designers. Our numerical results demonstrate that the proposed model yields higher-quality layouts as compared with the state-of-art models. 在现实生活中，通过设计家具布局来装饰3D室内场景，为人们提供了丰富的体验。在本文中，我们将家具布局任务探索为虚拟现实中的马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），并通过分层强化学习（HRL）来解决。目标是在室内场景的虚拟现实中产生适当的两家具布局。特别是，我们首先设计了一个模拟环境，并引入了两家具布局的 HRL 公式。然后，我们应用分层演员批评算法和课程学习来解决 MDP。我们在包含专业设计师的工业设计的大型真实室内布局数据集上进行实验。我们的数值结果表明，与最先进的模型相比，所提出的模型产生了更高质量的布局。 本文提出了一种基于分层强化学习的虚拟室内场景家具布局方法。 Xinhan Di,Pengqian Yu cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Prodromos Boutis,Zisis Batzos,Konstantinos Konstantoudakis,Anastasios Dimou,Petros Daras
title: MC-hands-1M: A glove-wearing hand dataset for pose estimation
title_zh: MC-hands-1M：用于姿势估计的戴手套手部数据集
abstract: Nowadays, the need for large amounts of carefully and complexly annotated data for the training of computer vision modules continues to grow. Furthermore, although the research community presents state of the art solutions to many problems, there exist special cases, such as the pose estimation and tracking of a glove-wearing hand, where the general approaches tend to be unable to provide an accurate solution or fail completely. In this work, we are presenting a synthetic dataset1 for 3D pose estimation of glove-wearing hands, in order to depict the value of data synthesis in computer vision. The dataset is used to fine-tune a public hand joint detection model, achieving significant performance in both synthetic and real images of glove-wearing hands.
summary: Nowadays, the need for large amounts of carefully and complexly annotated data for the training of computer vision modules continues to grow. Furthermore, although the research community presents state of the art solutions to many problems, there exist special cases, such as the pose estimation and tracking of a glove-wearing hand, where the general approaches tend to be unable to provide an accurate solution or fail completely. In this work, we are presenting a synthetic dataset1 for 3D pose estimation of glove-wearing hands, in order to depict the value of data synthesis in computer vision. The dataset is used to fine-tune a public hand joint detection model, achieving significant performance in both synthetic and real images of glove-wearing hands.
abstract_zh: 如今，用于计算机视觉模块训练的大量仔细且复杂的注释数据的需求持续增长。此外，尽管研究界针对许多问题提出了最先进的解决方案，但也存在特殊情况，例如戴手套的手的姿势估计和跟踪，其中一般方法往往无法提供准确的解决方案或完全失败。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个用于戴手套手的 3D 姿态估计的合成数据集1，以描述数据合成在计算机视觉中的价值。该数据集用于微调公共手部关节检测模型，在戴手套手部的合成图像和真实图像中均取得了显着的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为MC-hands-1M的合成数据集，用于解决戴手套手部的3D姿态估计问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在戴手套手部姿态估计任务中表现不佳，而高质量标注数据的获取成本高昂，需通过合成数据解决这一特殊场景的建模难题。
AI.method: 构建包含100万合成样本的数据集，涵盖不同手套类型、光照条件和手部姿态，并基于该数据集微调公开的手部关键点检测模型。
AI.result: 微调后的模型在合成数据和真实场景中均取得显著性能提升，验证了合成数据的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 合成数据能有效弥补特殊场景下标注数据的不足，为计算机视觉中细分领域问题提供解决方案。

title: Pseudo-Label Noise Suppression Techniques for Semi-Supervised Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于半监督语义分割的伪标签噪声抑制技术
abstract: Semi-supervised learning (SSL) can reduce the need for large labelled datasets by incorporating unlabelled data into the training. This is particularly interesting for semantic segmentation, where labelling data is very costly and time-consuming. Current SSL approaches use an initially supervised trained model to generate predictions for unlabelled images, called pseudo-labels, which are subsequently used for training a new model from scratch. Since the predictions usually do not come from an error-free neural network, they are naturally full of errors. However, training with partially incorrect labels often reduce the final model performance. Thus, it is crucial to manage errors/noise of pseudo-labels wisely. In this work, we use three mechanisms to control pseudo-label noise and errors: (1) We construct a solid base framework by mixing images with cow-patterns on unlabelled images to reduce the negative impact of wrong pseudo-labels. Nevertheless, wrong pseudo-labels still have a negative impact on the performance. Therefore, (2) we propose a simple and effective loss weighting scheme for pseudo-labels defined by the feedback of the model trained on these pseudo-labels. This allows us to soft-weight the pseudo-label training examples based on their determined confidence score during training. (3) We also study the common practice to ignore pseudo-labels with low confidence and empirically analyse the influence and effect of pseudo-labels with different confidence ranges on SSL and the contribution of pseudo-label filtering to the achievable performance gains. We show that our method performs superior to state of-the-art alternatives on various datasets. Furthermore, we show that our findings also transfer to other tasks such as human pose estimation. Our code is available at https://github.com/ChristmasFan/SSL_Denoising_Segmentation.
summary: Semi-supervised learning (SSL) can reduce the need for large labelled datasets by incorporating unlabelled data into the training. This is particularly interesting for semantic segmentation, where labelling data is very costly and time-consuming. Current SSL approaches use an initially supervised trained model to generate predictions for unlabelled images, called pseudo-labels, which are subsequently used for training a new model from scratch. Since the predictions usually do not come from an error-free neural network, they are naturally full of errors. However, training with partially incorrect labels often reduce the final model performance. Thus, it is crucial to manage errors/noise of pseudo-labels wisely. In this work, we use three mechanisms to control pseudo-label noise and errors: (1) We construct a solid base framework by mixing images with cow-patterns on unlabelled images to reduce the negative impact of wrong pseudo-labels. Nevertheless, wrong pseudo-labels still have a negative impact on the performance. Therefore, (2) we propose a simple and effective loss weighting scheme for pseudo-labels defined by the feedback of the model trained on these pseudo-labels. This allows us to soft-weight the pseudo-label training examples based on their determined confidence score during training. (3) We also study the common practice to ignore pseudo-labels with low confidence and empirically analyse the influence and effect of pseudo-labels with different confidence ranges on SSL and the contribution of pseudo-label filtering to the achievable performance gains. We show that our method performs superior to state of-the-art alternatives on various datasets. Furthermore, we show that our findings also transfer to other tasks such as human pose estimation. Our code is available at https://github.com/ChristmasFan/SSL_Denoising_Segmentation.
abstract_zh: 半监督学习 (SSL) 可以通过将未标记数据合并到训练中来减少对大型标记数据集的需求。这对于语义分割来说尤其有趣，因为在语义分割中标记数据非常昂贵且耗时。当前的 SSL 方法使用最初监督训练的模型来生成未标记图像的预测，称为伪标签，随后用于从头开始训练新模型。由于预测通常不是来自无错误的神经网络，因此它们自然充满错误。然而，使用部分不正确的标签进行训练通常会降低最终模型的性能。因此，明智地管理伪标签的错误/噪声至关重要。在这项工作中，我们使用三种机制来控制伪标签噪声和错误：（1）我们通过在未标记图像上混合图像与牛图案来构建坚实的基础框架，以减少错误伪标签的负面影响。尽管如此，错误的伪标签仍然会对性能产生负面影响。因此，（2）我们针对伪标签提出了一种简单有效的损失加权方案，该方案由在这些伪标签上训练的模型的反馈定义。这使我们能够根据训练期间确定的置信度得分对伪标签训练示例进行软加权。 (3)我们还研究了忽略低置信度伪标签的常见做法，并实证分析了不同置信度范围的伪标签对 SSL 的影响和作用以及伪标签过滤对可实现的性能增益的贡献。我们表明，我们的方法在各种数据集上的性能优于最先进的替代方法。此外，我们表明我们的发现也可以转移到其他任务，例如人体姿势估计。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/ChristmasFan/SSL_Denoising_Segmentation 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出三种伪标签噪声抑制技术，以提升半监督语义分割性能。
AI.motivation: 伪标签因神经网络误差导致噪声，影响半监督学习效果，需有效管理噪声以提升模型性能。
AI.method: （1）在无标签图像中混合牛纹图案构建基础框架；（2）基于模型反馈设计伪标签损失加权方案；（3）分析不同置信度范围伪标签对性能的影响并进行过滤。
AI.result: 方法在多个数据集上优于现有技术，并成功迁移到人体姿态估计等任务。
AI.conclusion: 提出的噪声抑制机制有效提升了半监督学习的性能与泛化能力。

title: SR-LIO: LiDAR-Inertial Odometry with Sweep Reconstruction
title_zh: SR-LIO：具有扫描重建功能的 LiDAR 惯性里程计
abstract: This paper proposes a novel LiDAR-Inertial odometry (LIO), named SR-LIO, based on an iterated extended Kalman filter (iEKF) framework. We adapt the sweep reconstruction method, which segments and reconstructs raw input sweeps from spinning LiDAR to obtain reconstructed sweeps with higher frequency. We found that such method can effectively reduce the time interval for each iterated state update, improving the state estimation accuracy and enabling the usage of iEKF framework for fusing high-frequency IMU and low-frequency LiDAR. To prevent inaccurate trajectory caused by multiple distortion correction to a particular point, we further propose to perform distortion correction for each segment. Experimental results on four public datasets demonstrate that our SR-LIO outperforms all existing state-of-the-art methods on accuracy, and reducing the time interval of iterated state update via the proposed sweep reconstruction can improve the accuracy and frequency of estimated states. The source code of SR-LIO is publicly available for the development of the community.
summary: This paper proposes a novel LiDAR-Inertial odometry (LIO), named SR-LIO, based on an iterated extended Kalman filter (iEKF) framework. We adapt the sweep reconstruction method, which segments and reconstructs raw input sweeps from spinning LiDAR to obtain reconstructed sweeps with higher frequency. We found that such method can effectively reduce the time interval for each iterated state update, improving the state estimation accuracy and enabling the usage of iEKF framework for fusing high-frequency IMU and low-frequency LiDAR. To prevent inaccurate trajectory caused by multiple distortion correction to a particular point, we further propose to perform distortion correction for each segment. Experimental results on four public datasets demonstrate that our SR-LIO outperforms all existing state-of-the-art methods on accuracy, and reducing the time interval of iterated state update via the proposed sweep reconstruction can improve the accuracy and frequency of estimated states. The source code of SR-LIO is publicly available for the development of the community.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于迭代扩展卡尔曼滤波器（iEKF）框架的新型激光雷达惯性里程计（LIO），名为SR-LIO。我们采用扫描重建方法，对旋转激光雷达的原始输入扫描进行分段和重建，以获得更高频率的重建扫描。我们发现这种方法可以有效减少每次迭代状态更新的时间间隔，提高状态估计精度，并能够使用 iEKF 框架来融合高频 IMU 和低频 LiDAR。为了防止对特定点进行多次畸变校正而导致轨迹不准确，我们进一步提出对每个片段进行畸变校正。四个公共数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的 SR-LIO 在准确性方面优于所有现有的最先进方法，并且通过所提出的扫描重建减少迭代状态更新的时间间隔可以提高估计状态的准确性和频率。 SR-LIO的源代码公开供社区开发。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于迭代扩展卡尔曼滤波框架的新型激光雷达惯性里程计方法SR-LIO，通过扫面重建技术提高状态估计精度。
AI.motivation: 传统LiDAR-Inertial Odometry方法因LiDAR数据频率低导致状态更新间隔大，影响估计精度，且多次畸变校正易引发轨迹误差。
AI.method: 采用扫面重建技术分割并重构旋转LiDAR的原始数据，生成高频重构扫面；结合迭代扩展卡尔曼滤波框架融合高频IMU与低频LiDAR数据，并对每个分段单独进行畸变校正。
AI.result: 在四个公开数据集上实验表明，SR-LIO在精度和状态估计频率上均优于现有最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: 扫面重建技术有效缩短状态更新间隔，提升精度与频率，开源代码促进社区发展。

title: Multi-view Gait Recognition based on Siamese Vision Transformer
title_zh: 基于Siamese Vision Transformer的多视角步态识别
abstract: While the Vision Transformer has been used in gait recognition, its application in multi-view gait recognition is still limited. Different views significantly affect the extraction and identification accuracy of the characteristics of gait contour. To address this, this paper proposes a Siamese Mobile Vision Transformer (SMViT). This model not only focuses on the local characteristics of the human gait space but also considers the characteristics of long-distance attention associations, which can extract multi-dimensional step status characteristics. In addition, it describes how different perspectives affect gait characteristics and generate reliable perspective feature relationship factors. The average recognition rate of SMViT on the CASIA B data set reached 96.4%. The experimental results show that SMViT can attain state-of-the-art performance compared to advanced step recognition models such as GaitGAN, Multi_view GAN, Posegait and other gait recognition models.
summary: While the Vision Transformer has been used in gait recognition, its application in multi-view gait recognition is still limited. Different views significantly affect the extraction and identification accuracy of the characteristics of gait contour. To address this, this paper proposes a Siamese Mobile Vision Transformer (SMViT). This model not only focuses on the local characteristics of the human gait space but also considers the characteristics of long-distance attention associations, which can extract multi-dimensional step status characteristics. In addition, it describes how different perspectives affect gait characteristics and generate reliable perspective feature relationship factors. The average recognition rate of SMViT on the CASIA B data set reached 96.4%. The experimental results show that SMViT can attain state-of-the-art performance compared to advanced step recognition models such as GaitGAN, Multi_view GAN, Posegait and other gait recognition models.
abstract_zh: 虽然Vision Transformer已经应用于步态识别，但其在多视角步态识别中的应用仍然有限。不同的视角显着影响步态轮廓特征的提取和识别精度。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种连体移动视觉转换器（SMViT）。该模型不仅关注人类步态空间的局部特征，还考虑了远距离注意关联的特征，可以提取多维的步态特征。此外，它还描述了不同视角如何影响步态特征并生成可靠的视角特征关系因素。 SMViT在CASIA B数据集上的平均识别率达到96.4%。实验结果表明，与 GaitGAN、Multi_view GAN、Posegait 等先进步态识别模型相比，SMViT 可以获得最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Siamese Vision Transformer的多视角步态识别方法SMViT，以解决不同视角对步态特征提取和识别精度的影响问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉Transformer在多视角步态识别中应用有限，不同视角会导致步态轮廓特征提取和识别准确率下降，需设计兼顾局部特征与长距离关联特性的模型。
AI.method: 设计Siamese Mobile Vision Transformer（SMViT）模型，结合局部步态空间特征与长距离注意力关联，提取多维步态状态特征，并建立视角特征关系因子以描述视角差异影响。
AI.result: 在CASIA B数据集上SMViT平均识别率达96.4%，优于GaitGAN、Multi_view GAN、Posegait等先进步态识别模型。
AI.conclusion: SMViT通过融合局部特征与视角关系因子，在多视角步态识别任务中达到当前最优性能。

authors_text: Romain Thoreau,Laurent Risser,Véronique Achard,Béatrice Berthelot,Xavier Briottet
title: Physics-informed Variational Autoencoders for Improved Robustness to Environmental Factors of Variation
title_zh: 基于物理的变分自动编码器可提高对变化环境因素的鲁棒性
abstract: The combination of machine learning models with physical models is a recent research path to learn robust data representations. In this paper, we introduce p$^3$VAE, a variational autoencoder that integrates prior physical knowledge about the latent factors of variation that are related to the data acquisition conditions. p$^3$VAE combines standard neural network layers with non-trainable physics layers in order to partially ground the latent space to physical variables. We introduce a semi-supervised learning algorithm that strikes a balance between the machine learning part and the physics part. Experiments on simulated and real data sets demonstrate the benefits of our framework against competing physics-informed and conventional machine learning models, in terms of extrapolation capabilities and interpretability. In particular, we show that p$^3$VAE naturally has interesting disentanglement capabilities. Our code and data have been made publicly available at https://github.com/Romain3Ch216/p3VAE.
summary: The combination of machine learning models with physical models is a recent research path to learn robust data representations. In this paper, we introduce p$^3$VAE, a variational autoencoder that integrates prior physical knowledge about the latent factors of variation that are related to the data acquisition conditions. p$^3$VAE combines standard neural network layers with non-trainable physics layers in order to partially ground the latent space to physical variables. We introduce a semi-supervised learning algorithm that strikes a balance between the machine learning part and the physics part. Experiments on simulated and real data sets demonstrate the benefits of our framework against competing physics-informed and conventional machine learning models, in terms of extrapolation capabilities and interpretability. In particular, we show that p$^3$VAE naturally has interesting disentanglement capabilities. Our code and data have been made publicly available at https://github.com/Romain3Ch216/p3VAE.
abstract_zh: 机器学习模型与物理模型的结合是学习鲁棒数据表示的最新研究路径。在本文中，我们介绍了 p$^3$VAE，一种变分自动编码器，它集成了有关与数据采集条件相关的变化潜在因素的先验物理知识。 p$^3$VAE 将标准神经网络层与不可训练的物理层相结合，以便将潜在空间部分接地到物理变量。我们引入了一种半监督学习算法，可以在机器学习部分和物理部分之间取得平衡。对模拟和真实数据集的实验证明了我们的框架在外推能力和可解释性方面相对于物理知识和传统机器学习模型的优势。特别是，我们表明 p$^3$VAE 自然具有有趣的解缠能力。我们的代码和数据已在 https://github.com/Romain3Ch216/p3VAE 上公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合物理知识的变分自编码器p$^3$VAE，通过引入物理层提升模型对环境因素变化的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习模型在环境因素变化时易失效，而物理模型能提供先验知识。结合两者可提升数据表示的鲁棒性与可解释性。
AI.method: 设计p$^3$VAE框架，融合神经网络层与非训练物理层，采用半监督学习算法平衡物理约束与数据拟合。
AI.result: 实验表明，p$^3$VAE在模拟和真实数据集上优于现有方法，具备更强的外推能力、可解释性及潜在变量解耦特性。
AI.conclusion: 物理信息变分自编码器有效结合物理先验与机器学习，为复杂环境下的鲁棒建模提供了新思路。

motivation: 传统机器学习模型在环境因素变化时易失效，而物理模型能提供先验知识。结合两者可提升数据表示的鲁棒性与可解释性。
method: 设计p$^3$VAE框架，融合神经网络层与非训练物理层，采用半监督学习算法平衡物理约束与数据拟合。
result: 实验表明，p$^3$VAE在模拟和真实数据集上优于现有方法，具备更强的外推能力、可解释性及潜在变量解耦特性。
conclusion: 物理信息变分自编码器有效结合物理先验与机器学习，为复杂环境下的鲁棒建模提供了新思路。
search_text: Physics-informed Variational Autoencoders for Improved Robustness to Environmental Factors of Variation 基于物理的变分自动编码器可提高对变化环境因素的鲁棒性 The combination of machine learning models with physical models is a recent research path to learn robust data representations. In this paper, we introduce p$^3$VAE, a variational autoencoder that integrates prior physical knowledge about the latent factors of variation that are related to the data acquisition conditions. p$^3$VAE combines standard neural network layers with non-trainable physics layers in order to partially ground the latent space to physical variables. We introduce a semi-supervised learning algorithm that strikes a balance between the machine learning part and the physics part. Experiments on simulated and real data sets demonstrate the benefits of our framework against competing physics-informed and conventional machine learning models, in terms of extrapolation capabilities and interpretability. In particular, we show that p$^3$VAE naturally has interesting disentanglement capabilities. Our code and data have been made publicly available at https://github.com/Romain3Ch216/p3VAE. 机器学习模型与物理模型的结合是学习鲁棒数据表示的最新研究路径。在本文中，我们介绍了 p$^3$VAE，一种变分自动编码器，它集成了有关与数据采集条件相关的变化潜在因素的先验物理知识。 p$^3$VAE 将标准神经网络层与不可训练的物理层相结合，以便将潜在空间部分接地到物理变量。我们引入了一种半监督学习算法，可以在机器学习部分和物理部分之间取得平衡。对模拟和真实数据集的实验证明了我们的框架在外推能力和可解释性方面相对于物理知识和传统机器学习模型的优势。特别是，我们表明 p$^3$VAE 自然具有有趣的解缠能力。我们的代码和数据已在 https://github.com/Romain3Ch216/p3VAE 上公开。 本文提出一种结合物理知识的变分自编码器p$^3$VAE，通过引入物理层提升模型对环境因素变化的鲁棒性。 Romain Thoreau,Laurent Risser,Véronique Achard,Béatrice Berthelot,Xavier Briottet cs.CV,stat.ML

title: High-Resolution Depth Estimation for 360-degree Panoramas through Perspective and Panoramic Depth Images Registration
title_zh: 通过透视和全景深度图像配准对 360 度全景图进行高分辨率深度估计
comment: IEEE/CVF Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV) 2023, to appear
comments: IEEE/CVF Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV) 2023, to appear
abstract: We propose a novel approach to compute high-resolution (2048x1024 and higher) depths for panoramas that is significantly faster and qualitatively and qualitatively more accurate than the current state-of-the-art method (360MonoDepth). As traditional neural network-based methods have limitations in the output image sizes (up to 1024x512) due to GPU memory constraints, both 360MonoDepth and our method rely on stitching multiple perspective disparity or depth images to come out a unified panoramic depth map. However, to achieve globally consistent stitching, 360MonoDepth relied on solving extensive disparity map alignment and Poisson-based blending problems, leading to high computation time. Instead, we propose to use an existing panoramic depth map (computed in real-time by any panorama-based method) as the common target for the individual perspective depth maps to register to. This key idea made producing globally consistent stitching results from a straightforward task. Our experiments show that our method generates qualitatively better results than existing panorama-based methods, and further outperforms them quantitatively on datasets unseen by these methods.
summary: We propose a novel approach to compute high-resolution (2048x1024 and higher) depths for panoramas that is significantly faster and qualitatively and qualitatively more accurate than the current state-of-the-art method (360MonoDepth). As traditional neural network-based methods have limitations in the output image sizes (up to 1024x512) due to GPU memory constraints, both 360MonoDepth and our method rely on stitching multiple perspective disparity or depth images to come out a unified panoramic depth map. However, to achieve globally consistent stitching, 360MonoDepth relied on solving extensive disparity map alignment and Poisson-based blending problems, leading to high computation time. Instead, we propose to use an existing panoramic depth map (computed in real-time by any panorama-based method) as the common target for the individual perspective depth maps to register to. This key idea made producing globally consistent stitching results from a straightforward task. Our experiments show that our method generates qualitatively better results than existing panorama-based methods, and further outperforms them quantitatively on datasets unseen by these methods.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种计算高分辨率（2048x1024 及更高）全景图深度的新颖方法，该方法比当前最先进的方法 (360MonoDepth) 速度明显更快，并且在定性和定性上更准确。由于传统的基于神经网络的方法由于 GPU 内存限制而在输出图像大小（最大 1024x512）方面受到限制，因此 360MonoDepth 和我们的方法都依赖于拼接多个透视视差或深度图像来生成统一的全景深度图。然而，为了实现全局一致的拼接，360MonoDepth 依赖于解决大量视差图对齐和基于泊松的混合问题，从而导致计算时间较长。相反，我们建议使用现有的全景深度图（通过任何基于全景的方法实时计算）作为要注册的各个透视深度图的共同目标。这一关键思想使得通过简单的任务产生全局一致的拼接结果。我们的实验表明，我们的方法在质量上比现有的基于全景的方法产生了更好的结果，并且在这些方法未见过的数据集上进一步在数量上优于它们。

AI.tldr: 提出一种高效准确的高分辨率全景深度估计方法。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络方法受GPU内存限制无法生成大尺寸深度图，现有方法依赖复杂对齐和融合步骤导致计算耗时。
AI.method: 利用实时生成的全景深度图作为基准，通过配准多视角深度图实现全局一致的全景图拼接。
AI.result: 在定性效果和未见过的数据集上定量评估均优于现有方法，且计算效率更高。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过简化配准流程解决了全景深度图生成中的效率与一致性难题。
