title: Real Image Super-Resolution using GAN through modeling of LR and HR process
title_zh: 通过 LR 和 HR 过程建模，使用 GAN 实现真实图像超分辨率
comment: Accepted in 18th IEEE International Conference on Advanced Video and Signal Based Surveillance (AVSS), 2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2009.03693, arXiv:2005.00953
comments: Accepted in 18th IEEE International Conference on Advanced Video and Signal Based Surveillance (AVSS), 2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2009.03693, arXiv:2005.00953
abstract: The current existing deep image super-resolution methods usually assume that a Low Resolution (LR) image is bicubicly downscaled of a High Resolution (HR) image. However, such an ideal bicubic downsampling process is different from the real LR degradations, which usually come from complicated combinations of different degradation processes, such as camera blur, sensor noise, sharpening artifacts, JPEG compression, and further image editing, and several times image transmission over the internet and unpredictable noises. It leads to the highly ill-posed nature of the inverse upscaling problem. To address these issues, we propose a GAN-based SR approach with learnable adaptive sinusoidal nonlinearities incorporated in LR and SR models by directly learn degradation distributions and then synthesize paired LR/HR training data to train the generalized SR model to real image degradations. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed approach in quantitative and qualitative experiments.
summary: The current existing deep image super-resolution methods usually assume that a Low Resolution (LR) image is bicubicly downscaled of a High Resolution (HR) image. However, such an ideal bicubic downsampling process is different from the real LR degradations, which usually come from complicated combinations of different degradation processes, such as camera blur, sensor noise, sharpening artifacts, JPEG compression, and further image editing, and several times image transmission over the internet and unpredictable noises. It leads to the highly ill-posed nature of the inverse upscaling problem. To address these issues, we propose a GAN-based SR approach with learnable adaptive sinusoidal nonlinearities incorporated in LR and SR models by directly learn degradation distributions and then synthesize paired LR/HR training data to train the generalized SR model to real image degradations. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed approach in quantitative and qualitative experiments.
abstract_zh: 目前现有的深度图像超分辨率方法通常假设低分辨率（LR）图像是高分辨率（HR）图像的双三次缩小。然而，这种理想的双三次下采样过程与真实的LR退化不同，真实的LR退化通常来自不同退化过程的复杂组合，例如相机模糊、传感器噪声、锐化伪影、JPEG压缩和进一步的图像编辑，以及通过互联网的多次图像传输和不可预测的噪声。它导致逆升级问题的高度不适定性质。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种基于 GAN 的 SR 方法，通过直接学习退化分布，将可学习的自适应正弦非线性纳入 LR 和 SR 模型中，然后合成配对的 LR/HR 训练数据来训练广义 SR 模型以实现真实图像退化。我们在定量和定性实验中证明了我们提出的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于GAN的图像超分辨率方法，通过建模真实低分辨率（LR）与高分辨率（HR）图像的生成过程，解决实际图像退化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有超分辨率方法假设LR图像是通过理想双三次下采样得到的，但实际LR图像通常经历复杂的退化过程（如模糊、噪声、压缩等），导致逆向超分问题高度不适定。
AI.method: 设计包含可学习自适应正弦非线性的GAN模型，直接学习退化分布并合成配对LR/HR训练数据，以训练适应真实退化的通用超分模型。
AI.result: 定量和定性实验验证了该方法在真实图像超分辨率任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过建模真实退化过程，所提方法能有效提升超分辨率性能，优于传统基于理想下采样的方法。

title: Domain generalization Person Re-identification on Attention-aware multi-operation strategery
title_zh: 注意力感知多操作策略的领域泛化行人重识别
abstract: Domain generalization person re-identification (DG Re-ID) aims to directly deploy a model trained on the source domain to the unseen target domain with good generalization, which is a challenging problem and has practical value in a real-world deployment. In the existing DG Re-ID methods, invariant operations are effective in extracting domain generalization features, and Instance Normalization (IN) or Batch Normalization (BN) is used to alleviate the bias to unseen domains. Due to domain-specific information being used to capture discriminability of the individual source domain, the generalized ability for unseen domains is unsatisfactory. To address this problem, an Attention-aware Multi-operation Strategery (AMS) for DG Re-ID is proposed to extract more generalized features. We investigate invariant operations and construct a multi-operation module based on IN and group whitening (GW) to extract domain-invariant feature representations. Furthermore, we analyze different domain-invariant characteristics, and apply spatial attention to the IN operation and channel attention to the GW operation to enhance the domain-invariant features. The proposed AMS module can be used as a plug-and-play module to incorporate into existing network architectures. Extensive experimental results show that AMS can effectively enhance the model's generalization ability to unseen domains and significantly improves the recognition performance in DG Re-ID on three protocols with ten datasets.
summary: Domain generalization person re-identification (DG Re-ID) aims to directly deploy a model trained on the source domain to the unseen target domain with good generalization, which is a challenging problem and has practical value in a real-world deployment. In the existing DG Re-ID methods, invariant operations are effective in extracting domain generalization features, and Instance Normalization (IN) or Batch Normalization (BN) is used to alleviate the bias to unseen domains. Due to domain-specific information being used to capture discriminability of the individual source domain, the generalized ability for unseen domains is unsatisfactory. To address this problem, an Attention-aware Multi-operation Strategery (AMS) for DG Re-ID is proposed to extract more generalized features. We investigate invariant operations and construct a multi-operation module based on IN and group whitening (GW) to extract domain-invariant feature representations. Furthermore, we analyze different domain-invariant characteristics, and apply spatial attention to the IN operation and channel attention to the GW operation to enhance the domain-invariant features. The proposed AMS module can be used as a plug-and-play module to incorporate into existing network architectures. Extensive experimental results show that AMS can effectively enhance the model's generalization ability to unseen domains and significantly improves the recognition performance in DG Re-ID on three protocols with ten datasets.
abstract_zh: 域泛化行人重识别（DG Re-ID）旨在将在源域上训练的模型直接部署到未见过的目标域上，并具有良好的泛化性，这是一个具有挑战性的问题，在实际部署中具有实用价值。在现有的DG Re-ID方法中，不变操作可以有效地提取域泛化特征，并且使用实例归一化（IN）或批量归一化（BN）来减轻对未见域的偏差。由于使用特定于域的信息来捕获各个源域的可区分性，因此对于未见过的域的泛化能力并不令人满意。为了解决这个问题，提出了一种用于 DG Re-ID 的注意感知多操作策略（AMS）来提取更通用的特征。我们研究不变操作并构建基于 IN 和组白化（GW）的多操作模块来提取域不变特征表示。此外，我们分析了不同的域不变特征，并将空间注意力应用于IN操作，将通道注意力应用于GW操作，以增强域不变特征。所提出的 AMS 模块可以用作即插即用模块，并入现有的网络架构中。大量实验结果表明，AMS 可以有效增强模型对未见领域的泛化能力，并显着提高 DG Re-ID 在三种协议、十个数据集上的识别性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种注意力感知的多操作策略（AMS），用于提升领域自适应行人重识别（DG Re-ID）模型在未见领域的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有DG Re-ID方法依赖于不变操作（如IN/BN）提取领域不变特征，但因过度依赖领域特定信息导致未见领域泛化能力不足。
AI.method: 设计AMS模块，结合实例归一化（IN）与组白化（GW）构建多操作特征提取网络，并引入空间注意力增强IN、通道注意力增强GW以强化领域不变特征。
AI.result: 在三个协议十个数据集上的实验表明，AMS显著提升了DG Re-ID的识别性能，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: AMS模块作为通用组件可有效增强模型跨领域泛化能力，为DG Re-ID提供新思路。

search_text: Domain generalization Person Re-identification on Attention-aware multi-operation strategery 注意力感知多操作策略的领域泛化行人重识别 Domain generalization person re-identification (DG Re-ID) aims to directly deploy a model trained on the source domain to the unseen target domain with good generalization, which is a challenging problem and has practical value in a real-world deployment. In the existing DG Re-ID methods, invariant operations are effective in extracting domain generalization features, and Instance Normalization (IN) or Batch Normalization (BN) is used to alleviate the bias to unseen domains. Due to domain-specific information being used to capture discriminability of the individual source domain, the generalized ability for unseen domains is unsatisfactory. To address this problem, an Attention-aware Multi-operation Strategery (AMS) for DG Re-ID is proposed to extract more generalized features. We investigate invariant operations and construct a multi-operation module based on IN and group whitening (GW) to extract domain-invariant feature representations. Furthermore, we analyze different domain-invariant characteristics, and apply spatial attention to the IN operation and channel attention to the GW operation to enhance the domain-invariant features. The proposed AMS module can be used as a plug-and-play module to incorporate into existing network architectures. Extensive experimental results show that AMS can effectively enhance the model's generalization ability to unseen domains and significantly improves the recognition performance in DG Re-ID on three protocols with ten datasets. 域泛化行人重识别（DG Re-ID）旨在将在源域上训练的模型直接部署到未见过的目标域上，并具有良好的泛化性，这是一个具有挑战性的问题，在实际部署中具有实用价值。在现有的DG Re-ID方法中，不变操作可以有效地提取域泛化特征，并且使用实例归一化（IN）或批量归一化（BN）来减轻对未见域的偏差。由于使用特定于域的信息来捕获各个源域的可区分性，因此对于未见过的域的泛化能力并不令人满意。为了解决这个问题，提出了一种用于 DG Re-ID 的注意感知多操作策略（AMS）来提取更通用的特征。我们研究不变操作并构建基于 IN 和组白化（GW）的多操作模块来提取域不变特征表示。此外，我们分析了不同的域不变特征，并将空间注意力应用于IN操作，将通道注意力应用于GW操作，以增强域不变特征。所提出的 AMS 模块可以用作即插即用模块，并入现有的网络架构中。大量实验结果表明，AMS 可以有效增强模型对未见领域的泛化能力，并显着提高 DG Re-ID 在三种协议、十个数据集上的识别性能。 本文提出一种注意力感知的多操作策略（AMS），用于提升领域自适应行人重识别（DG Re-ID）模型在未见领域的泛化能力。 Yingchun Guo,Huan He,Ye Zhu,Yang Yu cs.CV

title: Segmentation-free Direct Iris Localization Networks
title_zh: 无分段直接虹膜定位网络
abstract: This paper proposes an efficient iris localization method without using iris segmentation and circle fitting. Conventional iris localization methods first extract iris regions by using semantic segmentation methods such as U-Net. Afterward, the inner and outer iris circles are localized using the traditional circle fitting algorithm. However, this approach requires high-resolution encoder-decoder networks for iris segmentation, so it causes computational costs to be high. In addition, traditional circle fitting tends to be sensitive to noise in input images and fitting parameters, causing the iris recognition performance to be poor. To solve these problems, we propose an iris localization network (ILN), that can directly localize pupil and iris circles with eyelid points from a low-resolution iris image. We also introduce a pupil refinement network (PRN) to improve the accuracy of pupil localization. Experimental results show that the combination of ILN and PRN works in 34.5 ms for one iris image on a CPU, and its localization performance outperforms conventional iris segmentation methods. In addition, generalized evaluation results show that the proposed method has higher robustness for datasets in different domain than other segmentation methods. Furthermore, we also confirm that the proposed ILN and PRN improve the iris recognition accuracy.
summary: This paper proposes an efficient iris localization method without using iris segmentation and circle fitting. Conventional iris localization methods first extract iris regions by using semantic segmentation methods such as U-Net. Afterward, the inner and outer iris circles are localized using the traditional circle fitting algorithm. However, this approach requires high-resolution encoder-decoder networks for iris segmentation, so it causes computational costs to be high. In addition, traditional circle fitting tends to be sensitive to noise in input images and fitting parameters, causing the iris recognition performance to be poor. To solve these problems, we propose an iris localization network (ILN), that can directly localize pupil and iris circles with eyelid points from a low-resolution iris image. We also introduce a pupil refinement network (PRN) to improve the accuracy of pupil localization. Experimental results show that the combination of ILN and PRN works in 34.5 ms for one iris image on a CPU, and its localization performance outperforms conventional iris segmentation methods. In addition, generalized evaluation results show that the proposed method has higher robustness for datasets in different domain than other segmentation methods. Furthermore, we also confirm that the proposed ILN and PRN improve the iris recognition accuracy.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种不使用虹膜分割和圆拟合的有效虹膜定位方法。传统的虹膜定位方法首先使用U-Net等语义分割方法提取虹膜区域。然后，使用传统的圆拟合算法来定位内、外虹膜圆。然而，这种方法需要高分辨率的编码器-解码器网络来进行虹膜分割，因此导致计算成本很高。此外，传统的圆拟合往往对输入图像中的噪声和拟合参数敏感，导致虹膜识别性能较差。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种虹膜定位网络（ILN），它可以利用低分辨率虹膜图像中的眼睑点直接定位瞳孔和虹膜圆。我们还引入了瞳孔细化网络（PRN）来提高瞳孔定位的准确性。实验结果表明，ILN 和 PRN 的组合在 CPU 上处理一张虹膜图像只需 34.5 ms，其定位性能优于传统虹膜分割方法。此外，广义评估结果表明，该方法对于不同领域的数据集比其他分割方法具有更高的鲁棒性。此外，我们还证实所提出的 ILN 和 PRN 提高了虹膜识别的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需分割和圆拟合的高效虹膜定位方法。
AI.motivation: 传统虹膜定位方法需要高分辨率的编码器-解码器网络进行虹膜分割，导致计算成本高，且圆拟合对输入图像中的噪声和拟合参数敏感，影响虹膜识别性能。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种虹膜定位网络（ILN），可以直接利用低分辨率虹膜图像中的眼睑点定位瞳孔和虹膜圆，并引入了瞳孔精炼网络（PRN）以提高瞳孔定位的准确性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，ILN和PRN在CPU上处理一张虹膜图像仅需34.5毫秒，其定位性能优于传统分割方法，且在不同领域的数据集上表现出更高的鲁棒性，同时提高了虹膜识别的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的ILN和PRN方法在计算效率和鲁棒性方面优于传统方法，为虹膜识别提供了更优的解决方案。

authors_text: Lingxiao Huang,Shaofeng H. -C. Jiang,Jianing Lou,Xuan Wu
title: Near-optimal Coresets for Robust Clustering
title_zh: 稳健集群的近乎最佳核心集
abstract: We consider robust clustering problems in $\mathbb{R}^d$, specifically $k$-clustering problems (e.g., $k$-Median and $k$-Means with $m$ outliers, where the cost for a given center set $C \subset \mathbb{R}^d$ aggregates the distances from $C$ to all but the furthest $m$ data points, instead of all points as in classical clustering. We focus on the $ε$-coreset for robust clustering, a small proxy of the dataset that preserves the clustering cost within $ε$-relative error for all center sets. Our main result is an $ε$-coreset of size $O(m + \mathrm{poly}(k ε^{-1}))$ that can be constructed in near-linear time. This significantly improves previous results, which either suffers an exponential dependence on $(m + k)$ [Feldman and Schulman, SODA'12], or has a weaker bi-criteria guarantee [Huang et al., FOCS'18]. Furthermore, we show this dependence in $m$ is nearly-optimal, and the fact that it is isolated from other factors may be crucial for dealing with large number of outliers. We construct our coresets by adapting to the outlier setting a recent framework [Braverman et al., FOCS'22] which was designed for capacity-constrained clustering, overcoming a new challenge that the participating terms in the cost, particularly the excluded $m$ outlier points, are dependent on the center set $C$. We validate our coresets on various datasets, and we observe a superior size-accuracy tradeoff compared with popular baselines including uniform sampling and sensitivity sampling. We also achieve a significant speedup of existing approximation algorithms for robust clustering using our coresets.
summary: We consider robust clustering problems in $\mathbb{R}^d$, specifically $k$-clustering problems (e.g., $k$-Median and $k$-Means with $m$ outliers, where the cost for a given center set $C \subset \mathbb{R}^d$ aggregates the distances from $C$ to all but the furthest $m$ data points, instead of all points as in classical clustering. We focus on the $ε$-coreset for robust clustering, a small proxy of the dataset that preserves the clustering cost within $ε$-relative error for all center sets. Our main result is an $ε$-coreset of size $O(m + \mathrm{poly}(k ε^{-1}))$ that can be constructed in near-linear time. This significantly improves previous results, which either suffers an exponential dependence on $(m + k)$ [Feldman and Schulman, SODA'12], or has a weaker bi-criteria guarantee [Huang et al., FOCS'18]. Furthermore, we show this dependence in $m$ is nearly-optimal, and the fact that it is isolated from other factors may be crucial for dealing with large number of outliers. We construct our coresets by adapting to the outlier setting a recent framework [Braverman et al., FOCS'22] which was designed for capacity-constrained clustering, overcoming a new challenge that the participating terms in the cost, particularly the excluded $m$ outlier points, are dependent on the center set $C$. We validate our coresets on various datasets, and we observe a superior size-accuracy tradeoff compared with popular baselines including uniform sampling and sensitivity sampling. We also achieve a significant speedup of existing approximation algorithms for robust clustering using our coresets.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑 $\mathbb{R}^d$ 中的鲁棒聚类问题，特别是 $k$ 聚类问题（例如，$k$-Median 和 $k$-Means 具有 $m$ 异常值，其中给定中心集 $C \subset \mathbb{R}^d$ 的成本聚合从 $C$ 到除最远 $m$ 数据点之外的所有数据点的距离，而不是像经典聚类中的所有点。我们关注用于稳健聚类的 $ε$-coreset，它是数据集的一个小型代理，可将所有中心集的聚类成本保持在 $ε$ 相对误差内。我们的主要结果是可以在近线性时间内构建大小为 $O(m + \mathrm{poly}(k ε^{-1}))$ 的 $ε$-coreset，这显着改善了先前的结果，该结果要么对 $(m + k)$ 呈指数依赖关系。 SODA'12]，或者具有较弱的双标准保证 [Huang 等人，FOCS'18] 此外，我们表明这种对 $m$ 的依赖性几乎是最佳的，并且它与其他因素隔离的事实对于处理大量异常值可能至关重要，我们通过适应异常值设置最近的框架来构造我们的核心集 [Braverman 等人，FOCS'22]，该框架是为容量受限的聚类而设计的。一个新的挑战是，成本中的参与项，特别是排除的 $m$ 异常点，取决于中心集 $C$。我们在各种数据集上验证了我们的核心集，并且与包括均匀采样和灵敏度采样在内的流行基线相比，我们观察到了卓越的尺寸精度权衡。我们还使用我们的核心集实现了稳健聚类的现有近似算法的显着加速。

AI.tldr: 本文研究具有异常值的鲁棒聚类问题，提出一种近似最优的ε-coreset方法，用于在高维空间中高效处理k-中位数和k-均值等聚类问题。
AI.motivation: 传统聚类方法对异常值敏感，而现有coreset方法在处理大量异常值时存在指数级复杂度或较弱的双标准保证，需改进以提升效率和准确性。
AI.method: 通过改进Braverman等人提出的容量约束聚类框架，适应异常值场景，克服了成本计算中被排除的异常值依赖中心集的挑战，构建近线性时间的coreset。
AI.result: 提出coreset大小为O(m + poly(k ε⁻¹))，显著优于之前结果；实验验证显示其在数据集上具有更优的精度-规模权衡，并加速现有近似算法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在m的依赖上接近最优，且与其他因素解耦，为处理大量异常值提供关键优势，同时在实践中优于均匀采样等基准方法。

search_text: Near-optimal Coresets for Robust Clustering 稳健集群的近乎最佳核心集 We consider robust clustering problems in $\mathbb{R}^d$, specifically $k$-clustering problems (e.g., $k$-Median and $k$-Means with $m$ outliers, where the cost for a given center set $C \subset \mathbb{R}^d$ aggregates the distances from $C$ to all but the furthest $m$ data points, instead of all points as in classical clustering. We focus on the $ε$-coreset for robust clustering, a small proxy of the dataset that preserves the clustering cost within $ε$-relative error for all center sets. Our main result is an $ε$-coreset of size $O(m + \mathrm{poly}(k ε^{-1}))$ that can be constructed in near-linear time. This significantly improves previous results, which either suffers an exponential dependence on $(m + k)$ [Feldman and Schulman, SODA'12], or has a weaker bi-criteria guarantee [Huang et al., FOCS'18]. Furthermore, we show this dependence in $m$ is nearly-optimal, and the fact that it is isolated from other factors may be crucial for dealing with large number of outliers. We construct our coresets by adapting to the outlier setting a recent framework [Braverman et al., FOCS'22] which was designed for capacity-constrained clustering, overcoming a new challenge that the participating terms in the cost, particularly the excluded $m$ outlier points, are dependent on the center set $C$. We validate our coresets on various datasets, and we observe a superior size-accuracy tradeoff compared with popular baselines including uniform sampling and sensitivity sampling. We also achieve a significant speedup of existing approximation algorithms for robust clustering using our coresets. 我们考虑 $\mathbb{R}^d$ 中的鲁棒聚类问题，特别是 $k$ 聚类问题（例如，$k$-Median 和 $k$-Means 具有 $m$ 异常值，其中给定中心集 $C \subset \mathbb{R}^d$ 的成本聚合从 $C$ 到除最远 $m$ 数据点之外的所有数据点的距离，而不是像经典聚类中的所有点。我们关注用于稳健聚类的 $ε$-coreset，它是数据集的一个小型代理，可将所有中心集的聚类成本保持在 $ε$ 相对误差内。我们的主要结果是可以在近线性时间内构建大小为 $O(m + \mathrm{poly}(k ε^{-1}))$ 的 $ε$-coreset，这显着改善了先前的结果，该结果要么对 $(m + k)$ 呈指数依赖关系。 SODA'12]，或者具有较弱的双标准保证 [Huang 等人，FOCS'18] 此外，我们表明这种对 $m$ 的依赖性几乎是最佳的，并且它与其他因素隔离的事实对于处理大量异常值可能至关重要，我们通过适应异常值设置最近的框架来构造我们的核心集 [Braverman 等人，FOCS'22]，该框架是为容量受限的聚类而设计的。一个新的挑战是，成本中的参与项，特别是排除的 $m$ 异常点，取决于中心集 $C$。我们在各种数据集上验证了我们的核心集，并且与包括均匀采样和灵敏度采样在内的流行基线相比，我们观察到了卓越的尺寸精度权衡。我们还使用我们的核心集实现了稳健聚类的现有近似算法的显着加速。 本文研究具有异常值的鲁棒聚类问题，提出一种近似最优的ε-coreset方法，用于在高维空间中高效处理k-中位数和k-均值等聚类问题。 Lingxiao Huang,Shaofeng H. -C. Jiang,Jianing Lou,Xuan Wu cs.DS

title: Spatio-channel Attention Blocks for Cross-modal Crowd Counting
title_zh: 用于跨模式人群计数的空间通道注意力模块
comment: Accepted to ACCV 2022 (Oral). Code is available at https://github.com/vcllab/csca
comments: Accepted to ACCV 2022 (Oral). Code is available at https://github.com/vcllab/csca
abstract: Crowd counting research has made significant advancements in real-world applications, but it remains a formidable challenge in cross-modal settings. Most existing methods rely solely on the optical features of RGB images, ignoring the feasibility of other modalities such as thermal and depth images. The inherently significant differences between the different modalities and the diversity of design choices for model architectures make cross-modal crowd counting more challenging. In this paper, we propose Cross-modal Spatio-Channel Attention (CSCA) blocks, which can be easily integrated into any modality-specific architecture. The CSCA blocks first spatially capture global functional correlations among multi-modality with less overhead through spatial-wise cross-modal attention. Cross-modal features with spatial attention are subsequently refined through adaptive channel-wise feature aggregation. In our experiments, the proposed block consistently shows significant performance improvement across various backbone networks, resulting in state-of-the-art results in RGB-T and RGB-D crowd counting.
summary: Crowd counting research has made significant advancements in real-world applications, but it remains a formidable challenge in cross-modal settings. Most existing methods rely solely on the optical features of RGB images, ignoring the feasibility of other modalities such as thermal and depth images. The inherently significant differences between the different modalities and the diversity of design choices for model architectures make cross-modal crowd counting more challenging. In this paper, we propose Cross-modal Spatio-Channel Attention (CSCA) blocks, which can be easily integrated into any modality-specific architecture. The CSCA blocks first spatially capture global functional correlations among multi-modality with less overhead through spatial-wise cross-modal attention. Cross-modal features with spatial attention are subsequently refined through adaptive channel-wise feature aggregation. In our experiments, the proposed block consistently shows significant performance improvement across various backbone networks, resulting in state-of-the-art results in RGB-T and RGB-D crowd counting.
abstract_zh: 人群计数研究在现实世界的应用中取得了重大进展，但在跨模式环境中仍然是一个巨大的挑战。大多数现有方法仅依赖于 RGB 图像的光学特征，忽略了热图像和深度图像等其他模式的可行性。不同模式之间本质上存在的显着差异以及模型架构设计选择的多样性使得跨模式人群计数更具挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了跨模态空间通道注意（CSCA）块，它可以轻松集成到任何特定模态的架构中。 CSCA 块首先通过空间方向的跨模态注意以较少的开销在空间上捕获多模态之间的全局功能相关性。随后通过自适应通道特征聚合来细化具有空间注意力的跨模态特征。在我们的实验中，所提出的块在各种骨干网络中始终显示出显着的性能改进，从而在 RGB-T 和 RGB-D 人群计数中产生了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种跨模态人群计数方法，通过设计Spatio-Channel Attention模块提升多模态（RGB-热/深度）人群密度估计性能。
AI.motivation: 现有跨模态人群计数方法过度依赖RGB图像光学特征，忽视热成像/深度图像等模态信息，且多模态特征差异与模型架构设计多样性导致性能瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出CSCA模块：1) 通过空间交叉模态注意力机制捕捉多模态全局相关性；2) 基于自适应通道聚合优化跨模态特征表示，可无缝集成任意单模态网络架构。
AI.result: 在RGB-T和RGB-D数据集上，CSCA模块在多种骨干网络中均实现性能提升，达到当时最先进的计数精度。
AI.conclusion: CSCA模块通过有效融合多模态特征解决了跨模态人群计数难题，其模块化设计为后续研究提供通用解决方案。

authors_text: Mengmeng Jing,Xiantong Zhen,Jingjing Li,Cees G. M. Snoek
title: Variational Model Perturbation for Source-Free Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 无源域适应的变分模型扰动
abstract: We aim for source-free domain adaptation, where the task is to deploy a model pre-trained on source domains to target domains. The challenges stem from the distribution shift from the source to the target domain, coupled with the unavailability of any source data and labeled target data for optimization. Rather than fine-tuning the model by updating the parameters, we propose to perturb the source model to achieve adaptation to target domains. We introduce perturbations into the model parameters by variational Bayesian inference in a probabilistic framework. By doing so, we can effectively adapt the model to the target domain while largely preserving the discriminative ability. Importantly, we demonstrate the theoretical connection to learning Bayesian neural networks, which proves the generalizability of the perturbed model to target domains. To enable more efficient optimization, we further employ a parameter sharing strategy, which substantially reduces the learnable parameters compared to a fully Bayesian neural network. Our model perturbation provides a new probabilistic way for domain adaptation which enables efficient adaptation to target domains while maximally preserving knowledge in source models. Experiments on several source-free benchmarks under three different evaluation settings verify the effectiveness of the proposed variational model perturbation for source-free domain adaptation.
summary: We aim for source-free domain adaptation, where the task is to deploy a model pre-trained on source domains to target domains. The challenges stem from the distribution shift from the source to the target domain, coupled with the unavailability of any source data and labeled target data for optimization. Rather than fine-tuning the model by updating the parameters, we propose to perturb the source model to achieve adaptation to target domains. We introduce perturbations into the model parameters by variational Bayesian inference in a probabilistic framework. By doing so, we can effectively adapt the model to the target domain while largely preserving the discriminative ability. Importantly, we demonstrate the theoretical connection to learning Bayesian neural networks, which proves the generalizability of the perturbed model to target domains. To enable more efficient optimization, we further employ a parameter sharing strategy, which substantially reduces the learnable parameters compared to a fully Bayesian neural network. Our model perturbation provides a new probabilistic way for domain adaptation which enables efficient adaptation to target domains while maximally preserving knowledge in source models. Experiments on several source-free benchmarks under three different evaluation settings verify the effectiveness of the proposed variational model perturbation for source-free domain adaptation.
abstract_zh: 我们的目标是无源域适应，其任务是将在源域上预先训练的模型部署到目标域。挑战源于分布从源域到目标域的转变，再加上无法获得任何源数据和用于优化的标记目标数据。我们建议扰动源模型以实现对目标域的适应，而不是通过更新参数来微调模型。我们通过概率框架中的变分贝叶斯推理将扰动引入模型参数。通过这样做，我们可以有效地使模型适应目标领域，同时在很大程度上保留判别能力。重要的是，我们证明了与学习贝叶斯神经网络的理论联系，这证明了扰动模型对目标领域的普遍性。为了实现更有效的优化，我们进一步采用参数共享策略，与完全贝叶斯神经网络相比，该策略大大减少了可学习参数。我们的模型扰动为域适应提供了一种新的概率方法，可以有效地适应目标域，同时最大限度地保留源模型中的知识。在三种不同评估设置下对多个无源基准进行的实验验证了所提出的无源域适应变分模型扰动的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需源域数据的领域自适应方法，通过参数扰动实现目标领域的模型适应。
AI.motivation: 源域数据不可用且目标领域无标注数据，传统微调方法受限，需探索新适应策略以保持模型判别能力。
AI.method: 基于变分贝叶斯推断框架，通过扰动模型参数实现自适应，结合参数共享策略降低计算复杂度。
AI.result: 在多个源域无关基准测试中验证了方法有效性，证明扰动模型在目标领域的泛化能力。

search_text: Variational Model Perturbation for Source-Free Domain Adaptation 无源域适应的变分模型扰动 We aim for source-free domain adaptation, where the task is to deploy a model pre-trained on source domains to target domains. The challenges stem from the distribution shift from the source to the target domain, coupled with the unavailability of any source data and labeled target data for optimization. Rather than fine-tuning the model by updating the parameters, we propose to perturb the source model to achieve adaptation to target domains. We introduce perturbations into the model parameters by variational Bayesian inference in a probabilistic framework. By doing so, we can effectively adapt the model to the target domain while largely preserving the discriminative ability. Importantly, we demonstrate the theoretical connection to learning Bayesian neural networks, which proves the generalizability of the perturbed model to target domains. To enable more efficient optimization, we further employ a parameter sharing strategy, which substantially reduces the learnable parameters compared to a fully Bayesian neural network. Our model perturbation provides a new probabilistic way for domain adaptation which enables efficient adaptation to target domains while maximally preserving knowledge in source models. Experiments on several source-free benchmarks under three different evaluation settings verify the effectiveness of the proposed variational model perturbation for source-free domain adaptation. 我们的目标是无源域适应，其任务是将在源域上预先训练的模型部署到目标域。挑战源于分布从源域到目标域的转变，再加上无法获得任何源数据和用于优化的标记目标数据。我们建议扰动源模型以实现对目标域的适应，而不是通过更新参数来微调模型。我们通过概率框架中的变分贝叶斯推理将扰动引入模型参数。通过这样做，我们可以有效地使模型适应目标领域，同时在很大程度上保留判别能力。重要的是，我们证明了与学习贝叶斯神经网络的理论联系，这证明了扰动模型对目标领域的普遍性。为了实现更有效的优化，我们进一步采用参数共享策略，与完全贝叶斯神经网络相比，该策略大大减少了可学习参数。我们的模型扰动为域适应提供了一种新的概率方法，可以有效地适应目标域，同时最大限度地保留源模型中的知识。在三种不同评估设置下对多个无源基准进行的实验验证了所提出的无源域适应变分模型扰动的有效性。 本文提出一种无需源域数据的领域自适应方法，通过参数扰动实现目标领域的模型适应。 Mengmeng Jing,Xiantong Zhen,Jingjing Li,Cees G. M. Snoek cs.LG,cs.CV

title: Co-guiding Net: Achieving Mutual Guidances between Multiple Intent Detection and Slot Filling via Heterogeneous Semantics-Label Graphs
title_zh: 共引导网络：通过异构语义标签图实现多意图检测和槽填充之间的相互引导
comment: Accepted as Oral Presentation at EMNLP 2022
comments: Accepted as Oral Presentation at EMNLP 2022
abstract: Recent graph-based models for joint multiple intent detection and slot filling have obtained promising results through modeling the guidance from the prediction of intents to the decoding of slot filling. However, existing methods (1) only model the \textit{unidirectional guidance} from intent to slot; (2) adopt \textit{homogeneous graphs} to model the interactions between the slot semantics nodes and intent label nodes, which limit the performance. In this paper, we propose a novel model termed Co-guiding Net, which implements a two-stage framework achieving the \textit{mutual guidances} between the two tasks. In the first stage, the initial estimated labels of both tasks are produced, and then they are leveraged in the second stage to model the mutual guidances. Specifically, we propose two \textit{heterogeneous graph attention networks} working on the proposed two \textit{heterogeneous semantics-label graphs}, which effectively represent the relations among the semantics nodes and label nodes. Experiment results show that our model outperforms existing models by a large margin, obtaining a relative improvement of 19.3\% over the previous best model on MixATIS dataset in overall accuracy.
summary: Recent graph-based models for joint multiple intent detection and slot filling have obtained promising results through modeling the guidance from the prediction of intents to the decoding of slot filling. However, existing methods (1) only model the \textit{unidirectional guidance} from intent to slot; (2) adopt \textit{homogeneous graphs} to model the interactions between the slot semantics nodes and intent label nodes, which limit the performance. In this paper, we propose a novel model termed Co-guiding Net, which implements a two-stage framework achieving the \textit{mutual guidances} between the two tasks. In the first stage, the initial estimated labels of both tasks are produced, and then they are leveraged in the second stage to model the mutual guidances. Specifically, we propose two \textit{heterogeneous graph attention networks} working on the proposed two \textit{heterogeneous semantics-label graphs}, which effectively represent the relations among the semantics nodes and label nodes. Experiment results show that our model outperforms existing models by a large margin, obtaining a relative improvement of 19.3\% over the previous best model on MixATIS dataset in overall accuracy.
abstract_zh: 最近用于联合多意图检测和槽填充的基于图的模型通过对从意图预测到槽填充解码的指导进行建模，获得了有希望的结果。然而，现有方法（1）仅对从意图到槽位的\textit{单向引导}进行建模； （2）采用\textit{同质图}对槽语义节点和意图标签节点之间的交互进行建模，这限制了性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为“共同引导网络”的新颖模型，它实现了一个两阶段框架，实现了两个任务之间的 \textit{相互指导}。在第一阶段，生成两个任务的初始估计标签，然后在第二阶段利用它们来对相互指导进行建模。具体来说，我们提出了两个 \textit{异构图注意网络} 工作在所提出的两个 \textit{异构语义标签图} 上，它们有效地表示语义节点和标签节点之间的关系。实验结果表明，我们的模型大幅优于现有模型，在 MixATIS 数据集上比之前的最佳模型在整体精度上相对提高了 19.3%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Co-guiding Net模型，通过异构语义-标签图实现多意图检测与槽位填充任务间的双向引导，提升联合学习效果。
AI.motivation: 现有图模型仅实现意图到槽位的单向引导且使用同构图，限制了多任务间的交互效果，难以充分挖掘语义与标签节点的复杂关系。
AI.method: 设计两阶段框架：第一阶段生成初始标签，第二阶段构建两个异构图注意力网络，分别作用于语义节点与意图标签节点组成的异构图，实现双向互引导。
AI.result: 在MixATIS数据集上，模型整体准确率较之前最佳方法提升19.3%，显著优于现有模型。
AI.conclusion: 异构图结构与双向引导机制有效增强了多意图检测与槽位填充的联合学习能力，为相关任务提供新思路。

title: Learning Universe Model for Partial Matching Networks over Multiple Graphs
title_zh: 学习多图上部分匹配网络的宇宙模型
abstract: We consider the general setting for partial matching of two or multiple graphs, in the sense that not necessarily all the nodes in one graph can find their correspondences in another graph and vice versa. We take a universe matching perspective to this ubiquitous problem, whereby each node is either matched into an anchor in a virtual universe graph or regarded as an outlier. Such a universe matching scheme enjoys a few important merits, which have not been adopted in existing learning-based graph matching (GM) literature. First, the subtle logic for inlier matching and outlier detection can be clearly modeled, which is otherwise less convenient to handle in the pairwise matching scheme. Second, it enables end-to-end learning especially for universe level affinity metric learning for inliers matching, and loss design for gathering outliers together. Third, the resulting matching model can easily handle new arriving graphs under online matching, or even the graphs coming from different categories of the training set. To our best knowledge, this is the first deep learning network that can cope with two-graph matching, multiple-graph matching, online matching, and mixture graph matching simultaneously. Extensive experimental results show the state-of-the-art performance of our method in these settings.
summary: We consider the general setting for partial matching of two or multiple graphs, in the sense that not necessarily all the nodes in one graph can find their correspondences in another graph and vice versa. We take a universe matching perspective to this ubiquitous problem, whereby each node is either matched into an anchor in a virtual universe graph or regarded as an outlier. Such a universe matching scheme enjoys a few important merits, which have not been adopted in existing learning-based graph matching (GM) literature. First, the subtle logic for inlier matching and outlier detection can be clearly modeled, which is otherwise less convenient to handle in the pairwise matching scheme. Second, it enables end-to-end learning especially for universe level affinity metric learning for inliers matching, and loss design for gathering outliers together. Third, the resulting matching model can easily handle new arriving graphs under online matching, or even the graphs coming from different categories of the training set. To our best knowledge, this is the first deep learning network that can cope with two-graph matching, multiple-graph matching, online matching, and mixture graph matching simultaneously. Extensive experimental results show the state-of-the-art performance of our method in these settings.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑两个或多个图的部分匹配的一般设置，从某种意义上说，不一定一个图中的所有节点都可以在另一个图中找到它们的对应关系，反之亦然。我们从宇宙匹配的角度来看待这个普遍存在的问题，即每个节点要么匹配到虚拟宇宙图中的锚点，要么被视为异常值。这种全域匹配方案具有一些重要的优点，这些优点在现有的基于学习的图匹配（GM）文献中尚未被采用。首先，可以清晰地建模内部匹配和异常检测的微妙逻辑，否则在成对匹配方案中处理起来不太方便。其次，它支持端到端学习，特别是对于用于内部值匹配的宇宙级亲和度度量学习，以及用于将异常值收集在一起的损失设计。第三，生成的匹配模型可以轻松处理在线匹配下新到达的图，甚至来自训练集不同类别的图。据我们所知，这是第一个可以同时处理两图匹配、多图匹配、在线匹配和混合图匹配的深度学习网络。大量的实验结果表明我们的方法在这些设置中具有最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种学习宇宙模型，用于处理多个图之间的部分匹配问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于学习的图匹配方法难以处理图中节点不完全匹配以及在线匹配和混合图匹配的问题，因此需要一种新的方法来解决这些问题。
AI.method: 该方法引入了一个虚拟的宇宙图，将每个节点匹配到宇宙图中的锚点或视为异常值，从而实现端到端的学习，并设计了亲和度度量和损失函数以处理异常值。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在两个图匹配、多图匹配、在线匹配和混合图匹配任务中均取得了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的模型首次能够同时处理多种图匹配场景，并在多个任务中表现出色，为图匹配领域提供了新的解决方案。

Third, the resulting matching model can easily handle new arriving graphs under online matching, or even the graphs coming from different categories of the training set. To our best knowledge, this is the first deep learning network that can cope with two-graph matching, multiple-graph matching, online matching, and mixture graph matching simultaneously. Extensive experimental results show the state-of-the-art performance of our method in these settings. 我们考虑两个或多个图的部分匹配的一般设置，从某种意义上说，不一定一个图中的所有节点都可以在另一个图中找到它们的对应关系，反之亦然。我们从宇宙匹配的角度来看待这个普遍存在的问题，即每个节点要么匹配到虚拟宇宙图中的锚点，要么被视为异常值。这种全域匹配方案具有一些重要的优点，这些优点在现有的基于学习的图匹配（GM）文献中尚未被采用。首先，可以清晰地建模内部匹配和异常检测的微妙逻辑，否则在成对匹配方案中处理起来不太方便。其次，它支持端到端学习，特别是对于用于内部值匹配的宇宙级亲和度度量学习，以及用于将异常值收集在一起的损失设计。第三，生成的匹配模型可以轻松处理在线匹配下新到达的图，甚至来自训练集不同类别的图。据我们所知，这是第一个可以同时处理两图匹配、多图匹配、在线匹配和混合图匹配的深度学习网络。大量的实验结果表明我们的方法在这些设置中具有最先进的性能。 本文提出了一种学习宇宙模型，用于处理多个图之间的部分匹配问题。 Zetian Jiang,Jiaxin Lu,Tianzhe Wang,Junchi Yan cs.AI

authors_text: Jingxun Liang,Zhihao Gavin Tang,Yixuan Even Xu,Yuhao Zhang,Renfei Zhou
title: On the Perturbation Function of Ranking and Balance for Weighted Online Bipartite Matching
title_zh: 加权在线二分匹配的排序与平衡扰动函数研究
comment: Conference version to appear at the European Symposium on Algorithms (ESA 2023). 16 pages, 2 figures, 8 pages appendix
comments: Conference version to appear at the European Symposium on Algorithms (ESA 2023). 16 pages, 2 figures, 8 pages appendix
abstract: Ranking and Balance are arguably the two most important algorithms in the online matching literature. They achieve the same optimal competitive ratio of $1-1/e$ for the integral version and fractional version of online bipartite matching by Karp, Vazirani, and Vazirani (STOC 1990) respectively. The two algorithms have been generalized to weighted online bipartite matching problems, including vertex-weighted online bipartite matching and AdWords, by utilizing a perturbation function. The canonical choice of the perturbation function is $f(x)=1-e^{x-1}$ as it leads to the optimal competitive ratio of $1-1/e$ in both settings. We advance the understanding of the weighted generalizations of Ranking and Balance in this paper, with a focus on studying the effect of different perturbation functions. First, we prove that the canonical perturbation function is the \emph{unique} optimal perturbation function for vertex-weighted online bipartite matching. In stark contrast, all perturbation functions achieve the optimal competitive ratio of $1-1/e$ in the unweighted setting. Second, we prove that the generalization of Ranking to AdWords with unknown budgets using the canonical perturbation function is at most $0.624$ competitive, refuting a conjecture of Vazirani (2021). More generally, as an application of the first result, we prove that no perturbation function leads to the prominent competitive ratio of $1-1/e$ by establishing an upper bound of $1-1/e-0.0003$. Finally, we propose the online budget-additive welfare maximization problem that is intermediate between AdWords and AdWords with unknown budgets, and we design an optimal $1-1/e$ competitive algorithm by generalizing Balance.
summary: Ranking and Balance are arguably the two most important algorithms in the online matching literature. They achieve the same optimal competitive ratio of $1-1/e$ for the integral version and fractional version of online bipartite matching by Karp, Vazirani, and Vazirani (STOC 1990) respectively. The two algorithms have been generalized to weighted online bipartite matching problems, including vertex-weighted online bipartite matching and AdWords, by utilizing a perturbation function. The canonical choice of the perturbation function is $f(x)=1-e^{x-1}$ as it leads to the optimal competitive ratio of $1-1/e$ in both settings. We advance the understanding of the weighted generalizations of Ranking and Balance in this paper, with a focus on studying the effect of different perturbation functions. First, we prove that the canonical perturbation function is the \emph{unique} optimal perturbation function for vertex-weighted online bipartite matching. In stark contrast, all perturbation functions achieve the optimal competitive ratio of $1-1/e$ in the unweighted setting. Second, we prove that the generalization of Ranking to AdWords with unknown budgets using the canonical perturbation function is at most $0.624$ competitive, refuting a conjecture of Vazirani (2021). More generally, as an application of the first result, we prove that no perturbation function leads to the prominent competitive ratio of $1-1/e$ by establishing an upper bound of $1-1/e-0.0003$. Finally, we propose the online budget-additive welfare maximization problem that is intermediate between AdWords and AdWords with unknown budgets, and we design an optimal $1-1/e$ competitive algorithm by generalizing Balance.
abstract_zh: 排名和平衡可以说是在线匹配文献中两个最重要的算法。对于 Karp、Vazirani 和 Vazirani (STOC 1990) 的在线二分匹配的积分版本和分数版本，他们分别实现了相同的最优竞争比 $1-1/e$。通过利用扰动函数，这两种算法已推广到加权在线二分匹配问题，包括顶点加权在线二分匹配和 AdWords。扰动函数的规范选择是 $f(x)=1-e^{x-1}$，因为它在两种设置中都会导致 $1-1/e$ 的最佳竞争比。在本文中，我们推进了对排名和平衡的加权概括的理解，重点是研究不同扰动函数的影响。首先，我们证明规范扰动函数是顶点加权在线二分匹配的\emph{unique}最优扰动函数。与此形成鲜明对比的是，所有扰动函数在未加权的情况下都实现了 $1-1/e$ 的最佳竞争比。其次，我们证明使用规范扰动函数将未知预算的排名推广到 AdWords 最多具有 0.624 美元的竞争力，驳斥了 Vazirani（2021）的猜想。更一般地说，作为第一个结果的应用，我们通过建立 $1-1/e-0.0003$ 的上限来证明没有扰动函数会导致 $1-1/e$ 的显着竞争比。最后，我们提出了介于 AdWords 和预算未知的 AdWords 之间的在线预算加性福利最大化问题，并通过推广 Balance 设计了最优的 $1-1/e$ 竞争算法。

AI.tldr: 研究在线二分图匹配中Ranking和Balance算法的加权推广，重点分析扰动函数对算法性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 经典Ranking和Balance算法在未加权场景下达到最优竞争比1-1/e，但它们在加权场景下的推广依赖于扰动函数的选择。本文旨在深入理解扰动函数的作用，特别是探究规范扰动函数是否唯一最优，并解决相关猜想。
AI.method: 通过理论证明分析不同扰动函数下加权Ranking和Balance算法的竞争比。具体包括：证明规范扰动函数在顶点加权场景下的唯一最优性；分析AdWords未知预算场景中Ranking推广的竞争比上界；提出在线预算可加社会福利最大化问题并设计最优算法。
AI.result: 1. 规范扰动函数是顶点加权在线二分图匹配的唯一最优扰动函数；2. 在未加权场景下所有扰动函数均达到最优竞争比1-1/e；3. 规范扰动函数下Ranking推广到AdWords未知预算的竞争比至多为0.624，推翻了Vazirani猜想；4. 任何扰动函数在AdWords未知预算场景下无法达到1-1/e，上界为1-1/e-0.0003；5. 提出了在线预算可加社会福利最大化问题并为Balance设计了最优1-1/e竞争比算法。
AI.conclusion: 规范扰动函数在顶点加权场景中具有唯一最优性，但在更一般的加权场景（如AdWords未知预算）中并不足以达到最优竞争比，说明了不同加权场景对扰动函数要求的本质差异。同时，新提出的中间问题有助于更精细地理解加权在线匹配的难度层次。

title: Group is better than individual: Exploiting Label Topologies and Label Relations for Joint Multiple Intent Detection and Slot Filling
title_zh: 团体优于个人：利用标签拓扑和标签关系进行联合多意图检测和槽填充
abstract: Recent joint multiple intent detection and slot filling models employ label embeddings to achieve the semantics-label interactions. However, they treat all labels and label embeddings as uncorrelated individuals, ignoring the dependencies among them. Besides, they conduct the decoding for the two tasks independently, without leveraging the correlations between them. Therefore, in this paper, we first construct a Heterogeneous Label Graph (HLG) containing two kinds of topologies: (1) statistical dependencies based on labels' co-occurrence patterns and hierarchies in slot labels; (2) rich relations among the label nodes. Then we propose a novel model termed ReLa-Net. It can capture beneficial correlations among the labels from HLG. The label correlations are leveraged to enhance semantic-label interactions. Moreover, we also propose the label-aware inter-dependent decoding mechanism to further exploit the label correlations for decoding. Experiment results show that our ReLa-Net significantly outperforms previous models. Remarkably, ReLa-Net surpasses the previous best model by over 20\% in terms of overall accuracy on MixATIS dataset.
summary: Recent joint multiple intent detection and slot filling models employ label embeddings to achieve the semantics-label interactions. However, they treat all labels and label embeddings as uncorrelated individuals, ignoring the dependencies among them. Besides, they conduct the decoding for the two tasks independently, without leveraging the correlations between them. Therefore, in this paper, we first construct a Heterogeneous Label Graph (HLG) containing two kinds of topologies: (1) statistical dependencies based on labels' co-occurrence patterns and hierarchies in slot labels; (2) rich relations among the label nodes. Then we propose a novel model termed ReLa-Net. It can capture beneficial correlations among the labels from HLG. The label correlations are leveraged to enhance semantic-label interactions. Moreover, we also propose the label-aware inter-dependent decoding mechanism to further exploit the label correlations for decoding. Experiment results show that our ReLa-Net significantly outperforms previous models. Remarkably, ReLa-Net surpasses the previous best model by over 20\% in terms of overall accuracy on MixATIS dataset.
abstract_zh: 最近的联合多意图检测和槽填充模型采用标签嵌入来实现语义标签交互。然而，他们将所有标签和标签嵌入视为不相关的个​​体，忽略了它们之间的依赖关系。此外，他们独立地对这两个任务进行解码，没有利用它们之间的相关性。因此，在本文中，我们首先构建一个包含两种拓扑的异构标签图（HLG）：（1）基于标签共现模式和槽标签层次结构的统计依赖性； (2)丰富的标签节点之间的关系。然后我们提出了一种称为 ReLa-Net 的新颖模型。它可以捕获 HLG 标签之间的有益相关性。利用标签相关性来增强语义标签交互。此外，我们还提出了标签感知的相互依赖解码机制，以进一步利用标签相关性进行解码。实验结果表明，我们的 ReLa-Net 明显优于以前的模型。值得注意的是，ReLa-Net 在 MixATIS 数据集上的整体精度超过了之前的最佳模型 20% 以上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种联合多意图检测和槽位填充的模型ReLa-Net，通过利用标签拓扑结构和标签间关系提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有模型将标签视为独立个体，忽略了标签间的依赖关系及任务间的关联性，导致语义-标签交互不足。
AI.method: 构建包含统计依赖和标签节点关系的异构标签图（HLG），设计ReLa-Net模型捕捉标签相关性，并提出标签感知的联合解码机制。
AI.result: 在MixATIS数据集上，ReLa-Net较之前最佳模型整体准确率提升超20%。
AI.conclusion: 通过建模标签拓扑与关系，联合优化多任务解码，能显著提升意图检测与槽位填充的性能。

ai_content_json.method: 构建包含统计依赖和标签节点关系的异构标签图（HLG），设计ReLa-Net模型捕捉标签相关性，并提出标签感知的联合解码机制。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 通过建模标签拓扑与关系，联合优化多任务解码，能显著提升意图检测与槽位填充的性能。

motivation: 现有模型将标签视为独立个体，忽略了标签间的依赖关系及任务间的关联性，导致语义-标签交互不足。
method: 构建包含统计依赖和标签节点关系的异构标签图（HLG），设计ReLa-Net模型捕捉标签相关性，并提出标签感知的联合解码机制。

search_text: Group is better than individual: Exploiting Label Topologies and Label Relations for Joint Multiple Intent Detection and Slot Filling 团体优于个人：利用标签拓扑和标签关系进行联合多意图检测和槽填充 Recent joint multiple intent detection and slot filling models employ label embeddings to achieve the semantics-label interactions. However, they treat all labels and label embeddings as uncorrelated individuals, ignoring the dependencies among them. Besides, they conduct the decoding for the two tasks independently, without leveraging the correlations between them. Therefore, in this paper, we first construct a Heterogeneous Label Graph (HLG) containing two kinds of topologies: (1) statistical dependencies based on labels' co-occurrence patterns and hierarchies in slot labels; (2) rich relations among the label nodes. Then we propose a novel model termed ReLa-Net. It can capture beneficial correlations among the labels from HLG. The label correlations are leveraged to enhance semantic-label interactions. Moreover, we also propose the label-aware inter-dependent decoding mechanism to further exploit the label correlations for decoding. Experiment results show that our ReLa-Net significantly outperforms previous models. Remarkably, ReLa-Net surpasses the previous best model by over 20\% in terms of overall accuracy on MixATIS dataset. 最近的联合多意图检测和槽填充模型采用标签嵌入来实现语义标签交互。然而，他们将所有标签和标签嵌入视为不相关的个​​体，忽略了它们之间的依赖关系。此外，他们独立地对这两个任务进行解码，没有利用它们之间的相关性。因此，在本文中，我们首先构建一个包含两种拓扑的异构标签图（HLG）：（1）基于标签共现模式和槽标签层次结构的统计依赖性； (2)丰富的标签节点之间的关系。然后我们提出了一种称为 ReLa-Net 的新颖模型。它可以捕获 HLG 标签之间的有益相关性。利用标签相关性来增强语义标签交互。此外，我们还提出了标签感知的相互依赖解码机制，以进一步利用标签相关性进行解码。实验结果表明，我们的 ReLa-Net 明显优于以前的模型。值得注意的是，ReLa-Net 在 MixATIS 数据集上的整体精度超过了之前的最佳模型 20% 以上。 本文提出一种联合多意图检测和槽位填充的模型ReLa-Net，通过利用标签拓扑结构和标签间关系提升性能。 Bowen Xing,Ivor W. Tsang cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Daniela Rato,Miguel Oliveira,Vítor Santos,Manuel Gomes,Angel Sappa
title: A sensor-to-pattern calibration framework for multi-modal industrial collaborative cells
title_zh: 用于多模式工业协作单元的传感器到模式校准框架
abstract: Collaborative robotic industrial cells are workspaces where robots collaborate with human operators. In this context, safety is paramount, and for that a complete perception of the space where the collaborative robot is inserted is necessary. To ensure this, collaborative cells are equipped with a large set of sensors of multiple modalities, covering the entire work volume. However, the fusion of information from all these sensors requires an accurate extrinsic calibration. The calibration of such complex systems is challenging, due to the number of sensors and modalities, and also due to the small overlapping fields of view between the sensors, which are positioned to capture different viewpoints of the cell. This paper proposes a sensor to pattern methodology that can calibrate a complex system such as a collaborative cell in a single optimization procedure. Our methodology can tackle RGB and Depth cameras, as well as LiDARs. Results show that our methodology is able to accurately calibrate a collaborative cell containing three RGB cameras, a depth camera and three 3D LiDARs.
summary: Collaborative robotic industrial cells are workspaces where robots collaborate with human operators. In this context, safety is paramount, and for that a complete perception of the space where the collaborative robot is inserted is necessary. To ensure this, collaborative cells are equipped with a large set of sensors of multiple modalities, covering the entire work volume. However, the fusion of information from all these sensors requires an accurate extrinsic calibration. The calibration of such complex systems is challenging, due to the number of sensors and modalities, and also due to the small overlapping fields of view between the sensors, which are positioned to capture different viewpoints of the cell. This paper proposes a sensor to pattern methodology that can calibrate a complex system such as a collaborative cell in a single optimization procedure. Our methodology can tackle RGB and Depth cameras, as well as LiDARs. Results show that our methodology is able to accurately calibrate a collaborative cell containing three RGB cameras, a depth camera and three 3D LiDARs.
abstract_zh: 协作机器人工业单元是机器人与人类操作员协作的工作空间。在这种情况下，安全至关重要，因此需要对协作机器人插入的空间进行完整的感知。为了确保这一点，协作单元配备了大量多种模式的传感器，覆盖整个工作空间。然而，来自所有这些传感器的信息融合需要精确的外部校准。由于传感器和模态的数量，以及传感器之间的小重叠视场（这些传感器被定位来捕获细胞的不同视点），这种复杂系统的校准具有挑战性。本文提出了一种传感器模式方法，可以在单个优化过程中校准复杂系统，例如协作单元。我们的方法可以处理 RGB 和深度相机以及 LiDAR。结果表明，我们的方法能够准确校准包含三个 RGB 摄像头、一个深度摄像头和三个 3D LiDAR 的协作单元。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于多模态工业协作单元的传感器到模式校准框架，以解决多传感器系统校准难题。
AI.motivation: 协作机器人工作空间需依赖多模态传感器融合实现环境感知，但现有方法难以应对传感器数量多、视场重叠少的复杂校准需求。
AI.method: 提出传感器到模式方法，通过单次优化流程同时校准RGB相机、深度相机和LiDAR等多种传感器。
AI.result: 成功校准包含三台RGB相机、一台深度相机和三台3D LiDAR的协作单元，验证方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为复杂多模态系统提供了高效校准方案，可提升工业协作场景的安全性与感知精度。

authors_text: Xuehai He,Diji Yang,Weixi Feng,Tsu-Jui Fu,Arjun Akula,Varun Jampani,Pradyumna Narayana,Sugato Basu,William Yang Wang,Xin Eric Wang
title: CPL: Counterfactual Prompt Learning for Vision and Language Models
title_zh: CPL：视觉和语言模型的反事实即时学习
abstract: Prompt tuning is a new few-shot transfer learning technique that only tunes the learnable prompt for pre-trained vision and language models such as CLIP. However, existing prompt tuning methods tend to learn spurious or entangled representations, which leads to poor generalization to unseen concepts. Towards non-spurious and efficient prompt learning from limited examples, this paper presents a novel \underline{\textbf{C}}ounterfactual \underline{\textbf{P}}rompt \underline{\textbf{L}}earning (CPL) method for vision and language models, which simultaneously employs counterfactual generation and contrastive learning in a joint optimization framework. Particularly, CPL constructs counterfactual by identifying minimal non-spurious feature change between semantically-similar positive and negative samples that causes concept change, and learns more generalizable prompt representation from both factual and counterfactual examples via contrastive learning. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CPL can obtain superior few-shot performance on different vision and language tasks than previous prompt tuning methods on CLIP. On image classification, we achieve 3.55\% average relative improvement on unseen classes across seven datasets; on image-text retrieval and visual question answering, we gain up to 4.09\% and 25.08\% relative improvements across three few-shot scenarios on unseen test sets respectively.
summary: Prompt tuning is a new few-shot transfer learning technique that only tunes the learnable prompt for pre-trained vision and language models such as CLIP. However, existing prompt tuning methods tend to learn spurious or entangled representations, which leads to poor generalization to unseen concepts. Towards non-spurious and efficient prompt learning from limited examples, this paper presents a novel \underline{\textbf{C}}ounterfactual \underline{\textbf{P}}rompt \underline{\textbf{L}}earning (CPL) method for vision and language models, which simultaneously employs counterfactual generation and contrastive learning in a joint optimization framework. Particularly, CPL constructs counterfactual by identifying minimal non-spurious feature change between semantically-similar positive and negative samples that causes concept change, and learns more generalizable prompt representation from both factual and counterfactual examples via contrastive learning. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CPL can obtain superior few-shot performance on different vision and language tasks than previous prompt tuning methods on CLIP. On image classification, we achieve 3.55\% average relative improvement on unseen classes across seven datasets; on image-text retrieval and visual question answering, we gain up to 4.09\% and 25.08\% relative improvements across three few-shot scenarios on unseen test sets respectively.
abstract_zh: 提示调整是一种新的小样本迁移学习技术，仅调整预先训练的视觉和语言模型（例如 CLIP）的可学习提示。然而，现有的提示调整方法往往会学习虚假或纠缠的表示，这导致对看不见的概念的泛化能力较差。为了从有限的例子中实现非虚假和高效的即时学习，本文提出了一种新颖的视觉和语言模型\underline{\textbf{C}}反事实\underline{\textbf{P}}rompt \underline{\textbf{L}}收益（CPL）方法，该方法在联合优化框架中同时采用反事实生成和对比学习。特别是，CPL 通过识别语义相似的正样本和负样本之间导致概念变化的最小非虚假特征变化来构建反事实，并通过对比学习从事实和反事实示例中学习更通用的提示表示。大量实验表明，与之前的 CLIP 提示调整方法相比，CPL 在不同的视觉和语言任务上能够获得优异的小样本性能。在图像分类方面，我们在七个数据集上未见过的类别上实现了 3.55% 的平均相对改进；在图像文本检索和视觉问答方面，我们在未见过的测试集上的三个小样本场景中分别获得了高达 4.09% 和 25.08% 的相对改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CPL的反事实提示学习方法，用于改进视觉与语言模型在少量样本下的提示调优效果。
AI.motivation: 现有提示调优方法易学习到虚假或纠缠的表示，导致对未见概念泛化能力差，需从有限样本中学习更鲁棒的非虚假提示表示。
AI.method: CPL通过构建反事实样本（识别语义相似正负样本间的最小非虚假特征变化）并结合对比学习，在联合优化框架中同时利用事实与反事实示例学习更通用的提示表示。
AI.result: 在CLIP模型上，CPL在7个数据集的图像分类任务中实现3.55%平均相对提升，在图像-文本检索和视觉问答任务中分别达到4.09%和25.08%的相对提升。
AI.conclusion: CPL通过反事实生成与对比学习的联合优化，有效提升了视觉语言模型在少量样本下的泛化能力，优于现有提示调优方法。

Particularly, CPL constructs counterfactual by identifying minimal non-spurious feature change between semantically-similar positive and negative samples that causes concept change, and learns more generalizable prompt representation from both factual and counterfactual examples via contrastive learning. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CPL can obtain superior few-shot performance on different vision and language tasks than previous prompt tuning methods on CLIP. On image classification, we achieve 3.55\% average relative improvement on unseen classes across seven datasets; on image-text retrieval and visual question answering, we gain up to 4.09\% and 25.08\% relative improvements across three few-shot scenarios on unseen test sets respectively. 提示调整是一种新的小样本迁移学习技术，仅调整预先训练的视觉和语言模型（例如 CLIP）的可学习提示。然而，现有的提示调整方法往往会学习虚假或纠缠的表示，这导致对看不见的概念的泛化能力较差。为了从有限的例子中实现非虚假和高效的即时学习，本文提出了一种新颖的视觉和语言模型\underline{\textbf{C}}反事实\underline{\textbf{P}}rompt \underline{\textbf{L}}收益（CPL）方法，该方法在联合优化框架中同时采用反事实生成和对比学习。特别是，CPL 通过识别语义相似的正样本和负样本之间导致概念变化的最小非虚假特征变化来构建反事实，并通过对比学习从事实和反事实示例中学习更通用的提示表示。大量实验表明，与之前的 CLIP 提示调整方法相比，CPL 在不同的视觉和语言任务上能够获得优异的小样本性能。在图像分类方面，我们在七个数据集上未见过的类别上实现了 3.55% 的平均相对改进；在图像文本检索和视觉问答方面，我们在未见过的测试集上的三个小样本场景中分别获得了高达 4.09% 和 25.08% 的相对改进。 本文提出了一种名为CPL的反事实提示学习方法，用于改进视觉与语言模型在少量样本下的提示调优效果。 Xuehai He,Diji Yang,Weixi Feng,Tsu-Jui Fu,Arjun Akula,Varun Jampani,Pradyumna Narayana,Sugato Basu,William Yang Wang,Xin Eric Wang cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Marco Huber,Philipp Terhörst,Florian Kirchbuchner,Naser Damer,Arjan Kuijper
title: Stating Comparison Score Uncertainty and Verification Decision Confidence Towards Transparent Face Recognition
title_zh: 陈述比较分数的不确定性和验证决策对透明人脸识别的信心
comment: Accepted at British Machine Vision Conference (BMVC) 2022
comments: Accepted at British Machine Vision Conference (BMVC) 2022
abstract: Face Recognition (FR) is increasingly used in critical verification decisions and thus, there is a need for assessing the trustworthiness of such decisions. The confidence of a decision is often based on the overall performance of the model or on the image quality. We propose to propagate model uncertainties to scores and decisions in an effort to increase the transparency of verification decisions. This work presents two contributions. First, we propose an approach to estimate the uncertainty of face comparison scores. Second, we introduce a confidence measure of the system's decision to provide insights into the verification decision. The suitability of the comparison scores uncertainties and the verification decision confidences have been experimentally proven on three face recognition models on two datasets.
summary: Face Recognition (FR) is increasingly used in critical verification decisions and thus, there is a need for assessing the trustworthiness of such decisions. The confidence of a decision is often based on the overall performance of the model or on the image quality. We propose to propagate model uncertainties to scores and decisions in an effort to increase the transparency of verification decisions. This work presents two contributions. First, we propose an approach to estimate the uncertainty of face comparison scores. Second, we introduce a confidence measure of the system's decision to provide insights into the verification decision. The suitability of the comparison scores uncertainties and the verification decision confidences have been experimentally proven on three face recognition models on two datasets.
abstract_zh: 人脸识别 (FR) 越来越多地用于关键验证决策，因此需要评估此类决策的可信度。决策的置信度通常基于模型的整体性能或图像质量。我们建议将模型不确定性传播到分数和决策中，以提高验证决策的透明度。这项工作有两个贡献。首先，我们提出了一种估计面部比较分数的不确定性的方法。其次，我们引入了系统决策的置信度度量，以提供对验证决策的深入了解。比较分数不确定性和验证决策置信度的适用性已在两个数据集上的三个人脸识别模型上得到实验证明。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过估计面部比较分数的不确定性及验证决策的置信度，提升面部识别验证决策的透明度。
AI.motivation: 面部识别技术广泛应用于关键验证场景，但现有决策置信度评估依赖模型整体性能或图像质量，缺乏对不确定性量化和决策透明度的深入分析。
AI.method: 提出两种方法：1）估计面部比较分数的不确定性；2）引入系统决策置信度度量，通过不确定性传播机制增强决策透明性。
AI.result: 在三个面部识别模型和两个数据集上实验验证，证明所提方法能有效量化比较分数不确定性并提升验证决策可信度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为构建透明、可信的面部识别系统提供了理论支持，有助于在实际应用中更合理地评估决策风险。

title: Temporal Action Segmentation: An Analysis of Modern Techniques
title_zh: 时间动作分割：现代技术分析
abstract: Temporal action segmentation (TAS) in videos aims at densely identifying video frames in minutes-long videos with multiple action classes. As a long-range video understanding task, researchers have developed an extended collection of methods and examined their performance using various benchmarks. Despite the rapid growth of TAS techniques in recent years, no systematic survey has been conducted in these sectors. This survey analyzes and summarizes the most significant contributions and trends. In particular, we first examine the task definition, common benchmarks, types of supervision, and prevalent evaluation measures. In addition, we systematically investigate two essential techniques of this topic, i.e., frame representation and temporal modeling, which have been studied extensively in the literature. We then conduct a thorough review of existing TAS works categorized by their levels of supervision and conclude our survey by identifying and emphasizing several research gaps. In addition, we have curated a list of TAS resources, which is available at https://github.com/nus-cvml/awesome-temporal-action-segmentation.
summary: Temporal action segmentation (TAS) in videos aims at densely identifying video frames in minutes-long videos with multiple action classes. As a long-range video understanding task, researchers have developed an extended collection of methods and examined their performance using various benchmarks. Despite the rapid growth of TAS techniques in recent years, no systematic survey has been conducted in these sectors. This survey analyzes and summarizes the most significant contributions and trends. In particular, we first examine the task definition, common benchmarks, types of supervision, and prevalent evaluation measures. In addition, we systematically investigate two essential techniques of this topic, i.e., frame representation and temporal modeling, which have been studied extensively in the literature. We then conduct a thorough review of existing TAS works categorized by their levels of supervision and conclude our survey by identifying and emphasizing several research gaps. In addition, we have curated a list of TAS resources, which is available at https://github.com/nus-cvml/awesome-temporal-action-segmentation.
abstract_zh: 视频中的时间动作分割（TAS）旨在密集识别具有多个动作类别的长达数分钟的视频中的视频帧。作为一项远程视频理解任务，研究人员开发了一系列扩展的方法，并使用各种基准测试了它们的性能。尽管近年来 TAS 技术发展迅速，但尚未对这些领域进行系统调查。这项调查分析并总结了最重要的贡献和趋势。特别是，我们首先检查任务定义、通用基准、监督类型和普遍的评估措施。此外，我们系统地研究了该主题的两种基本技术，即帧表示和时间建模，这在文献中已被广泛研究。然后，我们对现有的 TAS 工作（按其监督级别进行分类）进行彻底审查，并通过识别和强调几个研究差距来结束我们的调查。此外，我们还整理了一份 TAS 资源列表，可从 https://github.com/nus-cvml/awesome-temporal-action-segmentation 获取。

AI.tldr: 该论文对视频中时间动作分割（TAS）的现代技术进行了系统性综述，分析了任务定义、基准、监督类型及评估指标，并总结了研究趋势与不足。
AI.motivation: 尽管TAS技术发展迅速，但缺乏对现有方法的系统性总结和趋势分析，本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 通过分析任务定义、常见基准、监督类型及评估指标，系统研究帧表示与时间建模两大核心技术，并按监督级别分类综述现有工作，最后指出研究缺口。
AI.result: 总结了TAS领域的重要贡献与趋势，整理了资源清单（如GitHub仓库），并明确了当前研究的不足方向。
AI.conclusion: 本文为TAS研究提供了全面的分析框架，强调了未来需关注的监督机制优化、跨模态融合等方向，并公开了资源以促进领域发展。

title: Using deep convolutional neural networks to classify poisonous and edible mushrooms found in China
title_zh: 使用深度卷积神经网络对中国发现的有毒蘑菇和食用蘑菇进行分类
abstract: Because of their abundance of amino acids, polysaccharides, and many other nutrients that benefit human beings, mushrooms are deservedly popular as dietary cuisine both worldwide and in China. However, if people eat poisonous fungi by mistake, they may suffer from nausea, vomiting, mental disorder, acute anemia, or even death. Each year in China, there are around 8000 people became sick, and 70 died as a result of eating toxic mushrooms by mistake. It is counted that there are thousands of kinds of mushrooms among which only around 900 types are edible, thus without specialized knowledge, the probability of eating toxic mushrooms by mistake is very high. Most people deem that the only characteristic of poisonous mushrooms is a bright colour, however, some kinds of them do not correspond to this trait. In order to prevent people from eating these poisonous mushrooms, we propose to use deep learning methods to indicate whether a mushroom is toxic through analyzing hundreds of edible and toxic mushrooms smartphone pictures. We crowdsource a mushroom image dataset that contains 250 images of poisonous mushrooms and 200 images of edible mushrooms. The Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) is a specialized type of artificial neural networks that use a mathematical operation called convolution in place of general matrix multiplication in at least one of their layers, which can generate a relatively precise result by analyzing a huge amount of images, and thus is very suitable for our research. The experimental results demonstrate that the proposed model has high credibility and can provide a decision-making basis for the selection of edible fungi, so as to reduce the morbidity and mortality caused by eating poisonous mushrooms. We also open source our hand collected mushroom image dataset so that peer researchers can also deploy their own model to advance poisonous mushroom identification.
summary: Because of their abundance of amino acids, polysaccharides, and many other nutrients that benefit human beings, mushrooms are deservedly popular as dietary cuisine both worldwide and in China. However, if people eat poisonous fungi by mistake, they may suffer from nausea, vomiting, mental disorder, acute anemia, or even death. Each year in China, there are around 8000 people became sick, and 70 died as a result of eating toxic mushrooms by mistake. It is counted that there are thousands of kinds of mushrooms among which only around 900 types are edible, thus without specialized knowledge, the probability of eating toxic mushrooms by mistake is very high. Most people deem that the only characteristic of poisonous mushrooms is a bright colour, however, some kinds of them do not correspond to this trait. In order to prevent people from eating these poisonous mushrooms, we propose to use deep learning methods to indicate whether a mushroom is toxic through analyzing hundreds of edible and toxic mushrooms smartphone pictures. We crowdsource a mushroom image dataset that contains 250 images of poisonous mushrooms and 200 images of edible mushrooms. The Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) is a specialized type of artificial neural networks that use a mathematical operation called convolution in place of general matrix multiplication in at least one of their layers, which can generate a relatively precise result by analyzing a huge amount of images, and thus is very suitable for our research. The experimental results demonstrate that the proposed model has high credibility and can provide a decision-making basis for the selection of edible fungi, so as to reduce the morbidity and mortality caused by eating poisonous mushrooms. We also open source our hand collected mushroom image dataset so that peer researchers can also deploy their own model to advance poisonous mushroom identification.
abstract_zh: 由于蘑菇含有丰富的氨基酸、多糖和许多其他有益于人类的营养物质，蘑菇在世界各地和中国当之无愧地成为受欢迎的饮食佳肴。但如果误食有毒真菌，可能会出现恶心、呕吐、精神错乱、急性贫血，甚至死亡。中国每年约有8000人因误食有毒蘑菇而患病，70人死亡。据统计，蘑菇有上千种，可食用的只有900多种左右，如果没有专业知识，误食有毒蘑菇的概率很大。大多数人认为毒蘑菇的唯一特征是颜色鲜艳，然而，有些种类的毒蘑菇并不符合这一特征。为了防止人们误食这些有毒蘑菇，我们建议使用深度学习方法，通过分析数百张可食用和有毒蘑菇的智能手机图片来表明蘑菇是否有毒。我们众包了一个蘑菇图像数据集，其中包含 250 张有毒蘑菇图像和 200 张食用蘑菇图像。卷积神经网络（CNN）是一种特殊类型的人工神经网络，它在至少一个层中使用称为卷积的数学运算代替一般的矩阵乘法，可以通过分析大量图像生成相对精确的结果，因此非常适合我们的研究。实验结果表明，该模型可信度较高，可为食用菌的选择提供决策依据，从而降低因误食毒蘑菇而造成的发病率和死亡率。我们还开源了我们手工收集的蘑菇图像数据集，以便同行研究人员也可以部署他们自己的模型来推进有毒蘑菇的识别。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用深度卷积神经网络（CNN）对在中国发现的有毒和可食用蘑菇进行分类，以减少误食有毒蘑菇的风险。
AI.motivation: 由于误食有毒蘑菇可能导致严重健康问题甚至死亡，而普通民众难以准确区分有毒与可食用蘑菇，因此需要一种可靠的识别方法。
AI.method: 通过众包收集包含250张有毒蘑菇和200张可食用蘑菇图像的数据集，利用卷积神经网络（CNN）进行图像分析和分类。
AI.result: 实验表明该模型具有高可信度，能够为食用菌选择提供决策依据，有效降低误食有毒蘑菇导致的发病率和死亡率。
AI.conclusion: 该模型可作为有毒蘑菇识别的有效工具，同时开放数据集有助于推动相关研究的进一步发展。

search_text: Using deep convolutional neural networks to classify poisonous and edible mushrooms found in China 使用深度卷积神经网络对中国发现的有毒蘑菇和食用蘑菇进行分类 Because of their abundance of amino acids, polysaccharides, and many other nutrients that benefit human beings, mushrooms are deservedly popular as dietary cuisine both worldwide and in China. However, if people eat poisonous fungi by mistake, they may suffer from nausea, vomiting, mental disorder, acute anemia, or even death. Each year in China, there are around 8000 people became sick, and 70 died as a result of eating toxic mushrooms by mistake. It is counted that there are thousands of kinds of mushrooms among which only around 900 types are edible, thus without specialized knowledge, the probability of eating toxic mushrooms by mistake is very high. Most people deem that the only characteristic of poisonous mushrooms is a bright colour, however, some kinds of them do not correspond to this trait. In order to prevent people from eating these poisonous mushrooms, we propose to use deep learning methods to indicate whether a mushroom is toxic through analyzing hundreds of edible and toxic mushrooms smartphone pictures. We crowdsource a mushroom image dataset that contains 250 images of poisonous mushrooms and 200 images of edible mushrooms. The Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) is a specialized type of artificial neural networks that use a mathematical operation called convolution in place of general matrix multiplication in at least one of their layers, which can generate a relatively precise result by analyzing a huge amount of images, and thus is very suitable for our research. The experimental results demonstrate that the proposed model has high credibility and can provide a decision-making basis for the selection of edible fungi, so as to reduce the morbidity and mortality caused by eating poisonous mushrooms. We also open source our hand collected mushroom image dataset so that peer researchers can also deploy their own model to advance poisonous mushroom identification. 由于蘑菇含有丰富的氨基酸、多糖和许多其他有益于人类的营养物质，蘑菇在世界各地和中国当之无愧地成为受欢迎的饮食佳肴。但如果误食有毒真菌，可能会出现恶心、呕吐、精神错乱、急性贫血，甚至死亡。中国每年约有8000人因误食有毒蘑菇而患病，70人死亡。据统计，蘑菇有上千种，可食用的只有900多种左右，如果没有专业知识，误食有毒蘑菇的概率很大。大多数人认为毒蘑菇的唯一特征是颜色鲜艳，然而，有些种类的毒蘑菇并不符合这一特征。为了防止人们误食这些有毒蘑菇，我们建议使用深度学习方法，通过分析数百张可食用和有毒蘑菇的智能手机图片来表明蘑菇是否有毒。我们众包了一个蘑菇图像数据集，其中包含 250 张有毒蘑菇图像和 200 张食用蘑菇图像。卷积神经网络（CNN）是一种特殊类型的人工神经网络，它在至少一个层中使用称为卷积的数学运算代替一般的矩阵乘法，可以通过分析大量图像生成相对精确的结果，因此非常适合我们的研究。实验结果表明，该模型可信度较高，可为食用菌的选择提供决策依据，从而降低因误食毒蘑菇而造成的发病率和死亡率。我们还开源了我们手工收集的蘑菇图像数据集，以便同行研究人员也可以部署他们自己的模型来推进有毒蘑菇的识别。 本文提出使用深度卷积神经网络（CNN）对在中国发现的有毒和可食用蘑菇进行分类，以减少误食有毒蘑菇的风险。 Baiming Zhang,Ying Zhao,Zhixiang Li cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Botao Yu,Peiling Lu,Rui Wang,Wei Hu,Xu Tan,Wei Ye,Shikun Zhang,Tao Qin,Tie-Yan Liu
title: Museformer: Transformer with Fine- and Coarse-Grained Attention for Music Generation
title_zh: Museformer：针对音乐生成具有细粒度和粗粒度关注的 Transformer
comment: Accepted by the Thirty-sixth Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022)
comments: Accepted by the Thirty-sixth Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022)
abstract: Symbolic music generation aims to generate music scores automatically. A recent trend is to use Transformer or its variants in music generation, which is, however, suboptimal, because the full attention cannot efficiently model the typically long music sequences (e.g., over 10,000 tokens), and the existing models have shortcomings in generating musical repetition structures. In this paper, we propose Museformer, a Transformer with a novel fine- and coarse-grained attention for music generation. Specifically, with the fine-grained attention, a token of a specific bar directly attends to all the tokens of the bars that are most relevant to music structures (e.g., the previous 1st, 2nd, 4th and 8th bars, selected via similarity statistics); with the coarse-grained attention, a token only attends to the summarization of the other bars rather than each token of them so as to reduce the computational cost. The advantages are two-fold. First, it can capture both music structure-related correlations via the fine-grained attention, and other contextual information via the coarse-grained attention. Second, it is efficient and can model over 3X longer music sequences compared to its full-attention counterpart. Both objective and subjective experimental results demonstrate its ability to generate long music sequences with high quality and better structures.
summary: Symbolic music generation aims to generate music scores automatically. A recent trend is to use Transformer or its variants in music generation, which is, however, suboptimal, because the full attention cannot efficiently model the typically long music sequences (e.g., over 10,000 tokens), and the existing models have shortcomings in generating musical repetition structures. In this paper, we propose Museformer, a Transformer with a novel fine- and coarse-grained attention for music generation. Specifically, with the fine-grained attention, a token of a specific bar directly attends to all the tokens of the bars that are most relevant to music structures (e.g., the previous 1st, 2nd, 4th and 8th bars, selected via similarity statistics); with the coarse-grained attention, a token only attends to the summarization of the other bars rather than each token of them so as to reduce the computational cost. The advantages are two-fold. First, it can capture both music structure-related correlations via the fine-grained attention, and other contextual information via the coarse-grained attention. Second, it is efficient and can model over 3X longer music sequences compared to its full-attention counterpart. Both objective and subjective experimental results demonstrate its ability to generate long music sequences with high quality and better structures.
abstract_zh: 符号音乐生成旨在自动生成乐谱。最近的趋势是在音乐生成中使用 Transformer 或其变体，但这并不是最理想的，因为充分的注意力无法有效地对典型的长音乐序列（例如超过 10,000 个标记）进行建模，并且现有模型在生成音乐重复结构方面存在缺陷。在本文中，我们提出了 Museformer，一种对音乐生成具有新颖的细粒度和粗粒度关注的 Transformer。具体来说，通过细粒度的注意力，特定小节的标记直接关注与音乐结构最相关的小节的所有标记（例如，通过相似性统计选择的先前的第1、第2、第4和第8小节）；通过粗粒度的注意力，一个令牌只关注其他条的汇总，而不是它们的每个令牌，以减少计算成本。优点有两个。首先，它可以通过细粒度的注意力捕获与音乐结构相关的相关性，并通过粗粒度的注意力捕获其他上下文信息。其次，它非常高效，与全注意力对应的音乐序列相比，它可以对长度超过 3 倍的音乐序列进行建模。客观和主观实验结果都证明了其生成具有高质量和更好结构的长音乐序列的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Museformer模型，通过细粒度和粗粒度注意力机制解决音乐生成中长序列建模和结构重复问题。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer模型在处理长音乐序列（如10,000+ tokens）时效率低下，且难以生成符合音乐结构的重复模式。
AI.method: 设计细粒度注意力（聚焦关键小节相关性）与粗粒度注意力（汇总其他小节信息），兼顾结构关联性与计算效率。
AI.result: 实验表明模型可生成3倍于全注意力模型的长序列，且在客观指标和主观评价中均展现更高质量与结构。
AI.conclusion: Museformer通过双粒度注意力机制有效平衡了长序列建模与音乐结构生成，为符号音乐创作提供新方法。

authors_text: Xuming Hu,Yong Jiang,Aiwei Liu,Zhongqiang Huang,Pengjun Xie,Fei Huang,Lijie Wen,Philip S. Yu
title: Entity-to-Text based Data Augmentation for various Named Entity Recognition Tasks
title_zh: 用于各种命名实体识别任务的基于实体到文本的数据增强
comment: Accepted to ACL 2023 (Findings), Long Paper, 14 pages
comments: Accepted to ACL 2023 (Findings), Long Paper, 14 pages
abstract: Data augmentation techniques have been used to alleviate the problem of scarce labeled data in various NER tasks (flat, nested, and discontinuous NER tasks). Existing augmentation techniques either manipulate the words in the original text that break the semantic coherence of the text, or exploit generative models that ignore preserving entities in the original text, which impedes the use of augmentation techniques on nested and discontinuous NER tasks. In this work, we propose a novel Entity-to-Text based data augmentation technique named EnTDA to add, delete, replace or swap entities in the entity list of the original texts, and adopt these augmented entity lists to generate semantically coherent and entity preserving texts for various NER tasks. Furthermore, we introduce a diversity beam search to increase the diversity during the text generation process. Experiments on thirteen NER datasets across three tasks (flat, nested, and discontinuous NER tasks) and two settings (full data and low resource settings) show that EnTDA could bring more performance improvements compared to the baseline augmentation techniques.
summary: Data augmentation techniques have been used to alleviate the problem of scarce labeled data in various NER tasks (flat, nested, and discontinuous NER tasks). Existing augmentation techniques either manipulate the words in the original text that break the semantic coherence of the text, or exploit generative models that ignore preserving entities in the original text, which impedes the use of augmentation techniques on nested and discontinuous NER tasks. In this work, we propose a novel Entity-to-Text based data augmentation technique named EnTDA to add, delete, replace or swap entities in the entity list of the original texts, and adopt these augmented entity lists to generate semantically coherent and entity preserving texts for various NER tasks. Furthermore, we introduce a diversity beam search to increase the diversity during the text generation process. Experiments on thirteen NER datasets across three tasks (flat, nested, and discontinuous NER tasks) and two settings (full data and low resource settings) show that EnTDA could bring more performance improvements compared to the baseline augmentation techniques.
abstract_zh: 数据增强技术已被用来缓解各种 NER 任务（平面、嵌套和不连续的 NER 任务）中标记数据稀缺的问题。现有的增强技术要么操纵原始文本中的单词，破坏文本的语义连贯性，要么利用生成模型忽略保留原始文本中的实体，这阻碍了在嵌套和不连续的 NER 任务上使用增强技术。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种名为 EnTDA 的新型基于实体到文本的数据增强技术，用于在原始文本的实体列表中添加、删除、替换或交换实体，并采用这些增强的实体列表为各种 NER 任务生成语义连贯和实体保留的文本。此外，我们引入了多样性波束搜索来增加文本生成过程中的多样性。在三个任务（平坦、嵌套和不连续的 NER 任务）和两种设置（完整数据和低资源设置）的 13 个 NER 数据集上进行的实验表明，与基线增强技术相比，EnTDA 可以带来更多的性能改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于实体到文本的数据增强方法EnTDA，用于改进各种命名实体识别任务中的数据稀缺问题。
AI.motivation: 现有数据增强技术要么破坏文本语义连贯性，要么忽略保留原始实体，难以有效应用于嵌套和不连续NER任务。
AI.method: 通过增删替换实体列表中的实体生成新实体列表，并采用多样性束搜索生成语义连贯且保留实体的文本。
AI.result: 在13个NER数据集的三种任务和两种设置下，EnTDA相比基线方法表现出更优的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: EnTDA通过实体列表操作和多样性生成策略，有效解决了复杂NER任务的数据增强难题，提升了模型性能。
